entries.description: Spawns a Locust to attack down the nearest lane every 15 seconds. Locusts last for 16 seconds, have 350 Health and deal 46 damage with each Basic Attack. Locusts deal 25% bonus damage to enemy Structures. Locust
entries.name: Locust Strain

undoc.notes: Damage bonus to Structures stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Locusts' Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Spawn and attach a Symbiote to a target ally or Structure. While active, Abathur controls the Symbiote, gaining access to new Abilities. The Symbiote is able to gain XP from nearby enemy deaths.
entries.name: Symbiote

undoc.notes: Allied and enemy Symbiote hosts display a crown icon above their portraits on the Minimap. Symbiote will be paused if the allied target enters a Stasis effect. Symbiote can still be canceled in these situations, but no Symbiote Abilities can be used.

entries.description: Shoots a spike toward target area that deals 119 damage to the first enemy it contacts.
entries.name: Symbiote - Stab

undoc.notes: Starts with 2 charges.

entries.description: Deals 120 damage to nearby enemies.
entries.name: Symbiote - Spike Burst

entries.description: Shields the assisted ally for 150. Allied Heroes are healed for 22 Health per second while the Shield is active. Lasts for 6 seconds.
entries.name: Symbiote - Carapace

undoc.notes: Healing ends immediately if Shield is destroyed.

entries.description: Spawn a mine that becomes active after a short time. Deals 153 damage and reveals the enemy for 4 seconds. Lasts 90 seconds. Toxic Nest Toxic Nest Explosion
entries.name: Toxic Nest

undoc.notes: Toxic Nests align with the map grid, i.e. each 1 x 1 square can hold only 1 Toxic Nest. / After the arming period Toxic Nest becomes invisible, grants vision around it and is capable of exploding. Invulnerable targets do not affect any Toxic Nests they walk over.

entries.description: Clone target allied Hero and control it for 20 seconds. Abathur has perfected the clone, granting it 20% Spell Power, 20% bonus Attack Damage, and 10% bonus Movement Speed. Cannot use their Heroic Ability. {{undoc-x|type=Summon |affects=Allied Heroes |target=Unit target |props=Channeled cast (stationary), Stasis |cast=1 + 0.0625 seconds |range=Global |notes= Interrupting the Ability puts it on a 10 second cooldown. The target of Ultimate Evolution must be a real Hero
entries.name: Ultimate Evolution

entries.description: Turn an allied Minion or Locust into a Monstrosity. When enemy Minions near the Monstrosity die, it gains 2% Health and 2% Basic Attack damage, stacking up to 40 times. The Monstrosity can be healed by Carapace and has the ability to Burrow to a visible location every 80 seconds. Using Symbiote on the Monstrosity allows Abathur to control it, in addition to Symbiote's normal benefits. This Ability can be reactivated to automatically cast Symbiote on his Monstrosity. Monstrosity
entries.name: Evolve Monstrosity

undoc.notes: Cooldown starts when the Monstrosity is destroyed. / Monstrosity can use Deep Tunnel on an 80 second cooldown. This cooldown is separate from Abathur's. Monstrosity can heal in the Hall of Storms. Damage bonus from Minion kills stacks additively with itself and multiplicatively with offensive damage modifiers that can affect Monstrosity 's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Quickly tunnel to a visible location.
entries.name: Deep Tunnel

undoc.notes: Deep Tunnel can be canceled by issuing a "move" or "stop" command. Deep Tunnel goes on a 10 second cooldown when interrupted by enemy or allied Abilities, including self-canceling. Deep Tunnel has an allied chat announcement upon activation.

entries.description: Increases the range of Symbiote's Spike Burst by 25% and decreases the cooldown by 1 second.
entries.name: Pressurized Glands

entries.description: Toxic Nests deal 75% more damage over 3 seconds and reduce the Armor of enemy Heroes hit by 10 for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Envenomed Nest

undoc.notes: Damage-over-time from multiple Toxic Nests does not stack.

entries.description: Increase the Shield amount of Carapace by 40%.
entries.name: Reinforced Carapace

entries.description: Increases Locust's Health by 100% and damage by 60%.
entries.name: Survival Instincts

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers.

entries.description: Heroic Symbiote hosts gain 25% increased Attack Speed.
entries.name: Adrenal Overload

undoc.notes: Does not affect current Symbiote target when Talent is taken. Symbiote must be canceled and re-applied to grant the buff. Attack Speed bonus stacks additively with other effects that can affect the target's Attack Speed.

entries.description: Increases the damage and range of Symbiote's Stab by 20%.
entries.name: Needlespine

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Stab 's damage.

entries.description: Increase the duration of Toxic Nests by 45 seconds, reduce its cooldown by 2 seconds and add 2 additional charges.
entries.name: Prolific Dispersal

entries.description: Toxic Nests Slow enemy Movement Speed by 40% for 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Vile Nest

entries.description: Using Symbiote's Carapace also applies an untalented Carapace Shield to all nearby allied Heroes, Minions, and Mercenaries.
entries.name: Networked Carapace

undoc.notes: 1) Extended by the target's unit radius. Increases Hivemind 's Carapace by half of Carapace 's normal Shield value.

entries.description: Activate to calldown a MULE that repairs Structures, one at a time, near target point for 40 seconds, healing for 90 Health every 1 second. MULE Repair
entries.name: Calldown: MULE

undoc.notes: Calldown: MULE can only be cast in visible area.
undoc.prop1: Summon delay / Health / Healing per tick

entries.description: Clone target allied Hero and control it for 20 seconds. Abathur has perfected the clone, granting it 20% Spell Power, 20% bonus Attack Damage, and 10% bonus Movement Speed. Cannot use their Heroic Ability.
entries.name: Ultimate Evolution

entries.description: Turn an allied Minion or Locust into a Monstrosity. When enemy Minions near the Monstrosity die, it gains 2% Health and 2% Basic Attack damage, stacking up to 40 times. The Monstrosity can be healed by Carapace and has the ability to Burrow to a visible location every 80 seconds. Using Symbiote on the Monstrosity allows Abathur to control it, in addition to Symbiote's normal benefits. This Ability can be reactivated to automatically cast Symbiote on his Monstrosity.
entries.name: Evolve Monstrosity

entries.description: Symbiote's Stab gains 1 additional charge and its Cooldown is reduced by 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Spatial Efficiency

entries.description: Symbiote's Spike Burst heals the host for 64 Health per enemy Hero hit.
entries.name: Soma Transference

entries.description: Locust's Basic Attacks become a long-range siege attack and their duration is increased by 75%.
entries.name: Bombard Strain

undoc.notes: Bombard Strain attacks can be dodged, similarly to Catapults' and Siege Giants' attacks, i.e. they can be dodged, although no preview is shown. Against targets within 3 range, fires a projectile that cannot be dodged (except by being disjointed).

entries.description: Abathur's Symbiote's Spike Burst also Slows enemy Movement Speed by 40% for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Envenomed Spikes

entries.description: Symbiote's Carapace increases the Movement Speed of the target by 40% for 3.5 seconds.
entries.name: Adrenaline Boost

entries.description: Ultimate Evolution clones and Monstrosities deal 137 damage to nearby enemies every 3 seconds and when they die. Enemy Heroes hit heal the clone or the Monstrosity for 100% of the damage dealt.
entries.name: Volatile Mutation

undoc.notes: Damage from Volatile Mutation does not benefit from Ultimate Evolution clone's damage bonus.

entries.description: Activate to spawn 3 Locusts at a nearby location.
entries.name: Locust Brood

entries.description: Increase the duration of Ultimate Evolution by 50%. As long as the Ultimate Evolution is alive, the original target of the clone gains a Shield equal to 35% of their maximum Health. Refreshes every 5 seconds.
entries.name: Evolutionary Link

undoc.notes: Shield from Evolutionary Link does not stack with itself. If an Ultimate Evolution Clone expires or dies while the target of Ultimate Evolution (the real Hero) is flagged as Immune to AOE, then that Hero will also receive Shields from Evolutionary Link while Ultimate Evolution is active on any other target.

entries.description: Increase Monstrosity's Basic Attack damage by 100%.
entries.name: Evolution Complete

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Monstrosity 's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Symbiote creates an additional Symbiote on a nearby allied Hero. This Symbiote mimics the commands of the first, but does half damage and Shielding.
entries.name: Hivemind

undoc.notes: Hivemind 's abilities have their own base values that are half the original.

entries.description: Activate to create a nest that periodically spawns Locusts. Only one Locust Nest can be active at a time. Locust Nest
entries.name: Locust Nest

entries.description: Alarak's Ability damage and self-healing are increased by 100% against enemy Heroes.
entries.name: Sadism (Trait)

undoc.notes: Benefits all flat Spell Damage and healing instances and bonuses from Alarak's Basic and Heroic Abilities and Talents. Spell Damage and healing from other sources will not be amplified. Sadism stacks additively with itself and other damage modifiers affecting Alarak's Ability damage. Sadism stacks additively with healing modifiers that increase healing dealt and multiplicatively with modifiers that affect healing received.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier, Healing dealt modifier

entries.description: After a 0.5 second delay, enemies in front of Alarak take 165 damage and are silenced for 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Discord Strike

entries.description: Create a force, pushing Alarak and all enemies hit from the targeted point towards the targeted direction. Deals 48 damage to enemies.
entries.name: Telekinesis

undoc.notes: Alarak does not get Dazed when using Telekinesis on himself. Self-casting sets the starting point at Alarak's location and pushes him (and nearby enemies) to the direction he is facing.
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Crowd control

entries.description: Deal 62 damage to an enemy and an additional 100% damage to enemies between Alarak and the target. Restore 75 Health for each Hero hit.
entries.name: Lightning Surge

undoc.notes: The primary target of the cast is unaffected by any center bonuses. Healing is unaffected by center bonuses. The center bonus stacks additively with Sadism and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Lightning Surge 's damage.

entries.description: After channeling, Alarak charges forward dealing 200 damage to all enemies in his path. Distance is increased based on the amount of time channeled, up to 1.5 seconds. Issuing a Move order while this is channeling will cancel it at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.
entries.name: Deadly Charge

undoc.notes: Interrupting the channel in any way does not put the Ability on cooldown. Mana cost is not consumed until the Ability has been fully cast, but can't be initiated if Alarak has insufficient Mana. Range increases by 0.6354 for every 0.0625 seconds channeled. Ability can be channeled indefinitely, but distance will no longer increase after reaching maximum distance at the 1.5 second mark.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Clamping, [[Channeled Ability#Weak Channel

entries.description: Alarak targets an area and channels for 1 second, becoming Protected and Unstoppable. Afterward, if he took damage from an enemy Hero, he sends a shockwave that deals 275 damage.
entries.name: Counter-Strike

undoc.notes: Hitscan is done in 3 ticks over 0.1825 seconds, ranging from 0 to 6 on the first, 6 to 9 on the second and 9 to 13 on the third tick. Taking damage in the final tick of the channel only activates the sound, but not the damage, of the Ability. Incoming Basic Attacks still trigger the Ability, despite missing due to Evasion granted by Protected status.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Clamping, Protected, Stationary channel, Unstoppable

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Discord Strike grants 40% Attack Speed and causes Basic Attacks to heal for 15% of the damage dealt, increased by 50% of Sadism's bonus when hitting Heroes. These effects last for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Overwhelming Power

entries.description: Reduce the Mana cost of Telekinesis from 30 to 20. Telekinesis's cooldown recharges 100% faster while above 80% Health.
entries.name: Ruthless Momentum

entries.description: Reduce Sadism by 10%.
entries.name: Extended Lightning

entries.description: Increase the Lightning Surge damage bonus to enemies between Alarak and his victim to 175%.
entries.name: Negatively Charged

undoc.notes: Quest reward stacks additively with center damage bonus and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Lightning Surge 's damage.

entries.description: Heroes hit with 3 of Alarak's Abilities within 2 seconds take an additional 61 damage and increase Sadism by 2%, stacking up to 20%. Sadism gained from Show of Force is lost on death.
entries.name: Show of Force

entries.description: Increase Discord Strike's Silence duration by 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Dissonance

entries.description: Telekinesis Slows enemies by 30% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Hindered Motion

entries.description: Reduce Sadism by 10%, but Telekinesis pushes 15% farther and has 15% increased range.
entries.name: Applied Force

entries.description: After channeling, Alarak charges forward, dealing 200 damage to all enemies in his path. Distance is increased based on the amount of time channeled, up to 1.5 seconds. Issuing a Move order while this is channeling will cancel it at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.
entries.name: Deadly Charge

entries.description: Alarak targets an area and channels for 1 second, becoming Protected and Unstoppable. Afterward, if he took damage from an enemy Hero, he sends a shockwave that deals 275 damage.
entries.name: Counter-Strike

entries.description: Basic Attacks against Heroes increase Sadism by 2%, up to 40%. Sadism gained from Blade of the Highlord is lost on death.
entries.name: Blade of the Highlord

entries.description: Increase Sadism by 10% any time an allied Hero dies, up to 40%. Sadism gained from Pure Malice is lost on death.
entries.name: Pure Malice

entries.description: Activate to mark an enemy Hero for 300 seconds. Hitting the marked Hero with Discord Strike increases Sadism by 3%. Killing the marked Hero increases Sadism by 5% and lowers the cooldown of Rite of Rak'Shir to 10 seconds. Sadism gained from Rite of Rak'Shir is lost on death.
entries.name: Rite of Rak'Shir

undoc.notes: Debuff is only removed when the mark expires or the target dies.

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Discord Strike grants 50% of Sadism's damage bonus to Alarak's Basic Attacks for 4 seconds. Basic Attacks against Heroes refresh this duration.
entries.name: Lethal Onslaught

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Alarak's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with the center of Lightning Surge allows it to be cast again for free on a different primary target within the next 3 seconds. This free cast cannot benefit from Lightning Barrage.
entries.name: Lightning Barrage

undoc.notes: Second cast interacts with all other talents affecting Lightning Surge.

entries.description: Basic Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Alarak's Basic Abilities by 1.5 seconds. This bonus is doubled against enemy Heroes who are Stunned, Silenced, Slowed or Rooted.
entries.name: Mocking Strikes

entries.description: If Deadly Charge was the selected Heroic, Heroes hit by Deadly Strike take bonus damage from Alarak's Abilities equal to 75% of Sadism's bonus damage for 4 seconds. If Counter-Strike was the selected Heroic, it's cooldown is reduced by 2.5 seconds for each enemy Hero hit by Alarak's Basic Abilities.
entries.name: Wrath of the Highlord

entries.description: Alarak gains access to both of his Heroic Abilities. This can be activated to change which Ability occupies the Heroic slot, with the other ability using the Trait slot.
entries.name: Might of the Highlord

entries.description: Activate to teleport to the chosen location and remove all Roots, Slows, and damage over time effects. If Alarak fails to hit enemy Heroes 3 times with Basic Abilities within 4 seconds of using Last Laugh, his Health is reduced to 1.
entries.name: Last Laugh

undoc.notes: Hit requirement is the sum of all Heroic targets hit, with any of his Basic Ablities, within the time limit. Health reduction ignores all damage reduction and prevention effects.

entries.description: Activate to permanently reduce Alarak's Sadism by 4% and reset the cooldowns of his Basic Abilities.
entries.name: Hasty Bargain

undoc.notes: Hasty Bargain cannot be used if Alarak doesn't have enough Sadism. Alarak's innate Sadism is consumed first. If there is not enough innate Sadism, Hasty Bargain can consume Sadism gained from Takedowns and Talents.

entries.description: After 1.25 seconds, transform into a dragon and gain 500 Health. While Dragonqueen is active, Alexstrasza's Basic Abilities are empowered, her Basic Attacks deal 143 damage and heal allied Heroes for 43 in an arc in front of her, and the duration of incoming Slows, Roots, and Stuns is reduced by 50%. Lasts 15 seconds.
entries.name: Dragonqueen

undoc.notes: Interrupting Dragonqueen during its cast puts it on a 10-second cooldown. Dragonqueen grants Alexstrasza a different set of Basic Abilities, which have independent cooldowns and are unaffected by Alexstrasza's Talents that interact with her base form Basic Abilities. When the Ability is successfully cast, and upon ending and transformation back to base form, Alexstrasza enters Stasis for 0.5 seconds. In addition to usual effects of Stasis, Alexstrasza is removed from the ground plane (disjoints certain projectiles), has no collision, cannot regenerate Health, Mana, Energy or Shields and cannot be seen on the minimap or revealed. Both current and maximum Health are increased upon successful transformation. When the Ability expires, only maximum Health is reduced back to normal. Dragonqueen's cooldown starts when the Ability is successfully cast.
undoc.props: Attack Modifier, Channeled cast (stationary), CC-reduction, Splash, Stasis
undoc.type: Transformation, Status effect / Physical Damage / Healing

entries.description: Sacrifice 15% of Alexstrasza's current Health, healing an ally for 150% of that amount. Alextraza's Health regeneration is increased by 150% Cooldown greatly reduced and does not cost Health.
entries.name: Gift of Life

undoc.notes: Passive Health regeneration bonus also affects Alexstrasza in her dragon form. Passive bonus directly increases Alexstrasza's base Health regeneration, meaning that calculations using the given percentage should be made multiplicatively with any modifiers affecting her Health regeneration.

entries.description: Heal an Ally for 20% of Alexstrasza's current Health.
entries.name: Breath of Life

entries.description: Plant a seed of healing that blooms after 3 seconds, healing nearby allied Heroes for 20% of their maximum Health. Heal area and amount greatly increased.
entries.name: Abundance

undoc.notes: Target area is visible to enemies.

entries.description: Plant a seed of healing that blooms after 3 seconds, healing nearby allied Heroes for 30% of their maximum Health.
entries.name: Preservation

undoc.notes: Target area is visible to enemies.

entries.description: Launch a fireball, Burning enemies hit for 75 damage over 5.5 seconds. Hitting enemies that are already Burning deals 125 bonus damage upon impact, Slows them by 40% decaying over 2 seconds, and refunds the Mana cost. Damage and Knockback enemies in an arc.
entries.name: Flame Buffet

undoc.props: Clamping, Damage over Time, Piercing Skillshot, Slow

entries.description: Deal 162 damage to enemies in an area, knocking them back and Slowing them by 50% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Wing Buffet

undoc.notes: The area starts at 3 radius and grows to its maximum radius over 0.3125 seconds.

entries.description: Bind Alexstrasa's life force with an allied Hero. Both she and her target are healed for 480 over 2 seconds. Afterward, the Hero with a lower percentage of health is set to the same Health percentage as the other Hero.
entries.name: Life-Binder

undoc.notes: Life-Binder immediately ends, going on full cooldown, if either of the two linked Heroes dies, becomes Time Stopped, enters a Vehicle or hostile Stasis or otherwise becomes untargetable by friendly Abilities. The heal resolves normally if the target ally enters a friendly Stasis effect, like Ice-Block or Bunker. However, the Ability still ends if Alexstrasza herself enters Stasis through means other than her Dragonqueen transformation.

entries.description: After 1.25 seconds, take to the sky and drop fireballs at the position of your mouse cursor every 1.2 seconds for 6 seconds. Each fireball restores 300 Health to nearby allied Heroes, and deals 135 damage to nearby enemies. 2 seconds after dropping all fireballs, Alexstrasza lands at the position of your mouse cursor.
entries.name: Cleansing Flame

undoc.notes: Interrupting Cleansing Flame during its cast period puts it on a 10-second cooldown. Cleansing Flame 's cooldown starts when the Ability is successfully cast. For the duration of the Ability, Alexstrasza is put in Stasis. In addition to the usual effects of Stasis, Alexstrasza is removed from the ground plane (disjoints certain projectiles), has no collision, cannot regenerate Health, Mana, Energy or Shields and cannot be seen on the minimap or revealed. Dragonqueen 's duration is paused during Cleansing Flame but its cooldowns are not.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Channeled cast (stationary), Stasis

entries.description: While Alexstrasza is above 75% Health, Gift of Life's cooldown recharges 125% faster.
entries.name: Live and Let Live

undoc.notes: Healing bonus affects the base value, causing it to stack multiplicatively with healing modifiers.

entries.description: Reduce the Mana cost of Flame Buffet from 50 to 40.
entries.name: Flames of Fury

entries.description: Abundance's healing burst grants allied Heroes 30% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Surge of Vitality

entries.description: Increase Flame Buffet's initial Slow from 40% to 50% and cause it to no longer decay.
entries.name: Heat Exhaustion

entries.description: While above 75% Health, gain 15% Movement Speed.
entries.name: Exuberance

entries.description: While Alexstrasza is above 75% Health, Gift of Life creates a Lifeblossom at the target's location. Alexstrasza can collect the Lifeblossom to make her next Gift of Life cost no Health. Reduces the cost of Gift of Life to 10% of Alexstrasza's current Health.
entries.name: Lifeblossom

undoc.notes: Lifeblossom remains on the ground for 7 seconds.

entries.description: Alexstrasza receives 40% more healing from Abundance and 100% more healing from Regeneration Globes.
entries.name: Verdant Flourish

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other modifiers affecting healing dealt and multiplicatively with modifiers affecting healing received.

entries.description: Hitting a Burning Hero with Flame Buffet heals Alexstrasza for 10% of her maximum Health.
entries.name: Fire Within

entries.description: Bind Alexstrasa's life force with an allied Hero. Both she and her target are healed for 480 over 2 seconds. Afterward, the Hero with a lower percentage of health is set to the same Health percentage as the other Hero.
entries.name: Life-Binder

entries.description: After 1.25 seconds, take to the sky and drop 5 fireballs over 6 seconds at the position of the mouse cursor. Fireballs deal 135 damage to enemies and heal allied Heroes for 300 Health. 2 seconds after dropping all fireballs, Alexstrasza lands at the position of the mouse cursor.
entries.name: Cleansing Flame

entries.description: Gain 50 Armor while Stunned, Silenced, or Rooted, and for 2 seconds afterward. Can only trigger once every 10 seconds.
entries.name: Dragon Scales

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Activate to Slow and reduce an enemy Hero's damage by 50% for 3 seconds. Healing a Stunned, Silenced, or Rooted ally reduces Pacify's cooldown by 30 seconds.
entries.name: Pacify

undoc.notes: Damage reduction stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting the target Hero's damage output.

entries.description: Activate to heal an allied Hero for 15% of their maximum Health and deal 200 damage to nearby enemies. Healing a Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced ally reduces Life Unbound's cooldown by 30 seconds. Cannot be used on Alexstrasza.
entries.name: Life Unbound

entries.description: Gift of Life grants its target 10 Armor for 2.5 seconds, increased to 30 while Alexstrasza is above 75% Health.
entries.name: Tough Love

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Heroes healed by Abundance gain a Shield for 6 seconds equal to 70% of the amount healed.
entries.name: Overprotective

undoc.notes: Shield amount is calculated from final amount healed after all modifications. Healing over a target's maximum Health does not count toward this amount.

entries.description: Increase Dragonqueen's duration by 6 seconds, and Basic Attack healing by 50%.
entries.name: Draconic Discipline

entries.description: Life-Binder activates 3 times over 6 seconds.
entries.name: Ritual of Life

entries.description: Healing or damaging Heroes 8 or more times with Cleansing Flame activates Dragonqueen for 15 seconds upon landing.
entries.name: On Ruby Wings

undoc.notes: Alextrasza lands in the Dragon form upon triggering this talent. If Alextrasza triggers this talent having used Cleansing Flame in Dragon form, the duration of Dragonqueen is prolonged by 15 seconds.

entries.description: While Dragonqueen is active, Alexstrasza's Basic Attacks apply Flame Buffet.
entries.name: Ancient Flame

undoc.notes: The Flame Buffet applied by this talent interacts with all talents affecting Flame Buffet.

entries.description: Activate to grant an allied Hero 500 bonus maximum Health until they die. Cannot be used on Alexstrasza, or on a Hero who already has Blessing of the Red.
entries.name: Blessing of the Red

entries.description: While moving, Cassia gradually gains up to 30 Armor over 3 seconds. After remaining stationary for 0.75 seconds the Armor is rapidly lost over 0.5 seconds. Avoidance remains charged while Fending.
entries.name: Avoidance

undoc.notes: Grants one stack of Avoidance every 0.0625 seconds, increasing Cassia's Armor by 0.625. While stationary, Cassia loses 6 stacks every 0.0625 seconds. Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Hurl a lightning javelin that deals 158 damage to the first enemy hit and splits into two lightning bolts that deal 158 damage to enemies in their path.
entries.name: Lightning Fury

undoc.notes: Holds 2 charges. Secondary projectiles do not split and can hit enemies that are immune to skillshots. Otherwise, they have the same on-hit properties as the initial missile and interact with all talents affecting Lightning Fury. Primary target cannot be hit by the splitting secondary bolts.

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, deal 50 damage and Blind enemies in the target area for 2 seconds. Cassia deals 15% increased damage to Blinded targets.
entries.name: Blinding Light

undoc.notes: Passive bonus triggers from all Blinds. Passive bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Cassia's Basic Attack damage.
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Status effect / Offensive damage modifier

entries.description: Charge at an enemy, and upon arriving channel for 1.5 seconds, dealing 64 damage to enemies in front of Cassia every 0.25 seconds. Deals 50% reduced damage to non-Heroes. Avoidance remains charged while Channeling.
entries.name: Fend

undoc.notes: Structures cannot be directly targeted, but can take area damage from Fend. Fend is interrupted if the target moves farther than 12 range from Cassia. Fend 's channel can be canceled after 0.5 seconds by reactivating the ability. Damage penalty against non-Heroes stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Fend 's damage.

entries.description: Throw a ball of lightning at an enemy Hero that bounces up to 6 times between nearby enemy Heroes and Cassia, dealing 180 damage to enemies hit.
entries.name: Ball Lightning

undoc.notes: Initial cast is interrupted if the target moves more than 3 units beyond its maximum range. Prioritizes the closest enemy Hero and only bounces back to Cassia if there are no enemy Heroes in its bounce range. Ball Lightning going through Cassia consumes a bounce normally. Cannot bounce to enemies out of vision. Ball Lightning grants vision in 4.0 radius around the projectile.

entries.description: Summon a Valkyrie that rushes to Cassia after 0.75 seconds, pulling the first enemy Hero hit, dealing 225 damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds at the end of her path. The Valkyrie knocks back all other enemy Heroes in her way.
entries.name: Valkyrie

undoc.notes: Damage is dealt upon impact, and the Stun is applied when the impaled enemy Hero reaches the cast location. The impaled enemy is Unstoppable while being pulled by Valkyrie. Secondary targets are knocked away perpendicular to Valkyrie 's direction.

entries.description: Increase the damage of Lightning Fury by 20.
entries.name: Thunderstroke

entries.description: Increase Fend's cast range and area of effect by 25%. It deals an additional 70% damage to enemies below 50% Health.
entries.name: Impale

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Fend 's damage.

entries.description: Gain 15% Attack Speed. Every 3rd Basic Attack deals 20% bonus damage and bounces to nearby enemy Heroes.
entries.name: Charged Strikes

undoc.notes: Bounce radius is extended by the target's unit radius. Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Cassia's Basic Attack damage. Still progresses through the 3-hit cycle if Cassia is Blinded or the target is Evading, though the 3rd hit bonus will also miss entirely in that case.

entries.description: Regenerate 6 Health per second while Avoidance is active. If fully charged gain an additional 12 Health per second.
entries.name: Plate of the Whale

entries.description: Basic Attacks against your primary target heal you for 20% of their damage. If an enemy is Blinded, this also affects Lightning Fury and Fend.
entries.name: Ring of the Leech

entries.description: Activate to heal for 25% of your maximum Health over 5 seconds. Enemy Heroes hit by Lightning Fury lower the cooldown of this ability by 10 seconds.
entries.name: Inner Light

entries.description: Enemies hit by Lightning Fury or Fend are Slowed by 20% for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Grounding Rod

entries.description: Primary Basic Attacks against an enemy Hero grant 10 Mana and reduce the cooldown of Blinding Light by 2 seconds. Increase the passive damage bonus of Blinding Light from 15% to 30%.
entries.name: Seraph's Hymn

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other damage modifiers affecting Cassia's Basic Attack damage output, including baseline bonus damage against Blinded targets.

entries.description: After taking 650 damage with Avoidance active, Cassia can activate Avoidance to deal 220 damage to enemies around her.
entries.name: Surge of Light

entries.description: Throw a ball of lightning at an enemy Hero that bounces up to 6 times between nearby enemy Heroes and Cassia, dealing 180 damage to enemies hit.
entries.name: Ball Lightning

entries.description: Summon a Valkyrie that rushes to Cassia after 0.75 seconds, pulling the first enemy Hero hit, dealing 225 damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds at the end of her path. The Valkyrie knocks back all other enemy Heroes in her way.
entries.name: Valkyrie

entries.description: Cassia becomes Protected while channeling Fend and for 1 additional second if the channel is completed.
entries.name: War Matron

entries.description: Gain 5% Movement Speed. While Avoidance is fully charged, gain an additional 10% Movement Speed and Mounting is instant.
entries.name: War Traveler

entries.description: Gain 1 Basic Attack range. While Avoidance is fully charged, gain an additional 1 Basic Attack range.
entries.name: Gloves of Alacrity

entries.description: Lightning Fury pierces, but only splits on Heroes. Enemy Heroes hit reduce its cooldown by 1 second and become marked for 15 seconds. Upon reaching 3 marks, remove the marks and cast a Blinding Light at their feet.
entries.name: Power Strike

undoc.notes: Reapplying a mark refreshes its duration.

entries.description: Gain 2 additional charges of Lightning Fury. Fend's impact launches a lightning bolt toward each nearby enemy Hero.
entries.name: Static Electricity

undoc.notes: "Lightning bolts" have the same properties as secondary projectiles from Lightning Fury.

entries.description: Basic attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 1% of their maximum Health. Increase this to 3% if they are Stunned, Rooted, Slowed, or Blinded.
entries.name: Martial Law

entries.description: Ball Lightning can now bounce indefinitely. Every bounce reduces its cooldown by 4 seconds.
entries.name: Infinite Lightning

entries.description: The impaled Hero is Blinded for 5 seconds. Upon impaling a Hero, Cassia's Valkyrie creates a wave of light that deals 200 damage to nearby enemies. The wave Silences and Roots them for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Imprisoning Light

undoc.notes: Blind is applied when the target arrives at the end location. The pull target takes the additional damage upon impact as well, but is not affected by the Root and Silence effects.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Blind, Root, Silence

entries.description: Cassia's Basic Attacks now ignore Armor and while Avoidance is fully charged they deal an additional 20% bonus damage.
entries.name: Titan's Revenge

undoc.notes: Titan's Revenge empowered Basic Attacks only ignore positive Armor. Bonus damage stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Cassia's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Activate to fully charge Avoidance and increase its Armor value to 60 for 4 seconds Losing Avoidance removes this bonus.
entries.name: Rockstopper

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifires may stack.

entries.description: Basic Attacks apply a Dose to enemies, dealing 40 damage over 5 seconds plus additional damage equal to the current number of stacks on the target, stacking up to 5 times. Every 0.5 seconds, Ana is healed for 60% of the damage dealt by Shrike. Aim Down Sights Activating Shrike reduces your Movement Speed by 25%, but increases the range of Healing Dart and Sleep Dart by 25% while also allowing them to pierce one Hero. Lasts until canceled.
entries.name: Shrike

undoc.notes: Applies a tick of damage per new stack value on-hit, and refreshes the duration of existing stacks. Hence, actually does 44 damage over 5 seconds rather than the listed 40. Self-healing from Shrike behaves like lifesteal, but can be affected by healing dealt modifiers, including Biotic Grenade 's healing bonus. A distinctive sound effect plays when an enemy reaches the maximum of 5 stacks. / Movement Speed reduction behaves like a Slow, but does not interact with effects that interact with Slows nor get removed by effects that grant crowd control immunity.
undoc.prop1: Damage per tick / Bonus Healing Dart range

entries.description: Fire a dart which heals the first allied Hero hit for 195 Health. Does not affect full Health Heroes.
entries.name: Healing Dart

entries.description: Toss a Grenade at the target area. Allied Heroes hit are healed for 152 Health and receive 25% increased healing from Ana for 4 seconds. Enemies hit take 60 damage and receive 100% less healing for 1.75 seconds. If Biotic Grenade does not hit any enemies, reduce its cooldown by 3 seconds, and if Ana is the only target hit, reduce its cooldown by an additional 2 seconds.
entries.name: Biotic Grenade

undoc.notes: Healing modifiers are applied after damage and healing are dealt. Enemy healing reduction stacks additively with healing modifiers that affect healing received by the target. Ally healing bonus stacks additively with healing modifiers affecting healing dealt by Ana and multiplicatively with healing received modifiers on the target.
undoc.type: Spell damage, Healing received modifier / Healing / Healing dealt modifier

entries.description: Fire a dart that puts the first enemy Hero hit to Sleep, Stunning them for 3 seconds. Sleep's effects end instantly if the target takes damage after the first 0.5 seconds. Cannot be used on Vehicles.
entries.name: Sleep Dart

undoc.notes: Sleep counts as a Stun effect and interacts with all effects that interact with Stuns. Damage over time effects applied beforehand do not interrupt Sleep.

entries.description: Instantly boost an allied Hero, restoring 200 Mana. For the next 8 seconds, they gain 30% Spell Power and their Basic Ability cooldowns recharge 150% faster.
entries.name: Nano Boost

undoc.notes: Spell Power stacks additively with other sources of Spell Power and other damage and healing modifiers affecting the target hero's Spell Damage or healing output. Stacks additively with other effects that affect cooldown rerfresh rate.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier, Healing dealt modifier, Mana

entries.description: Assume a sniping position, gaining the ability to fire up to 6 specialized rounds with unlimited range. Rounds pierce allied and enemy Heroes but collide with enemy Structures in their path. Allies are healed for 225 and enemies are damaged for 135. Deals 50% less damage to Structures. Ana is unable to move while Eye of Horus is active.
entries.name: Eye of Horus

undoc.notes: Eye of Horus can be canceled after 0.5 seconds through the 'W' or 'E' key. If Eye of Horus is canceled or interrupted before any shots are fired, it will not be put on cooldown. Ana cannot move, Mount, Hearth or use other abilities while channeling Eye of Horus. Channel can last indefinitely and will only end if interrupted, manually canceled or once all shots have been fired.

entries.description: Fire a specialized round with unlimited range, piercing all allied and enemy Heroes in its path. Allies are healed for 225 and enemies are damaged for 135. Deals 50% less damage to Structures.
entries.name: Eye of Horus - High Powered Round
entries.normalizedName: eye of horus high powered round

undoc.notes: Can be activated using the 'Q', 'R' or left mouse button during Eye of Horus. Using High Powered Round briefly provides vision around the line of fire and upon hitting around the targets.

entries.description: Hitting Heroes with Biotic Grenade increases its damage and healing by 30% Hero hit.
entries.name: Contact Healing

undoc.notes: Gains bonuses from both allied and enemy Heroes hit. Stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Biotic Grenade 's damage. Stacks additively with itself and other healing dealt modifiers that can affect Biotic Grenade 's healing.

entries.description: Reduce the cooldown of Sleep Dart by 2 seconds. Upon waking, enemy Heroes are Slowed by 25% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Slumber Shells

entries.description: Increase Shrike's healing by 15%
entries.name: Vampiric Rounds

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself and baseline healing from Shrike.

entries.description: Increase the bonus healing duration of Biotic Grenade by 50% and reduce its cooldown by 3 seconds.
entries.name: Biotic Enhancements

entries.description: Sleep Dart applies 4 Doses. While Aim Down Sights is active, Sleep Dart pierces all enemy Heroes.
entries.name: Overdose

entries.description: Activate to fire a dart which Slows the Movement Speed and reduces the damage dealt by the first enemy Hero it hits by 50% for 4 seconds. If no Heroes are hit reduce this cooldown by 8 seconds.
entries.name: Debilitating Dart

undoc.notes: Damage reduction stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting the target hero's damage output.

entries.description: Increase the area of Biotic Grenade by 25% and the duration of the healing reduction by 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Anti-Healer

undoc.notes: 25% increase in radius, therefore actually a 56% increase in area.

entries.description: Gain 25% Movement Speed for 2 seconds for every Hero hit by Sleep Dart. Upon waking, enemy Heroes take 8% of their maximum Health in damage.
entries.name: Night Terrors

undoc.notes: Speed bonus amount does not stack, only duration does.

entries.description: Every Dose a Hero has reduces their Spell Power by 10%.
entries.name: Mind-Numbing Agent

undoc.notes: Spell Power stacks additively with itself, other sources of Spell Power and other damage and healing modifiers affecting the target hero's Spell Damage or healing output.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier, Healing dealt modifier

entries.description: Instantly boost an allied Hero, restoring 200 Mana. For the next 8 seconds, they gain 30% Spell Power and their Basic Ability cooldowns recharge 150% faster.
entries.name: Nano Boost

entries.description: Assume a sniping position, gaining the ability to fire up to 6 specialized rounds with unlimited range. Rounds pierce allied and enemy Heroes but collide with enemy Structures in their path. Allies are healed for 225 and enemies are damaged for 135. Deals 50% less damage to Structures. Ana is unable to move while Eye of Horus is active.
entries.name: Eye of Horus

entries.description: Healing Dart grants 25% Movement Speed to affected Heroes for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Speed Serum

entries.description: Healing Dart removes Roots and Slows from the target, and heals for 20% more when doing so.
entries.name: Purifying Darts

undoc.notes: Healing bonus stacks additively with other healing dealt modifiers that can affect Healing Dart 's healing.

entries.description: Healing Dart removes Stuns from the target, and grants them 50 Armor for 2 seconds when doing so.
entries.name: Smelling Salts

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Healing Dart's healing is increased by 5% if it heals a Hero, up to 50%. At maximum bonus, further increase its healing by 35%. This bonus is reset if Healing Dart fails to hit a Hero.
entries.name: Sharpshooter

undoc.notes: If Aim Down Sights is active, only the first Hero healed by each Healing Dart grants a stack. If Healing Dart passes through at least one allied Hero, no stacks will be lost even if they are at full Health. For a stack to be gained it must actually heal at least one Hero, however. Healing bonus stacks additively with itself and other healing dealt modifiers that can affect Healing Dart 's healing.

entries.description: Increase Healing Dart's healing by 12% for each Dose active on enemy Heroes.
entries.name: Concentrated Doses

undoc.notes: Healing bonus stacks additively with itself and other healing dealt modifiers that can affect Healing Dart 's healing.

entries.description: Activate to instantly gain 3 charges of Healing Dart.
entries.name: Active Reload

undoc.notes: Cannot hold more than 3 charges at any time. Activating Active Reload instantly refreshes the cooldown of Healing Dart. Charges last indefinitely, but cooldown doesn't start until all charges have been consumed.

entries.description: Allies affected by Nano Boost heal for 50% of Spell Damage dealt.
entries.name: Nano Infusion

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other sources of lifesteal.

entries.description: Eye of Horus's cooldown is reduced to 6 seconds, but it only regains charges every 10 seconds. Remaining cooldown is converted to rounds. For every Hero Eye of Horus hits, increase its healing and damage by 5%. This bonus resets after leaving Eye of Horus or after 4 seconds.
entries.name: Deadeye

undoc.notes: Both damage and healing share the same bonus value. Bonus updates after all damage and healing for the shot has been dealt, and only affects the following shots. Stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers and healing dealt modifiers that can affect Eye of Horus 's damage or healing.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier, Healing dealt modifier

entries.description: Increase Shrike's damage by 50%. While Aim Down Sights is active, gain 25 Armor.
entries.name: Armored Stance

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Shrike 's damage. Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier / Defensive damage modifier

entries.description: Basic Attacks increase Attack Speed by 10% for 3 seconds, up to 100%. While Aim Down Sights is active, increase your Basic Attack Range by 4.
entries.name: Dynamic Optics

entries.description: Faith instantly pulls an allied Hero to Anduin's location, granting them Unstoppable while they travel. Pursued By Grace Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes heal the lowest Health allied Hero near Anduin for 32.
entries.name: Leap of Faith

undoc.notes: Pulled allied Heroes are Dazed for 0.125 seconds, interrupting stationary channeled abilities, dashes and launches. If the pulled ally gets Time Stopped, they will continue to be pulled to the cast location of Leap of Faith once the debuff expires.

entries.description: Cast for 0.75 seconds to heal an allied Hero for 280.
entries.name: Flash Heal

undoc.notes: Flash Heal does not go on cooldown if it is interrupted during its cast time. Cast is interrupted if target ally moves more than 4.5 units past Flash Heal 's cast range. Anduin can cancel the cast by issuing a 'stop' or 'move' command.

entries.description: Send light that deals 140 damage to enemies and then returns to Anduin, healing allied Heroes for 130 in a wider path. Healing increases by 25% per enemy Hero hit.
entries.name: Divine Star

undoc.notes: Allies can be hit by the returning missile of Divine Star multiple times within the same cast as long as there is at least 1.5 seconds between the hits. If Anduin dies or teleports (e.g. using a portal), Divine Star returns to Anduin's location before the event.

entries.description: Shove a swell of light forward, dealing 175 damage to the first enemy Hero hit and Rooting them for 1.25 seconds.
entries.name: Chastise

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, channel to invoke the Light for 3 seconds. While nearby, allied Heroes heal for up to 30% of their max Health and are Protected.
entries.name: Holy Word: Salvation

undoc.notes: Interrupting the Ability during its windup puts it on a 10-second cooldown. Anduin can reactivate the ability after 0.5 seconds to end its effect early.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Channeled cast (stationary), Stationary channel, Protected
undoc.tickrate: - Ally search: 16.0 per second (x48) - Protected: 8.0 per second (x24) - Healing: 4.0 per second (x12)

entries.description: Imbue an allied Hero with the Light. After 1.5 seconds, it explodes, dealing 150 damage to enemies and Stunning them for 1.25 seconds. The target gains a Shield that absorbs 165 damage per enemy Hero hit. Lasts for 5 seconds.
entries.name: Lightbomb

undoc.notes: Lightbomb is canceled and put on full cooldown if the Hero carrying it dies before it triggers. If the Hero carrying Lightbomb is put in Stasis or removed from the battleground it will go off at their tracked location. Lightbomb 's timer is paused if the Hero carrying it is put in Time Stop.

entries.description: If Flash Heal is cast on a different target from its last, increase its healing by 15% and refund 40% of its cooldown.
entries.name: Evenhanded Blessings

undoc.notes: Bonus stacks additively with other healing dealt modifiers that can affect Flash Heal and multiplicatively with modifiers that affect healing received by the target.

entries.description: While Divine Star is traveling out, allies in its path gain a Shield that absorbs 128 damage over 4 seconds. If Divine Star hits an enemy Hero, Anduin gains a Shield that absorbs 185 damage for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Power Word: Shield

undoc.notes: Multiple hits do not grant more Shields. Shields do not stack with themselves.

entries.description: Summon a Lightwell that periodically heals a nearby allied Hero for 50. The well only fades after healing 15 times or when recast. This cooldown is reduced by 1 second each time Anduin heals an allied Hero.
entries.name: Lightwell

undoc.notes: Lightwell 's healing cannot target the same ally more frequently than once every 0.875 seconds. Lightwell 's cooldown reduction also triggers from self-healing, including healing from Regeneration Globes and Healing Fountains.

entries.description: Divine Star fires Basic Attacks at Heroes close to its apex. Increase Attack Range by 1.1.
entries.name: Moral Compass

undoc.notes: Moral Compass interacts with all Talents affecting Anduin's Basic Attacks. Moral Compass Basic Attacks will miss if Anduin is Blinded or if the target is Evading.

entries.description: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Chastise by 0.75 seconds. Basic Attacks against Heroes Rooted by Chastise launch an additional Basic Attack and restore 25 Mana.
entries.name: Surge of Light

undoc.notes: The additional Basic Attack is fired at the Rooted target. The additional Basic Attack has the same properties as Anduin's regular Basic Attack.

entries.description: Chastise pierces to hit an additional Hero.
entries.name: Piercing Light

undoc.notes: Spell Power from Piercing Light stacks additively with itself and other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage modifiers and healing dealt modifiers affecting Anduin.
undoc.type: Healing dealt modifier, Offensive damage modifier

entries.description: Casting Flash Heal on an ally heals Anduin for 135.
entries.name: Binding Heal

undoc.notes: This heal does not benefit from Talents affecting Flash Heal.

entries.description: If Anduin loses more than 8% of his maximum Health at once, recover 15% Health over 3 seconds. This effect has a 10 second cooldown. Current Health required: 133
entries.name: Blessed Recovery

entries.description: Activate to instantly heal an allied Hero for 375, but kneel for 2 seconds, unable to act.
entries.name: Desperate Prayer

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, channel to invoke the Light for 3 seconds. While nearby, allied Heroes heal for up to 30% of their max Health and are Protected.
entries.name: Holy Word: Salvation

entries.description: Imbue an allied Hero with the Light. After 1.5 seconds, it explodes, dealing 150 damage to enemies and Stunning them for 1.25 seconds. The target gains a Shield that absorbs 165 damage per enemy Hero hit. Lasts for 5 seconds.
entries.name: Lightbomb

entries.description: While Divine Star is traveling, gain 30% Movement Speed. Each allied Hero healed by Divine Star on its return to Anduin reduces its cooldown by 1 second.
entries.name: Speed of the Pious

undoc.notes: Anduin himself does not trigger the cooldown reduction.

entries.description: Damaging an enemy Hero increases Movement Speed by 2.5% and the amount healed by Pursued by Grace by 5% for 6 seconds. These effects stack up to 8 times.
entries.name: Push Forward!

undoc.notes: Healing bonus stacks additively with other healing dealt modifiers that can affect Pursued by Grace.

entries.description: Gain 5% Movement Speed. This bonus is quadrupled while Leap of Faith's cooldown is available. Allies pulled by Leap of Faith are healed for 280 over 4 seconds.
entries.name: Enchanted Boots - Lion's Speed

undoc.notes: Heal over time is applied upon cast.

entries.description: Flash Heal heals for an additional 180 over 6 seconds. The duration of this heal is refreshed each time Anduin hits an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack.
entries.name: Renew

entries.description: After Anduin catches Divine Star, it explodes, healing nearby allied Heroes for 105 and damaging enemies for 150.
entries.name: Holy Nova

entries.description: Leap of Faith gains a 2nd charge.
entries.name: Glyph of Faith

entries.description: Activate to reset the cooldown of Flash Heal and cause its next cast to heal for 25% more. Damaging enemy Heroes reduces this cooldown by 1 second.
entries.name: Inner Focus

undoc.notes: Inner Focus 's cooldown starts immediately upon activation. Inner Focus cannot be activated again until the current buff is triggered by casting Flash Heal. Activating Inner Focus does not dismount. Bonus stacks additively with healing dealt modifiers that can affect Flash Heal and multiplicatively with modifiers that affect healing received by the target.

entries.description: Holy Word: Salvation grants allies Invulnerability instead of Protected. This does not affect Anduin. Channeling Holy Word: Salvation for its full duration reduces its cooldown by 60 seconds.
entries.name: Light of Stormwind

entries.description: The target of Lightbomb gains 40% Movement Speed and 50 Armor for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Inner Fire

undoc.notes: Bonuses are applied immediately upon cast. Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Chastise Stuns for 0.75 seconds and its Root duration is increased by 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Censure

undoc.notes: Stun is applied in addition to Root for the first 0.75 seconds of the duration.

entries.description: Basic Attacks burn enemies for 87 damage over 3 seconds and Anduin heals for 50% of the damage dealt.
entries.name: Varian's Legacy

undoc.notes: The burn DoT does not activate Pursued by Grace.

entries.description: Using an Ability spawns a Beetle which lasts for 8 seconds, attacking nearby enemies for 20 damage. Beetle
entries.name: Scarab Host

undoc.notes: Beetles spawn randomly in one of eight possible locations around Anub'arak. If Anub'arak is attacking an enemy when a Beetle is spawned, the Beetle will also attempt to attack that target. If Anub'arak is not attacking anything when a Beetle is spawned, the Beetle will attempt to find a nearby target to attack. If an enemy Hero is close enough it will be prioritized. Beetles will then attack and pursue a target found this way until that enemy dies, or the Beetles lose track of the target (through teleporting away, for example). Only then will the Beetles return to a lane.

entries.description: Deals 90 damage. Stuns for 1 second.
entries.name: Impale

entries.description: Gain a Shield that grants 40 Spell Armor and absorbs 340 damage over 3 seconds.
entries.name: Harden Carapace

undoc.notes: Damage is dealt to shield after modifications. Spell Armor ends immediately if the shield breaks. Does not stack with other positive Spell Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Burrow to the target location, dealing 91 damage and briefly Stunning enemies in a small area upon surfacing, Slowing them by 25% for 2.5 seconds. Burrow Charge can be reactivated to surface early.
entries.name: Burrow Charge

undoc.notes: Burrow Charge grants Anub'arak Unstoppable for its duration. However, like other [[Movement Ability
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Clamping, Slow, Stun, Unstoppable
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Movement: Launch, Status effect

entries.description: Deal 68 damage per second to nearby enemies. Each enemy damaged restores 24 Health. Lasts 6 seconds.
entries.name: Locust Swarm

entries.description: Wraps target enemy Hero in a cocoon, rendering them unable to act or be targeted for 7 seconds. Allies of the Hero can attack the cocoon to break it and free them early. Cocoon
entries.name: Cocoon

undoc.notes: The cast is interrupted if the target moves farther than 4.5 units beyond the Ability's cast range during the windup. Cocoon missile can only be disjointed if the target dies, is removed from the plane (certain Stasis effects) or instantly teleports farther than 30 units from its previous location. When disjointed, the missile expires upon reaching the target's location before the event. Otherwise, the missile will keep redirecting to the target unit. Enemies inside the Cocoon are put in debuff Stasis, preventing interaction with them until they are freed. / 1) Coccoon degenerates its Health over time, effectively giving it a 7 second duration. Cocoon only takes 2 damage for every instance of damage dealt, effectively reducing its remaining duration by 0.5 seconds. Minions, Structures and friendly Mercenaries do not attack the cocoon.

entries.description: Increase Hardened Carapace's Spell Armor by 25.
entries.name: Nerubian Armor

entries.description: Beetles have 30 Spell Armor. Automatically spawn a Beetle every 12 seconds. Can be toggled on and off.
entries.name: Legion of Beetles

undoc.notes: Beetles do not spawn when Anub'arak is Mounted.
Bonus Health gained from completing Regeneration Master does not benefit effects granting Health based on percentage of maximum Health.

entries.description: Create a bed of spikes along Impale's path that Slows enemies by 25% and deals 21 damage per second. Spikes persist for 3.5 seconds.
entries.name: Bed of Barbs

entries.description: Hardened Carapace grants 30% increased Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Shed Exoskeleton

entries.description: Increases Burrow Charge range by 20% and damage by 100%.
entries.name: Underking

undoc.notes: Range increase is actually 16%, not 20%. Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Burrow Charge 's damage.

entries.description: While Harden Carapace is active, taking damage from enemy Abilities reduces its cooldown by 1 seconds, up to 3 seconds.
entries.name: Chitinous Plating

entries.description: Burrow Charge also grants a 400 point Shield for 5 seconds.
entries.name: Subterranean Shield

entries.description: Beetles gain 30% bonus attack damage and they heal Anub'arak for 50% of their damage with each attack if he is nearby.
entries.name: Leeching Scarabs

undoc.notes: Actually heals for a fixed amount, 50% of the Beetle s' Basic Attack damage, regardless of how much damage is actually done. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Beetles' attack damage.

entries.description: Deal 68 damage per second to nearby enemies. Each enemy damaged restores 24 Health. Lasts 6 seconds.
entries.name: Locust Swarm

entries.description: Wraps target enemy Hero in a cocoon, rendering them unable to act or be targeted for 7 seconds. Allies of the Hero can attack the cocoon to break it and free them early.
entries.name: Cocoon

entries.description: Casting Harden Carapace will also deal 90 damage to nearby enemies. Deals double damage against Heroes.
entries.name: Urticating Spines

entries.description: Deal 21 damage per second to nearby enemies. Beetles deal 6 damage per second to nearby enemies.
entries.name: Burning Beetles

undoc.notes: Burning Beetles is inactive while Mounted. Burning Beetles does not affect unaggroed neutral Mercenaries. Damaging enemy Heroes with Burning Beetles does not trigger tower aggro. Damage from Burning Beetles is affected by offensive damage modifiers, unlike other Heroes' Burning Rage effects. Damage from multiple auras stacks.

entries.description: Attacking a Hero who is Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned increases Anub'arak's Basic Attack damage by 80% for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Acid Drenched Mandibles

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Anub'arak's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Increases Burrow Charge impact area by 60% and lowers the cooldown by 1 second for each Hero hit.
entries.name: Epicenter

undoc.notes: 60% increase in radius, so actually a 156% increase in impact area.

entries.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Burrow Charge or Impale have their Spell Power reduced by 50% for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Debilitation

undoc.notes: Debilitation does not stack with itself. Subsequent applications refresh the duration. Spell Power debuff from Debilitation stacks additively with other sources of Spell Power and other offensive damage and healing modifiers affecting target Heroes' Spell Damage or healing output.

entries.description: Beetles gain 30% increased Health. Every 4th Basic Attack spawns a Beetle.
entries.name: Beetle, Juiced

undoc.notes: The counter is reset 3 seconds after the last successful Basic Attack.

entries.description: Gain a permanent Vampire Locust that attacks a nearby enemy every 3 seconds. The Vampire Locust deals 165 damage and returns to heal you for 80 health.
entries.name: Hive Master

undoc.notes: Vampire Locust may aggro neutral Mercenaries while Anub'arak is not Mounted. Does not attack when Anub'arak is Mounted.

entries.description: Staying near the Cocoon allows Anub'arak to extend the duration by up to 6 seconds per Cocoon. Upon exiting the Cocoon enemies take 60 damage over 4 seconds. This damage is increased by 100% for each second that they were inside.
entries.name: Cryptweave

undoc.notes: While below 30 Health and within 4.0 range of Anub'arak, the Cocoon is healed at a rate of 2 Health every 0.5 seconds, for up to 24 Health. Damage bonus stacks up to 13 times to a maximum of 1300% bonus. Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and offensive damage modifiers that can affect Cryptweave 's damage.

entries.description: Gain 10% bonus maximum Health and 20 Spell Armor. Activate to gain 75 Armor for 4 seconds.
entries.name: The Traitor King

undoc.notes: Does not benefit from the flat Health bonus from completed Regeneration Master quest. Does not stack with itself or other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Activate to reset the cooldowns of your Basic Abilities.
entries.name: Rewind

entries.description: After taking damage while below 75% Health, Artanis gains a 365 point Shield for 5 seconds. Basic Attacks lower the cooldown of Shield Overload by 4 seconds.
entries.name: Shield Overload

undoc.notes: Shield applies after the damage that triggered Shield Overload is applied to Artanis's Health. However, Artanis will not die if Shield Overload is off cooldown, and no "overkill" damage will carry over to this Shield.

entries.description: Dash forward and deal 63 damage to enemies, then return and deal 171 damage. Every enemy hit reduces the cooldown on Shield Overload by 1 second, and Heroes by 2 seconds.
entries.name: Blade Dash

undoc.notes: Both forward and backward dash grant Shield Overload cooldown reduction. Hitting an enemy at the very peak of the dash only damages with backward dash damage.

entries.description: Artanis's next Basic Attack immediately causes him to charge a short distance and strike the enemy 2 times.
entries.name: Twin Blades

undoc.notes: Activating this Ability immediately resets Artanis's Basic Attack timer. Cooldown starts once the Ability is triggered by Basic Attacking an enemy. Twin Blades can be triggered while Rooted, but it doesn't dash.

entries.description: Fire a Phase Prism that deals 66 damage to Heroes and swaps Artanis's position with theirs. Hitting a Hero also grants Artanis Unstoppable for 1.5 seconds. Can be used during Blade Dash.
entries.name: Phase Prism

undoc.notes: Enemies can be swapped over terrain and enemy Structures, but not through allied Structures.
undoc.props: Clamping, Daze, Displacement, Skillshot, Stationary channel, Unstoppable

entries.description: Fire a large area pulse from the Spear of Adun, dealing 114 damage and Blinding enemies for 4 seconds. Unlimited range.

entries.description: Target an enemy Hero with an orbital beam from the Spear of Adun, dealing 184 damage per second for 8 seconds. The beam will chase the target as they move. Unlimited range.
entries.name: Purifier Beam

undoc.notes: Reveals the target for 10 seconds upon cast. Hits all enemies in its radius, including Heroes and Structures.

entries.description: Damaging enemy Heroes with Twin Blades or Blade Dash grants Artanis 50 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing its damage by 50%. Stores up to 2 charges.
entries.name: Reactive Parry

undoc.notes: Twin Blades grants a charge on each attack. Blade Dash grants a charge for each Hero hit on both the initial dash and return. Does not stack with other positive Physical Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Twin Blades attacks deal 150% bonus damage to non-Heroes.

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Artanis's Basic Attack damage with Twin Blades.
Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Artanis's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Hitting an enemy with Phase Prism grants 30 Armor for 5 seconds.
entries.name: Psionic Synergy

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Shield Overload's cooldown recharges 125% faster while its Shield is active. Reduce Shield Overload's cooldown by 4 seconds.
entries.name: Shield Battery

undoc.notes: Reduces the cooldown of Shield Overload by 0.3125 seconds every 0.25 seconds while it is active.

entries.description: Increases Shield Overload's Shields by 80% while below 25% Health.
entries.name: Shield Surge

entries.description: Increases the damage of the first dash of Blade Dash by 175%.
entries.name: Solarite Reaper

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Blade Dash 's damage.

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Phase Prism grants 40% bonus Attack Speed for 5 seconds and Slows the enemy's Movement Speed by 30% for 4 seconds.

entries.description: After using an Ability, your next Basic Attack within 6 seconds deals 40% additional damage. While under 25% Health, this damage bonus is increased to 60%.
entries.name: Final Cut

undoc.notes: During Twin Blades the damage bonus is applied to the first strike only. Does not stack with itself. Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Artanis's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Fire a large area pulse from the Spear of Adun, dealing 114 damage and Blinding enemies for 4 seconds. Unlimited range.

entries.description: Target an enemy Hero with an orbital beam from the Spear of Adun, dealing 184 damage per second for 8 seconds. The beam will chase the target as they move. Unlimited range.

entries.description: Reduce the Mana cost of Blade Dash from 50 to 25. Each time that Shield Overload activates, reduce the cooldown of Blade Dash by 6 seconds.
entries.name: Templar's Zeal

entries.description: Increase Twin Blades's number of Basic Attacks to 3, but increase its cooldown by 1 second.
