entries.description: Reduce the Mana cost of Phase Prism from 50 to 25. Hitting an enemy Hero with Basic Attacks or Blade Dash lowers the cooldown of Phase Prism by 2 seconds.
entries.name: Graviton Vortex

entries.description: Shield Overload grants 50 Spell Armor while active, and for 2 seconds after it expires.
entries.name: Phase Bulwark

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Spell Armor effects. Other damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Basic Attacks against Heroes deal an additional 0.5% of their maximum Health in damage, increased to 1.5% when empowered by Twin Blades.
entries.name: Titan Killer

entries.description: Casting Basic Abilities reduces the cooldown of Shield Overload by 5 seconds.
entries.name: Force of Will

entries.description: Increase Attack Speed by 20%. Basic Attacks Slow enemy Movement Speed by 20% for 1.25 seconds.
entries.name: Blades of a Templar

entries.description: Suppression Pulse gains an additional charge. There is a 10 second cooldown between uses.
entries.name: Orbital Bombardment

entries.description: Increase the speed of Purifier Beam by 15%. If the target of Purifier Beam dies, it automatically recasts on the nearest visible enemy Hero.
entries.name: Target Purified

entries.description: Increase Twin Blades's charge distance by 75%.
entries.name: Zealot Charge

entries.description: While Shield Overload is active, deal 70 damage per second to nearby enemies.
entries.name: Plasma Burn

undoc.notes: 1) Area of Effect is extended by Artanis's unit radius. Plasma Burn does not affect unaggroed neutral Mercenaries. Damaging enemies with Plasma Burn does not trigger tower aggro. Plasma Burn is unaffected by offensive damage modifier and lifesteal effects.

entries.description: Activate to make Arthas's next Basic Attack strike immediately and deal 71 bonus damage. Dealing damage restores 40 Mana.
entries.name: Frostmourne Hungers

undoc.notes: The damage is added to Arthas's Basic Attack damage and dealt in a single instance. Cooldown starts once the Ability is triggered by attacking an enemy.

entries.description: Deals 164 damage to target enemy. Can be self-cast to heal for 275 Health.
entries.name: Death Coil

entries.description: Root enemies within the target area for 1.25 seconds and deals 68 damage.
entries.name: Howling Blast

undoc.props: Area of Effect, Root, Clamping, Self-castable

entries.description: Deal 36 damage per second to nearby enemies and Slow them by 10% per second, stacking up to 40%. Heroes hit also have their Attack Speed reduced by 10% per second, stacking up to 40%. Frozen Tempest's effects last for 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Frozen Tempest

undoc.notes: Debuff can be fully removed with Invulnerable and friendly Stasis effects. Unstoppable and CC removal effects only remove the Slow and not the Attack Slow debuff. Slow stacks with itself, but not with other sources of Slows. Attack Slow stacks additively with itself and other effects that affect the target's Attack Speed.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Attack Slow, Slow
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Status effect

entries.description: Consume all charges to summon an equal number of Ghouls that lose Health over 20 seconds and attack for 20 damage. Reactivate to sacrifice a ghoul, healing Arthas for 267 Health. Stores up to 6 charges. Whenever a nearby enemy Minion dies, reduce the charge cooldown of this Ability by 1 second. Takedowns reduce the charge cooldown of this Ability by 6 seconds. Ghoul
entries.name: Army of the Dead

undoc.notes: While active, the ability is replaced by Sacrifice. / Ghouls are unable to move for the first 1.3 seconds after being summoned. Ghouls are summoned at random positions within 5 radius around Arthas, but will reorganize around Arthas at 2.5 range at 60 degree intervals once they are able to move. Ghouls will follow Arthas in this formation until he issues an attack move on an enemy. Each of the Ghouls will then attack this target until they or the target dies or the Ghoul is leashed and returns to the formation. Ghouls persist even after Arthas's death.

entries.description: Sacrifice a Ghoul to restore 267 Health.
entries.name: Army of the Dead - Sacrifice

undoc.notes: Replaces Arthas's Heroic Ability slot while Army of the Dead is active. Sacrifice starts on a 1.5 second cooldown when Army of the Dead is activated. Arthas cannot activate the Ability to sacrifice a Ghoul if he is at full Health. The Ghoul with the lowest Health will be sacrificed first.

entries.description: Deals 230 damage and Slows enemies by 60% for 4 seconds. Also disables Minions, Mercenaries, Monsters and Structures for 20 seconds.
entries.name: Summon Sindragosa

undoc.props: Clamping, Piercing Skillshot, Slow (vs. Heroes and Summons), Stun (vs. non-Heroic)

entries.description: Increase the area of Howling Blast by 20%. After Hitting 30 Heroes, Death Coil Slows Heroes hit by 50% for 1.25 seconds.
entries.name: Frost Presence

undoc.notes: Howling Blast 's projectile speed is increased if it is cast beyond 8 range.

entries.description: After Frozen Tempest has been active for 2 seconds, Arthas gains 10% Movement Speed. Frozen Tempest's Slowing effects last an additional 0.5 seconds and its Mana cost is reduced by 4 per second.
entries.name: Borean Winds

entries.description: Every 5 seconds, gain 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%. Stores up to 3 charges. Arthas heals for 24 Health per second while Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned.
entries.name: Rime

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself or other positive Physical Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Howling Blast have their Armor reduced by 15 for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Shattered Armor

entries.description: Gain 3% Attack Speed for 2 seconds every time a Hero is damaged by Frozen Tempest, to a maximum of 60%.
entries.name: Icy Talons

undoc.notes: Attack speed stacks additively with itself and other effects that can affect Arthas's Attack Speed.

entries.description: Frostmourne Hungers deals an additional 115 Spell Damage in an area and Slows enemy Heroes hit by 20% for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Frost Strike

entries.description: Gain the healing effect of Death Coil even when used on enemies. If Death Coil is used on Arthas, it heals for an additional 75% bonus healing and its cooldown is reduced by 3 seconds.
entries.name: Immortal Coil

undoc.notes: Healing on enemy cast is applied when the missile returns to Arthas. Bonus healing stacks additively with other healing dealt modifiers that can affect Death Coil 's healing.

entries.description: Every 3rd Basic Attack heals Arthas for 5% of his max Health. Each stack of Frostmourne Hungers increases Arthas's maximum Health by 10.
entries.name: Rune Tap

entries.description: Activate to instantly remove all Roots and Slows. Gain 25 Armor and and reduce the duration of Stuns, Slows, and Roots against Arthas by 75% for 3 seconds. Each Hero Rooted by Howling Blast reduces the cooldown of this ability by 2 seconds.
entries.name: Icebound Fortitude

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Consume all charges to summon an equal number of Ghouls that lose Health over 20 seconds and attack for 20 damage. Reactivate to sacrifice a ghoul, healing Arthas for 267 Health. Stores up to 6 charges. Whenever a nearby enemy Minion dies, reduce the charge cooldown of this Ability by 1 second. Takedowns reduce the charge cooldown of this Ability by 6 seconds.
entries.name: Army of the Dead

entries.description: Deals 230 damage and Slows enemies by 60% for 4 seconds. Also disables Minions, Mercenaries, Monsters and Structures for 20 seconds.
entries.name: Summon Sindragosa

entries.description: If Death Coil is used on an enemy Hero, launch an additional Death Coil at a nearby enemy Hero. Death Coil deals more damage the lower Arthas's current Health is, up to a maximum of 50% bonus damage.
entries.name: Deathlord

undoc.notes: Bonus damage equates to the percentage of Health Arthas is missing. Bonus damage stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Death Coil 's damage.

entries.description: Howling Blast's damage is increased by 2 for each stack of Frostmourne Hungers. Howling Blast deals 100% additional damage and Roots for an additional 0.25 seconds against Heroes under 50% Health.
entries.name: Deathchill

entries.description: Each second an enemy is damaged by Frozen Tempest, it deals 15% bonus damage, up to a 75% bonus.
entries.name: Biting Cold

undoc.notes: Damage bonus is tracked independently for every affected unit. Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Frozen Tempest 's damage.

entries.description: Enemy Heroes that remain within Frozen Tempest for 2.5 seconds are Rooted for 1.25 seconds and heal Arthas for 3% of his maximum Health. This effect has an 8 second cooldown per target.
entries.name: Remorseless Winter

entries.description: Reduce the cooldown of Frostmourne Hungers by 6 seconds. Arthas heals for 75% of the Basic Attack damage dealt by Frostmourne Hungers.
entries.name: Frostmourne Feeds

entries.description: Activate to make Arthas immune to Spell Damage for 4 seconds and heal Arthas for 25% of the damage prevented.
entries.name: Anti-Magic Shell

undoc.notes: Anti-Magic Shell absorbs all incoming Spell Damage, similar to Protected status. The amount of damage absorbed, and thus also healing done, is calculated after damage modifiers, such as Armor. Healing does not benefit from Arthas's Spell Power or other healing dealt modifiers. Note that Percent damage in all its forms is a type of Spell Damage, therefore Arthas fully benefits from this Talent when applied to it.

entries.description: Reduce Army of the Dead's charge cooldown by 5 seconds. Each charge consumed spawns an additional Ghoul to attack nearby enemies. These Ghouls cannot be sacrificed.
entries.name: Legion of Northrend

entries.description: Sindragosa flies twice as far. Enemy Heroes are Rooted for 2.5 seconds, and then Slowed by 60% for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Absolute Zero

entries.description: Instantly double your stacks of Frostmourne Hungers, but it no longer gains stacks from hitting Heroes or killing Minions. Takedowns grant 2 stacks of Frostmourne Hungers.
entries.name: Frostmourne Feeds

entries.description: Activate to instantly mount with 10% additional Movement Speed. Taking damage does not dismount Arthas from this Mount. Lasts up to 5 seconds. When Arthas dismounts, Slow all nearby enemies by 30% for 2 seconds and deal 66 damage.
entries.name: Path of Frost

entries.description: 70% of the damage Auriel deals to Heroes and 35% dealt to non-Heroes is stored as energy. Bestow an allied Hero with Hope. While they remain near Auriel, 30% of their damage to Heroes and 10% of their damage to non-Heroes is converted to energy. Auriel can only have Bestow Hope on 1 ally at a time. Auriel can store up to 475 energy.
entries.name: Bestow Hope

entries.description: Sweep the area with sacred power, dealing 40 damage to enemies and an additional 160 damage to enemies caught in the center.
entries.name: Sacred Sweep

undoc.notes: 1) Target search is done in five 20 degree sections rotating inward from both sides over the duration of the channel. Enemies in the center area take both base and center damage. Center damage is dealt in an additional instance to all targets once the cast finishes.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Clamping, Stationary channel

entries.description: Consume Auriel's stored energy and heal allied Heroes in the area for the amount of energy consumed.
entries.name: Ray of Heaven

entries.description: Deal 55 damage to the first enemy Hero hit and knock them back. If they collide with terrain, they are also Stunned for 1.25 seconds and take an additional 165 damage.
entries.name: Detainment Strike

undoc.notes: Detainment Strike also interacts with pathing blockers, which are usually not considered as real terrain.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Clamping, Knockback, Skillshot, Stun

entries.description: Place an allied Hero into Stasis for 2 seconds. Upon expiration, Crystal Aegis deals 255 damage to all nearby enemies.
entries.name: Crystal Aegis

entries.description: Channel on the spirit of a dead ally for 1 second. After a 3 second delay, they are brought back to life with 100% of their maximum Health at the location where they died. Auriel can use this ability while dead to resurrect herself.
entries.name: Resurrect

undoc.notes: Interrupting the Ability during its cast puts it on a 10 second cooldown.

entries.description: Reduces the cooldown of Sacred Sweep by 3 seconds for each enemy Hero hit by its center.
entries.name: Righteous Assault

entries.description: Ray of Heaven also deals damage to enemy Heroes in the area equal to 30% of the energy consumed.
entries.name: Searing Light

entries.description: Increases the radius of Sacred Sweep by 15%.
entries.name: Majestic Span

entries.description: Detainment Strike Slows enemy Heroes by 20% for 2.5 seconds. Slow and duration are doubled on the enemies it Stuns. Increase Detainment Strike's Stun duration by 0.25 seconds.
entries.name: Heavy Burden

entries.description: Enemies hit by Detainment Strike are knocked back 30% farther.
entries.name: Repeated Offense

undoc.notes: There is no increase in the speed of the knockback.

entries.description: Collecting a Regeneration Globe reduces the cost of Auriel's next Ray of Heaven by 75%.
entries.name: Glimmer of Hope

entries.description: Increases the energy stored from Auriel's Basic Attacks to 130% of the damage against Heroes and 70% of the damage against non-Heroes. Increase Basic Attack Range by 1.1.
entries.name: Energized Cord

entries.description: Auriel stores 25% of damage taken by allies with Bestow Hope.
entries.name: Empathic Link

undoc.notes: Self-damage does not grant any energy. The amount of energy stored is calculated after all damage modifiers.

entries.description: Channel on the spirit of a dead ally for 1 second. After a 3 second delay, they are brought back to life with 100% of their maximum Health at the location where they died. Auriel can use this ability while dead to resurrect herself.
entries.name: Resurrect

entries.description: Place an allied Hero into Stasis for 2 seconds. Upon expiration, Crystal Aegis deals 255 damage to all nearby enemies.
entries.name: Crystal Aegis

entries.description: Enemies hit by the center area of Sacred Sweep are blinded for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Blinding Flash

entries.description: Enemies hit by the outer area of Sacred Sweep are pushed slightly toward the center.
entries.name: Converging Force

entries.description: Detainment Strike now pierces and hits all enemy Heroes in a line, reducing the cooldown by 2 seconds for each Hero hit.
entries.name: Piercing Lash

entries.description: Allies with Bestow Hope gain 20% Attack Speed. Auriel gain 10% increased Basic Attack damage.
entries.name: Will of Heaven

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Auriel's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Allies with Bestow Hope gain 15% Spell Power. Enemy Heroes hit by the center area of Sacred Sweep or the terrain collision of Detainment Strike have their Spell Armor reduced by 20 for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Wrath of Heaven

undoc.notes: Spell Power from Wrath of Heaven stacks additively with other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage modifiers and healing dealt modifiers affecting the target Hero. Does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier, Healing dealt modifier / Defensive damage modifier

entries.description: Resurrected allies gain 200% increased Movement Speed, decaying over 4 seconds. While a resurrected ally remains alive, Resurrect's next cooldown recharges 100% faster.
entries.name: Light Speed

entries.description: When Crystal Aegis expires, it grants the target 75 Armor for 5 seconds, reducing damage taken by 75%.
entries.name: Diamond Resolve

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: After 2 seconds, fly to a target location.
entries.name: Angelic Flight

undoc.notes: Interrupting the Ability before the cast finishes doesn't put it on cooldown. Auriel is completely untargetable during the flight.

entries.description: Activate to grant all nearby allied Heroes a Shield for 3 seconds equal to 50% of the amount of Health they are missing.
entries.name: Shield of Hope

entries.description: Summon a Demon Lieutenant at any allied Mercenary, Minion, or Azmodan Demon. The Lieutenant will cast Demonic Smite every 7 seconds, instantly killing an enemy Minion. Health decays over 21 seconds. Usable while Channeling All Shall Burn. Demon Lieutenant Demonic Smite
entries.name: Demon Lieutenant

undoc.notes: Can be cast while casting and channeling the following Abilities: Globe of Annihilation, All Shall Burn, Demonic Invasion. Does not dismount. / A Demon Lieutenant is unable to move or attack during its spawn duration. Deals 100% bonus damage to Mercenaries and Minions.

entries.description: Shoot a globe of destruction, dealing 176 damage on impact deals 50% damage to non-Heroes.
entries.name: Globe Of Annihilation

undoc.notes: Azmodan is able to cast Summon Demon Warrior, Demon Lieutenant and Tide of Sin while casting this Ability. This ability deals full damage to summons. Increases radius by 15%, so the area is actually increased by 32%

entries.description: Spawn a Demon Warrior that marches forward. Warriors deal 53 damage per Attack Loses health over 17 seconds. Deals 100% bonus damage to Mercenaries and Minions. Stores up to 2 charges. Usable while Channeling All Shall Burn. Demon Warrior
entries.name: Summon Demon Warrior

undoc.notes: Can be cast while casting and channeling the following Abilities: Globe of Annihilation, All Shall Burn, Demonic Invasion. / A Demon Warrior is immobile, Invulnerable, and unable to move or attack during its spawn duration, though it will still block skillshots, negating them entirely during this time, and will instantly take Structure aggro off of Heroes during this spawn time (unless they have Call for Help triggered).

entries.description: Channel a beam of death on an enemy, dealing 128 damage per second for 2.5 seconds. If the Channel lasts its full duration, deal an extra 340 damage to the target. Azmodan's Movement Speed is reduced by 30% while Channeling.
entries.name: All Shall Burn

undoc.notes: The channel is interrupted if the target moves outside the active range. Can be reactivated after 1 second to end its effect early. Does not grant full duration benefits if interrupted in this way. Azmodan is able to cast Summon Demon Warrior, Demon Lieutenant, Demonic Invasion and Tide of Sin while casting and channeling this Ability.

entries.description: Rain a small army of Demonic Grunts down on enemies, dealing 85 damage per impact. Grunts deal 30 damage, have 750 Health and last up to 20 seconds. When Grunts die they explode, dealing 40 damage to nearby enemies, doubled against enemy Heroes. Usable while Channeling All Shall Burn. Demonic Grunt
entries.name: Demonic Invasion

undoc.notes: 1) Spawns a total of 8 Demonic Grunts, one every 0.125 seconds, in a randomized order to predetermined locations within 2.5 radius. Each spawn location has a randomized offset with 8 possible locations within 0.3125 radius. Azmodan is able to cast Summon Demon Warrior and Demon Lieutenant while casting this Ability. / Demonic Grunts lose 75 (+4%/level) Health per second, causing any damage dealt to them to also reduce their duration.

entries.description: Activate to make the next Globe of Annihilation cost no Mana and deal 50% more damage. Usable while Channeling All Shall Burn.
entries.name: Tide of Sin

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Globe of Annihilation 's damage. Can be cast while casting and channeling Globe of Annihilation and All Shall Burn.

entries.description: Globe of Annihilation deals 15% more damage to non-Heroic targets.
entries.name: Greed

entries.description: Increase the number of stacks of Annihilation gained by hitting Heroes with Globe of Annihilation from 2 to 4.
entries.name: Gluttony

entries.description: Provides 1 of Annihilation stack for every 2 Basic Attacks hit against a Structure or Hero.
entries.name: Wrath

undoc.notes: Annihilation is gained before the Basic Attack damage is dealt, increasing its damage if the Quest is complete and the Basic Attack would also be empowered by it. damage unaffected by q quest final reward.

entries.description: Summon Demon Warrior spawns an additional Demon, but its cooldown is increased by 10 seconds.
entries.name: Army of Hell

entries.description: Demon Warriors and Lieutenants gain 20 Armor and health decays 25% slower..
entries.name: Hellforged Armor

undoc.notes: Effective 5.6s increase in duration

entries.description: Reduce the Mana cost of Summon Demon Warrior from 25 to 20. Azmodan's Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Summon Demon Warrior by 0.75 seconds and Demon Lieutenant by 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Battleborn

entries.description: If Globe of Annihilation hits 2 or more Heroes, restore 40 Mana and gain an extra 2 Annihilation.
entries.name: Art of Chaos

entries.description: After casting Globe of Annihilation, Azmodan's Basic Attacks within the next 3 seconds have an additional 1.5 range and can hit 3 additional targets. Hitting Heroes with Basic Attacks empowered by Bombardment grants 1 Annihilation.
entries.name: Bombardment

undoc.notes: The additional targets hit can grant stacks for the Wrath talent and receive its bonus damage, and also grant cooldown reduction for the Battleborn talent. Annihilation is gained before the Basic Attack damage is dealt (increasing its damage if Wrath 's Quest is complete and the Basic Attacks would also be empowered by it).

entries.description: If All Shall Burn's channel kills or lasts its full duration, All Shall Burn's final damage applies to all enemies in an area around the target and grants 1 Annihilation per Hero hit.
entries.name: Master of Destruction

undoc.notes: Also triggers if the target dies to any other source of damage than All Shall Burn while its channel is active.

entries.description: Rain a small army of Demonic Grunts down on enemies, dealing 85 damage per impact. Grunts deal 39 damage, have 750 Health and last up to 10 seconds. When Grunts die they explode, dealing 40 damage to nearby enemies, doubled against enemy Heroes. Usable while Channeling All Shall Burn.
entries.name: Demonic Invasion

entries.description: Activate to make the next Globe of Annihilation cost no Mana and deal 50% more damage. Usable while Channeling All Shall Burn.
entries.name: Tide of Sin

entries.description: Demon Warriors and Lieutenants gain 25% increased Health. Demon Warrior's attacks slow enemies by 30%.
entries.name: Brutish Vanguard

entries.description: Reduces the Channel time of All Shall Burn by 0.5 seconds. If All Shall Burn's Channel kills or lasts its full duration against a Hero, Azmodan is healed for 8% of his maximum Health.
entries.name: Cydaea's Kiss

undoc.notes: Reduces periodic damage ticks by 2. Damage per tick remains unchanged, lowering the total damage of the Ability. Also triggers if the target dies to any other source of damage than All Shall Burn while its channel is active.

entries.description: The cooldown of Demon Lieutenants' Demonic Smite is reduced by 2 seconds and they grant 25% increased damage to nearby friendly Minions, Mercenaries, and Azmodan’s summoned Demons.
entries.name: Chain of Command

undoc.notes: Does not increase the damage of Demon Lieutenant itself, but two Demon Lieutenants can potentially increase the damage of each other. Does not stack with itself. Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting the target units' damage output.

entries.description: Globe of Annihilation damages Heroes for an additional 4% of their maximum Health.
entries.name: Total Annihilation

entries.description: If All Shall Burn Channels for its full duration or kills the target, a Demon Warrior is summoned at the target's location and all Demon Warriors deal 35% increased damage for 5 seconds.
entries.name: Hell Rift

undoc.notes: Also triggers if the target dies to any other source of damage than All Shall Burn while its channel is active. Affects both the Basic Attack damage and the burn aura damage of Demon Warriors. Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Demon Warriors' damage output.

entries.description: Activate to charge a short distance, dealing 275 damage and Slowing enemies caught in the path by 60% for 1.25 seconds. After hitting an enemy Hero with Trample, reduce the cooldown of Azmodan's Heroic Ability by 25%.
entries.name: Trample

undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Movement: Dash

entries.description: Azmodan’s Demons deal 40% increased damage to Structures.
entries.name: Siegebreaker

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other damage modifiers affecting target units' damage output.

entries.description: Globes of Annihilation empowered by Tide of Sin also leave a Black Pool at their impact location for 5 seconds. Enemies within the pool lose 8 Armor per second, up to 15, and take 56 damage per second.
entries.name: Black Pool

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself, but not with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack radius unaffected by q quest final reward.
undoc.tickrate: - Armor reduction: 8.0 per second (x40) - Damage: 4.0 per second (x20)

entries.description: Globe of Annihilation can now be cast globally.
entries.name: Inescapable Annihilation

entries.description: All Shall Burn Slows enemy Heroes. While active, the target is Slowed by 15%, and if it lasts its full duration, they are Slowed by 50% for 2.5 seconds. If All Shall Burn's channel kills or last its full duration against a Hero, reduce its cooldown by 50%.
entries.name: Sin's Grasp

undoc.notes: Also triggers if the target dies to any other source of damage than All Shall Burn while its channel is active. A full duration channel only triggers these effects if the target is an enemy Hero.

entries.description: Use Fury instead of Mana, which is gained by taking damage or dealing Basic Attack damage. Using a Basic or Heroic Ability grants 10% Movement Speed for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Fury

undoc.notes: Sonya starts at 0 Fury when she respawns. Basic Attacks generate 6 Fury each and every instance of damage Sonya takes generates 2 Fury. Movement Speed bonus does not stack, but instead refreshes the duration.

entries.description: Throw out a spear that pulls Sonya to the first enemy hit, dealing 173 damage and briefly Stunning them. If this hits an enemy, generate 40 Fury.
entries.name: Ancient Spear

undoc.notes: Ancient Spear can be used while Rooted, damaging the enemy and stunning them upon hit, but it will not cause Sonya to be pulled to them. Ancient Spear 's Stun has variable duration and lasts until Sonya reaches her target (5 server ticks, or .3125s, at max range. 1 server tick, or .0625s, at point blank.) If the enemy dies from the impact or while Sonya is being pulled to them, the pull will continue until Sonya reaches their location. Hitting an enemy with Ancient Spear will reset Sonya's Basic Attack cooldown.
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Movement: Launch

entries.description: Deals 176 damage to the target enemy and 44 to enemies behind the target.
entries.name: Seismic Slam

undoc.notes: 1) Splash search is done in three 3x2 areas, impacting at 0.15 intervals behind the target. The first search takes place at the same time as the initial impact. Primary target cannot be hit by the splash damage of the same cast.

entries.description: Deals 138 damage a second to nearby enemies for 3 seconds, healing for 25% of damage dealt. Healing tripled versus Heroes.
entries.name: Whirlwind

undoc.notes: Really averages 161 DPS over 3 seconds, because there are 7 ticks including one immediately and one at the end of the 3 seconds. Whirlwind can be reactivated after 0.75 seconds to end its effect early. Lifesteal value against Heroes is set to 75% of damage dealt. Sonya ignores collision with Heroes, Minions, Mercenaries and Monsters while Whirlwinding. While Whirlwinding, Sonya attempts to closely follow behind the target of the last attack command issued to her.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Lifesteal, Mobile channel

entries.description: Leap into the air, dealing 135 damage to nearby enemies and Stunning them for 1.25 seconds.
entries.name: Leap

undoc.notes: 1) Extended by Sonya's unit radius. Sonya becomes Unstoppable while in the air. Targeting Leap less than 0.65 units from Sonya's location causes her to land in place after 0.2 seconds' delay. Regardless, Leap is a Movement Ability and cannot be cast while Rooted.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Clamping, Stun, Unstoppable
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Movement: Launch, Status Effect

entries.description: Increase damage dealt by 40%. Reduce the duration of Stuns, Slows, and Roots against you by 50%. Lasts 15 seconds, and extends by 1 second for every 10 Fury gained.
entries.name: Wrath of the Berserker

undoc.notes: Cooldown starts when the Ability is cast. Does not stack with itself. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Sonya's damage output.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier, Crowd control reduction

entries.description: Every 4th cast of Seismic Slam deals 40% more damage to the primary target and costs no Fury.
entries.name: Furious Blow

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Seismic Slam 's primary damage.

entries.description: Sonya's Basic Attacks heal for 30% of the damage dealt.
entries.name: War Paint

entries.description: Every 16 seconds, gain 60 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 60%. Stores up to 3 charges. Charges refresh 200% faster while Fury's Movement Speed bonus is active.
entries.name: Tough As Nails

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself or other positive Physical Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Increase Seismic Slam's splash damage by 250%. Targeting a Hero with Seismic Slam further increases its splash damage by 250%, while targeting other enemies instead increases the length of Seismic Slam's splash by 66%.
entries.name: Shattered Ground

undoc.notes: Damage bonuses stack additively with themselves and any other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Seismic Slam 's splash damage. This value is still separate from the primary damage and does not benefit from damage modifiers that only affect the primary damage.

entries.description: Reduces the cooldown of Whirlwind by 2 seconds. Casting Whirlwind removes all Slows and Roots from Sonya.
entries.name: Hurricane

entries.description: Activate to gain 50 Fury. Usable while Whirlwinding. After casting Seismic Slam, your next Basic Attack deals 40% more damage.
entries.name: Shot of Fury

undoc.notes: Damage bonus does not stack with itself and does not store charges. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Sonya's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Ancient Spear deals an additional 100% damage over 6 seconds.
entries.name: Poisoned Spear

entries.description: Increases the healing of Whirlwind to 35% of damage dealt.
entries.name: Life Funnel

entries.description: Activate to instantly restore 10% of Sonya's maximum Health. Stores up to 2 charges. Usable while Whirlwinding. Sonya deals 25% more damage to Mercenaries.
entries.name: Battle Rage

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Sonya's damage against Mercenaries.

entries.description: Leap into the air, dealing 135 damage to nearby enemies and Stunning them for 1.25 seconds.
entries.name: Leap

entries.description: Increase damage dealt by 40%. Reduce the duration of Stuns, Slows, and Roots against you by 50%. Lasts 15 seconds, and extends by 1 second for every 10 Fury gained.
entries.name: Wrath of the Berserker

entries.description: Ancient Spear always pulls Sonya to the target location even if it doesn't hit an enemy. When used this way, Ancient Spear's cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds.
entries.name: Mystical Spear

entries.description: Whirlwind deals an additional 50 damage per second to Heroes below 50% Health. Does not generate additional healing.

entries.description: Increases the Movement Speed bonus from using Basic and Heroic Abilities to 20%.

entries.description: Increase Basic Attack damage by 25%. Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Ancient Spear by 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Rampage

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Sonya's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Activate to gain 25% of your maximum Health as a Shield for 3 seconds. Usable while Whirlwinding.

entries.description: Leap leaves behind an impassable crater for 5 seconds. Reduces Leap's cooldown by 20 seconds.
entries.name: Arreat Crater

undoc.notes: 1) The wall consists of 40 smaller blocker units, with 0.625 radius, spread around the area. Leap can be reactivated after 1.5 seconds to end this effect early.

entries.description: Wrath of the Berserker increases maximum Health by 10% and grants Striding Giant, which can be activated to become Unstoppable for 2 seconds. Striding Giant (active) Activate to become Unstoppable for 2 seconds. Usable only when Wrath of the Berserker is active.

entries.name: Composite Spear

undoc.notes: Still Stuns until target is reached, so if used at the max new range of 9.75, Stuns for 7 server ticks, or 0.4375s. Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Activate to gain 60 Armor for 4 seconds, taking 60% less damage. Usable while Whirlwinding.
entries.name: Ignore Pain

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Upon dying, nearby enemy Minions drop 1 Fresh Meat and enemy Heroes drop 20 Fresh Meat. Fresh Meat can be picked up to gain 0.5 Attack Damage per Meat. The Butcher loses 15 Fresh Meat upon dying.
entries.name: Fresh Meat

undoc.notes: Attack Speed stacks additively with other effects affecting the Butcher's Attack Speed. Bonus Attack Damage from Fresh Meat is added to The Butcher 's base Attack Damage before multiplying by the sum of any damage modifiers, such as Brutal Strike and Nexus Blades.

entries.description: Deal 110 damage and Slow enemies by 50% fading over 2 seconds. The Butcher's next Basic Attack will strike immediately.
entries.name: Hamstring

entries.description: Deal 37 damage to an enemy and Brand them for 4 seconds. The Butcher's Basic Attacks against the Branded target heal him for 75% of the damage done. Basic Attacks against Branded Heroes heal for double and extend the duration of the Brand by 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Butcher's Brand

undoc.notes: Resets The Butcher's Basic Attack timer.

entries.description: Charge at an enemy, becoming Unstoppable and gaining Movement Speed. If The Butcher reaches the target, they are Stunned for 1 second and take 119 damage.
entries.name: Ruthless Onslaught

undoc.notes: The Butcher is not Unstoppable until the cast time is complete, meaning that, like other Abilities, it can interrupted by enemy crowd control during its windup, refunding its cooldown and Mana cost. Ruthless Onslaught can be reactivated after 0.75 seconds to interrupt the charge, placing it on full cooldown. Otherwise The Butcher is uncontrollable during the charge. Charge is automatically canceled if it has been active for 4 seconds without hitting the target or if the target becomes untargetable or, for its windup, if the target moves farther than 5 units from its maximum cast range.
undoc.props: Mobile channel, Movement speed, Stun, Unstoppable
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Status effect

entries.description: After a 3 second delay, fire explodes around The Butcher dealing 500 damage to enemies. Can be cast while using Ruthless Onslaught.
entries.name: Furnace Blast

entries.description: Throw a hitching post that attaches to the nearest enemy Hero after a 1 second delay. This deals 171 damage and causes the enemy to be chained to the post and Silenced for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Lamb to the Slaughter

undoc.notes: 'Nearest enemy' refers to the one closest to the center of the search area. Chained enemies will be pulled to the center if they try to escape the area.

entries.description: If Hamstring hits a Hero, half of the Mana cost is refunded and the cooldown is reduced by 1 second.
entries.name: Invigoration

entries.description: Every 5 seconds, gain 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%. Stores up to 2 charges.

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself or other positive Physical Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Increases Hamstring damage by 100% to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Hamstring 's damage.

entries.description: Increases the length of Hamstring by 40%.
entries.name: Flail Axe

entries.description: Reduces the cooldown of Ruthless Onslaught by 33% upon impact.
entries.name: Unrelenting Pursuit

entries.description: Hamstring does 100% more damage to targets affected by Slow, Root, or Stun.
entries.name: Cheap Shot

undoc.notes: Does not benefit from Hamstring 's Slow, as the damage is dealt before the Slow is applied. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Hamstring 's damage output.

entries.description: While facing the branded enemy, The Butcher's Movement Speed is increased by 25%.
entries.name: Insatiable Blade

entries.description: Every time a nearby enemy Minion dies, The Butcher heals 5% of his maximum Health.
entries.name: Victuals

entries.description: When Ruthless Onslaught impacts an enemy Hero, The Butcher gains 50 Spell Armor for 2.5 seconds, reducing Spell Damage taken by 50%.
entries.name: Meat Shield

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself or other positive Spell Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: After a 3 second delay, fire explodes around The Butcher dealing 500 damage to enemies. Can be cast while using Ruthless Onslaught.
entries.name: Furnace Blast

entries.description: Throw a hitching post that attaches to the nearest enemy Hero after a 1 second delay. This deals 171 damage and causes the enemy to be chained to the post and Silenced for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Lamb to the Slaughter

entries.description: Basic Attacks deal 35% of The Butcher's Basic Attack Damage in an area around the target.
entries.name: Cleaver

undoc.notes: Cleaver benefits from the bonus damage from Fresh Meat . Splash damage does not grant lifesteal when damaging enemies affected by Butcher's Brand . Damage reduction stacks additively with offensive damage modifiers affecting The Butcher's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Ruthless Onslaught deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to 10% of their maximum Health.
entries.name: Savage Charge

entries.description: After using Hamstring, The Butcher's next 3 Basic Attacks within 5 seconds deal an additional 15% damage.
entries.name: Brutal Strike

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself. Charges from previous casts are not stored. Damage bonus stacks additively with other damage modifiers affecting The Butcher's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Hamstring's Slow no longer fades out, and the duration is increased by 30%.
entries.name: Crippling Slam

entries.description: While below 50% of his maximum Health, taking damage causes The Butcher to become Enraged for 10 seconds, gaining 40% Attack Speed and 25 Armor, reducing damage taken by 25%. This effect has a 25 second cooldown.

entries.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant 5% increased Attack and Movement Speed for 3 seconds, up to 25%.

entries.description: Basic Attacks deal 20% more damage and Slow enemy Movement Speed by 20% for 1 second.

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other damage modifiers affecting The Butcher's Basic Attack damage. The sum of these bonuses is multiplied by The Butcher's Attack Damage (which includes his bonus Attack Damage from Fresh Meat).

entries.description: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.
entries.name: Bolt of the Storm

entries.description: Chen drinks from his keg, gaining 50 Brew and 190 temporary Shields per second, up to a maximum of 570 while drinking. Shields persist for 4 seconds after he stops drinking.
entries.name: Fortifying Brew

undoc.tickrate: - Shields: 2.0 per second (x8) - Brew: 8.0 per second (x32)

entries.description: Kick through target enemy, dealing 130 damage.
entries.name: Flying Kick

undoc.notes: Chen is positioned on the opposite side of the target upon landing.

entries.description: Deal 50 damage and soak enemies in Brew for 3 seconds, Slowing them by 10%. After 1.25 seconds, the Slow is increased to 40%. After being used, this ability becomes Breath of Fire. Breath of Fire Deal damage and Ignite Brew-soaked enemies.
entries.name: Keg Smash

undoc.notes: Igniting enemies also extend the duration of Brew-soaked debuff by 1.5 seconds. Brew-soaked cannot be removed by cleansing the associated Slow.

entries.description: Breathe a cone of flames, dealing 40 damage. Enemies soaked in Brew are Ignited, dealing 171 additional damage over 6 seconds and adding 1.5 seconds to the duration of the Slow from Keg Smash. After being used or after 6 seconds, this Ability becomes Keg Smash. Keg Smash Damage and Slow enemies.
entries.name: Keg Smash - Breath of Fire

undoc.notes: Igniting enemies also extends the duration of Brew-soaked debuff by 1.5 seconds. The cooldown does not start counting until Breath of Fire has been used or it has expired.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Clamping, Damage over Time (Ignited)

entries.description: Damage taken over the next 3 seconds is prevented. Once this effect ends, Chen receives 75% of the damage taken over 5 seconds. This damage cannot be modified.
entries.name: Stagger

undoc.notes: Damage over time can still be prevented, absorbed or dispelled through specific Abilities and effects. Chen can die from self-damage, which grants the enemy team the normal amount of XP and takedown credit. Damage taken during Stagger 's protective period is calculated and stored after all reductions, causing its damage reduction to stack multiplicatively with other defensive damage modifiers, like Armor, that were active at the same time. Does not prevent or store damage to Shields.

entries.description: Roll around inside an Unstoppable barrel with 70% increased Movement Speed and 25 Armor, dealing 59 damage to enemies in the way and knocking them back. Lasts for 5 seconds.
entries.name: Wandering Keg

undoc.notes: Chen can not attack, use his Abilities or stop during Wandering Keg. Colliding with an enemy removes the Movement Speed bonus which is then regained over 0.375 seconds.
undoc.props: Area of Effect,Knockback, Mobile channel, Unstoppable
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Defensive damage modifier, Status effect

entries.description: After 1 second, Chen splits into three elemental spirits for 12 seconds, each with 70% of Chen's maximum Health and a unique Ability. The last spirit Ability that is cast is empowered. If all three spirits are killed, Chen will die as well. Storm can grant the spirits a Shield. Earth can leap to an area and Slow Enemies. Fire can grant the spirits Attack Speed and damage. Storm Earth Fire
entries.name: Storm, Earth, Fire

undoc.notes: Interrupting the Ability during its cast time puts it on a 10 second cooldown. Each spirit ability can be used only once per cast and requires the corresponding spirit to be alive. Chen is put in Stasis while Storm, Earth, Fire is active. In addition to the usual effects of Stasis, Chen is removed from ground plane (disjoints certain projectiles), has no collision, cannot regenerate Health, Mana, Energy or Shields and cannot be seen on the minimap or revealed. Spirits cannot Mount, Hearth, collect Regeneration Globes and power-ups, use Healing Fountain or channel Objectives. Upon dying in this form, Chen receives damage equal to his maximum Health from the Hero who killed him. Spirits cannot Mount, Hearth, collect Regeneration Globes and power-ups, use Healing Fountain or channel Objectives. At the end of the duration Chen reappears at one of the alive spirit's locations based on the following priority: Storm -> Earth -> Fire. / Earth's Basic Attacks splash in 3.5 radius, dealing Spell Damage and Slowing enemies within 3.5 radius of the primary target by 25% for 1.75 seconds.

entries.description: Fire and Earth leap to the target location dealing 32 damage and Slowing enemies in a large area by 70% for 1.5 seconds. If this is the final Ability cast, increase the damage dealt by 300% and instead of Slowing, the leap Roots enemy Heroes hit for 1.75 seconds.
entries.name: Storm, Earth, Fire - Earth

entries.description: Increase the Attack Speed and Basic Attack damage of the spirits by 50% for 5 seconds. If this is the final Ability cast, the Attack Speed and damage bonus is increased to 75% and the spirits gain 50% Movement Speed for its duration.

entries.description: Roll around inside an Unstoppable barrel with 70% increased Movement Speed and 25 Armor, dealing 59 damage to enemies in the way and knocking them back. Lasts for 5 seconds.

entries.description: After 1 second, Chen splits into three elemental spirits for 12 seconds, each with 70% of Chen's maximum Health and a unique Ability. The last spirit Ability that is cast is empowered. If all three spirits are killed, Chen will die as well. Storm can grant the spirits a Shield. Earth can leap to an area and Slow Enemies. Fire can grant the spirits Attack Speed and damage.

entries.description: Fortifying Brew instantly grants Chen a Shield that absorbs 190 damage, and each second grants nearby allied Heroes a Shield that absorbs 140 damage, up to 420.

entries.description: Increase Flying Kick's range by 15% and reduce its cooldown by 0.5 seconds each time an enemy Hero takes damage from being Ignited.

entries.description: Basic Attacks against Stunned, Rooted or Slowed enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Stagger by 2 seconds and grant Chen 30 Armor for 3 seconds.

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers, like Stagger 's damage reduction, may stack.

entries.description: Every 3rd Basic Attack against the same target deals 75% bonus damage. While Chen has Shields from Fortifying Brew and for 2 seconds after, he gains 35% Attack Speed.

undoc.notes: Changes target and progresses in the cycle even if the attack misses due to Blinds or Evasion. Stacks additively with other damage modifiers affecting Chen's Basic Attack damage.

Energizing Brew buff is removed upon successfully casting Storm, Earth, Fire. Health increase is based on Chen's maximum Health regardless of Chen's current Health. Upon expiration, Chen retains any Health gained through Energizing Brew that does not exceed his base maximum Health.
