entries.description: Upheaval Roots enemy Heroes for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Favor of the Old Gods

entries.description: Basic Attacks against enemies cause them to explode, dealing 21 damage to them and 45 damage to nearby enemies. This damage is doubled against enemy Heroes.
entries.name: Fuel for the Flame

undoc.notes: Hero damage bonus (+100%) stacks additively with offensive damage modifiers that can affect Cho'gall's Spell Damage output.

entries.description: Decreases Cho'gall's death timer by 50%.
entries.name: Hour of Twilight

entries.description: Chromie has traveled to the future, and as such, will learn her Talents 2 levels earlier than her teammates!
entries.name: Timewalker

entries.description: Detonate active Time Traps.
entries.name: Detonate Time Trap

undoc.notes: Detonate Time Trap is put on cooldown every time a new Time Trap is placed.

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, fire a missile that deals 305 damage to the first enemy hit. Deals 50% damage to Structures. Casting Sand Blast leaves an Echo behind that mimics Chromie's Sand Blast and Basic Attack, dealing 40% damage. Maximum of 1 Echo active at a time.
entries.name: Sand Blast

undoc.notes: Sand Blasts fired by Sand Echoes count for Sand Blast related talents and quests. Sand Echoes' Basic Attacks deal Physical Damage. Sand Echoes' damage reduction stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers.

entries.description: Launch 3 blasts into the air that land every 0.75 seconds toward the targeted direction, dealing 215 damage each.
entries.name: Dragon's Breath

undoc.notes: First blast lands 0.75 seconds after a successful cast. First cast point determines the location of first blast and second the direction of following blasts.

entries.description: Place a Time Trap that arms and Stealths after 2 seconds. Chromie's Trait can be activated to detonate the trap, placing all nearby allied or enemy Heroes in Time Stop for 2 seconds. Maximum of 1 trap active at a time. Time Trap
entries.name: Time Trap

entries.description: Summon a sand vortex that Slows enemies by 10% every 0.25 seconds, up to 70%.
entries.name: Slowing Sands

undoc.notes: Slowing Sands is interrupted and put on cooldown when Chromie cancels the ability, runs out of Mana or moves 30 units away from it. Each Hero has their own stack counter. Stacks are reset immediately when the affected Hero leaves the area. 0.75 Mana is consumed per tick. Cannot be picked in ARAM games.

entries.description: Choose an enemy Hero. After 3 seconds, they are teleported back to the location where Temporal Loop was cast on them. Basic Abilities recharge 500% faster for 3 seconds after casting Temporal Loop.
entries.name: Temporal Loop

undoc.notes: Temporal Loop cannot be removed, but its displacement effect will be prevented if the target is Unstoppable when it triggers.

entries.description: Gain 15% Spell Power and reduce the arming time of Time Traps by 0.75 seconds. Activate to reveal the targeted area for 4 seconds. Enemies seen are revealed for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Timewalker's Pursuit

undoc.notes: Does not dismount. Spell Power from Timewalker's Pursuit stacks additively with itself and other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage modifiers and healing dealt modifiers affecting the Chromie.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Revealed, Spell Power
undoc.type: Status effect (active) / Offensive damage modifier, Healing dealt modifier

entries.description: After its Time Stop ends, enemies affected by Time Trap are Slowed by 30% for 3 seconds and allies gain 30% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Chronic Conditions

entries.description: After its Time Stop ends, enemies affected by Time Trap lose 15 Armor for 3 seconds and allies gain 30 Armor for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Time Troubles

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other negative/positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Increase the charges and maximum active Time Traps to 3, and reduce its cooldown by 8 seconds.
entries.name: Andorhal Anomaly

entries.description: Hitting a Hero with Sand Blast from Chromie or her Echoes grants 50% additional Basic Attack damage for 5 seconds.
entries.name: Bronze Talons

undoc.notes: Stacks additionally with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Chromie's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Dragon’s Breath deals 30% bonus damage to enemies hit by its center. Enemy Heroes hit by its center are Slowed by 40% for 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Mobius Loop

entries.description: Damaging a Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed enemy Hero grants 20% additional damage for 3 seconds.
entries.name: A Proper Greeting

undoc.notes: Stacks additionally with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Chromie's damage output.

entries.description: Summon a sand vortex that Slows enemies by 10% every 0.25 seconds, up to 70%.
entries.name: Slowing Sands

entries.description: Choose an enemy Hero. After 3 seconds, they are teleported back to the location where Temporal Loop was cast on them. Basic Abilities recharge 500% faster for 3 seconds after casting Temporal Loop.
entries.name: Temporal Loop

entries.description: After casting Sand Blast, Chromie gains 20% Movement Speed and 200% increased Health Regeneration for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Gnome Speed Ahead!

entries.description: Activate to teleport to an area near an Echo, swapping it with Chromie's previous location.
entries.name: Here and There

entries.description: Activate to place Chromie in Stasis and gain Invulnerability for up to 5 seconds. Can be reactivated to end the effect early.
entries.name: Time Out

undoc.notes: Time Out can be reactivated after 0.5 seconds to end its effect early.

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Chromie's primary Sand Blast grants 5% Spell Power for 8 seconds, up to a maximum of 50%. The duration is refreshed whenever an enemy is damaged by the primary Sand Blast.
entries.name: Shifting Sands

undoc.notes: Spell Power from Shifting Sands stacks additively with itself and other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage modifiers and healing dealt modifiers affecting Chromie.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier, Healing dealt modifier

entries.description: If Chromie's primary Sand Blast travels at least 50% of its base distance and hits a Hero, its cooldown is reduced to 0.5 seconds and it refunds 10 Mana.
entries.name: Fast Forward

entries.description: Activate to increase Spell Power by 30% for 8 seconds. Hitting an enemy Hero with Sand Blast reduces this cooldown by 3 seconds.
entries.name: Quantum Overdrive

undoc.notes: Spell Power from Quantum Overdrive stacks additively with itself and other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage modifiers and healing dealt modifiers affecting Chromie.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier, Healing dealt modifier

entries.description: Every 0.25 seconds, enemy Heroes Slowed by Slowing Sands have their Spell Armor reduced by 10, up to 50. Increase Slowing Sands cast range by 50% and it persists for 5 seconds after it is canceled.
entries.name: Unravelling

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself, but not with other negative Spell Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Temporal Loop teleports the target a second time after the first, and Basic Abilities continue recharging for an additional 3 seconds. Increase the cooldown recharge rate from 500% to 700%.
entries.name: Stuck in a Loop

entries.description: Sand Blast casts from Chromie and her Echoes now pierce all enemies hit.
entries.name: Piercing Sands

entries.description: Activate to cause Chromie and all allied Heroes to gain 20% Movement Speed and their Basic Abilities to recharge 35% faster for 8 seconds. Hitting an enemy Hero with Sand Blast from Chromie or her Echoes reduces the cooldown of Blessing of the Bronze by 1 second.
entries.name: Blessing of the Bronze

entries.description: Activate to grant Johanna a Shield that absorbs 810 damage for 4 seconds. While this Shield is active, Johanna is Unstoppable.
entries.name: Iron Skin

undoc.notes: If the Shield breaks, Johanna loses Unstoppable and any other benefits that come with it.

entries.description: Step forward dealing 113 damage and Slowing enemies by 50% decaying over 2 seconds.
entries.name: Punish

undoc.notes: Using Punish causes Johanna to minidash into the target direction. Roots prevent the dash behavior, but do not disable the Ability altogether.

entries.description: After 1 second, Johanna pulls nearby enemies toward her, Stunning them for 0.25 seconds and dealing 55 damage. Deals 200% increased damage to Minions and Mercenaries.
entries.name: Condemn

undoc.notes: Enemies hit by Condemn are in order first pulled, then damaged, and once the pull ends Stunned. Damage bonus to Minions and Mercenaries stacks additively with offensive damage modifiers that can affect Condemn 's damage.

entries.description: Deal 59 damage to enemies and Blind them for 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Shield Glare

entries.description: Johanna leaps into the air for 2 seconds and she can steer the landing location by moving. While in the air, allies below Johanna are Unstoppable. Upon landing enemies hit take 225 damage and are Stunned for 0.25 seconds.
entries.name: Falling Sword

undoc.notes: The cast is uninterruptible. The initial teleport can be used to cross over terrain or Structures, but the Ability cannot be targeted on top of them or steered into them, except for allied and enemy Gates. Immediately upon activating the Ability and while in the air, Johanna is put in Stasis. In addition to usual effects of Stasis, Johanna has no collision and after the initial delay removed from the ground plane. While targeting the landing area, Johanna moves at regular Movement Speed subject to allied and her own Movement Speed buffs applied beforehand. While in the air, Johanna gains vision over the target area. The range indicator for the Ability's initial cast shown in game is incorrect.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Stasis, Stun, Unstoppable
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Movement: Teleport, Status effect / Status effect

entries.description: Deal 114 damage and Stun the first enemy hit for 1.5 seconds. Blessed Shield then bounces to 2 nearby enemies, dealing 57 damage and Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Blessed Shield

undoc.notes: Bounces prioritize Heroes and then the closest enemy to Johanna. Each bounce originates from the previous target. Enemies that are immune to skillshots cannot be hit by the initial projectile, but can be targeted by bounces as long as they are not also immune to AoE (Invulnerable targets therefore cannot be targeted by or hit by either).

entries.description: Shield Glare gains 1 additional charge, and deals 70% more damage.
entries.name: Zealous Glare

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Shield Glare 's damage.

entries.description: Basic Attacks grant 10 Physical Armor for 4 seconds, stacking up to 40.
entries.name: Divine Fortress

undoc.notes: Bonus loss is additive and the loss per death stops when 0% is reached.

entries.description: Activate to heal 20% of Johanna's max Health over 5 seconds.
entries.name: Laws of Hope

entries.description: Hitting 2 or more Heroes at the same time with Punish increases the Slow to 70% and the Slow amount does not decay.
entries.name: Subdue

undoc.notes: Slow amount also does not decay after completing the Quest.

entries.description: Mark enemies hit by Condemn for 10 seconds. Johanna's next Basic Attack against them removes the mark, lowering the cooldown of Condemn by 1 second, refunding 10 Mana, and killing Minions.
entries.name: Eternal Retaliation

undoc.type: Mana restoration / Instant kill / Cooldown reduction

entries.description: Increases Iron Skin's Shield by 40% and its cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.
entries.name: Hold Your Ground

entries.description: Punish reduces healing received by 35% for 3 seconds. Basic Attacks against them refresh this duration.
entries.name: Sins Exposed

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself. Reapplying refreshes the duration. Healing reduction stacks additively with other healing received modifiers affecting the target Hero.

entries.description: Gain 10% Movement Speed, increased to 20% while Condemn is charging up.
entries.name: Conviction

entries.description: Activate to instantly Mount for 4 seconds, unhindered by damage. Increase the duration of Iron Skin by 2 seconds.
entries.name: Steed Charge

undoc.notes: Cannot be activated while Rooted. Johanna is automatically dismounted when the effect ends, placing Mount on cooldown. Attacking, using Abilities or getting Rooted, Stunned, Polymorphed, Dazed or put in Stasis instantly ends the effect.

entries.description: Johanna leaps into the air for 2 seconds and she can steer the landing location by moving. While in the air, allies below Johanna are Unstoppable. Upon landing enemies hit take 225 damage and are Stunned for 0.25 seconds.
entries.name: Falling Sword

entries.description: Deal 114 damage and Stun the first enemy hit for 1.5 seconds. Blessed Shield then bounces to 2 nearby enemies, dealing 57 damage and Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Blessed Shield

entries.description: Increases Punish's damage by 50%. This bonus is increased to 150% whenever Punish hits 2 or more Heroes.
entries.name: Roar

undoc.notes: Multihit bonus does not stack with base bonus. Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Punish 's damage.

entries.description: Deal 15 damage per second to nearby enemies. Each Hero hit by Condemn increases this damage by 40% for 5 seconds.
entries.name: Holy Fury

undoc.notes: Holy Fury is inactive while Mounted. Holy Fury does not affect unaggroed neutral Mercenaries Damaging enemy Heroes with Holy Fury does not draw tower aggro. Damage from Holy Fury is unaffected by external offensive damage modifiers and lifesteal effects. Holy Fury 's damage bonus stacks additively with itself.

entries.description: Activate to create 2 hammers that spiral outward from Johanna, dealing 65 damage to enemies hit. Damaging enemies with Basic Abilities reduces the cooldown of this Ability by 2 seconds. Every 3rd Basic Attack against enemy Heroes releases a Hammer.
entries.name: Blessed Hammer

undoc.notes: Actually 2.5s of cooldown reduction per enemy hit by Basic Abilities, despite the tooltip. The Ability is interrupted if Johanna dies or is put in Stasis. Hammers spiral clockwise around Johanna, always starting from 10 o'clock and making 2.25 revolutions before reaching maximum radius and disappearing. The second hammer appears 1 second after the first. Enemies can be hit by Blessed Hammer multiple times, but not more often than once per 0.5 seconds.

entries.description: Condemn reduces enemy Heroes' damage by 30% and Slows by 30% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Shrinking Vacuum

undoc.notes: Damage reduction stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect the target Hero's damage output.

entries.description: Hitting enemy Heroes with Shield Glare reduces its cooldown by 1 second and heals for 5% of Johanna's maximum Health.
entries.name: Holy Renewal

undoc.notes: Each enemy Hero hit applies the cooldown reduction.

entries.description: Basic Attacks grant 10% increased Attack Speed for 4 seconds, stacking up to 40%. They also reduce Johanna's Basic Ability cooldowns by 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Blessed Momentum

undoc.notes: Attack Speed from Blessed Momentum stacks additively with itself and other Attack Speed effects.
undoc.props: Attack modifier, Attack Speed, Cooldown reduction

entries.description: Falling Sword rains down holy bolts, dealing 50 damage to enemies, healing allied Heroes for 68, and reducing its cooldown by 1 second for each Hero hit.
entries.name: Heaven's Fury

undoc.notes: Can target up to 3 enemies and 3 allied Heroes per tick, chosen at random within the target area. Allied Heroes healed and enemy Heroes damaged both grant cooldown reduction. Invulnerable allies are not healed by this Ability.

entries.description: Increase the number of enemies hit by Blessed Shield by 2. Its Stun duration is increased to 1.75 seconds and all targets hit are Stunned for the maximum duration.
entries.name: Radiating Faith

entries.description: Upon taking fatal damage, Johanna gains a Shield equal to her maximum Health for 4 seconds. This effect has a 120 second cooldown.
entries.name: Indestructible

entries.description: Activate to grant nearby allied Heroes a Shield for 25% of their maximum Health for 3 seconds. Hitting Heroes with Shield Glare reduces the cooldown of this Ability by 8 seconds.
entries.name: Blinded By The Light

entries.description: When D.Va's Mech dies, she is ejected out after 0.75 seconds and can continue to fight. D.Va's Mech only awards 50% of a normal Hero's XP upon dying. Fusion Cannons D.Va's Mech Basic Attacks deal 22 damage in a large area every 0.25 seconds. Deals 40% bonus damage against enemies very close to the Mech.
entries.name: Mech Mode

undoc.notes: D.Va's Mech still awards full Takedown credit. While in Mech Mode, D.Va's Mount is replaced with Mechanized Walker. / 1) Primary target must be within 3.75 range while secondary targets can be hit up to 5.0 range. Upon issuing an attack command on an enemy unit, D.Va attempts to move to a range where the target enemy can be hit by bonus damage. D.Va's Basic Attacks can hit secondary targets even if the primary target is Evading. Bonus damage stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect D.Va's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Increases D.Va's Movement Speed by 115% for 1.75 seconds. Enemies that are hit take 135 damage and are knocked away. D.Va cannot be Slowed while Boosters are active, and each enemy can only be hit once per use.
entries.name: Boosters

undoc.notes: Boosters cannot be activated while Rooted. The Ability can be reactivated after 0.5 seconds to end its effect early. Not affected by cooldown reduction granted by allies.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Movement speed, Mobile channel, Knockback
undoc.type: Spell damage, Crowd control / Status effect

entries.description: Project a defensive field in the target direction for 3 seconds, reducing damage dealt by enemy Heroes inside it by 60%. Activate again to change the angle of the projection. Damage dealt to the Mech from enemies within Defense Matrix still grants the same amount of Self-Destruct Charge.
entries.name: Defense Matrix

undoc.notes: 1) Offset to the start of the area. Defense Matrix can be canceled using the trait button to end its effect early. Damage reduction from Defense Matrix stacks multiplicatively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting the target Heroes' damage output.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Clamping, Mobile channel

entries.description: Requires Mech Mode. Eject from the Mech, setting it to self-destruct after 4 seconds. Deals 400 to 1100 damage in a large area, depending on distance from center. Deals 50% damage against Structures. Gain 1% Charge for every 2 seconds spent Basic Attacking, and 25% Charge per 100% of Mech Health lost.
entries.name: Self-Destruct

undoc.notes: Each Basic Attack grants 0.125% Self-Destruct Charge (even if the attack misses due to being Blinded or the target Evading). Hitting multiple enemies does not increase the Charge gained. Charge gained from damage taken is calculated after all damage modifications, excluding Defense Matrix. Self-Destruct can be activated while Boosters can be deactivated after leaving the Mech to stop it in its place. If Mech has taken fatal damage Self-Destruct cannot be used. Upon cast D.Va is ejected from the back of the Mech and the Mech itself becomes Unkillable and turns into a Heroic Pet, allowing it to be hit by Abilities that can target Heroes. Exploding Mech can be afflicted and moved with crowd control and Stasis effects, like Stitches's Gorge, but these effects cannot suppress the Mech's explosion. Explosion can only be delayed by placing the Mech in Time Stop. Using Self-Destruct to eject from the Mech awards no experience or Takedown credit to enemies. If the Mech is Rooted prior to D.Va ejecting and the root expires before it explodes, it will move toward the location of the last move order issued while D.Va was in the Mech. At certain Hero levels, explodes immediately when hit by Malthael's Throwing Shade.

entries.description: D.Va's Mech becomes Unstoppable and stomps every 0.5 seconds, dealing 78 damage in a large area. Every 4th consecutive hit on a Hero deals 80% more damage and Stuns them for 0.5 seconds. Lasts 4 seconds. Requires Mech Mode.
entries.name: Bunny Hop

undoc.notes: Bunny Hop can be canceled after 1 second to end its effect early.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Mobile channel, Stun, Unstoppable
undoc.type: Spell damage / Crowd control / Status effect

entries.description: After 0.375 seconds Channel to launch a volley of 12 missiles in a target direction. Each missile impacts the first enemy in its path, dealing 40 damage in a small area and Slowing by 30% for 2 seconds. Stores 2 charges with a 3 second cooldown between each use. Requires Mech Mode.
entries.name: Micro Missiles

undoc.notes: The launch location of left and right missile are each chosen at random from three possible horizontal offsets from the center: x=[±0.2, ±0.95, ±1.2]. Missiles splash in an area upon hitting a target or upon reaching the end location.
undoc.props: Clamping, Mobile channel, Skillshot, Splash, Slow

entries.description: D.Va's Mech can shoot while moving. While shooting or channeling an Ability the Mech's Movement Speed is quickly reduced by 25%.
entries.name: Mechanized Walker

undoc.notes: Mechanized Walker directly affects D.Va's base Movement Speed, causing the reduction to stack multiplicatively with Slows and Movement Speed buffs. D.Va does not suffer the Movement Speed penalty from Mechanized Walker while using Boosters. Activating Boosters also immediately removes the reduction.

entries.description: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Call Mech by 0.5 seconds. As a Pilot, D.Va only awards 50% of a normal Hero's XP upon dying.
entries.name: Pilot Mode

undoc.notes: D.Va can Mount normally while in Pilot Mode

entries.description: Dash toward the target location, passing through enemies along the way.
entries.name: Torpedo Dash

undoc.notes: Torpedo Dash has a 0.75 second coolup after exiting Mech. D.Va's Basic Attack is placed on a 0.25 second cooldown when Torpedo Dash ends. Abilities can be used immediately. Benefits from cooldown reduction granted by allies.

entries.description: Deal 120 damage to enemies in a cone and knock them back.
entries.name: Concussive Pulse

undoc.notes: 1) Knockback happens in three 0.0625 second long pulses. Benefits from cooldown reduction granted by allies.

entries.description: Call a new Mech and enter Mech Mode. Basic Attacks lower this cooldown by 0.5 seconds each.
entries.name: Call Mech

undoc.notes: This Ability has no cooldown if Self-Destruct was used to enter Pilot Mode. However, it remains disabled until the Mech has exploded. Entering the Mech successfully fully heals D.Va's Pilot form,removes most debuffs, and resets the cooldown of Defense Matrix. Interrupting Call Mech during its cast puts it on a 4 second cooldown.

entries.description: Deal 150 damage to all enemies in a line. Heroes hit have their Movement Speed reduced by 25% for 1.5 seconds. The cooldown of Call Mech is reduced by 5 seconds for each enemy Hero hit. Requires Pilot Mode.
entries.name: Big Shot

undoc.notes: This Ability occupies the Heroic Ability slot in Pilot Mode, but is available from the start of the game. Interrupting Big Shot during its windup puts it on full cooldown.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Channeled cast (stationary), Clamping

entries.description: D.Va's Mech gains 10% increased Health and its Fusion Cannons heal for 16% of the damage dealt to enemies in its bonus area.
entries.name: Full Metal

undoc.notes: Does not reduce the amount of Self-Destruct Charge gained.

entries.description: D.Va's Mech gains 2% Movement Speed and 2 Armor every time it takes damage, stacking up to 15 times. Stacks of this effect decay every 0.5 seconds. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes in Pilot Mode reduce the cooldown of Call Mech by 1 additional second.
entries.name: Pro Moves

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself, but not with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Activate to gain the effects of a Healing Fountain. Requires Mech Mode. While in Mech Mode, Healing Fountain's cooldown is reduced to 50 seconds and its effects last 50% longer.
entries.name: Liquid Cooling

undoc.notes: Shares cooldown with Healing Fountain. Disabled while at full Health.

entries.description: Boosters deals an additional 2% of maximum Health as damage to Heroes and heals D.Va's Mech for the damage dealt. Boosters deals 50% increased damage to non-Heroic enemies.
entries.name: Rush-down

undoc.notes: Bonus damage to Heroes is dealt in a separate instance from Boosters damage. Healing is based only on bonus damage dealt to Heroes. Bonus damage to non-Heroes stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Boosters 's damage.
undoc.type: Spell damage / Healing / Offensive damage modifier

entries.description: Enemy Heroes within your Defense Matrix receive 35% less healing. Basic Attacks against Heroes lower the cooldown of Defense Matrix by 0.1875 seconds.
entries.name: Aggression Matrix

undoc.notes: Cooldown reduction triggers from every enemy Hero hit by Fusion Cannons. Stacks additively with other healing modifiers that affect the target's healing received.

entries.description: Hitting your self-destructing Mech with Big Shot causes it to explode 40% faster. When Fusion Cannons deal bonus damage to an enemy Hero, gain 0.25% Self Destruct Charge.
entries.name: Nuclear Option

entries.description: Casting Boosters grants nearby allies 20% Movement Speed for 3 seconds. If D.Va hasn't taken damage in the last 2 seconds, Boosters's cooldown refreshes 100% faster.
entries.name: Get On The Point!

entries.description: The initial speed bonus of Boosters is increased to 300%, then decays to normal boost speed over 0.5 seconds. During this time Boosters Stuns for 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Hit the Nitrous

entries.description: Every time an enemy deals damage while inside Defense Matrix, D.Va's Self-Destruct Charge increases by 1%. Max of 20% Charge gained per use. While at full Self-Destruct Charge, Fusion Cannons's bonus damage is increased to 100%.
entries.name: Fusion Generator

entries.description: D.Va's Mech becomes Unstoppable and stomps every 0.5 seconds, dealing 78 damage in a large area. Every 4th consecutive hit on a Hero deals 80% more damage and Stuns them for 0.5 seconds. Lasts 4 seconds. Requires Mech Mode.
entries.name: Bunny Hop

entries.description: After 0.375 seconds Channel to launch a volley of 12 missiles in a target direction. Each missile impacts the first enemy in its path, dealing 40 damage in a small area and Slowing by 30% for 2 seconds. Stores 2 charges with a 3 second cooldown between each use. Requires Mech Mode.
entries.name: Micro Missiles

entries.description: Enemy Heroes that remain in your Defense Matrix for 0.75 seconds have their Armor reduced by 15 and their Movement Speed reduced by 25% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Target Locked

undoc.notes: Target must remain continuously within Defense Matrix to receive the debuff. The timer starts again immediately after the target receives the debuff, allowing it to be applied multiple times within the same cast of Defense Matrix. Does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Unlocks the Torpedo Dash and Concussive Pulse abilities. Torpedo Dash: Dash a short distance. 10 second cooldown. Concussive Pulse: Deal 120 damage to enemies in a cone and knock them back. 10 second cooldown.
entries.name: Good To Go

entries.description: Instead of a single shot, Big Shot fires 3 shots over 0.5 seconds. Each shot deals 75% damage.
entries.name: Pew! Pew! Pew!

undoc.notes: Damage reduction stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Big Shot 's damage.

entries.description: Casting Boosters grants a Shield equal to 10% of maximum life for 2.5 seconds. Each enemy Hero hit by Boosters increases D.Va's Mech's Basic Attack damage by 10% for 5 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.
entries.name: In For The Kill

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect D.Va's Mech's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Defense Matrix's area grows drastically in size and each time it reduces damage dealt to Heroes D.Va's Mech is healed for 31 Health.
entries.name: Diverting Power

entries.description: When D.Va's Mech would be destroyed, it instead gains a Shield that absorbs 290 damage over 8 seconds. This effect has a 30 second cooldown.
entries.name: Emergency Shielding

undoc.notes: Damage from the instance that would have dealt fatal damage does not overflow to the Shield.

entries.description: Increase Bunny Hop's duration by 4 seconds, and it does not decay while D.Va's Mech is stationary.
entries.name: Stop and Pop

entries.description: Micro Missiles gains an additional charge. Each time Micro Missiles hits an enemy Hero reduce its cooldown by 0.5 seconds and charge cooldown by 0.25 seconds.
entries.name: Timing Attack

entries.description: Increase Big Shot's damage by 75% and reduce its cooldown by 2 seconds.
entries.name: Headshot!

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Big Shot 's damage.

entries.description: 45% of Spell Damage dealt to D.Va's Mech is returned as Healing over 4 seconds.
entries.name: Ablative Armor

undoc.notes: Healing amount is calculated from final damage taken, after all damage modifications. Healing gained can be affected by healing dealt and healing received modifiers. Spell Damage dealt to D.Va's Shields will not grant Healing.

entries.description: Deathwing is fitted with 4 Armor Plates which grant 10 Armor each. Every 25% Health lost causes Deathwing to lose a plate. Plates are only restored when is used, based on the amount of Health Deathwing has when landing. Deathwing is also a mighty Dragon Aspect who is permanently Unstoppable and deals 100% additional Spell Damage to Heroes, but views his allies with contempt and ignores any of their friendly effects.
entries.name: Aspect of Death

undoc.notes: Deathwing uses Energy instead of Mana as a resource. Deathwing has 100 max Energy, which regenerates at 5 Energy per second (even while channeling Molten Flame). Deathwing can still be affected by allied and enemy Time Stop and pathing blockers and by enemy non-crowd control debuffs, like Attack Slows, Damage over time, Damage modifier, Healing modifier, Revealed, [[armor
undoc.type: Defensive damage modifier, Offensive damage modifier, Status effect

entries.description: After 1.5 seconds, Deathwing breathes a stream of flame, dealing 20 damage every 0.125 seconds. Drains 30 Energy per second.
entries.name: Molten Flame

undoc.notes: Molten Flame is usable in both forms. Molten Flame can be canceled 0.75 seconds after successfully casting it to end its effect early.

entries.description: After 2 seconds, Deathwing flies in the targeted direction, dealing 90 damage on impact and leaving scorched ground that deals 36 damage a second. Lasts 6 seconds.
entries.name: Cataclysm

undoc.notes: Starts on a 270 second cooldown at the beginning of a match. Disjoints projectiles such as most ranged Basic Attacks as well as Experience Globes which were moving toward Deathwing. Can be used to enter out-of-bounds areas by landing exactly perpendicular to and with the end of the launch being exactly on the edge of Terrain.

entries.description: After 3 seconds, fly into the sky, becoming immune to all effects and gaining 2.5% Health per second. Once cast, this Ability cannot be interrupted. Cannot be cast for 6 seconds after taking damage, Basic Attacking or casting an Ability.
entries.name: Dragonflight

undoc.notes: Taking damage only prevents using the Ability. Once it has been activated it cannot be interrupted. Last indefinitely until Destroyer or World Breaker are used. While in the air, enemies will be alerted by occasional roars.

entries.description: heals Deathwing for 100% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes. explosion damage heals Deathwing for 200% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes.
entries.name: Dragon Soul

entries.description: While Deathwing has 3 or more Armor Plates, he heals for 0.6% of his maximum Health per second.
entries.name: Molten Blood

entries.description: Deathwing's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes heal him for 25% of the damage dealt. Upon losing an Armor Plate, Deathwing becomes Protected for 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Draconic Might

entries.description: Increase the damage of Molten Flame against enemy Heroes by 25%. Increase this damage bonus to 75% when Molten Flame is cast at 75% Energy or higher.
entries.name: Infernus

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Molten Flame 's damage.

entries.description: After hitting an enemy Hero with , Deathwing deals 18 damage per second to all nearby enemies for the next 9 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times. Increases the explosion damage of by 150%.
entries.name: Heat Wave

undoc.notes: Burn damage from hitting Heroes with Incinerate does not benefit from Dragon Soul lifesteal. Burn Damage is not effected by damage modifers other than the one the 100% bonus damage to heroes from Deathwing's trait. Subsequent hits refresh the burn duration. Damaging enemy Heroes with burn damage does not trigger tower aggro. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Lava Burst 's' damage.

entries.description: While Deathwing has 3 or fewer Armor Plates, his damage is increased by 25%.
entries.name: Dragon's Ire

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Deathwing's damage output.

entries.description: Reduce the cooldowns of Deathwing's landing Abilities by 3 seconds. When Deathwing lands, he drops 7 meteors near the landing area, dealing 77 damage to enemies hit. Meteors prioritize landing on Heroes, otherwise they fall randomly in the area.
entries.name: Firestorm

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with or landing damage reduces their Spell Armor by 15 for 4 seconds and Deathwing's Basic Ability cooldowns by 2 seconds.
entries.name: Death Drop

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other negative Spell Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: After using Dragonflight, Deathwing can drop meteors anywhere within vision, dealing 58 damage to enemies in the area. Has 3 charges. If a Hero is hit, Deathwing heals for 3% of his maximum Health.
entries.name: Skyfall

undoc.notes: This Ability takes over the 'E' slot during Dragonflight. Cannot be cast on a point that is out of vision.

entries.description: When an enemy Fort or Keep is destroyed the cooldown of Cataclysm is reset. Cataclysm's periodic damage is increased by 80%.
entries.name: Burn Beneath My Shadow

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Cataclysm 's damage.

entries.description: After 1 second, Deathwing unleashes a mighty roar, dealing 25 damage to nearby Heroes and causing them to run in Fear for 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Bellowing Roar

undoc.notes: Can be cast during Dragonflight for the rest of the game if the Talent is selected during Molten Flame 's cast or while landing from Dragonflight. Fear is treated as a Silence effect.

entries.description: Molten Flame's Energy cost per second is reduced by 10. After using Molten Flame, Deathwing gains 15 Energy over 3 seconds.
entries.name: Wicked Inferno

entries.description: The bite from now Slows by 60% for 1.5 seconds. Reduce cooldown by 6 seconds and its Energy cost by 10.
entries.name: Ruination

entries.description: Basic Attacks against Rooted, Slowed, or Stunned enemy Heroes deal 40% additional damage and reduce the cooldowns of Deathwing's Basic Abilities by 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Fire and Fury

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Deathwing's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Dealing 320 damage with Molten Flame to enemy Heroes within 4 seconds causes them to burn for an additional 100 damage over 4 seconds. While burning, they explode every 1 second, dealing 80 damage to all nearby enemies.
entries.name: Conflagration

undoc.props: Area of Effect, Damage over Time

entries.description: Hitting Heroes with or landing causes their damage to be reduced by 75% and Slows them by 40% for 3.5 seconds.
entries.name: Gaze Onto Destruction

undoc.notes: Damage reduction stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting the target.

entries.description: Activate to gain a Shield equal to 30% of Deathwing's missing Health for 8 seconds. While the Shield holds, Deathwing regenerates 2% of his maximum Health per second. When the Shield expires or is destroyed, Deathwing regains Armor Plates appropriate for his new Health. The Shield and effect end immediately if Deathwing uses Dragonflight.
entries.name: Elementium Plating

entries.description: Enemy Heroes are Slowed by 40% while standing in scorched ground, and its duration is increased by 50%.
entries.name: Stood in the Fire

entries.description: or landing damage is increased by 400%. Deathwing also gains the benefits of all of his level 7 talents.
entries.name: Arrival of a God

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect landing damage from Dragonflight abilities.

entries.description: For the next 4 seconds after landing in form, Deathwing's damage is increased by 40% and his Basic Ability cooldowns recharge 50% faster. Damaging Heroes refreshes this effect and switching to form removes the effect.
entries.name: Destroyer's Rampage

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Deathwing's damage output. Damage bonus is lost on death unlike most other damage bonuses. This matters because some of Deathwing's Abilities can do damage after he dies, and damage modifiers are checked at the moment the damage hits.

entries.description: When at least 1 other allied Hero is nearby, Deckard gains 10 Armor and his Basic Abilities recharge 50% faster.
entries.name: Fortitude of the Faithful

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other effects that can affect cooldown refresh rate. Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Throw a Healing Potion on the ground that heals the first allied Hero who comes in contact with it for 285. Limit 5 active Potions.
entries.name: Healing Potion

undoc.notes: Healing Potion cannot be cast on unpathable terrain. Healing Potions do not grant any vision. Healing Potions cannot be picked up by Heroes at full health. Allies can see the landing location of the potion while it's in the air. Potions on the ground are also visible to the enemy.
undoc.val2: - Range 0 - 3.0: 0.125 seconds - Range 3.0 - 6.0: 0.375 seconds - Range 6.0+: 0.5 seconds

entries.description: Release the Horadric Cube. After 0.5 seconds it explodes, dealing 80 damage to all enemies in the area and Slowing them by 35% for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Horadric Cube

entries.description: Unfurl an enchanted scroll over 2.25 seconds, forming a triangle that deals 150 damage to enemies inside and Roots them for 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Scroll of Sealing

entries.description: After 1 second, Channel for 3 seconds, putting enemy Heroes in front of Deckard to Sleep while Channeling, and for 2 seconds after. Enemies can only be put to Sleep once per cast, and Sleep's effects end instantly if they take damage.
entries.name: Stay Awhile and Listen

undoc.notes: Interrupting the ability during its windup puts it on a 10 second cooldown. Sleep cannot be interrupted for the first 0.5 seconds. Sleep counts as a Stun effect and interacts with all effects that interact with Stuns.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Channeled cast (stationary), Stationary channel, Sleep

entries.description: After 1 second, create a swirling tome tornado that travels in the targeted direction, continually knocking away enemies that come into contact with it. Deals 20 damage to Heroes hit.
entries.name: Lorenado

undoc.notes: Removes existing knockback effects from the target. Enemies cannot be hit by Lorenado while a knockback from it is still active on them.

Continues to gain stacks after the Quests have been completed. Armor debuff and bonus damage is applied after the damage is dealt. The second Quest Reward also increases the duration of the reveal. Does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.
undoc.type: Defensive damage modifier, Status effect / Bonus damage

entries.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Scroll of Sealing grants 20% Spell Power for 16 seconds, up to 40%.
entries.name: Field Study

undoc.notes: Spell Power is calculated after damage is dealt. Spell Power from Field Study stacks additively with itself and other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage modifiers and healing dealt modifiers affecting Deckard.
undoc.type: Healing dealt modifier, Offensive damage modifier

entries.description: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by 100% and its slow by 30%. Only 1 Gem may be active at a time.
entries.name: Sapphire

undoc.notes: A Gem goes on cooldown once the Horadric Cube is cast. An activated Gem can be deactivated only by activating another Gem. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers.

entries.description: Whenever an ally is healed by a Healing Potion, they gain a 140 Shield for 6 seconds.
entries.name: Potion of Shielding

undoc.notes: Shield from Potion of Healing does not stack with itself. Subsequent applications refresh the amount and duration.

entries.description: Healing Potions restore 15 Mana and heal for an additional 114 over 3 seconds.
entries.name: Rejuvenation Potion

undoc.notes: Healing-over-time does not stack with itself. Subsequent applications refresh the duration.

entries.description: Activate to increase the next Horadric Cube's damage by 100% and it spawns 3 Lesser Healing Potions from each enemy Hero hit, healing allied Heroes for 250 when picked up. Lesser Healing Potions last for 10 seconds. Only 1 Gem may be active at a time.
entries.name: Ruby

undoc.notes: A Gem goes on cooldown once the Horadric Cube is cast. An activated Gem can be deactivated only by activating another Gem. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers.

entries.description: Reduce the Mana cost of Scroll of Sealing from 40 to 25. Each enemy Hero hit by Horadric Cube reduces the cooldown of Scroll of Sealing by 4 seconds.
entries.name: Cube Mastery

entries.description: Horadric Cube reduces Hero damage dealt by 30% for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Kanai's Cube

undoc.notes: Damage debuff stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting the target Hero's damage output.

entries.description: Activate to make the next Horadric Cube reduce healing received by 75% for 4 seconds. Only 1 Gem may be active at a time.
entries.name: Emerald

undoc.notes: A Gem goes on cooldown once the Horadric Cube is cast. An activated Gem can be deactivated only by activating another Gem. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers. Healing reduction stacks additively with other healing received modifiers.
undoc.type: Healing received modifier / Offensive damage modifier

entries.description: After 1 second, Channel for 3 seconds, putting enemy Heroes in front of Deckard to Sleep while Channeling, and for 2 seconds after. Enemies can only be put to Sleep once per cast, and Sleep's effects end instantly if they take damage.
entries.name: Stay Awhile and Listen

entries.description: After 1 second, create a swirling tome tornado that travels in the targeted direction, continually knocking away enemies that come into contact with it. Deals 20 damage to Heroes hit.
entries.name: Lorenado

entries.description: If a Healing Potion isn't picked up for at least 2 seconds, it heals for 100% more. Healing Potion heals for 25% more if the target is below 50% Health.
entries.name: Super Healing Potion

undoc.notes: Does not benefit the additional healing from Rejuvenation Potion. Bonuses stack additively with themselves and other healing dealt modifiers that can affect Healing Potion 's healing.

entries.description: When a Healing Potion is picked up, it also heals all nearby allied Heroes for 75% of the healing amount.
entries.name: Potion of Revival

undoc.notes: Only the primary target of Healing Potion benefits from additional effects from talents, such as Potion of Shielding and Rejuvenation Potion. Reduction to healing amount stacks additively with healing dealt modifiers that can affect Healing Potion 's healing.

entries.description: Activate Fortitude of the Faithful to empower nearby allied Hero Basic Attacks for 8 seconds, causing them to deal an additional 62 damage in an area and heal for 90 for each Hero hit. This effect can only occur once per second.
entries.name: Ancient Blessings

undoc.notes: Ancient Blessings is independent from Fortitude of the Faithful 's aura - The buff is applied one time upon cast to allies within the talent's radius for 8 seconds. The affected allies are not required to remain near Deckard to keep gaining its benefits. The damage is dealt in a separate instance of Spell Damage. The damage and healing are affected by the offensive damage modifiers and healing dealt modifiers on the attacker. Deckard's modifiers only affects his own attacks. The bonus damage is scored to the attacker, but the healing is scored to Deckard.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Attack Modifier, Splash

entries.description: Scroll of Sealing deals 200% more damage when hitting at least 2 Heroes.
entries.name: Scroll of Stone Curse

undoc.notes: Bonus damage stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Scroll of Sealing 's damage.

entries.description: If at least 2 allied Heroes are nearby, Fortitude of the Faithful grants an additional 10 Armor, 50% Mana regeneration per second, and causes Deckard's Basic Abilities to recharge an additional 50% faster.
entries.name: Safety in Numbers

entries.description: Every 5 seconds, Deckard's next Basic Attack Stuns Heroes for 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Horadric Staff

entries.description: Stay Awhile and Listen Silences and Blinds enemies for 3 seconds upon waking up from Sleep.
entries.name: Respect the Elderly

entries.description: Lorenado gains an additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds every time an enemy Hero is knocked back. This effect can only occur once per 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Morenados!

entries.description: After use, Healing Potions recharge after 8 seconds.
entries.name: Bottomless Flask

undoc.notes: Recharged potions benefit from every talent affecting Healing Potion, including this talent.

entries.description: Reduce the cooldown of all Gems to 5 seconds and the cooldown of Horadric Cube by 6 seconds.
entries.name: Perfect Gems

entries.description: Heal Dehaka for 29 Health per stored Essence over 5 seconds. Can be cast during Drag and Burrow. Gain 10 Essence from Takedowns and 2 Essence from nearby Minions dying. Maximum of 50 Essence.
entries.name: Essence Collection

entries.description: Dehaka lashes out his tongue, dealing 160 damage to the first enemy hit, Stunning and dragging them with him for 1.75 seconds. If Dehaka is Stunned or Silenced while using Drag, the effect ends.
entries.name: Drag

undoc.notes: Is also interrupted by Daze (from Knockbacks). Can use Basic Attacks and all other Abilities except Burrow without interrupting Drag.

entries.description: Deal 48 damage every 0.5 seconds to nearby enemies for 3.5 seconds. While active, you are able to move through units. Can be cast during Drag and Burrow.
entries.name: Dark Swarm

entries.description: Burrow into the ground, entering Stasis and becoming Invulnerable for 2 seconds. While Burrowed, Dehaka can move at 50% Movement Speed.
entries.name: Burrow

undoc.notes: Burrow can be reactivated after 0.5 seconds to end its effect early. Temporarily disables all Movement Speed buffs while active, causing Dehaka to always move at 50% speed while Burrowed. Will not remove Revealed status.

entries.description: Launch biomass that hits the first enemy Hero dealing 200 damage, revealing, Silencing, and Slowing them 30% for 3 seconds. Additionally, their vision radius is greatly reduced for 6 seconds.
entries.name: Isolation

undoc.notes: Interrupting the ability during its windup puts it on a 10 second cooldown. Enemy Heroes hit by Isolation are Revealed for 3 seconds.
undoc.props: Channeled cast (stationary), Revealed, Silence, Skillshot, Slow
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crows control, Status effect, Vision reduction

entries.description: After 4 seconds, heal for 100% of the damage Dehaka took over this period.
entries.name: Adaptation

undoc.notes: Healing is calculated from final damage taken, after damage modifications. Amount healed can further be affected by healing modifiers affecting either Dehaka's healing output (e.g. Spell Power) or healing received.

entries.description: Activate to burrow to a bush on the Battleground. Gain 20% Movement Speed while in a bush and for 2 seconds after leaving.
entries.name: Brushstalker

undoc.notes: Interrupting Brushstalker during its cast puts it on a 10 second cooldown. While traveling, Dehaka is removed from battleground and put in Stasis for 1.5 seconds, removing most debuffs. Targeting Brushstalker inside of Dehaka's unit radius (or self-casting it) causes Dehaka to use it in place and its cooldown to be reset when he emerges.

entries.description: Dark Swarm's duration is increased by 0.5 seconds and grants 50 Spell Armor while active.
entries.name: Enduring Swarm

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Spell Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Regneration Globes grant 10 Essence.
entries.name: Tissue Regeneration

undoc.notes: Essence collected while at maximum Essence still counts toward quest progress.

entries.description: Brushstalker's Movement Speed bonus now lasts for 4 seconds after leaving a bush.
entries.name: Enhanced Agility

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself and Brushstalker 's passive Movement Speed bonus. Essence collected while at maximum Essence still counts toward quest progress.

entries.description: Emerging from Burrow grants Dehaka Stealth for 3 seconds and knocks nearby enemies back, dealing 125 damage and Slowing them by 30% for 3 seconds. Reduce the cooldown of Burrow by 2 seconds.
entries.name: Lurker Strain

undoc.props: Area of Effect, Knockback, Slow, Stealth
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Status effect

entries.description: Increases Essence collected from Minions by 50%. Dark Swarm deals 40% more damage to Mercenaries.
entries.name: One-Who-Collects

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Dark Swarm 's damage against Mercenaries.

entries.description: Increases Essence gained from Takedowns by 100%, and gain 1 Essence for each enemy Hero hit by Dark Swarm, up to 3 at once.
entries.name: Hero Stalker

entries.description: Increase Drag's duration by 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Feeding Frenzy

entries.description: Drag Slows the target by 40% and reduces their healing received by 50% while active and for 2 seconds after ending. Dehaka's Basic Attacks increase the duration of the healing reduction to 2 seconds.
entries.name: Paralyzing Enzymes

entries.description: Every time Dark Swarm damages an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown by 0.4 seconds.
entries.name: Symbiosis

entries.description: Launch biomass that hits the first enemy Hero dealing 200 damage, revealing, Silencing, and Slowing them 30% for 3 seconds. Additionally, their vision radius is greatly reduced for 6 seconds.
entries.name: Isolation

entries.description: After 4 seconds, heal for 100% of the damage Dehaka took over this period.
entries.name: Adaptation

entries.description: Dark Swarm Slows enemy Heroes by 15% for 0.75 seconds and deals 50% more damage while Brushstalker's Movement Speed bonus is active.
entries.name: Ferocious Stalker

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Dark Swarm 's damage.

entries.description: Dark Swarm causes enemies hit to lose 10 Armor for 0.75 seconds, causing them to take 10% extra damage.
entries.name: Primal Swarm

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself or other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Gain 1.25% increased Attack Damage per Essence stored.
entries.name: Primal Rage

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Dehaka's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Increase Drag range by 20%.
entries.name: Elongated Tongue

entries.description: Increase movement speed while Burrowing to 120%.
entries.name: Tunneling Claws

entries.description: Dehaka gains 40 Armor and 15% increased Attack Speed while in a bush and for 4 seconds after leaving.
entries.name: Pack Leader

undoc.notes: Attack Speed from Pack Leader stacks additively with other effects affecting Dehaka's Attack Speed. Does not stack with itself or other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Isolation hits all Heroes near the first target, but it deals 60% less damage to all targets.
entries.name: Contagion

entries.description: Increases Adaptation healing to 200% of the damage received and reduces the cooldown by 40 seconds.
entries.name: Change Is Survival

undoc.notes: Increases the amount of healing stored, causing the bonus to stack multiplicatively with healing modifiers.

entries.description: Dehaka's Basic Attacks Slow the target by 20% for 1 second. If the target is a Hero, Dehaka gains 5 Essence.
entries.name: Essence Claws

entries.description: Reduces Brushstalker's cooldown by 50 seconds and the cast time by 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Apex Predator

entries.description: Basic Attacks grant a stack of Hatred, up to 10. Each Hatred stack increases Basic Attack damage by 8% and Movement Speed by 1%. Lasts 5 seconds.
entries.name: Hatred

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Valla's Basic Attack damage. Movement Speed stacks additively with itself, but not with other Movement Speed effects.

entries.description: Fire an arrow that deals 140 damage to the first target hit, then seeks up to 2 additional enemies, prioritizing Heroes, dealing 80 damage. Can hit an enemy multiple times.
entries.name: Hungering Arrow

undoc.notes: Bounces prioritize targets within the target groups that have gone the longest time without being hit by a bounce from the current cast of Hungering Arrow. Heroes are still prioritized over anything else. Enemies that are immune to skillshots can still be hit by the bounces, but not by the initial projectile. Bounce projectiles can be disjointed via Teleports, but only by Teleporting more than 3 units from the previous hit before it connects.

entries.description: Deal 159 damage to enemies within the target area.
entries.name: Multishot

undoc.notes: 1) Area grows to its maximum radius over 0.375 seconds in increments of 1.15.

entries.description: Dash to the target area. Valla's next Basic Attack within 2 seconds deals 6% increased damage per stack of Hatred.
entries.name: Vault

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and multiplicatively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Valla's Basic Attack damage. Vault is unhindered, which means Valla can move through all units with it. Affects the next Basic Attack that fires after finishing casting Vault, even if another Basic Attack was still in flight before casting Vault.

entries.description: Rapidly attack enemies within 10 range for 70 damage per hit, prioritizing Heroes over Minions. Valla is able to move and use Vault while strafing. Lasts for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Strafe

undoc.notes: Strafe prioritizes the closest enemies within the target group. Does not affect unaggroed neutral Mercenaries. Strafe can hit the same target only once per 0.3125 seconds, making it possible to hit a single enemy only a maximum of 11 times. Valla retains current stacks of Hatred during Strafe and their duration is refreshed when Strafe ends. Valla cannot Mount, use Healing Fountains or channel objectives while Strafe is active.

entries.description: Launch a wave of Shadow Beasts that deals 250 damage and Stuns enemies in the target area for 0.5 seconds. Stores up to 2 charges.
entries.name: Rain of Vengeance

undoc.notes: 1) Area consists of six overlapping 2.8 x 2.8 sub-areas that impact one by one over 0.5 seconds. Enemies cannot be hit more than once.

entries.description: Increase the number of Hungering Arrow bounces by 1.
entries.name: Puncturing Arrow

undoc.notes: Continues to gain stacks after the quest is completed.

Attack Speed loss on death only affects the bonus gained from the Gambit (and cannot go below 0%). Attack Speed from Creed of the Hunter stacks additively with other effects that can affect Attack Speed.

entries.description: Increase the range of Multishot by 20%. Multishot also fires 3 grenades that deal 100 damage and refund 25 Mana after hitting enemy Heroes.
entries.name: Arsenal

undoc.notes: Increases the time Multishot takes to expand to its new maximum radius by 0.125 seconds. Grenades are launced at the very middle and both edges of the AoE. Grenades are unaffected by Fire at Will 's damage bonus. A Hero cannot be hit by any of the grenades more than once. Grenades take 0.5 seconds to reach their maximum distance.

entries.description: Increase Vault's Basic Attack damage bonus from 6% to 15% per stack of Hatred. If this attack kills its victim within 1.5 seconds, the Mana cost and cooldown of Vault are refunded. Reduce the cooldown of Vault by 5 seconds.
entries.name: Death Dealer

undoc.notes: Any unit killing the target triggers the reset.

entries.description: Vault no longer has a Mana cost. Casting Vault resets the cooldown of Hungering Arrow.
entries.name: Repeating Arrow

entries.description: Hungering Arrow deals 150% additional damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
entries.name: Monster Hunter

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Hungering Arrow 's damage.

entries.description: Multishot Slows enemies by 20% for 2.5 seconds. Hungering Arrow deals 25% more damage to Slowed enemies.
entries.name: Frost Shot

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Multishot 's damage.

entries.description: Increase the Movement Speed bonus of each stack of Hatred to 2%.
entries.name: Hot Pursuit

entries.description: Rapidly attack enemies within 10 range for 70 damage per hit, prioritizing Heroes over Minions. Valla is able to move and use Vault while strafing. Lasts for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Strafe

entries.description: Launch a wave of Shadow Beasts that deals 250 damage and Stuns enemies in the target area for 0.5 seconds. Stores up to 2 charges.
entries.name: Rain of Vengeance

entries.description: Hitting a Hero with Hungering Arrow heals Valla for 4% of her maximum Health, and Multishot heals for 2%.
entries.name: Siphoning Arrows

undoc.notes: Hungering Arrow triggers healing for the initial hit and each bounce (provided they hit a Hero) and Multishot for each enemy Hero hit.

entries.description: Basic Attacks heal for 10% of the damage dealt, increased by 2% per Hatred stack.
entries.name: Tempered by Discipline

undoc.notes: Lifesteal bonus stacks additively with itself and other lifesteal effects.

entries.description: Activate to consume all Hatred, granting 3 Spell Armor per Hatred consumed for 5 seconds. Gain 15 Spell Armor, and each stack of Hatred heals for 1.2 Health per second.
entries.name: Gloom

undoc.notes: Actually heals for 1.25 Health per second, but there is a tooltip error. Spell Armor from active component stacks additively with itself and the passive component. Does not stack with other positive Spell Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: While at max Hatred, Multishot's cooldown recharges 50% faster. Reduce Multishot's Mana cost from 75 to 55.
entries.name: Punishment

undoc.notes: While active, reduces the cooldown of Multishot by 0.125 seconds every 0.25 seconds.

entries.description: While at max Hatred, increase all damage dealt by 10%.
entries.name: Seething Hatred

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Valla's damage output.

entries.description: Every 3rd Basic Attack against the same Hero deals an additional 4% of their maximum Health as damage.
entries.name: Manticore

undoc.notes: Bonus damage is dealt in a separate instance. Stacks toward bonus last for up to 5 minutes and persist after that Hero's death. The first stacks applied to any Hero start being replaced if the total stack count across all Hero units reaches 20 (possible against certain team compositions with high Heroic unit counts, including Hallucinations).

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Strafe increases its duration by 0.125 seconds. Strafe also fires penetrating bolts in a line for 34 damage every 0.25 seconds.
entries.name: Death Siphon

undoc.notes: Death Siphon 's piercing bolts can target the same enemy only once every 0.375 seconds. Death Siphon bolts do not prioritize Heroes or closer enemies. Targets are chosen at random from all valid targets in the area. Only regular bolts increase the duration.

entries.description: Basic Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Rain of Vengeance by 5 seconds. Each stack of Hatred increases your Attack Speed by 2%. While at max Hatred, gain an additional 30% Attack Speed.
entries.name: Storm of Vengeance

undoc.notes: Attack Speed from Storm of Vengeance stacks additively with itself and other Attack Speed effects.

entries.description: Gain 2 additional charges of Vault. Drop 3 Caltrops while Vaulting that deal 60 damage and Slow enemies by 40% for 1 second. Caltrop
entries.name: Acrobat

undoc.notes: 1) Caltrops are dropped at 0.125 second intervals during Vault.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Slow, Summon figment

entries.description: Gain 20% Basic Attack range. While at max Hatred, gain an additional 30% Basic Attack range.
entries.name: Farflight Quiver

entries.description: After reaching level 10, Diablo only consumes 75 souls when resurrecting.
entries.name: Black Soulstone

undoc.notes: Grants a Soul if Diablo is within 13.125 range of an enemy Minion as it dies or if the Minion is killed by Diablo.

entries.description: Charge an enemy, knocking them back, dealing 40 damage and gaining 15% Movement Speed for 2 seconds. If the enemy hits terrain, they are Stunned for 1 second and take an additional 130 damage.
entries.name: Shadow Charge

undoc.notes: Diablo is able to see collision edges of terrain in 18 radius. Target enemy is considered hit when Diablo is within 2.5 range of them. If the target is not within 30 degrees of the direction Diablo is traveling upon impact, the Ability is interrupted, and if Diablo hasn't moved more than 2 units from the cast location, its cooldown and Mana cost are refunded.
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Movement: Launch, Status effect

entries.description: Unleashes fire waves toward the targeted area that deal 12 damage each. Once they reach maximum range, they return, dealing an additional 36 damage. Diablo heals for 130% of the damage dealt to Heroes.
entries.name: Fire Stomp

undoc.notes: Sends 5 waves. Each wave can hit an enemy once on launch and once on return. Fire Stomp waves return toward Diablo's current location.

entries.description: Grabs the target and slams it behind Diablo, dealing 73 damage and Stunning for 0.25 seconds.

undoc.notes: Cannot target Unstoppable enemies. Activating this Ability during Shadow Charge on a valid, in-range target automatically queues up the Ability to attempt to cast immediately at the end of the Charge.

entries.description: Create a demonic rune under each enemy Hero on the battleground. After 1.75 seconds the rune explodes, dealing 137 damage and Stunning for 1.75 seconds.

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, become Unstoppable and Channel for up to 4 seconds, dealing 50 damage every 0.25 seconds to enemies in front of Diablo. Enemies affected are Slowed by 4% for 2 seconds, up to 40%. Lightning Breath's direction changes with your mouse cursor position.
entries.name: Lightning Breath

undoc.notes: Unstoppable is granted immediately. Damage and Slow start after the windup of 0.5625 seconds. If Diablo dies or is put in Stasis during the windup, Lightning Breath is put on a 10 second cooldown. Lightning Breath can be reactivated after the windup of 0.5625 seconds to end its effect early.

entries.description: Lunara's Basic Attacks and damaging Abilities poison their target, dealing 33 damage a second for 3 seconds. Every additional application increases the duration by 3 seconds, up to a maximum of 9 seconds.

entries.description: Enemies currently afflicted by Nature's Toxin have its duration increased by 3 seconds and are Slowed by 40% decaying over 3 seconds.
entries.name: Crippling Spores

undoc.notes: Only activatable if there is an enemy afflicted by Nature's Toxin. This cannot increase the duration to longer than 9 seconds.

entries.description: Spawn a Wisp to scout an area. Can be redirected once active. When the Wisp is in a bush for more than 2 seconds, its vision radius is increased by 75%. Lasts 45 seconds. Wisp
entries.name: Wisp

undoc.notes: Each instance of damage taken reduces Wisp's Health by 1. Only 1 Wisp can be active at a time. Cooldown starts when the ablility is cast.

entries.description: Orders your Wisp to move to a new location.

undoc.notes: Replaces Wisp while your Wisp is alive.

entries.description: Send forth vines that deal 184 damage to all enemies in a line. Stores up to 3 charges.

entries.description: Leap over an enemy, Slowing them by 80% for 0.35 seconds and dealing 271 damage. Stores up to 2 charges.

undoc.notes: Lunara is Unstoppable during the leap. Regardless, the Ability cannot be casted while Rooted, as it is a Movement Ability.
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Movement: Launch, Status effect

entries.description: Lunara moves 20% faster by leaping short distances.
entries.name: Dryad's Swiftness

undoc.notes: Lunara cannot Mount. Dryad's Swiftness grants Lunara +90% Movement Speed that gradually decays to -50% in a repeating cycle of 10 game ticks: +90% > +75% > +60% > +45% > +30% > +15% > +0% > +0% > -50% > -50% (1 tick = 0.0625 seconds), resulting in an average Movement Speed increase of +21.5%. The 50% ticks are set as a Movement Speed maximum and cannot be exceeded using any Movement Speed buffs. Issuing a 'stop' command resets Dryad's Swiftness ' Movement Speed cycle and can, with repetition, be used to reach higher average Movement Speed than intended.

entries.description: After remaining in a bush for 5 seconds, Wisp's vision radius is increased by 200% and reveals the surrouding area.
entries.name: Sentinel Wisp

entries.description: Nature's Toxin reveals enemies for its duration.
entries.name: Natural Perspective

undoc.notes: The effect is tied to Natures Toxin. If the damage over time is removed, Revealed status gets removed as well.

entries.description: After not Basic Attacking or taking damage for 2 seconds, increase the Move Speed bonus of Dryad's Swiftness by 10%.
entries.name: Hippity Hop

undoc.notes: Increases Dryad's Swiftness ' Movement Speed cycle's initial bonus to +120% and the decay rate on the first 6 ticks to -20% per tick. Due to cycling, the actual average Movement Speed bonus of Dryad's Swiftness increases to +32%.

entries.description: Increases Noxious Blossom's range by 25% and its radius by 20%. Noxious Blossom applies two stacks of Nature's Toxin to enemies hit.

entries.description: Casting Noxious Blossom grants Lunara 3 stacks of Splintered Spear. When Lunara uses her Basic Attack, it hits an additional enemy for each stack of Splintered Spear, consuming 1 stack for each target. Stores up to 3 stacks. Splintered Spear deals 90 damage, and applies Nature's Toxin.

Upon entering a Vehicle, the cooldown from the Passive is frozen at its value prior to entering, and resumes counting down from there upon exiting.

undoc.notes: Target is validated every 0.25 seconds. If the target is untargetable or outside the active radius during the check, the Ability ends. Target momentarily leaving the active radius or becoming untargetable does not end the Ability, as long as they are valid for the next check. Only one Lightning Rod may be active at a time. Recasting Lightning Rod on another Hero while it is still active causes only the initial damage to be dealt. Recasting Lightning Rod on the same Hero resets its duration. Damage bonus to Minions and Mercenaries stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Lightning Rod 's damage.

entries.description: Instead of mounting, Falstad can fly a great distance over terrain.

undoc.notes: Cast can be canceled by issuing a 'move' or 'stop' command or be interrupted by enemy abilities that Stun, Silence, Stasis or Knockback. Taking damage does not interrupt the cast. Interrupting the channel in any way puts Flight on a 10 second cooldown. An indicator will display the landing location to both teams on the ground (for the enemy team, it only appears if within vision).

Hammerang 's reactivation also grants stacks and benefits from the damage bonus. Continues to gain stacks after the quest reward is achieved. Per hit and reward damage bonuses stack additively with themselves and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Hammerang 's damage.
Damage bonus affects both initial and periodic damage instances. Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and offensive damage modifiers that can affect Lightning Rod 's damage.

entries.description: Basic Attack speed increased by 150%. Activate to change to , increasing Basic Attack range and damage and causing Basic Attacks to splash.
entries.name: Weapon Mode: Repeater Cannon

undoc.notes: Repeater Cannon's single-target DPS is twice that of Phase Bomb. Switching weapon modes does not dismount nor does it interrupt mounting, hearthing or channeling objectives. Attack Speed stacks additively with other effects that can affect Fenix's Attack Speed.

entries.description: Basic Attacks have 1.25 increased range, deal 25% more damage, and splash to nearby enemies. Activate to change to , increasing Basic Attack Speed.
entries.name: Weapon Mode: Phase Bomb

undoc.notes: Damage bonus is implemented as a direct base damage increase, causing it to stack multiplicatively with offensive damage modifiers. Switching weapon modes does not reset Fenix's auto-attack timer. The auto-attack timer ticks from its current completion percentage according to the weapon mode currently selected. Therefore, by attacking exclusively with Phase Bomb and quickly switching to Repeater Cannon and back just between auto-attacks (ideally staying in Repeater Cannon mode for all of the auto-attack downtime), Fenix can benefit from the bonus range, damage, and splash damage of Phase Bomb as well as the bonus attack speed of Repeater Cannon.

entries.description: Warp to a targeted location, phasing out after 0.5 seconds, and arriving 0.75 seconds later.
entries.name: Warp

undoc.notes: Interrupting Warp during its cast puts it on full cooldown. While phased out Fenix is put in Stasis. However, he does not get the debuff removal most Stasis effects give.

entries.description: Channel for 1.5 seconds, sweeping a laser in front of Fenix that locks onto enemy Heroes. Once Channeling finishes, fire 5 missiles at each locked Hero, dealing 79 damage each. Deals 50% increased damage to Slowed targets.
entries.name: Purification Salvo

undoc.notes: 1) Scan is performed in twenty-four 7.5 degree sections rotating counter-clockwise over 1.5 seconds and only detects visible enemy Heroes. Fenix cannot attack or use his Abilities while channeling. Interrupting the Ability during the channeled targeting period puts it on a 10-second cooldown. Purification Salvo missiles can only be disjointed if the target dies, is removed from the plane (certain Stasis effects) or instantly teleports farther than 60 units from its previous location. When disjointed, the missile expires upon reaching the target's location before the event. Otherwise, the missiles will keep redirecting to the target unit. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Purification Salvo 's damage.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Clamping, Mobile channel

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, Channel a powerful beam that spans across the battleground for 4 seconds, dealing 112 damage every 0.25 seconds to non-Structure enemies hit.
entries.name: Planet Cracker

undoc.notes: Interrupting the Ability during its 0.5 second windup channel puts it on a 10 second cooldown. Planet Cracker can be reactivated after 1 second to end its effect early.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Channeled cast (stationary), Stationary channel

undoc.notes: Bonus damage from Advanced Targeting does not benefit from Weapon Mode: Phase Bomb 's damage multiplier.

entries.description: After hitting enemy Heroes with Basic Attacks 3 times while Repeater Cannon is active, the next Basic Attack with Phase Bomb deals 150% more damage and splashes in a 50% larger area.

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Fenix's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: After moving, Fenix's next Basic Attack deals 35% more damage to Heroes.

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Fenix's Basic Attack damage. The bonus damage vs Heroes applies to splash damage as well, even if the primary target is non-Heroic.

entries.description: Basic Attacks against Slowed Heroes with Repeater Cannon active grant 10% Movement Speed for 4 seconds, up to 40%.

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself, but not with other sources of Movement Speed.

entries.description: Every 10 seconds, Fenix's next Basic Attack with Phase Bomb active Slows all enemies hit by 60%, decaying in strength over 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Inhibiting Energy

undoc.notes: Goes on full cooldown if Fenix's Basic Attack misses due to Blinds, but does not go on cooldown if it misses due to the target Evading.

entries.description: While Fenix has shields from Shield Capacitor, he gains 10% Movement Speed. This bonus is increased to 15% when Fenix loses shields from Shield Capacitor.
entries.name: Emergency Protocol

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other sources of Movement Speed.

entries.description: Plasma Cutter deals 35% more damage to Slowed targets.
entries.name: Combat Advantage

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Plasma Cutter 's damage.

entries.description: After arriving with Warp, gain 175% Attack Speed for 4 seconds while in Repeater Cannon mode. Hero Takedowns reset Warp's cooldown.

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with Attack Speed bonus from Weapon Mode: Repeater Cannon and other effects that can affect Fenix's Attack Speed.

entries.description: Activate to gain 40% Basic Attack damage for 5 seconds. Basic Attacking a Hero refreshes this duration. Once Divert Power: Weapons ends, drain all of Shield Capacitor's Shields.
entries.name: Divert Power: Weapons

undoc.notes: Cooldown starts ticking immediately when the Ability is cast. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Fenix's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Channel for 1.5 seconds, sweeping a laser in front of Fenix that locks onto enemy Heroes. Once Channeling finishes, fire 5 missiles at each locked Hero, dealing 79 damage each. Deals 50% increased damage to Slowed targets.

entries.description: Fenix gains 30 Spell Armor while he has a Shield from Shield Capacitor.

entries.description: The time before Shield Capacitor begins regenerating after taking damage is reduced by 2 seconds. Whenever Fenix is healed, Shield Capacitor's Shield recharges for 60% of the healing received.

undoc.notes: Shield healing can be increased or decreased based on Fenix's Spell Power.

entries.description: Permanently reduce Fenix's maximum Health by 30% but increase Shield Capacitor's Shield by 40%. Basic Attacks regenerate Shields equal to 10% of the damage dealt.

undoc.notes: This lowers overall Fenix's effective Health pool (including Shields) by 2%. Shield gain is calculated from final damage dealt after all damage modifications.

entries.description: Basic Attacks with Repeater Cannon reduce Ability cooldowns by 0.5 seconds. Basic Attacks with Phase Bomb active reduce Ability cooldowns by 0.5 seconds per Hero hit.

undoc.notes: Affects both Basic and Heroic Abilities, but not Trait or Talents that have a cooldown. Repeater Cannon attacks do not require the target to be a Hero. Phase Bomb does not grant cooldown reduction for the primary target hit, even if it is a Hero. Phase Bomb attack cooldown reduction is capped at 1.5 seconds per Basic Attack (i.e. 3 Heroes).

entries.description: Planet Cracker's width increases by 100% over 1.5 seconds. Reduce Planet Cracker's cooldown by 40 seconds.

entries.description: Repeater Cannon grants 100% more Attack Speed, and Phase Bomb grants 1.25 more range.
