undoc.notes: Stacks additively with Attack Speed bonus from Weapon Mode: Repeater Cannon and other effects that can affect Fenix's Attack Speed.

entries.description: Upon taking fatal damage, Shield Capacitor regains 800 Shields. This effect has a 120 second cooldown.
entries.name: Unconquered Spirit

entries.description: Gain 40 Armor and deal 40 damage to nearby enemies every 0.5 seconds for 4 seconds. Each Hero hit by Flame Stream reduces Pyromania's cooldown by 4 seconds.
entries.name: Pyromania

undoc.notes: Does not affect unaggroed neutral Mercenaries. Cooldown reduction can trigger for both streams as well as the bonus damage from hitting an enemy with both. Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack. Blaze's Basic Attacks Splash in a 55 degree wide cone starting from the weapon he is firing with and hit all targets in front of him, up to 5.05 range. Blaze alternates the hand he uses to attack, causing a small offset to the starting point of every Basic Attack.

entries.description: Fire two streams that deal 76 damage to enemies hit, and an additional 120 damage to enemies hit by both streams. Flame Stream Ignites Oil Spills it comes in contact with.
entries.name: Flame Stream

undoc.notes: Additional damage cannot affect Structures. If multiple Blazes are on a team, the double hit effect can be triggered by single Flame Streams from different Blazes if they hit the target within 0.25 seconds of each other.

entries.description: Dispense a slick of oil that lasts for 5 seconds and Slows enemies that come in contact with it by 50%. Oil Spills are Ignited for 2.5 seconds when hit by Flame Stream. Ignited Oil Spills no longer Slow enemies, but instead deal 16 damage to them every 0.3 seconds. Additionally, Blaze is healed for 49 Health every 0.3 seconds while standing in Ignited Oil Spills. Stores up to 2 charges.
entries.name: Oil Spill

undoc.notes: 1) One Oil Spill consists of three smaller circular puddles with 1.5 radius, with the centers 1.5 units apart. Each smaller Oil puddle provides vision in 2.5 radius. Igniting an Oil Spill sets its remaining duration to 2.5 seconds regardless of how long it has been on the ground. If no secondary direction is issued, Oil Spill will be cast toward the direction Blaze is facing. Self-casting creates an Oil Spill starting from Blaze's feet toward the direction he is facing. Blaze can ignite any ally Blaze's Oil Spill, but only the Blaze who Ignited the Oil can heal from it.

entries.description: After 0.375 seconds, charge forward. Colliding with an enemy Hero deals 52 damage to all nearby enemy Heroes and Stuns them for 1.25 seconds.
entries.name: Jet Propulsion

undoc.notes: Enemies that are immune to skillshots cannot be hit by the initial dash, but can be affected by the impact, as long as they are not also immune to AoE. Does not search inside of Blaze's own hitbox upon a successful cast, so units who can ignore collision such as Dehaka with Dark Swarm active will not be hit if overlapping with Blaze on cast.
undoc.type: Crowd control, Spell Damage / Movement: Dash

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, deploy and enter a Bunker with 1435 Health. Blaze and his allies can enter and exit the Bunker at will. While in the Bunker, occupants gain access to Flamethrower, dealing 150 damage to enemies in a line. Exiting the Bunker grants 25 Armor for 2 seconds. Bunkers last 10 seconds, or until destroyed. Bunker
entries.name: Bunker Drop

undoc.notes: Upon cast, Blaze automatically enters the Bunker. Otherwise, entering the Bunker requires a 0.5 second Stationary channel. Bunker Drop is interrupted, putting it on a 10 second cooldown, if Blaze dies or is put in Stasis during the initial delay. Heroes inside the Bunker are put in Stasis. In addition to usual effects of Stasis, the targets are removed from ground plane (disjoints certain projectiles), have no collision and cannot be seen on the minimap or revealed. Damage dealt by bunker is unaffected by hero damage modifers. Players can exit the Bunker to a direction of their choice, 1 second after entering. Exiting the Bunker requires you to target an area you have vision over. If the Bunker is put in Time Stop (by Void Prison), all units inside are put in Time Stop as well. If Blaze is put in Time Stop during the initial delay, the Bunker drops as usual after the Time Stop ends.

entries.description: Deal 150 damage to enemies in a line.
entries.name: Bunker - Flamethrower

undoc.notes: Does not ignite Oil Spills.

entries.description: Channel for up to 2.6 seconds. Upon ending, Slow nearby enemies by 60% and deal 55 damage to them every 0.5 seconds. Combustion's Slow and damage over time duration is extended the longer Blaze Channels, from 1 second up to 5 seconds. Blaze's Movement Speed is reduced by 40% while Channeling.
entries.name: Combustion

undoc.notes: Every 0.3125 seconds of channeling increases Slow and DoT duration by 0.5 seconds Combustion can be reactivated after 0.5 seconds to trigger its end effect early. Interrupting Combustion in any way during its channel fires it with its accumulated duration. During the channel Blaze can Mount by targeting an ally Mounted with the Toy Train equipped.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Damage over Time, Mobile channel, Slow

entries.description: While over 80% Health, gain 20% bonus Attack Speed and 10% bonus Movement Speed. Activate to gain 100% Attack Speed and 25% Movement Speed for 5 seconds.

undoc.notes: Movement Speed bonus does not stack with itself or other Movement Speed bonuses. Attack Speed bonus stacks additively with itself and other Attack Speed bonuses.

entries.description: Activate to gain a Shield that absorbs 590 damage over 5 seconds. When taking damage while below 30% maximum Health, Endurance Stimpack will automatically be cast if it is not on cooldown.

entries.description: Activate to gain 40 Mana and cause Basic Ability cooldowns to recharge 100% faster for 5 seconds.

undoc.notes: Reduces Basic Ability cooldowns by 0.0625 seconds every 0.0625 seconds.

entries.description: Increase Oil Spill's area by 20%. Each enemy Hero hit by Flame Stream reduces the cooldown of Oil Spill by 0.75 seconds and refunds 5 Mana.
entries.name: Oil Dispersal

undoc.notes: Increases the radius of Oil puddles by 0.3, resulting in 0.6 bonus length and width to the Oil Spill (the separation among the puddles is not increased). This actually results in approximately a 32% increase in the area of each Oil Spill. Effects trigger per stream. Enemies hit by both streams trigger the cooldown reduction and Mana refund for both of them.

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Pyromania reduces their damage dealt by 8% for 2.5 seconds, up to 40%.
entries.name: Meltdown

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that affect the target Hero's damage output.

entries.description: Increase Basic Attack area by 15%, and Basic Attack damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters by 40%.
entries.name: Incinerator Gauntlets

undoc.notes: Also increases damage against Summons. 15% increase in splash range, so actually a 32% increase in splash area. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Blaze's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Each stream of Flame Stream reduces the Spell Power of Heroes hit by 20% for 4 seconds, up to 40%.
entries.name: Suppressive Fire

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself and other damage modifiers that can affect the target's Spell Power.

entries.description: Enemies standing in Oil Spills and Ignited Oil Spills have their Attack Speed reduced by 35% for 4 seconds.

entries.description: Jet Propulsion creates Oil Spills along Blaze's path. If Jet Propulsion impacts an enemy Hero, an additional Oil Spill is created underneath them.

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, deploy and enter a Bunker with 1435 Health. Blaze and his allies can enter and exit the Bunker at will. While in the Bunker, occupants gain access to Flamethrower, dealing 150 damage to enemies in a line. Exiting the Bunker grants 25 Armor for 2 seconds. Bunkers last 10 seconds, or until destroyed.
entries.name: Bunker Drop

entries.description: Channel for up to 2.6 seconds. Upon ending, Slow nearby enemies by 60% and deal 55 damage to them every 0.5 seconds. Combustion's Slow and damage over time duration is extended the longer Blaze Channels, from 1 second up to 5 seconds. Blaze's Movement Speed is reduced by 40% while Channeling.
entries.name: Combustion

entries.description: Increase Ignited Oil Spill damage by 45%.
entries.name: Grill and Kill

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Oil Spill 's damage.

entries.description: Enemies standing in Oil Spill when it is Ignited are Slowed by 40% and take 35% more Basic Attack damage from Blaze for 3 seconds. Additionally, Basic Attack splashes Ignite Oil Spills.
entries.name: Adhesive Petroleum

undoc.notes: Effects are applied only to enemies that are standing on an Oil Spill as it is being Ignited - enemies that enter the Oil Spill after it has been Ignited are unaffected. Slow is not removed by leaving the area of an Ignited Oil Spill. Adhesive Petroleum can be fully removed with Invulnerable and friendly Stasis effects. Unstoppable and CC removal effects only remove the Slow and not the damage bonus debuff. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Blaze's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Jet Propulsion's collision deals 260 damage to the first enemy Hero hit.
entries.name: Collision Course

undoc.notes: Damage is dealt in a separate instance.

entries.description: Each enemy hit by Jet Propulsion grants 10 Armor for 3 seconds and reduces its cooldown by 1.25 seconds.

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself, but not with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Heal for 75% of the damage dealt by Pyromania.

entries.description: Activate to gain 50 Spell Armor for 3 seconds. Upon expiration, gain a Shield equal to 125% of the Spell Damage taken while Juggernaut Plating was active.
entries.name: Juggernaut Plating

undoc.notes: Shield amount is calculated from final damage taken, after modifications. Shield from Juggernaut Plating does not expire.

entries.description: Occupants can cast Oil Spill from Bunker Drop every 6 seconds. Additionally, Bunker Drop's Armor bonus upon exiting is increased by 25, and its duration by 1 second.
entries.name: Fortified Bunker

undoc.notes: When an Oil Spill is cast from the Bunker, it can only heal the Blaze who ignites it (only relevant if there are multiple Blazes on the same team in ARAM, or if Abathur uses Ultimate Evolution on Blaze). This is different from the usual Ignited Oil Spill behavior. Additionally, Oil Spills placed by Heroes other than Blaze, when Ignited by Blaze, only do the base damage of the Ability (as if it were ignited by a level 0 Blaze).

entries.description: While Channeling Combustion, Blaze's Movement Speed is no longer reduced, and nearby enemies are Slowed by 60%.
entries.name: Flash Fire

entries.description: Basic Attacks Slow enemies by 5% and deal an additional 18 damage over 2.5 seconds. Stacks up to 5 times.
entries.name: Burn Notice

undoc.notes: Damage stacks up to 6 times, not 5, though the Slow stacks up to 5 times. Basic Attacks deal a tick of damage per new stack and refresh the duration of all stacks. They also restart the DoT tick timer for each stack, synchronizing them (so the next damage tick for all stacks will be 0.5s after the most recent Basic Attack). This also means DoT ticks that happen on the same server tick (1/16 s) as a Basic Attack generally happen twice (the DoT takes place and then the on-hit DoT tick from the Basic Attack resolves) There is observed to be about a 75% chance of this happening when a Basic Attack resolves, and a 25% chance of only 1 tick per stack, for reasons not fully understood. This is hypothesized to be because the Basic Attack, which applies and refreshes DoT durations, and the pre-scheduled DoT ticks happen on the same server tick, so which resolves first is seemingly random.
undoc.props: Attack Modifier, Damage over Time, Slow

entries.description: Activate to increase Gall's damage by 25%, but reduce Cho's Armor by 25. Gall is permanently immune to Stun and Silence effects.

Changes the base cooldown of both Abilities and therefore stacks multiplicatively with the sum of any cooldown reduction applied to Cho'gall.

The thrown enemy is briefly Stunned, interrupting channeled abilities, and then Dazed for the remainder of the flight. The thrown enemy also receives the impact effects upon landing.

entries.description: Deal 50 damage to nearby enemies and Slow them by 40% for 1.5 seconds. Deals 100% more damage to Heroes, and each Hero hit reduces the cooldown by 1 second. Stores up to 3 charges.
entries.name: Decimate

entries.description: If Groundbreaker Stuns a Hero, Garrosh gains a 350 point Shield for 6 seconds.
entries.name: Defensive Measures

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself. Subsequent applications refresh the Shield and duration.

entries.description: When hitting a Hero, Bloodthirst heals for an additional 15% of Garrosh's maximum Health over 3 seconds.
entries.name: Bloodcraze

undoc.notes: Heal over Time from Bloodcraze does not stack with itself. Subsequent applications refresh the duration.

entries.description: Armor Up can be activated to increase its Armor bonus by 100% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Double Up

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other sources of Armor.

entries.description: Hitting a Hero with Groundbreaker's Stun and throwing them with Wrecking Ball within 3 seconds reduces Wrecking Ball's cooldown by 10 seconds, regardless of order.
entries.name: Mortal Combo

undoc.notes: Comboing multiple units with the level 20 talent Titanic Might allows an immediate full cooldown reset on Wrecking Ball, since the 10 second CDR is per Hero affected.

entries.description: Wrecking Ball Stuns enemies near the impact area for 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Earthshaker

entries.description: Gain 5% maximum Health, increase Groundbreaker's Slow duration by 1 second, and Bloodthirst gains an additional charge.
entries.name: Seasoned Soldier

entries.description: Increase the duration of Warlord's Challenge by 0.5 seconds. If an enemy Hero is killed while affected by Warlord's Challenge, its cooldown is reduced by 45 seconds.
entries.name: Death Wish

entries.description: Heroes hit by Decimate deal 40% less damage for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Deadly Calm

undoc.notes: Damage reduction stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting the target hero's damage output.

entries.description: Wrecking Ball now throws the 2 closest enemies.
entries.name: Titanic Might

entries.description: Body Check gains an additional charge and its healing reduction is increased by an additional 45%.
entries.name: Inner Rage

undoc.notes: Requires Body Check.

entries.description: Activate to jump to the target area.
entries.name: Cyber Agility

undoc.notes: Genji's Basic Attack launches 3 projectiles in quick succession, each one doing the full amount of damage listed in his base stats.

entries.description: Throw 3 Shuriken in a spread pattern, each dealing 65 damage to the first enemy hit. Stores up to 3 charges. Shuriken's cooldown replenishes all charges at the same time.
entries.name: Shuriken

undoc.notes: Shuriken at the edges are aligned 10 degrees to both sides from the target point. Cooldown starts when the first charge is consumed.

entries.description: Channel for 1.25 seconds, becoming Protected and blocking damage. Any damage blocked while channeling causes Genji to throw a Kunai toward the nearest enemy, prioritizing Heroes and dealing 55 damage.
entries.name: Deflect

undoc.notes: Genji cannot use Basic Attacks while Deflect is active. Using other Abilities instantly ends Deflect. Cannot target enemies out of vision. Damage over Time effects and Abilities that deal periodic damage proc Deflect on every tick of damage. If the channel gets interrupted by a Stun or a Silence, the damage of the Ability that caused the interruption still gets deflected.

entries.description: Dash forward, dealing 190 damage to all enemies in a line. Enemy Heroes who die within 1.5 seconds of being hit with Swift Strike cause the cooldown and Mana cost to be refunded.
entries.name: Swift Strike

undoc.notes: Killing Hallucinations does not grant the cooldown reset or Mana refund.

entries.description: Unleash the Dragonblade for 8 seconds. While active, Dragonblade can be reactivated to lunge forward and slash in a huge arc, dealing 240 damage.
entries.name: Dragonblade

undoc.notes: Dragonblade replaces Shuriken for its duration and can be reactivated with both the 'Q' and 'R' keys. Deflect, Swift Strike and Cyber Agility can be used normally during Dragonblade.

entries.description: Perform two slashes dealing 145 damage. The slashes detonate after 1.25 seconds causing an additional 290 damage to enemies in their area.
entries.name: X-Strike

undoc.notes: 1) Slash AoEs consist of a 1.0 x 6.0 rectangle in the middle and 1.0 x 5.0 triangles on both ends. Slashes are aligned 45 degrees to both sides from the direction Genji is facing, the first slash hitting from rear left to front right. Genji turns toward the target point before the Ability is cast. The first two strikes take place at 0.3125 second intervals and the final strike 0.5625 seconds later. Casting X-Strike removes Root effects from Genji. For the duration of the slash animation (1.3125 seconds), Genji is put in a Pseudo-Stasis. In addition to usual effects of Stasis, Genji is removed from ground plane (disjoints certain projectiles) and has no collision, but does not receive the initial expanded debuff removal. Self-casting the Ability slightly moves Genji forward.
undoc.type: Spell Damage / Movement: Teleport, Status effect

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Swift Strike increases Genji's Movement Speed by 30% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Swift as the Wind

entries.description: While mounted, the range of Cyber Agility is increased by 70%, its cooldown is reduced by 14 seconds, and it Slows enemy Heroes in its landing area by 25% for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Agile Dismount

undoc.notes: Range of Cyber Agility is not increased for casts queued up using the Command Queue system (Shift by default) prior to Mounting.

entries.description: Jumping over terrain with Cyber Agility increases Movement Speed by 30% and grants Stealth for 4 seconds. Genji's Heroic ability heals him for 10% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes, increasing up to 30% the lower Genji's health is.
entries.name: Pathfinder

undoc.notes: Genji is unrevealable for 1 second after entering Stealth.
Each shuriken hitting an enemy Hero contributes a stack.

entries.description: Enemies hit by the end of Swift Strike take an additional 134 damage after 1 second.
entries.name: Strike At The Heart

entries.description: After Genji blocks 330 damage with Deflect, he may activate Dragon Claw to deal 190 damage to all nearby enemies.
entries.name: Dragon Claw

undoc.notes: Stored damage does not scale upon leveling up, but a fully charged Ability remains activatable.

entries.description: When Deflect ends, Genji gains a Shield equal to 100% of the damage blocked for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Augmented Guard

undoc.notes: The Shield is actually gained 62.5ms (1 server tick) after Deflect ends, so there is a small window where Genji may take damage before it is applied.

entries.description: Deflected damage reduces the cooldown of Deflect by 2 seconds, up to a maximum of 10 seconds.
entries.name: Perfect Defense

entries.description: Using Cyber Agility grants 40 Spell Armor for 4 seconds. Genji dodges 1 Heroic Basic Attack every 5 seconds.
entries.name: Cyber Shield

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Unleash the Dragonblade for 8 seconds. While active, Dragonblade can be reactivated to lunge forward and slash in a huge arc, dealing 240 damage.
entries.name: Dragonblade

entries.description: Perform two slashes dealing 145 damage. The slashes detonate after 1.25 seconds causing an additional 290 damage to enemies in their area.
entries.name: X-Strike

entries.description: Hitting an enemy with all 3 Shuriken deals 110 bonus damage. Deals 40% less damage to structures.
entries.name: Shingan

entries.description: Each enemy Hero hit with Swift Strike reduces its cooldown by 3 seconds.
entries.name: Flow Like Water

entries.description: Increase Genji's Basic Attack Range by 1. Each time Genji hits an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack, increase his Basic Attack damage by 1% for 3 seconds, stacking up to 15%.
entries.name: Way Of The Shimada

undoc.notes: Each hit of the three part Basic Attack contributes a stack. Stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Genji's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Deflect also deals an additional 33% of the damage blocked.
entries.name: Reflect

undoc.notes: All damage is dealt in Spell Damage regardless of the damage type of the blocked attack. Reflected damage stored is calculated after defensive damage modifiers from the final damage taken. When the damage is dealt by Genji, it is affected by his offensive damage modifiers. Finally, the damage taken by the target can further be affected by their defensive damage modifiers.

entries.description: After 1 second, Swift Strike deals an additional 125 damage to all enemies in the area.
entries.name: Final Cut

entries.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Swift Strike increases the damage of the next Swift Strike by 30%. This bonus stacks up to 3 times.
entries.name: Steady Blade

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers affecting Swift Strike.

entries.description: Each time Dragonblade hits an enemy Hero, the duration of Dragonblade is increased by 0.5 seconds. If a Hero is killed within 1.5 seconds of being hit by Dragonblade, Swift Strike's cooldown is reset.
entries.name: The Dragon Becomes Me

entries.description: Each enemy Hero hit by X-Strike reduces its cooldown by 12.5 seconds.
entries.name: Living Weapon

entries.description: Shuriken now pierce all enemies hit. Swift Strike's refund grants 1 charge of Shuriken.
entries.name: Sharpened Stars

entries.description: Greymane can use certain Abilities to shapeshift between a and a . While , Greymane's Basic Attacks are ranged. While , Greymane gains 10 Armor, and his Basic Attacks become melee, but deal 40% more damage.
entries.name: Curse of the Worgen (Trait)

undoc.notes: Successfully mounting in the Worgen form shapeshifts Greymane back into Human, placing Darkflight on cooldown. Worgen bonus damage stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Greymane's Basic Attack damage. Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Hurl a flask that deals 55 damage to the first enemy hit and explodes for 220 damage to enemies in a cone behind them. Swipe forward, damaging enemies hit.
entries.name: Gilnean Cocktail

undoc.notes: 1) Splash radius grows from 1.5 to 6.0 over 0.3125 seconds in increments of 1.125. Enemies who are immune to skillshots can be hit by the splash, but not by the initial projectile, as long as they are not also immune to AoE.

entries.description: Swipe in the targeted direction, dealing 126 damage to enemies hit. Damage the first enemy hit and deal heavy damage behind them.
entries.name: Razor Swipe

undoc.notes: 1) After dashing, Greymane swipes a half circle shaped area in front of him. Greymane can move through units during Razor Swipe.

entries.description: Gain 50% Attack Speed for 3 seconds. Basic Attacks refresh this duration and reduce the cooldown of Inner Beast by 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Inner Beast

undoc.notes: Cooldown starts when the effect ends. Stacks additively with other effects that can affect Greymane's Attack Speed.

entries.description: Shapeshift into a and leap at an enemy, dealing 88 damage. Roll away and shapeshift into a .
entries.name: Darkflight

undoc.notes: Cooldown is shared with Disengage.

entries.description: Roll away and shapeshift into a . Shapeshift into a and leap at an enemy.
entries.name: Disengage

undoc.notes: Cooldown is shared with Darkflight.

entries.description: Leap at an enemy Hero and shapeshift into a , slashing for 355 damage. If this kills them, the Ability can be used a second time within 10 seconds for free.
entries.name: Go for the Throat

undoc.notes: 1) Greymane is Unstoppable during the leap until he reaches the target. Enemy Heroes low enough on Health to be killed by Go for the Throat are indicated to the player by a red skull above the unit when the Ability is not on cooldown. Go for the Throat places Disengage on cooldown if it was cast from Human form. The Ability is interrupted if the target moves 8.5 units past its range. Recast is granted if the target dies to anything within 0.1875s of being hit by this Ability.
undoc.type: Spell Damage / Movement: Launch, Status effect

entries.description: Greymane shapeshifts into a and fires a bullet that hits the first enemy Hero in its path, dealing 35% of their current Health in damage. Does not affect Vehicles.
entries.name: Cursed Bullet

undoc.notes: Casting Cursed Bullet from either form does not affect the cooldown of Darkflight or Disengage.

entries.description: Increase the cooldown reduction from Basic Attacks during Inner Beast from 0.5 to 1.2 seconds, and Form's Armor bonus from 10 to 15.
entries.name: Wolfheart

entries.description: Increases Gilnean Cocktail's range by 30% and refunds 45 Mana if it hits an enemy Hero.
entries.name: Perfect Aim

undoc.notes: Both initial projectile and splash count. Multiple hits do not grant more Mana.

entries.description: Increases Inner Beast's duration to 4 seconds, and causes Spell Damage to also refresh its duration.
entries.name: Viciousness

entries.description: Using Darkflight grants 50 Physical Armor against the next 2 Hero Basic Attacks while in Form, reducing the damage taken by 50%.
entries.name: Thick Skin

undoc.notes: Charges are lost immediately upon entering Human form. Does not stack with itself or other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Disengage grants Stealth for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Eyes in the Dark

undoc.notes: Greymane is unrevealable for the first 0.625 seconds of Stealth. Basic Attacking or using Abilities instantly removes Stealth.

entries.description: Inner Beast causes Basic Attacks to restore 10 Mana, and reduce the cooldown of Healing Fountain by 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Insatiable

entries.description: Increases Basic Attack Range by 1.1.
entries.name: Quicksilver Bullets

entries.description: {{questonly|Every 6 Basic Attacks against Heroes increase Basic Attack damage by 1%, up to 30%. Basic Attacks grant credit for 3 Basic Attacks. Half of this bonus is lost upon death.}}
entries.name: Wizened Duelist

undoc.notes: Upon death, incomplete stacks are nullified. The remaining damage bonus from completed stacks is truncated after halving. Stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers affecting Greymane's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Leap at an enemy Hero and shapeshift into a , slashing for 355 damage. If this kills them, the Ability can be used a second time within 10 seconds for free.
entries.name: Go for the Throat

entries.description: Greymane shapeshifts into a and fires a bullet that hits the first enemy Hero in its path, dealing 35% of their current Health in damage. Does not affect Vehicles.
entries.name: Cursed Bullet

entries.description: Increases Darkflight and Disengage's range by 35%, and reduce their cooldowns by 1 second.
entries.name: Running Wild

entries.description: Increases Razor Swipe's lunge distance by 60%, and Basic Attacks reduce Razor Swipe's cooldown by 1.5 second.
entries.name: Unfettered Assault

undoc.notes: End area size is unaffected by the distance bonus.

entries.description: Inner Beast increases Movement Speed by 30% once it has been active for 3 seconds.
entries.name: On the Prowl

entries.description: Increases the Attack Speed bonus of Inner Beast by an additional 40% after it has been active for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Eager Wolf

entries.description: Attacking a Hero who is Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned increases Greymane's Basic Attack damage by 25% for 3 seconds, increased to 50% while in Worgen Form.
entries.name: Lord of His Pack

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Greymane's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Basic Attacks against Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 3% of the Hero's maximum Health.
entries.name: Alpha Killer

entries.description: Go For The Throat's damage is increased by 25%. If Go For The Throat kills its target, reset the cooldowns of Greymane's Abilities.
entries.name: Unleashed

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Go for the Throat 's damage. Reset is granted if the target dies to anything within 0.1875s of being hit by this Ability.

entries.description: Cursed Bullet's damage is reduced to 30% of the target's current Health, but its cooldown is reduced by 24 seconds.
entries.name: Gilnean Roulette

entries.description: Basic Attacks splash for 100% damage behind the target.
entries.name: Hunter's Blunderbuss

undoc.notes: Secondary targets of splashing attacks benefit from attack modifiers except Wizened Duelist.

entries.description: Basic Attacks cleave for 100% damage. Increase Razor Swipe's damage by 100%.
entries.name: Tooth and Claw

undoc.notes: Secondary targets of cleaving attacks benefit from attack modifiers except Wizened Duelist. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Razor Swipe 's damage.

entries.description: 222 Life Gul'dan does not regenerate Mana. Activate to restore 25% of Gul'dan's Mana.
entries.name: Life Tap

undoc.notes: Cannot be used if Gul'dan is at maximum Mana or if using it would be lethal. Does not dismount.

entries.description: Release a wave of flame, dealing 210 damage to enemies.
entries.name: Fel Flame

undoc.notes: 1) Area grows from 1.0 to its maximum radius over 0.5625 seconds in 1.04 increments. Casting Fel Flame sets Gul'dan's Basic Attack cooldown to 0.5 seconds.

entries.description: Drain the life from an enemy over 3 seconds, dealing 132 damage per second and healing Gul'dan for 188 Health per second.
entries.name: Drain Life

undoc.notes: Ability is interrupted if the target moves 3.5 units past its cast range. Can be canceled after 0.5 seconds by reactivating the Ability, or issuing a move or stop command.

entries.description: Call forth three bursts of shadow energy, dealing 204 damage over 6 seconds. Corruption can stack up to 3 times on an enemy.
entries.name: Corruption

undoc.notes: Cast point marks the center of the first burst. Can only stack up to 3 times per target (cannot be modified by any Talents). Damage over time ticks individually for each burst. Each hit extends the duration of all stacks to 6 seconds (because the tick rate is only once per second, this only matters for each full second the stack has been extended by).
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Clamping, Damage over Time

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds deal 120 damage to enemy Heroes in an area and Fear them for 2 seconds. While Feared, Heroes are Silenced and forced to run away from Horrify's center.
entries.name: Horrify

entries.description: After 1.5 seconds, summon a rain of meteors in an area for 7 seconds. Each meteor deals 165 damage in a small area.
entries.name: Rain of Destruction

undoc.notes: 1) Meteors' spawn locations are randomly chosen (allowing repetitions) from 44 predetermined locations: 1 in the center, 8 locations are spaced evenly on a 3 radius circle, 15 locations are spaced evenly on a 6 radius circle and the remaining 20 locations are spaced evenly on a 9 radius circle. Interrupting the cast in any way puts it on a 10-second cooldown. Gul'dan can interrupt the channel by issuing a "move" or "stop" command.
Increases the radius growth rate to 1.14 per tick.

entries.description: Increases the cast range of Drain Life by 25% and the healing provided by Regen Globes by 50%.
entries.name: Chaotic Energy

undoc.notes: A target can still only have up to 3 stacks of Corruption on it (see notes under that Basic Ability). Because of the length of the delay between impacts, all hits above 3 from Corruption once this Talent reward is earned will add 1 second to 1 stack of Corruption each (in other words 1 damage tick).

entries.description: Drain Life's cooldown recharges 100% faster while it is channeling. If an enemy dies while under the effect of Drain Life, the cooldown is instantly refreshed.
entries.name: Health Funnel

undoc.notes: Cooldown gets reset if the enemy dies from anything within 1.5 seconds after being affected by Drain Life (Summon timed life expiration does not apply cooldown reset).

entries.description: Increase the Mana restored by Life Tap to 40%.
entries.name: Improved Life Tap

entries.description: Instantly kill an enemy Minion and heal for 365 Health. Stores 3 charges.
entries.name: Consume Soul

entries.description: Each enemy Hero hit with Fel Flame reduces the cooldown of Corruption by 1.75 seconds.
entries.name: Bound by Shadow

entries.description: Drain Life deals 50% more damage and Slows the target's Movement Speed by 40%.
entries.name: Curse of Exhaustion

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Drain Life 's damage.

entries.description: Increases Spell Power by 15% but reduces healing received from allies by 25%.
entries.name: Hunger for Power

undoc.notes: Healing from Healing Fountains, Regeneration Globes and Biotic Emitters is also reduced. Self-healing from Gul'dan's Abilities and Talents is not reduced, and is in fact increased due to Spell Power. Spell Power from Hunger for Power stacks additively with itself and other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage modifiers and healing dealt modifiers affecting Gul'dan.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier, Healing dealt modifier, Healing received modifier

entries.description: After a short delay, deal 120 damage and fear enemy Heroes in the area for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Horrify

entries.description: After 1.5 seconds, summon a rain of meteors in an area for 7 seconds. Each meteor deals 165 damage in a small area.
entries.name: Rain of Destruction

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Fel Flame grants 50 Spell Armor for 2.5 seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by 50%.
entries.name: Fel Armor

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself or other positive Armor effects.

entries.description: Drain Life heals for 75% more Health when used on Heroes.
entries.name: Harvest Life

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with effects that affect healing dealt, and multiplicatively with effects that affect healing received by Gul'dan.

entries.description: Guldan's maximum Health is permanently increased by 40% but his Death Respawn time is increased by 10 seconds.
entries.name: Dark Bargain

entries.description: Activate to heal for 25% of Gul'dan's maximum Health.
entries.name: Healthstone

undoc.notes: Cannot be used when Gul'dan is at maximum Health.

entries.description: Fel Flame's damage is increased by 12% for 5 seconds when hitting an enemy Hero. This can stack up to 5 times.
entries.name: Rampant Hellfire

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers affecting Fel Flame 's damage.

entries.description: Corruption deals an additional 70 damage on impact. If the enemy is hit by all three strikes, the third strike deals 242 damage.
entries.name: Ruinous Affliction

undoc.notes: Three hit damage is dealt instead of the initial damage of the third hit.

entries.description: Dealing 600 damage to enemy Heroes causes the next cast of Life Tap to cost no Health and grant Gul'dan 25% Spell Power for 5 seconds.
entries.name: Darkness Within

undoc.notes: Stored damage does not scale upon level up, but fully charged effect remains activatable. Spell Power from Darkness Within stacks additively with itself and other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage modifiers and healing dealt modifiers affecting Gul'dan.

entries.description: Increases the duration of Horrify by 1 second, and while Feared, enemies lose 20 Armor, causing them to take 20% increased damage.
entries.name: Haunt

entries.description: Rain of Destruction Slows enemies' Movement Speed by 90% for 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Deep Impact

entries.description: Summon a Demonic Circle at your location. Activate to teleport to the Demonic Circle. Summon Demonic Circle Teleport to Demonic Circle
entries.name: Demonic Circle

undoc.notes: Grants two active abilities: Summon Demonic Circle for setting up the circle and Teleport to Demonic Circle for teleporting to it. / Only one Demonic Circle may be active at a time. Demonic Circle is removed, if Gul'dan dies. / Requires an active Demonic Circle. Active Demonic Circles are removed when Teleport to Demonic Circle is used.

entries.description: Jump over unpathable terrain or Structures, up to a maximum range.
entries.name: Natural Agility

undoc.notes: Natural Agility cannot be used if there is no unpathable terrain between Hanzo and target point, or if there are no viable landing spots in range. Hanzo cannot use Natural Agility to jump over pathing blockers or friendly Gates. Hanzo always lands at 2 range from the edge of the terrain, regardless of its width.

entries.description: Activate to charge an arrow that deals 291 damage to the first enemy hit. Storm Bow's range increases the longer it is Channeled.
entries.name: Storm Bow

undoc.notes: Storm Bow can be channeled indefinitely, but its range stops increasing after 1.25 seconds. Cooldown starts once Storm Bow is reactivated. Timing a Basic Attack right before Storm Bow ignores the cooldown of the first Basic Attack, which will cause a second Basic Attack to be launched right after Storm Bow is cast.

entries.description: Fire an arrow that deals 88 to the first enemy Hero hit. Scatter Arrow can collide with terrain and Structures, splitting into 5 arrows that travel extra distance, ricochet up to 4 additional times, and deal 88 damage each to the first enemy hit.
entries.name: Scatter Arrow

undoc.notes: Neither initial projectile nor the ricocheting arrows can ever damage Structures, but only bounce off of them. Hanzo is able to see the collision edges of terrain in 16 radius. Scatter Arrow does not bounce off of pathing blockers or friendly Gates.

entries.description: Fire an arrow that grants vision in a large area for 5 seconds. Enemies inside are revealed for 1 second. If Sonic Arrow lands directly on an enemy, it deals 165 damage to them and follows them as they move.
entries.name: Sonic Arrow

entries.description: After 1.5 seconds, summon a pair of Spirit Dragons which travel forward, dealing 84 damage every 0.25 seconds to enemy Heroes in its area. Enemies in the center take 75% increased damage.
entries.name: Dragonstrike

undoc.notes: Interrupting Dragonstrike in its cast period puts the Ability on a 10 second cooldown. Arrow shot at the end of cast animation is purely visual and deals no damage. Center damage bonus stacks additively with offensive damage modifiers that can affect Dragonstrike 's damage.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Channeled cast (stationary), Clamping

entries.description: Fire a missile that travels across the battleground. Explodes upon hitting an enemy Hero, dealing 130 damage to all nearby enemies and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds. After traveling a medium distance, the damage is increased to 260 and the Stun duration to 1.25 seconds. After traveling a long distance, the damage is increased to 390 and the Stun duration to 2 seconds.
entries.name: Dragon's Arrow

undoc.notes: Distance is measured from the distance traveled rather than the difference from Hanzo's current location. Enemies that are immune to Skillshots cannot be hit by the initial projectile, but can still be affected by the splash, as long as they are not also immune to AoE.
Only affects maximum range. Channel time for maximum range remains the same.

If there are multiple Hanzos on a team, the attack counter per Hero is shared among all of them and only the one who triggers the second attack on the target gains the stack. While at full stacks attacks do not increment the counter. Attack Speed bonus stacks additively with other effects that can affect Hanzo's Attack Speed.

entries.description: Upon hitting a Minion or Monster, Storm Bow deals 60% of its damage to enemies around its target.
entries.name: Explosive Arrows

undoc.notes: The splash damage affects all enemies, but is only triggered when Storm Bow hits a Minion or Monster. The splash does not trigger other Talents that interact with Storm Bow, but can benefit from damage increases that affect Hanzo or Storm Bow specifically.

entries.description: Scatter Arrow deals 100% more damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
entries.name: Serrated Arrows

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Scatter Arrow 's damage.

entries.description: Basic Attacks instantly kill Minions and increase Hanzo's Basic Attack range by 2 for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Ignore All Distractions

undoc.notes: Bonus Basic Attack range is only granted or refreshed by Basic Attacking a Minion.

entries.description: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow grants 5% Spell Power for 12 seconds, stacking up to 20%.
entries.name: The Dragon Hungers

undoc.notes: Spell Power from The Dragon Hungers stacks additively with itself and other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage and healing dealt modifiers affecting Hanzo's Spell Damage or healing output.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier, Healing dealt modifier

entries.description: Reduce Scatter Arrow's Mana cost from 50 to 30. Basic Attacks against Heroes lower the cooldown of Scatter Arrow by 3 seconds.
entries.name: Never Outmatched

entries.description: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow or Basic Attacks reduces their Armor by 3 for 3 seconds, up to a maximum reduction of 20 Armor.
entries.name: Sharpened Arrowheads

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself but not with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: After 1.5 seconds, summon a pair of Spirit Dragons which travel forward, dealing 84 damage every 0.25 seconds to enemy Heroes in its area. Enemies in the center take 75% increased damage.
entries.name: Dragonstrike

entries.description: Fire a missile that travels across the battleground. Explodes upon hitting an enemy Hero, dealing 130 damage to all nearby enemies and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds. After traveling a medium distance, the damage is increased to 260 and the Stun duration to 1.25 seconds. After traveling a long distance, the damage is increased to 390 and the Stun duration to 2 seconds.
entries.name: Dragon's Arrow

entries.description: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow grants 10% Movement Speed for 6 seconds, up to 30%.
entries.name: Fleet of Foot

undoc.notes: Consecutive hits refresh the duration.

entries.description: Hitting Heroes with Storm Bow lowers Natural Agility's cooldown by 10 seconds. Additionally, Hero Takedowns reset Natural Agility's cooldown.
entries.name: Ninja Assassin

entries.description: Reduce the cooldown of Summon Mount by 2 seconds. Upon mounting, gain 25% additional Movement Speed for 5 seconds. Using Natural Agility instantly mounts.
entries.name: Mounted Archery

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with Mounted Movement Speed bonus, but not with other sources of Movement Speed.

entries.description: Hitting Heroes with Storm Bow increases the damage of Hanzo's next Basic Attack within 5 seconds by 40%. Basic Attacks against Heroes increase the damage of Hanzo's next Storm Bow within 5 seconds by 40%.
entries.name: Flawless Technique

undoc.props: Attack Modifier Damage bonuses stack additively with other offensive damage modifiers.

entries.description: Storm Bow and Scatter Arrow pierce, hitting an additional enemy. Additionally, Scatter Arrow can pierce through 1 enemy each time it ricochets.
entries.name: Piercing Arrows

entries.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Scatter Arrow and Basic Attacks take a bonus 1.6% of their maximum Health as damage.
entries.name: Giant Slayer

entries.description: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow, Scatter Arrow, or Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Dragonstrike by 4 seconds.
entries.name: The Dragon Awakens

entries.description: While in flight or for up to 2 seconds after impacting a target, Dragon's Arrow can be reactivated to teleport to its location and jump backwards. If used after impact, Hanzo shoots arrows that deal 132 damage to each target hit by the impact. Hanzo is Unstoppable during Play of the Game.
entries.name: Play of the Game

undoc.type: Spell Damage / Movement: Teleport, Launch, Unstoppable

entries.description: Increase Sonic Arrow's speed and center radius by 100%. Additionally, Heroes hit by Sonic Arrow's center are Stunned for 1 second.
entries.name: Bullseye

entries.description: Natural Agility gains a 2nd charge and its cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds.
entries.name: Perfect Agility

entries.description: Throw a pile of junk onto the battlefield, dealing 102 damage in a small area, knocking enemies away and acting as terrain for up to 5 seconds. When the Loot Hoard expires or is destroyed, a chunk of Meat falls out that can be picked up to restore 3% of maximum Health every second for 4 seconds. Reactivate to destroy Loot Hoard.
entries.name: Loot Hoard

undoc.notes: Loot Hoard can be reactivated 0.5 seconds after it has spawned to end its effect early. This still spawns Meat. Loot Hoard is aligned with the map grid and must be placed on a location, where it does not collide with Hogger's unit radius and its center does not collide with existing terrain. Picking up Meat while under its effects adds to its total duration. Meat stays on the ground for up to 8 seconds.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Heal over Time, Knockback, Self-castable
undoc.type: Terrain / Spell Damage, Crowd control / Healing

entries.description: Rage is gained by taking damage or dealing Basic Attack damage. Hogger’s Basic Ability cooldowns refresh 1% faster for every 2 points of Rage. After 3 seconds of not gaining Rage, it begins to quickly decay.
entries.name: Rage

undoc.notes: Hogger gains 5 Rage when landing a Basic Attack and 1 Rage each time he takes damage. Decays by 0.8125 per 0.0625s (13 per second) after not gaining any Rage for 3 seconds.

entries.description: Swing your chain in a wide arc, dealing 140 damage to enemies hit and knocking them away. If an enemy collides with terrain, deal an additional 150 damage, Stun for 0.75 seconds, and gain 15 Rage.
entries.name: Staggering Blow

undoc.notes: 1) The swing is channeled and the search is split in three 40 degree sections, rotating counter-clockwise over 0.1875 seconds. Enemies are knocked away radially from Hogger. Damage from terrain hit is dealt in a separate instance. Hogger's Basic Attack is placed on a 0.375 second cooldown when Staggering Blow finishes casting.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Clamping, Knockback, Stationary channel (1 , Stun

entries.description: Toss a bundle of Dynamite with a 1.5 second fuse. Upon detonation, enemies take 180 damage and are Slowed by 30% for 2 seconds. The Dynamite instantly detonates when landing directly on an enemy Hero and grants Hogger 10 Rage.
entries.name: Ez-Thro Dynamite

undoc.notes: Dynamite bundle takes 0.5 seconds to reach its end location regardless of distance. Instant detonation only triggers on the enemy Hero closest to the dynamite's center, causing the Rage gain and talent bonuses only to be applied once per dynamite regardless of how many Heroes were hit. Dynamite bundle grants vision over its area before detonating.

entries.description: After 0.25 seconds, become Unstoppable and uncontrollably spin towards the target direction, ricocheting off terrain. Ricocheting off terrain refreshes the duration. Every 0.125 seconds, deal 44 damage to nearby non-Structure enemies. Damage against Heroes is increased by 0.5% for each point of Rage.
entries.name: Hogg Wild

undoc.notes: Hogg Wild can be reactivated after 0.5 seconds to end its effect early. Bouncing off terrain instantly sets the speed to 14.5. During Hogg Wild Hogger also bounces off of Structure units and his Loot Hoard, but ignores collision with any other units, including pathing blockers like Tassadar's Force Wall. Contact with terrain is checked from the centerpoint of Hogger's hitbox. Cooldown starts when the Ability ends. Rage damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Hogg Wild 's damage.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Clamping, Self-castable, Unstoppable
undoc.type: Spell Damage / Movement: Dash, Status effect

entries.description: Launch an empowered Loot Hoard with Hogger attached, dealing 100 damage and Slowing enemies by 50% for 2 seconds. Hoardapult’s Loot Hoard lasts for up to 20 seconds, decaying rapidly while not nearby. Every 10 seconds Hogger can take a chunk of Meat from the Loot Hoard.
entries.name: Hoardapult

undoc.notes: Hoardapult can be canceled after 0.75 seconds to end its effect early. The initial point of vector targeting determines the location of the Loot Hoard unit and the second which direction Hogger will be positioned next to it. Hoardapult can exceptionally be cast while Rooted. Hogger is Unstoppable while in the air. In addition to Hoardapult 's damage, enemies also take damage from Loot Hoard 's impact. Loot Hoards created by Hoardapult and Meat dropped by them have the same properties as their base version and interact with Talents affecting them, except that the initial Meat drop from Bones to Gnaw does not happen. Hogger automatically consumes Meat if he is within the pickup radius and not at maximum Health. The first Meat can be collected instantly. If Hogger is not within the decay radius, Hoardapult's duration is reduced by 0.5 seconds every 0.0625 seconds.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Self-castable, Slow, Unstoppable
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Movement: Launch, Status effect

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, slam the ground, sending out a shockwave that travels in a long line. Enemies hit by the initial slam take 335 damage and are Stunned for 1.5 seconds. Enemies only hit by the shockwave take 230 damage and are Stunned for 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Shockwave

undoc.notes: Interrupting Shockwave during its windup puts it on a 10 second cooldown. Enemies hit by the initial slam cannot be affected by the shockwave.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Channeled cast (stationary), Clamping, Piercing Skillshot, Stun

entries.description: Each Hero hit by Ez-Thro Dynamite heals you for 8% of maximum Health.
entries.name: Journeyman Cooking

entries.description: Loot Hoard creates a chunk of Meat when it lands. While under the effects of Meat, gain 10 Armor.
entries.name: Bones to Gnaw

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Activate to gain 30 Rage over 8 seconds. You heal for 7 Health every second, increased by 2% per point of Rage.
entries.name: On The Prowl

undoc.notes: Rage healing bonus directly increases the base healing of the Ability, causing the bonus to stack multiplicatively with Healing modifiers.

entries.description: Increase the range of Loot Hoard by 25% and its damage by 50%.
entries.name: Brute Force

entries.description: Increase Hogg Wild’s radius by 20% and each enemy hit generates 0.5 Rage, increased to 2 against Heroes.
entries.name: Aggro Range

entries.description: While at or above 30 Rage, gain 10% increased Movement Speed and healing received. While at or above 50 Rage, increase these bonuses to 15%.
entries.name: Hogger’s Joggers

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other healing modifiers that affect healing received and multiplicatively with modifiers that affect healing dealt.

entries.description: Instant detonations of Ez-Thro Dynamite create an additional dynamite bundle behind the Hero hit. Hitting the bundle of Ez-Thro Dynamite with Staggering Blow breaks it into 3 sticks and launches them forward in an arc.
entries.name: Dense Blasting Powder

undoc.notes: Dynamites launched with Dense Blasting Powder have the same properties as base version and interact with all other talents affecting it. Dynamites created from Dense Blasting Power cannot be split by hitting them with Staggering Blow. The original Ez-Thro Dynamite does not explode if split with Staggering Blow.

entries.description: Reduce the cooldown of Loot Hoard by 2 seconds. Every 0.5 seconds, enemies in a large area around Loot Hoard take 23 damage and are Slowed by 20%.
entries.name: Garbage Fire

undoc.notes: Enemies can be damaged by multiple Garbage Fires simultaneously.

entries.description: While above 50 Rage, gain 35% Attack Speed and the cooldowns of Staggering Blow and Hogg Wild refresh 30% faster.
entries.name: Seeing Red

entries.description: Launch an empowered Loot Hoard with Hogger attached, dealing 100 damage and Slowing enemies by 50% for 2 seconds. Hoardapult’s Loot Hoard lasts for up to 20 seconds, decaying rapidly while not nearby. Every 10 seconds Hogger can take a chunk of Meat from the Loot Hoard.
entries.name: Hoardapult

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, slam the ground, sending out a shockwave that travels in a long line. Enemies hit by the initial slam take 335 damage and are Stunned for 1.5 seconds. Enemies only hit by the shockwave take 230 damage and are Stunned for 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Shockwave

entries.description: Gain 25 Armor while Hogg Wild is active and for 4 seconds afterward. While at or above 50 Rage, increase this Armor to 40.
entries.name: Dust Devil

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Enemies hit by Hogg Wild are Slowed by 10% for 2 seconds, stacking up to 5 times. Heroes hit have their Spell Power reduced by 30% for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Pummel

undoc.notes: Pummel 's Spell Power reduction does not stack with itself. Spell Power reduction stacks additively with other sources of Spell Power and other damage and healing modifiers affecting the target Hero's Spell Damage or healing output.
undoc.type: Crowd control, Offensive damage modifier, Healing dealt modifier

entries.description: Damaging Heroes with Basic Attacks, Staggering Blow or Hogg Wild heals you for 33% of the damage dealt.
entries.name: Bloodthirst

entries.description: Enemy Heroes Stunned by Staggering Blow take an additional 8% of their maximum Health as damage and are Stunned for an additional 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Headbanger

undoc.notes: Bonus damage is dealt in a separate instance and does grant lifesteal with Bloodthirst.

entries.description: Instant Ez-Thro Dynamite detonations deal 50% more damage, reduce its cooldown by 1.5 seconds, and increase its Slow amount to 50%. Increase Ez-Thro Dynamite’s range by 25%.
entries.name: Kablooie!

undoc.notes: Cooldown reduction and Slow increase only apply to the target of instant detonation. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Ez-Thro Dynamite 's damage.

entries.description: Hitting Heroes with Staggering Blow or Ez-Thro Dynamite increases the damage of the next Basic Attack within 8 seconds by 50%, stacking up to 2 times. When Hogg Wild ends, gain 30% Movement Speed for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Furzerker

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Hogger's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Every 2 seconds, Hoardapult’s Loot Hoard randomly launches Ez-Thro Dynamite, prioritizing nearby enemy Heroes. Every 5 seconds, it also launches a chunk of Meat toward Hogger.
entries.name: Secret Stash

undoc.notes: Dynamite bundles launch at a set 4.5 distance towards a random enemy Hero, if there are any within 7 radius. If no enemy Heroes are within the radius at the time, dynamite bundles are launched to one of 8 predetermined locations chosen randomly. Dynamite bundles launched by Secret Stash have the same properties as the base version and interact with all talents affecting Ez-Thro Dynamite, except Dense Blasting Powder. Meat is launched at a set 4.0 distance in Hogger's direction. Secret Stash 's Meat launch cooldown is independent from Hoardapult's Meat pickup and does not require Hogger to be full Health. The first Meat is launched after 5 seconds. Meat launched by Secret Stash interacts with all talents affecting Meat.

entries.description: Hitting Heroes with Shockwave reduces their Armor by 15 for 4 seconds and grants 20 Rage. Rage's cooldown reduction affects Shockwave's cooldown.
entries.name: Power Spike

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Activate to cast an untalented Hogg Wild and begin chasing an enemy Hero. After reaching the Hero, bounce to a random nearby enemy Hero. Lasts up to 5 seconds, rapidly decaying if there are no other enemy Heroes nearby. Cannot be canceled.
entries.name: No Control

undoc.notes: No Control increases Hogger's Movement Speed by 10% every 0.0625 seconds, stacking up to 24 times (~16.5 max speed). Hogger loses 2 stacks every 0.0625 seconds if the current target is within 1.75 range. Bounces choose the farthest targetable Hero in the range that has not been targeted within the last 2 seconds. The current target is revealed for 0.125 seconds every 0.0625 seconds while Hogger is traveling to them. If Hogger has no viable bounce targets, the duration of No Control begins to decay by 0.1875 seconds every 0.0625 seconds.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Mobile channel, Movement speed, Unstoppable

entries.description: Increase maximum Rage by 50, raising the maximum bonuses for its cooldown refresh rate to 75% and Hogg Wild's Hero damage to 75%. Basic Attacks grant 5 additional Rage.
entries.name: Anger Management

entries.description: Basic Attacks heal for 30% of damage dealt and reduce Ability cooldowns by 1 second.
entries.name: Betrayer's Thirst

undoc.notes: Cooldown reduction affects both Heroic and Basic Abilities, but not active Abilities gained from Talents. Getting Blinded makes you unable to hit enemies and gain cooldown reduction or lifesteal.

entries.description: Dive at the target, dealing 66 damage and flipping to the other side of the target.
entries.name: Dive

undoc.notes: The damage is dealt upon first reaching the target. If the target dies, Illidan does not get flipped to the other side.

entries.description: Dash toward target point, dealing 119 damage to enemies along the way. Hitting an enemy increases Illidan's Basic Attack damage by 35% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Sweeping Strike

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself. Consecutive applications refresh the duration. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Illidan's Basic Attack damage.
undoc.type: Spell Damage / Offensive damage modifier, Movement: Dash

entries.description: Evade enemy Basic Attacks for 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Evasion

entries.description: Transform into Demon Form at the target location, dealing 46 damage in the area. Temporarily increases maximum Health by 220 for each Hero hit by the initial impact. Lasts for 18 seconds.
entries.name: Metamorphosis

undoc.notes: Can be cast while Rooted. While phased out, Illidan is put in Stasis. In addition to usual effects of Stasis, Illidan is removed from ground plane (disjoints certain projectiles) and has no collision, but does not get the initial expanded debuff removal. Bonus Health is calculated and damage is dealt when the transformation period ends and Illidan reappears on the battlefield. Illidan's current Health is increased by the same flat amount as his maximum Health. Once Metamorphosis ends, only maximum Health is reduced.
undoc.type: Spell Damage / Status effect, Bonus Health, Movement: Teleport

entries.description: Charge to target unit, dealing 251 damage on impact and Stunning for 1 second.
entries.name: The Hunt

undoc.notes: Interrupting the cast puts the Ability on a 10 second cooldown. Cast is interrupted if the target moves more than 5 units past its maximum range. The target is Revealed instantly upon cast until Illidan hits the target. After the cast period, Illidan is Unstoppable until he hits the target.
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control, Status effect / Movement: Launch, Status effect

entries.description: After using Sweeping Strike, burn nearby enemies for 22 damage a second for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Immolation

undoc.notes: 1) Extended by Illidan's unit radius. Does not draw tower aggro when damaging Heroes under their Structures. Damage from Immolation is affected by offensive damage modifiers unlike other burning rage effects. Disabled while Illidan is Mounted or in Stasis.

entries.description: Increase Sweeping Strike's Basic Attack damage bonus duration from 3 to 5 seconds. If Sweeping Strike hits 2 Heroes its damage bonus is increased from 35% to 125%.
entries.name: Battered Assault

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself. Damage bonus increase always lasts 5 seconds: If the next Sweeping Strike hits only a single enemy Hero while Battered Assault is still active, the baseline bonus of the new cast is overridden with the higher value until previous cast's Battered Assault bonus ends.
Continues to gain stacks even after the quest is completed. Grants credit if within 13.125 range of an enemy Minion as it dies.

entries.description: Using Dive grants 75 Physical Armor against the next 3 Hero Basic Attacks for 4 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%.
entries.name: Reflexive Block

undoc.notes: Illidan can have a maximum of 4 Block stacks from this Talent, and the duration of all existing Block stacks from the Talent is refreshed if he gains more from it.

entries.description: Betrayer's Thirst's healing from Basic Attacks is increased from 30% to 50% while Sweeping Strike's damage bonus is active.
entries.name: Thirsting Blade

entries.description: Basic Abilities heal for 35% of the damage they deal. Double this bonus versus Heroes.
entries.name: Hunter's Onslaught

undoc.notes: Benefits from bonus damage from Marked for Death and Immolation 's burn damage.

entries.description: Dive grants 20% Movement Speed for 2 seconds. If the target is an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown by 1 second.
entries.name: Rapid Chase

entries.description: Increases the range of Dive by 20% and allows it to be used to dive to allied Heroes.
entries.name: Friend or Foe

undoc.notes: Using Dive on an allied Hero does not damage them nor flip Illidan over them.

entries.description: Sweeping Strike can go over walls and terrain.
entries.name: Unbound

undoc.notes: Original animation of Sweeping Strike becomes broken when this talent is picked (adds extra frames of delay durning end animation).

entries.description: Transform into Demon Form at the target location, dealing 46 damage in the area. Temporarily increase your maximum Health by 220 for each Hero hit. Lasts for 18 seconds.
entries.name: Metamorphosis

entries.description: Charge to target unit, dealing 251 damage on impact and Stunning for 1 second.
entries.name: The Hunt

entries.description: If Sweeping Strike hits an enemy Hero, gain 25 Armor for 2 seconds, reducing damage taken by 25%.
entries.name: Nimble Defender

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself or other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Sweeping Strike reduces the cooldown of Evasion by 3 seconds every time it damages an enemy Hero.
entries.name: Elusive Strike

entries.description: Evasion grants Illidan 75 Spell Armor against the next 2 sources of Spell Damage, reducing their damage by 75%.
entries.name: Sixth Sense

undoc.notes: Charges expire when Evasion ends.

entries.description: Dive deals an extra 180 damage if used consecutively on a target within 10 seconds.
entries.name: Marked for Death

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself.

entries.description: Every 3rd attack against the same Hero deals an additional 7% of their maximum Health as damage.
entries.name: Fiery Brand

undoc.notes: The counter is reset if Illidan has not attacked the enemy Hero for 300 seconds or if they gain Stasis or Invulnerable. Attacking a different Hero resets the counter. Counter does not continue through the cycle if Illidan is Blinded or the target is Evading.

entries.description: Hitting 5 Heroes with Sweeping Strike allows Blades of Azzinoth to be activated, increasing Basic Attack damage by 75% for 8 seconds.
entries.name: Blades of Azzinoth

undoc.notes: Each Hero hit counts as 1 stack. After gathering 5 stacks the ability can be activated, consuming all stacks. Starts with full 5 stacks. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Illidan's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Permanently remain in Demonic Form. Metamorphosis also increases Attack Speed by 20% and reduces the duration of Stuns, Roots and Slows by 50%. Illidan can now mount in Demonic Form.
entries.name: Demonic Form

undoc.notes: The bonuses are applied the next time Illidan casts Metamorphosis . Metamorphosis and its bonuses are removed upon death. The Health bonus is still temporary. Attack Speed bonus stacks additively with other effects that affect Illidan's Attack Speed. In Demonic Form, Illidan's Mount is limited to a special Ability-specific one.

entries.description: The Hunt gains unlimited range. Illidan passively Reveals enemy Heroes below 25% Health anywhere on the Battleground.
entries.name: Nowhere to Hide

undoc.notes: The Hunt cannot be used to travel into or out of the underground level in Haunted Mines. Passive Reveal still applies everywhere.

entries.description: Basic Attacks deal 20% more damage and Slow enemy Movement Speed by 20% for 1 second.
entries.name: Nexus Blades

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Illidan's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.
entries.name: Bolt of the Storm

undoc.notes: Can be used to extend active frames of Sweeping Strike (note: this is not possible anymore if Unbound is picked level 7).

entries.description: Each Basic Ability marks enemy Heroes hit for 10 seconds. Basic Attacks consume the target's marks, dealing 20% bonus damage per mark and healing for 75 per mark.
entries.name: Valorous Brand

undoc.notes: Marks are consumed even if Imperius is Blinded or if the target is Evading. The healing still occurs, though all of the damage misses except from specific Talents. A Hero can not be marked by the same Basic Ability more than once at a time. Further applications refresh the duration. Stacks additively with itself and other Physical Damage modifiers.

entries.description: Lunge toward a targeted direction and stab, dealing 35 damage. If an enemy Hero is hit, Channel to Stun for 1 second and deal 80 additional damage when it finishes.
entries.name: Celestial Charge

undoc.notes: Imperius moves with a speed of 14 and is able to pass through terrain. Enemy Heroes hit are snapped toward the center line of the area within 1.5 - 4.5 units in front of Imperius. If the Channel lasts for its full duration, the targets are Stunned for an additional 0.25 seconds while the bonus damage is being dealt.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Stationary channel, Stun
undoc.type: Spell Damage / Crowd control / Movement: Launch

entries.description: Release a fiery wave that deals 110 damage. Enemies hit by the center take 50% bonus damage and are Slowed by 40% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Solarion's Fire

undoc.notes: The wave has a sight range of 2. Center damage bonus stacks additively with offensive damage modifiers that can affect Solarion's Fire 's damage.

entries.description: Shroud Imperius in flames for 3 seconds, striking a nearby enemy for 19 damage every 0.25 seconds. Imperius heals for 50% of the damage dealt, increased to 100% against Heroes. Strikes 2 additional targets if no Heroes are in range, and restores 1 Mana for each strike on expiration.
entries.name: Molten Armor

undoc.notes: 1) Targets one enemy per tick prioritizing enemies currently Stunned by Celestial Charge, then the closest enemies, prioritizing Heroes only if equidistant from Imperius. If there are multiple targets within the search area, the same target can not be hit again until all or up to 4 different targets in the area have been hit. Can be activated while leaping or channeling Celestial Charge. Molten Armor will only hit revealed/visible targets.

entries.description: Summon a ring of blazing swords that grants 850 Shield for 3 seconds. If the Shield lasts the full duration, this Ability can be reactivated within 5 seconds to launch 6 swords toward an area, each dealing 140 damage to the first enemy hit.
entries.name: Angelic Armaments

entries.description: After 0.75 seconds, charge in the target direction, lifting the first enemy Hero hit into the Heavens. While in the air, Imperius can steer the landing location by moving. After 2 seconds, slam the target into the ground, dealing 250 damage to them, increased by 20% for each Valorous Brand mark on them when landing, and Stunning them for 1 second.
entries.name: Wrath of the Angiris

undoc.affects: Enemy Heroes (damage, cc) / Enemy Heroes & Self (status effect)
undoc.notes: Interrupting the Ability during its cast puts it on a 10-second cooldown. Doesn't affect Vehicles. While in air both Heroes are put in Stasis. In addition to usual effects of Stasis, Imperius and the target are removed from ground plane (disjoints certain projectiles), have no collision, cannot regenerate Health, Mana, Energy or Shields and cannot be seen on the minimap or revealed. The target is affected by a hostile Stasis, causing some delayed healing Abilities to be prevented. Landing location can't be steered over unpathable terrain. Upon landing, the target enemy Hero is placed at the center of the indicator, facing Imperius. Imperius will be positioned 2 units in front of the target, so that the target is positioned in the direction he was moving toward before landing. Valorous Brand marks placed by Imperius will not be removed when launching the target into the air. Marks can still expire while in the air
undoc.props: Channeled cast (stationary), Skillshot, Stasis (in air), Stun, Unstoppable (dash)
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Movement: Launch, Status effect

entries.description: Celestial Charge deals 150% more damage to Heroes, reduced by 25% for each additional Hero hit. For each Valorous Brand on the target when Celestial Charge's Stun completes, reduce its cooldown by 1 second. Reduce Celestial Charge's cooldown by 1.5 seconds, and its Mana cost from 40 to 30.
entries.name: Impaling Light

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Celestial Charge 's damage.

entries.description: Increase the center damage of Solarion's Fire by an additional 125% and its Slow amount by 15%. The first enemy Hero hit by Solarion's Fire refunds 30 Mana.
entries.name: Consuming Flame

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Solarion's Fire 's damage.

entries.description: Consuming a Valorous Brand mark deals bonus damage equal to 2.5% of the Hero's maximum Health.
entries.name: Burn The Impure

undoc.notes: This bonus damage is dealt even if Imperius is Blinded, or if the target is Evading.

entries.description: Molten Armor grants 20 Armor for 1.5 seconds. Damaging an enemy Hero with Molten Armor increases the duration of the Armor by 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Sovereign Armor

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Increase the healing of Valorous Brand by 80%.
entries.name: Battle Hunger

entries.description: Gain 10 Armor while being healed by a Regeneration Globe. Damaging an enemy Hero sets the duration of an active Regeneration Globe on Imperius to 8 seconds (unless it is already higher).
entries.name: Press Forward

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself or other positive Armor effects. Other damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Consuming a mark from Celestial Charge deals 150 damage around the target and grants Imperius a 250 point Shield for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Flash of Anger

undoc.notes: Also affects the target itself. Enemies cannot be hit by Flash of Anger more than once per cast. Does not benefit from talents affecting Celestial Charge. Shield does not stack. Damage is dealt and Shield is gained even if Imperius is Blinded, or if the target is Evading.

entries.description: Solarion's Fire leaves a line of scorched earth along its center that explodes after 1.75 seconds for 212 damage, dealing bonus damage with Valorous Brand marks.
entries.name: Blaze of Glory

undoc.notes: Does not benefit from talents affecting Solarion's Fire. Valorous Brand marks only provide bonus damage. Blaze of Glory does not interact with any other effects associated with them. Blaze of Glory does not remove Valorous Brand marks from the targets. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Blaze of Glory 's damage.

entries.description: Activate to reset Imperius's Basic Attack cooldown and cause the next 4 Basic Attacks within 10 seconds to cleave for 30% additional damage.
entries.name: Holy Fervor

undoc.notes: Consumes Valorous Brand marks from all targets hit. Cooldown and duration start upon the first attack. Duration limit also applies to passive charges and starts from the first Basic Attack after casting Molten Armor. May store up to 6 Basic Attacks combining the active and passive effects, but passive charges are refreshed every time Molten Armor is cast and cannot by themselves go past 2. Stacks additively with other damage modifiers affecting Imperius's Physical Damage output.

entries.description: Summon a ring of blazing swords that grants 850 Shield for 3 seconds. If the Shield lasts the full duration, this Ability can be reactivated within 5 seconds to launch 6 swords toward an area, each dealing 140 damage to the first enemy hit.
entries.name: Angelic Armaments

entries.description: After 0.75 seconds, charge in the target direction, lifting the first enemy Hero hit into the Heavens. While in the air, Imperius can steer the landing location by moving. After 2 seconds, slam the target into the ground, dealing 375 damage and Stunning them for 1 second.
entries.name: Wrath of the Angiris

entries.description: Stunning enemy Heroes with Celestial Charge reduces their Movement Speed by 25% and damage by 50% for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Pathetic Mortals

undoc.notes: Debuff is applied immediately once the Stun ends, regardless of whether Imperius finished the channel or not. Damage debuff stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting the target's damage output.

entries.description: Consuming a Valorous Brand mark reduces the cooldown of Molten Armor by 1 second.
entries.name: Divine Rage

entries.description: Increase Molten Armor's healing against Heroes by 2% for every 1% of health Imperius is Missing.
entries.name: Heat of Battle

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with baseline Hero bonus.

entries.description: Gain 20% Movement Speed for 5 seconds after casting Celestial Charge. Gain 40% Attack Speed for 5 seconds for each enemy Hero stunned with Celestial Charge.
entries.name: Celestial Swiftness

undoc.notes: Subsequent application applications refresh the duration. Attack speed stacks up to 10 times to a maximum of 400% bonus. Movement Speed does not stack.

entries.description: Consuming a Molten Armor mark reduces the target's Armor by 25 for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Melting Touch

undoc.notes: Armor reduction triggers even if Imperius is Blinded, or if the target is Evading. Subsequent applications refresh the duration. Does not stack with itself or other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Activate to teleport to an enemy that has been marked by Valorous Brand and gain 25 Armor for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Valorous Pursuit

undoc.notes: Cannot target enemies you have no vision of. Imperius is placed next to the target in the closet direction from his previous location.

entries.description: Shields granted by Angelic Armaments no longer expire, and on initial activation, nearby allied Heroes gain a Shield that absorbs 600 damage. If a Shield granted to an allied Hero lasts 3 seconds, it fires 1 sword at a nearby enemy, prioritizing Heroes, dealing 140 damage.
entries.name: Heavenly Host

undoc.notes: Additional swords are only fired from Allied Heroes' Shields that expire without breaking.

entries.description: Descending from the Heavens restores 30% of Imperius' maximum Health and Mana. Consuming a Valorous Brand reduces the cooldown of Wrath of the Angiris by 10 seconds.
entries.name: Unrelenting Descent

entries.description: Molten Armor's radius is increased by 25% and it always strikes 2 additional targets, even if there are Heroes in range.
entries.name: Molten Wrath

entries.description: Reduce the duration of Valorous Brand to 5 seconds, but it is no longer consumed when triggered.
entries.name: Brand of Solarion

entries.description: Activate to become Unstoppable and gain 75 Spell Armor for 3 seconds. Hitting Heroes with the center of Solarion's Fire reduces this cooldown by 5 seconds.
entries.name: Impervious

entries.description: Jaina's Abilities Chill targets, Slowing them by 25% and amplifying damage taken from her Abilities by 50%. Lasts 4 seconds.
entries.name: Frostbite

undoc.notes: Chill can be fully removed with Invulnerable and friendly Stasis effects. Unstoppable and CC removal effects only remove the Slow and not the damage bonus debuff. All Jainas in the same team fully interact with each others' Chill debuffs regardless of who applied them in the first place. Does not stack with itself or other Chill debuffs. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Jaina's Abilities' damage.

entries.description: Deal 184 damage and Chill the target.
entries.name: Frostbolt

entries.description: Bombard an area with 3 waves of ice, dealing 142 damage each. Damaged enemies are Chilled.
entries.name: Blizzard

entries.description: Deal 220 damage and Chill targets.
entries.name: Cone of Cold

entries.description: After a 1.5 second delay, create a Ring of Frost in an area that deals 310 damage and Roots enemies for 3 seconds. The ring persists for 3 seconds afterward, Chilling any enemies who touch it.
entries.name: Ring of Frost
