undoc.notes: Enemies within the inner radius are not affected in any way.

entries.description: Summons a Water Elemental at target location. The Water Elemental's Basic Attacks deal 62 damage, splash for 25% damage and Chill. The Ability can be reactivated to retarget the Water Elemental. Lasts 20 seconds. Water Elemental
entries.name: Summon Water Elemental

undoc.notes: Water Elemental's Basic Attacks and Abilities on Chilled targets benefit from the damage bonus and their damage generates quest progress for Frostbite. Splash damage reduction stacks multiplicatively with other offensive damage modifiers.

entries.description: Activate to place Jaina in Stasis and gain Invulnerability for 2.5 seconds. When this effect expires, nearby enemies are Chilled.
entries.name: Improved Ice Block

undoc.notes: Can be reactivated after 0.5 seconds to end the effect early. Manually exiting Improved Ice Block also causes AoE Chill to be applied.

entries.description: Increases the range and travel speed of Frostbolt by 30%.
entries.name: Winter's Reach

entries.description: Increases the duration of Chill from 4 seconds to 6 seconds.
entries.name: Lingering Chill

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with baseline Frostbite damage bonus.
undoc.type: Bonus Mana Regeneration / Offensive damage modifier

entries.description: Frostbolt will now pierce the first two targets.
entries.name: Frost Shards

entries.description: Dealing damage to a Chilled target returns Mana to Jaina. Basic Attacks return 5 Mana and Abilities return 20. While above 75% Mana, Jaina gains 10% Spell Power.
entries.name: Arcane Intellect

undoc.notes: Spell Power stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage and healing modifiers affecting Jaina's Spell Damage or healing output.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier, Healing Modifier, Mana

entries.description: Enemies that attack Jaina are Chilled. Additionally, every 10 seconds, Jaina gains 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%.
entries.name: Frost Armor

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself or other positive Physical Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Hitting a Chilled target with Frostbolt reduces its cooldown by 1.5 seconds and restores 10 Mana.
entries.name: Ice Lance

entries.description: Increase the width of Cone of Cold by 100%, and cause each Hero hit to reduce its cooldown by 2 seconds, doubled against Chilled Heroes, up to a maximum of 8 seconds per use.
entries.name: Ice Floes

entries.description: Basic Attacks against Chilled enemies deal 50% more damage and lower the cooldown of Blizzard by 1.25 seconds. Doubled against enemy Heroes.
entries.name: Icefury Wand

undoc.notes: Does not affect Water Elemental's Basic Attacks. Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Jaina's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: After a 1.5 second delay, create a Ring of Frost in an area that deals 310 damage and Roots enemies for 3 seconds. The ring persists for 3 seconds afterward, Chilling any enemies who touch it.
entries.name: Ring of Frost

entries.description: Summons a Water Elemental at target location. The Water Elemental's Basic Attacks deal 62 damage, splash for 25% damage and Chill. The Ability can be reactivated to retarget the Water Elemental. Lasts 20 seconds.
entries.name: Summon Water Elemental

entries.description: Increases the cast range of Blizzard by 75% and its radius by 30%.
entries.name: Storm Front

entries.description: Gain a Shield for 25% of Spell Damage dealt to Chilled targets. The Shield lasts 4 seconds.
entries.name: Ice Barrier

undoc.notes: All damage dealt by Water Elemental contributes to the Shield. Shields gained can stack indefinitely and every instance refreshes the duration. Shield amount is calculated from final damage dealt after all modifications.

entries.description: Activate to make Jaina's Basic Abilities' cooldowns recharge 200% faster and reduce their Mana cost by 50% for 5 seconds.
entries.name: Icy Veins

entries.description: The damage of the second wave of Blizzard is increased by 50%. The damage of the third wave is increased by 100%.
entries.name: Snowstorm

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself. Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Blizzard 's damage.

entries.description: Enemies damaged by Cone of Cold have their Armor lowered by 25 for 2 seconds, increasing the damage they take by 25%.
entries.name: Northern Exposure

undoc.notes: Does not reduce the Armor of Structures. Does not stack with itself or other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Cone of Cold Roots Chilled targets for 1 second.
entries.name: Numbing Blast

entries.description: The center area of Ring of Frost deals 310 damage and Roots enemies after the outer ring expires. Each enemy Hero hit reduces its cooldown by 15 seconds.
entries.name: Cold Snap

undoc.notes: Center of the ring explodes 0.5 seconds after the outer ring expires.

entries.description: Increases the cast range of Water Elemental by 50%, and the Water Elemental will now mimic Jaina's Basic Abilities for 50% damage.
entries.name: Wintermute

undoc.notes: Abilities used by Water Elemental benefit from all of Jaina's Talents except Arcane Intellect, Snowstorm, and Ice Floes. Frostbolt and Cone of Cold mimicked by Water Elemental are cast after Jaina finishes her cast animation. Blizzard mimicked by Water Elemental is cast after all 3 waves of Jaina's Blizzard have fallen. Elemental casts Blizzard to the exact same area as Jaina regardless of distance. Wintermute 's damage reduction stacks multiplicatively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Abilities cast by Water Elemental.

entries.description: Activate to teleport a short distance and Chill all nearby enemies.
entries.name: Ice Blink

entries.description: Frostbite's Chill can now stack a second time, Slowing targets up to 40%.
entries.name: Deep Chill

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other Slow effects.

entries.description: Upon dying, drop 5 grenades that explode after 0.75 seconds, each dealing 250 damage to nearby enemies. Deals 75% less damage to Structures.
entries.name: Total Mayhem

undoc.notes: Grenades are dropped at 5 points, randomly selected out of 10 preset locations, around Junkrat's death location over 0.3125 seconds. Junkrat's Basic Attacks Splash, dealing 100% of their damage in 2 radius.

entries.description: Detonate the planted Concussion Mine, dealing 180 damage to nearby enemies and knocking them back. Junkrat can also be affected by Concussion Mine, but takes no damage.
entries.name: Detonate Mine

undoc.notes: Requires an active Concussion Mine.

entries.description: Launch a grenade that explodes at the end of its path or upon hitting an enemy, dealing 124 damage to nearby enemies. Grenades can ricochet off of terrain. Deals 50% less damage to Structures. Stores up to 4 charges. Frag Launcher's cooldown replenishes all charges at the same time.
entries.name: Frag Launcher

undoc.notes: If the grenade lands on unpathable terrain, it explodes immediately without bouncing. Enemies that are immune to skillshots cannot trigger the grenades, but can be damaged by the explosion. Depending on the distance, launched grenades have a flight time of up to 0.625 seconds. Grenades have a set rolling distance regardless of launch distance. Rolling speed gradually decelerates over the distance down to 1.75.

entries.description: Place a mine on the ground. Junkrat's Trait can be activated to detonate the mine, dealing 180 damage to nearby enemies and knocking them back. Junkrat can also be affected by Concussion Mine, but takes no damage. Limit 1 active mine.
entries.name: Concussion Mine

undoc.notes: Concussion Mine takes 0.125-0.75 seconds to reach the target location, based on distance to target point. The mine is Invulnerable and untargetable and lasts indefinitely until detonation or placing another one. Concussion Mine provides vision in 3 radius. The area of effect is visible to enemies. Targets launched by Concussion Mine detonation (including Junkrat himself) are Dazed and can travel over unpathable terrain. Distance and duration of the displacement depend on how far the target is hit from the center of the Mine, with the longest being the farthest.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Clamping, Summon figment, Displacement, Daze

entries.description: Place a trap on the ground that arms after 2 seconds. Deals 130 damage to the first enemy that walks over it and Roots them for 2 seconds. Limit 1 active trap.
entries.name: Steel Trap

undoc.notes: The trap is Invulnerable and untargetable and lasts indefinitely until triggering or placing another one. Enemy units that do not draw Minion aggro, such as [[Summons#Passive Summons

entries.description: Create a motorized bomb with 530 Health that lasts 15 seconds. While active, Junkrat is immobile but gains control of RIP-Tire's movement. RIP-Tire can be reactivated to detonate immediately, knocking nearby enemies back and dealing 720 damage to enemies near the center gradually reduced to 445 to enemies on the edge. RIP-Tire
entries.name: RIP-Tire

undoc.notes: Interrupting the ability during its windup puts it on a 10 second cooldown. While controlling RIP-Tire, Junkrat has access to Jump and Detonate RIP-Tire abilities. RIP-Tire does not detonate if it is destroyed or has expired. If Junkrat's channel gets interrupted, RIP-Tire instantly expires without detonating. The durations of crowd control effects against RIP-Tire are reduced by 75%.

entries.description: Activate to make RIP-Tire jump. Can be used to pass over terrain and Structures.
entries.name: RIP-Tire - Jump

undoc.notes: This Ability is available while controlling RIP-Tire.

entries.description: Instantly detonate the RIP-Tire, knocking nearby enemies back and dealing 720 damage to enemies near the center gradually reduced to 445 to enemies on the edge.
entries.name: RIP-Tire - Detonate RIP-Tire

undoc.notes: This Ability is available while controlling RIP-Tire. Base damage is reduced linearly based on the distance to the center.

entries.description: After 1.25 seconds, Junkrat launches into the air. While in the air, he can steer the landing location by moving. After 3.75 seconds, Junkrat lands, dealing 935 damage to nearby enemies and activating Total Mayhem. 5 seconds after landing, Junkrat reappears at the Hall of Storms and gains 150% additional Movement Speed until dismounted.
entries.name: Rocket Ride

undoc.notes: Interrupting the Ability during its windup puts it on a 10 second cooldown. After successfully casting Rocket Ride, Junkrat is put in Stasis until he re-emerges. In addition to usual effects of Stasis, Junkrat is removed from ground plane (disjoints certain projectiles) and has no collision. While waiting to respawn he also cannot regenerate Health, Mana, Energy or Shields and cannot be seen on the minimap or revealed.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Channeled cast (stationary), Clamping, Stasis
undoc.type: Spell Damage / Movement: Teleport, Status effect

entries.description: While Frag Launcher has no charges left, gain 10% Movement Speed and his Basic Attacks deal 15% bonus damage.
entries.name: Tricky Shuffles

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Junkrat's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: The final grenade from Frag Launcher deals 100% bonus damage, and Frag Launcher grenades last an additional 2 seconds before automatically detonating.
entries.name: Extra-Wound Timers

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Frag Launcher 's damage.

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Concussion Mine or Steel Trap causes Junkrat to deal 25% more damage with Basic Attacks and Basic Abilities for 6 seconds.
entries.name: Blow 'Em Up!

undoc.notes: Subsequent applications refresh the duration. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Junkrat's damage output.
Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers affecting Frag Launcher 's damage.

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Concussion Mine reduces its cooldown by 10 seconds.
entries.name: BOOM POW

entries.description: Steel Traps will slowly chase nearby enemy Heroes.
entries.name: Chattering Teeth

entries.description: Enemies launched by Concussion Mine are Slowed by 40% for 2.5 seconds upon landing.
entries.name: Bogged Down

entries.description: Enemy Heroes who are hit by Steel Trap are Silenced for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Sticky Wicket

entries.description: Increase the explosion radius of Total Mayhem by 20%. When Junkrat is Stunned, Rooted, or damaged by an enemy Hero while below 50% Health, he uses Total Mayhem, dropping 5 grenades at his feet that explode. This effect has a 20 second cooldown.
entries.name: Dirty Trickster

entries.description: Create a motorized bomb with 530 Health that lasts 15 seconds. While active, Junkrat is immobile but gains control of RIP-Tire's movement. RIP-Tire Can be reactivated to detonate immediately, knocking nearby enemies back and dealing 720 damage to enemies near the center gradually reduced to 445 to enemies on the edge.
entries.name: RIP-Tire

entries.description: After 1.25 seconds, Junkrat launches into the air. While in the air, he can steer the landing location by moving. After 3.75 seconds, Junkrat lands, dealing 935 damage to nearby enemies and activating Total Mayhem. 5 seconds after landing, Junkrat reappears at the Hall of Storms and gains 150% additional Movement Speed until dismounted.
entries.name: Rocket Ride

entries.description: Increase Junkrat's Basic Attack range by 1. Frag Launcher grenades fired within 0.5 seconds of using a Basic Attack deal 30% bonus damage.
entries.name: Bombs Away

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Frag Launcher 's damage.

entries.description: Junkrat is knocked back 50% farther by Concussion Mine. Additionally, Concussion Mine's cooldown is reduced by 12 seconds if only Junkrat is hit.
entries.name: Ripper Air

entries.description: Reduce Steel Trap's cooldown by 5 seconds and increase the maximum number of active traps to 2.
entries.name: Gotta Trap 'Em All!

entries.description: Steel Trap now only hits Heroes, and Heroes hit have their Armor reduced by 15 for 3 seconds. Increase Steel Trap's radius and damage by 50%.
entries.name: Big As

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack. Damage bonus stacks with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Steel Trap 's damage.
undoc.type: Defensive damage modifier / Offensive damage modifier

entries.description: Frag Launcher fires all of its charges in a continuous burst and its cooldown is reduced by 6 seconds, but it loses 1 maximum charge.
entries.name: Burst Fire

undoc.notes: All three grenades benefit from Bombs Away, if the first was fired within the time window.

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Frag Launcher reduces its cooldown by 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Endless Nades

entries.description: Activate to make Frag Launcher fire 2 additional grenades in a spread. Works for up to 4 total charges, or until Frag Launcher runs out of charges.
entries.name: Spread Volley

undoc.notes: Cooldown starts when all affected charges are fired. Extra grenades benefit from all talents affecting Frag Launcher.

entries.description: Increase RIP-Tire's knockback distance by 50%, and its cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds for each enemy Hero hit.
entries.name: Extra Oomph

entries.description: Junkrat also gains the Ability RIP-Tire. Each time he uses this Heroic, it swaps to the alternate ability. Each Heroic has its own separate cooldown. Reduce both Heroic cooldowns by 20 seconds.
entries.name: Puckish Scamp

undoc.notes: Does not switch to RIP-Tire until Rocket Ride is used again, if the talent is picked while it's on cooldown.

entries.description: Increase the radius and explosion radius of grenades from Basic Attacks and Frag Launcher by 50%.
entries.name: Cannonball!

entries.description: Junkrat always rides his Rocket Ride Mount, which grants 150% increased Movement Speed, but his Mount cooldown is increased to 8 seconds.
entries.name: I Hate Waiting!

entries.description: Activate to make your next Basic Ability more powerful.
entries.name: Verdant Spheres

undoc.notes: Cooldown starts when the effect is triggered by casting a Basic Ability.

entries.description: After 1 second, deal 345 damage in an area. increases the radius by 50%.
entries.name: Flamestrike

undoc.notes: Delay starts after the cast goes through, making the total time after initiating cast to damage being dealt 1.25 seconds.

entries.description: Deal 126 damage over 3 seconds to an enemy, then they explode dealing 215 damage to all nearby enemies. Other Heroes damaged by this explosion are also affected by Living Bomb, though the secondary explosions cannot spread. makes this Ability cost no Mana and have no cooldown.
entries.name: Living Bomb

undoc.notes: Casting Living Bomb will prevent Basic Attacks for 0.25 seconds Living Bomb cannot spread to targets already affected by another Living Bomb. Main target takes damage from both periodic and explosion damage. Explosion damage is displayed in the target unit's Health bar as if it were a DoT, but does not count as one, allowing it to interrupt [[Channeled Ability#Weak Channel
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Damage over Time

entries.description: Stun the first enemy hit for 1 seconds. causes Gravity Lapse to stun the first 3 enemies hit and increases the stun duration by 50%.
entries.name: Gravity Lapse

entries.description: Launch a Phoenix to an area, dealing 84 damage to enemies along the way. The Phoenix persists for 7 seconds, attacking enemies for 84 damage and splashing for 42 damage.
entries.name: Phoenix

undoc.notes: Phoenix will prioritize attacking the last enemy Hero hit during its launch. If no Hero is hit, or the target leaves its Attack Range, Phoenix will attack the nearest enemy to the center, prioritizing Heroes.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Summon figment, Splash

entries.description: After 1.5 seconds, cast a slow-moving fireball that deals 810 damage to an enemy Hero and 405 damage to enemies nearby.
entries.name: Pyroblast

undoc.notes: Interrupting the Ability during its windup puts it on a 10 second cooldown. The cast is interrupted, if the target moves 5 units past its range during windup, or if Kael'thas issues a "move" or "stop" command. Pyroblast missile can only be disjointed if the target dies, is removed from the plane (certain Stasis effects) or instantly teleports farther than 30 units from its previous location. When disjointed, the missile expires upon reaching the target's location before the event. Otherwise, the missile will keep redirecting to the target unit. Pyroblast always explodes, applying its area effects upon reaching the end location, regardless of being able to hit its original target. Main target does not take area damage.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Channeled cast (stationary), Revealed

undoc.notes: Can trigger multiple times per cast.

entries.description: Increases Kael'thas's Spell Power by 4%. Kael'thas heals for 94 Health when activating Verdant Spheres.
entries.name: Fel Infusion

undoc.notes: Spell Power is permanent. Spell Power from Fel Infusion stacks additively with other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage and healing dealt modifiers affecting Kael'thas's Spell Damage or healing output.

entries.description: Arcane Barrier Activate to gain a Shield for 100% of Kael'thas's maximum Mana for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Mana Addict

undoc.notes: Continues to gain stacks even after the quest is complete. Kael'thas's current Mana is also increased by 15 when a Regeneration Globe is collected.

entries.description: Increases Gravity Lapse's range by 30%. When Gravity Lapse hits an enemy Hero, refund 80 Mana.
entries.name: Nether Wind

undoc.notes: Can only trigger once per cast.

entries.description: Reduce the Mana cost of Gravity Lapse by 70. When Gravity Lapse hits a Hero, reduce its cooldown by 8 seconds.
entries.name: Energy Roil

undoc.notes: Can only trigger once per cast.

entries.description: Activating Verdant Spheres restores 5% of Kael'thas's maximum Mana.
entries.name: Mana Tap

entries.description: When Flamestrike damages 2 or more Heroes, they take additional damage equal to 8% of their maximum Health.
entries.name: Burned Flesh

undoc.notes: The damage from Burned Flesh is dealt in a separate instance of damage.

entries.description: Living Bombs that spread to enemy Heroes deal 35% more damage.
entries.name: Sun King's Fury

undoc.notes: Affects both periodic and explosion damage. Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Living Bomb 's damage.

entries.description: Activating Verdant Spheres causes Kael'thas's next 2 Basic Attacks to instead deal 115 Spell Damage. If both of them hit enemy Heroes, gain 15% Spell Power for 10 seconds.
entries.name: Sunfire Enchantment

undoc.notes: Empowered attacks last until consumed. Using Verdant Spheres refreshes charges. Does not stack with itself. Subsequent applications refresh the duration of Spell Power buff. Spell Power from Sunfire Enchantment stacks additively with other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage and healing dealt modifiers affecting Kael'thas's Spell Damage or healing output.

entries.description: Launch a Phoenix to an area, dealing 78 damage to enemies along the way. The Phoenix persists for 7 seconds, attacking enemies for 78 damage and splashing for 39 damage.
entries.name: Phoenix

entries.description: After 1.5 seconds, cast a slow-moving fireball that deals 810 damage to an enemy Hero and 405 damage to enemies nearby.
entries.name: Pyroblast

entries.description: Each time Living Bomb deals periodic damage, Kael'thas's Basic Ability cooldowns are reduced by 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Pyromaniac

undoc.notes: Affects both initial and secondary targets' Living Bombs.

entries.description: Living Bomb's explosion Slows enemy Movement Speed by 30% for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Backdraft

undoc.notes: Affects both initial and secondary targets' Living Bombs.

entries.description: Increases Living Bomb's explosion radius by 20%.
entries.name: Fission Bomb

undoc.notes: Affects both initial and secondary targets' Living Bombs.

entries.description: Flamestrike will explode a second time 1.5 seconds later.
entries.name: Fury of the Sunwell

undoc.notes: Secondary Flamestrike has the same properties as baseline and benefits from all Talents affecting it.

entries.description: Flamestrike applies Living Bomb to the enemy Hero closest to its center who is not currently affected by Living Bomb.
entries.name: Ignite

entries.description: Verdant Spheres gains a second charge. Kael'thas benefits from all of his level 7 talents.
entries.name: Twin Spheres

undoc.notes: Verdant Spheres cannot be activated again before the previous charge has been triggered.

entries.description: Increases Phoenix duration by 100%. While alive, the Phoenix may be ordered to move to a different location. Stores 3 charges.
entries.name: Rebirth

entries.description: Increases Pyroblast's explosion radius by 50%. Heroes who are hit by Flamestrike or have Living Bomb spread to them reduce the cooldown of Pyroblast by 10 seconds.
entries.name: Presence Of Mind

entries.description: Living Bomb's spread from explosions can now also spread Living Bomb.
entries.name: Master of Flames

entries.description: Increases the cast range of Flamestrike by 40%. If you hit 2 or more Heroes, Flamestrike's cooldown is reduced by 4 seconds.
entries.name: Flamethrower

undoc.notes: Can only trigger once per cast.

Unstoppable enemy Heroes cannot be Rooted and thus do not grant stacks from being hit by Frost Nova. Chains of Kel'Thuzad, however, still does as it only requires hitting enemy Heroes. Spell Power from Master of the Cold Dark stacks additively with other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage and healing dealt modifiers affecting Kel'Thuzad's Spell Damage or healing output.

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, launch an orb that explodes upon hitting an enemy, dealing 150 damage to enemies in the area. The explosion leaves behind a pool of decay that lasts 2 seconds, dealing 82 damage every 0.5 seconds to enemies.
entries.name: Death and Decay

undoc.notes: Units that are immune to skillshots cannot be hit by the initial projectile, but can still be damaged by the splash and AoE damage. Casting Death and Decay sets Kel'Thuzad's Basic Attack cooldown to 0.5 seconds.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Clamping, Skillshot, Splash

entries.description: Create a nova that explodes after 1 second, dealing 180 damage to enemies inside and Slowing them by 35% for 2.5 seconds. Enemies in the center are Rooted for 1 second.
entries.name: Frost Nova

undoc.notes: Enemies hit by the center are both Rooted and Slowed. Casting Frost Nova sets Kel'Thuzad's Basic Attack cooldown to 0.5 seconds.

entries.description: Launch a chain, dealing 97 damage to the first enemy Hero hit. For 3 seconds after hitting an enemy, Chains can be reactivated to launch to an additional enemy, pulling both enemies together and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Chains of Kel'Thuzad

undoc.notes: Chain is launched from primary target toward target point on reactivation. If one target is Unstoppable, the other is pulled all the way to them. Casting Chains of Kel'Thuzad sets Kel'Thuzad's Basic Attack cooldown to 0.5 seconds.

entries.description: Launch a meteor of ice at an enemy Hero. Upon impact, the meteor deals 115 damage to its target and 275 damage to enemies in the area. All enemies hit by Frost Blast are Rooted for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Frost Blast

undoc.notes: Frost Blast missile can only be disjointed if the target dies, is removed from the plane (certain Stasis effects) or instantly teleports farther than 30 units from its previous location. When disjointed, the missile explodes upon reaching the target's location before the event. Otherwise, the missile will keep redirecting to the target unit. Frost Blast always explodes, applying its area effects upon reaching the end location, regardless of being able to hit its original target. Primary target does not take area damage. Casting Frost Blast sets Kel'Thuzad's Basic Attack cooldown to 0.5 seconds.

entries.description: Create a fissure anywhere on the Battleground that explodes after 1.5 seconds, dealing 320 damage to enemy Heroes in its area. If an enemy Hero is hit, set its cooldown to 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Shadow Fissure

undoc.notes: Casting Shadow Fissure sets Kel'Thuzad's Basic Attack cooldown to 0.5 seconds.

entries.description: Activate to create a spike that detonates after 4 seconds, dealing 70 damage to nearby enemies. The spike can be affected by Chains of Kel'Thuzad.
entries.name: Glacial Spike

undoc.notes: The spike has collision.

entries.description: Increase Death and Decay's duration by 1 second. After gaining 30 Blight, increase the radius of Death and Decay's pool by 30%.
entries.name: The Plaguelands

undoc.notes: Does not affect the initial splash radius.

entries.description: Frost Nova deals 75% more damage to enemies in the center. After gaining 30 Blight, increase Frost Nova's Root duration by 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Blighted Frost

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Frost Nova 's damage.

entries.description: Increase Chains of Kel'Thuzad's damage by 125%. After gaining 30 Blight, Chains of Kel'Thuzad reduces the Armor of pulled Heroes by 10 for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Barbed Chains

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers.
undoc.type: Defensive damage modifier / Offensive damage modifier

entries.description: Pulling a Hero with Chains of Kel'Thuzad grants Kel'Thuzad a permanent 128 Shield, stacking up to 2 times. Additionally, Chains of Kel'Thuzad deals up to 270 bonus damage to Shields.
entries.name: Strip Shields

undoc.notes: Damage is dealt to Shields only, cannot overflow to the target unit.

entries.description: Kel'Thuzad heals for 10% of all Spell Damage dealt while the Phylactery is charged.
entries.name: Phylactery of Kel'Thuzad

undoc.notes: All stacks are consumed and passive effect is lost when the Ability is activated.

entries.description: Activate to gain 50 Physical Armor for 4 seconds. Upon activation, nearby enemies take 45 damage and are Slowed by 35% for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Armor of the Archlich

undoc.props: Area of Effect, Physical Armor, Slow
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Defensive damage modifier

entries.description: Each time a Hero is hit by Death and Decay's pool, they take 25% more periodic damage from Death and Decay for the next 4 seconds, stacking up to 4 times.
entries.name: Accelerated Decay

undoc.notes: Counter tracks each enemy Hero affected by Death and Decay separately. Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers.

entries.description: Every 8 seconds, Kel'Thuzad's next Basic Attack hits all enemies in the area for 80% additional damage, deals Spell Damage instead of Physical, and Slows by 30% for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Chilling Touch

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Chilling Touch 's damage.

entries.description: Reduce the cooldown of Glacial Spike by 10 seconds and increase its damage by 400%.
entries.name: Ice Cold

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Glacial Spike 's damage.

entries.description: Launch a meteor of ice at an enemy Hero. Upon impact, the meteor deals 115 damage to its target and 275 damage to enemies in the area. All enemies hit by Frost Blast are Rooted for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Frost Blast

entries.description: Create a fissure anywhere on the Battleground that explodes after 1.5 seconds, dealing 320 damage to enemy Heroes in its area. If an enemy Hero is hit, set its cooldown to 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Shadow Fissure

entries.description: Increase Frost Nova's Slow by 20%. Each time Kel'Thuzad damages enemies Slowed by Frost Nova, reduce the cooldown of Frost Nova by 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Icy Grasp

undoc.notes: Cooldown reduction is triggered by every tick of damage dealt by Kel'Thuzad from both Basic Attacks and Abilities.

entries.description: After Chains of Kel'Thuzad's Stun expires, targets are Slowed by 60% for 1 seconds.
entries.name: Chains of Ice

undoc.notes: The slow effect is not applied if the stun is cleansed.

entries.description: Pulling a Hero with Chains of Kel'Thuzad reduces its cooldown by 5 seconds and refunds its Mana cost.
entries.name: Chain-Link

entries.description: Whenver Kel'Thuzad hits an enemy Hero with Death and Decay's explosion, its cooldown is reduced by 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Arcane Echoes

entries.description: Enemies that are Rooted take an additional 55 damage each time they are damaged by Kel'Thuzad.
entries.name: Hungering Cold

undoc.notes: Bonus damage is added to every tick of damage dealt by Kel'Thuzad from both Basic Attacks and Abilities.

entries.description: Stunning, Rooting, or Slowing a Hero grants 6% Spell Power for 10 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.
entries.name: Power of Icecrown

undoc.notes: Spell Power stacks additively with itself and offensive damage modifiers affecting Kel'Thuzad's Spell Damage output.

entries.description: When Frost Blast's Root expires, enemies are Slowed by 40% for 3 seconds. Heroes killed while under the effects of Frost Blast instantly release another Frost Blast explosion.
entries.name: Deathchill

undoc.notes: The post-Root Slow from Deathchill also counts as being affected by Frost Blast, triggering the secondary explosion upon a Hero's death.

entries.description: If a Hero is hit with Shadow Fissure, a second one is cast below them 1 second later. This second cast will not duplicate itself.
entries.name: Might of the Scourge

undoc.notes: The secondary explosion has the same area and initial delay, which starts after the 1 second secondary cast delay, as the original, but it does not grant the cooldown reduction upon hitting an enemy Hero

entries.description: Activate to dash forward, dealing 150 damage to enemies in the path. Takedowns reset the cooldown of Shifting Malice.
entries.name: Shifting Malice

entries.description: Activate to create a Shade of Naxxramas that lasts 15 seconds and mimics Kel'Thuzad's casts of Death and Decay.
entries.name: The Damned Return

undoc.notes: Shade is Invulnerable and Untargetable and has no collision. Shade's Death and Decay benefits from all talents affecting it.

entries.description: Gain 20% of damage dealt from Basic Attacks and 10% from Abilities as Shields for 6 seconds. Shield amount gained doubled against Heroes. 1004
entries.name: Assimilation

undoc.notes: Benefits from all damage from Basic and Heroic Abilities and Talents. Duration is refreshed every time more Shields are gained through Assimilation. Shields gained are calculated from the final damage dealt after all damage modifiers. Hero bonus stacks multiplicatively with all bonuses from talents affecting Assimilation 's baseline Shield gain.

entries.description: Leap at a target, dealing 115 damage. If the enemy dies within 1.5 seconds, restore 1 charge and refund 20 Mana.
entries.name: Ravage

entries.description: After 1.25 seconds, deal 140 damage to enemies within the target area, Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Impaling Blades

entries.description: Pulls enemies within the target area towards Kerrigan, dealing 40 damage. After 2.5 seconds, an explosion occurs around Kerrigan, dealing 165 damage to nearby enemies.
entries.name: Primal Grasp

undoc.notes: Both pull and explosion trigger talents affecting Primal Grasp . Removes active knockbacks on hit.

entries.description: Deals 74 damage per second to nearby enemies. Lasts for 7 seconds.
entries.name: Maelstrom

undoc.notes: Kerrigan can't mount while Maelstrom is active.

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, summon an Ultralisk that rushes foward upon spawning, dealing 250 damage to the first enemy Hero hit and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds. The Ultralisk's Basic Attacks deal 50% of their damage in an area around their target. Reactivate to retarget the Ultralisk. Ultralisk Charge
entries.name: Summon Ultralisk

undoc.notes: Upon summon, Ultralisk spawns in front of Kerrigan and casts Charge to the target direction. Kerrigan gains Assimilation Shields from all damage dealt by Ultralisk.
undoc.type: Summon / Active / Spell Damage, Crowd control / Movement: Dash

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Ravage grants 100 points of Assimilation Shields.
entries.name: Siphoning Impact

entries.description: Regeneration Globe healing grants 50 points of Assimilation Shields per second while active. While Assimilation is active, Kerrigan's Health and Mana regeneration is increased by 150%.
entries.name: Assimilation Mastery

entries.description: After casting Ravage, Kerrigan's next Basic Attack within 3 seconds splashes for 100% damage around the target.
entries.name: Fury of the Swarm

entries.description: Ravage grants Kerrigan 25% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Ravaging Ferocity

entries.description: Damaging an enemy increases the damage of Kerrigan's next Impaling Blades within 10 seconds by 10%, up to 100%.
entries.name: Kinetic Fulmination

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers affecting Impaling Blades ' damage output.

entries.description: Primal Grasp explodes a second time 2 seconds after its first explosion.
entries.name: Psionic Pulse

undoc.notes: Secondary explosion interacts with all talents affecting Primal Grasp .

entries.description: Reduce the cooldown of Ravage by 4 seconds and increase its damage to Minions and Mercenaries by 100%.
entries.name: Queen of Blades

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Ravage 's damage.

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Ravage grants a charge of Ravage. Can only occur once every 12 seconds per Hero.
entries.name: Boundless Fury

entries.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Kerrigan's Basic Abilities by 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Bladed Momentum

entries.description: Deals 74 damage per second to nearby enemies. Lasts for 7 seconds.
entries.name: Maelstrom

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, summon an Ultralisk that rushes foward upon spawning, dealing 225 damage to the first enemy Hero hit and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds. The Ultralisk's Basic Attacks deal 50% of their damage in an area around their target. Reactivate to retarget the Ultralisk.
entries.name: Summon Ultralisk

entries.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Primal Grasp grants 20 Spell Armor and 4% Movement Speed for 4 seconds, stacking up to 20% Movement Speed.
entries.name: Psionic Barrier

undoc.notes: Armor stacks up to 10 times (cannot bypass the Armor cap of 75 after subtracting the largest Armor debuff active on Kerrigan). Both effects stack additively with themselves, but not with other positive Spell Armor or Movement Speed effects. Consecutive applications refresh the duration of existing stacks.

entries.description: Increase the amount of Assimilation Shields granted from damage dealt by 10%, but reduce duration of Assimilation by 3 seconds.
entries.name: Volatile Power

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other talents affecting baseline Shield gain.

entries.description: Activate to place Kerrigan in a Chrysalis with 650 Health for 5 seconds. While inside, Kerrigan regenerates 4% of her maximum Health per second. Enemies can destroy the Chrysalis to end its effects early. Chrysalis
entries.name: Chrysalis

undoc.notes: Chrysalis can be reactivated after 0.5 seconds to end its effect early. Chrysalis places Kerrigan in Stasis, removing most negative effects from her.

entries.description: Ravage grants 5% Spell Power for 5 seconds, up to 40%.
entries.name: Mounting Potency

undoc.notes: Spell Power increase applies after the damage from Ravage is dealt. Consecutive applications refresh the duration of existing stacks. Spell Power from Mounting Potency stacks additively with itself and other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage and healing modifiers affecting Kerrigan's Spell Damage or healing output.

entries.description: Enemies hit by Impaling Blades take an additional 60 damage the next 6 times Kerrigan damages them within 5 seconds.
entries.name: Painful Spikes

undoc.notes: Damage dealt by Ultralisk does not count as dealt by Kerrigan for the purposes of this Talent.

entries.description: Damaging a Hero with a Heroic Ability grants 35% Spell Power for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Unbridled Energy

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself. Subsequent applications refresh the duration of the effect. Spell Power from Unbridled Energy stacks additively with other sources of Spell Power and other offensive damage and healing modifiers affecting Kerrigan's Spell Damage or healing output.

entries.description: Maelstrom's duration is increased by 0.4 seconds every time it damages a Hero.
entries.name: Omegastorm

entries.description: Increase the Health and Basic Attack damage of the Ultralisk by 20%. The Ultralisk morphs into an egg when it dies. If the egg isn't killed within 4 seconds, a new Ultralisk is born. Torrasque
entries.name: Torrasque

undoc.notes: There is no limit to how many times Ultralisk can respawn this way. Egg is spawned regardless of Ultralisk dying from its duration expiring or being killed by the enemy.

entries.description: Damaging an enemy increases Basic Attack damage by 2% for 5 seconds, up to 40%.
entries.name: Assimilation Blades

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers affecting Kerrigan's Basic Attack damage. Consecutive applications refresh the duration of existing stacks.

entries.description: Activate to teleport to a nearby location, dealing 50 damage to nearby enemies. Generates 300% increased Assimilation Shields from the damage dealt.
entries.name: Psionic Shift

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other talents affecting baseline Shield gain.

entries.description: Using a Basic Ability grants 25 Armor for 2 seconds. Heroic Abilities grant 50 Armor.
entries.name: Rockstar

undoc.notes: When using Mosh Pit, Armor is granted after the initial channel finishes. Otherwise, the Armor is granted after casting the Ability is fully finished. Does not stack with itself or other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Slide to a location, dealing 105 damage and Stunning enemies hit for 1.25 seconds.
entries.name: Powerslide

undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Movement: Dash

entries.description: Deals 68 damage to nearby enemies, knocking them back.
entries.name: Face Melt

entries.description: Regenerate 66 Health per second for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Guitar Solo

entries.description: After 0.75 seconds, channel to Stun nearby enemies for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Mosh Pit

undoc.notes: Interrupting Mosh Pit during its windup puts it on a 10 second cooldown.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Channeled cast (stationary), Stationary channel, Stun

entries.description: Leap to target location, landing after 2.75 seconds, dealing 330 damage to enemies in the area, and Slowing them by 50% for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Stage Dive

undoc.notes: Interrupting Stage Dive during its windup puts it on a 10 second cooldown. Stace Dive cannot be interrupted or prevented by Roots, unlike most other Movement Abilities. After successfully channeling, E.T.C is put in Stasis until landing. In addition to usual effects of Stasis, E.T.C is removed from ground plane (disjoints certain projectiles) and has no collision, but he does not receive the initial expanded debuff removal. A warning AoE appears for both teams when the Ability has been cast successfully.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Channeled cast (stationary), Slow, Pseudo-Stasis (self)
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Status effect, Movement: Teleport

entries.description: While Guitar Solo is active, E.T.C. heals for 60% of his damage dealt by Basic Attacks. Basic Attacks increase the duration of Guitar Solo by 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Guitar Hero

entries.description: Rockstar gives allies a stack of Block, granting 75 Physical Armor against the next Hero Basic Attack for 8 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%. Maximum 2 stacks of Block.
entries.name: Block Party

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Physical Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Allows Powerslide to travel over walls and terrain. If no enemies are hit, reduce the cooldown by 6 seconds and refund the Mana cost.
entries.name: Crowd Surfer

entries.description: Increases Face Melt range and knockback by 50%.
entries.name: Loud Speakers

entries.description: Using a Basic or Heroic Ability also gives nearby allied Heroes 20% Movement Speed for 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Speed Metal

entries.description: Face Melt does 300% more damage to enemies recently affected by Powerslide.
entries.name: Pinball Wizard

undoc.notes: Pinball Wizard uses a separate damage value from Face Melt, causing the tooltip percentage to stack multiplicatively with offensive damage modifiers.

entries.description: E.T.C's Basic Attacks deal 12% more damage, increased to 36% While Guitar Solo is active.
entries.name: Hammer-on

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers.

entries.description: Using a Basic or Heroic Ability releases two pulses of 18 damage. This deals 200% bonus damage to Minions and Mercenaries. The first occurs instantly. The second occurs 2 seconds later.
entries.name: Echo Pedal

undoc.notes: Pulses do not stack. The second pulse for one Ability will not occur if you use another Ability before it activates. Note that the second pulse will always occur right when the Armor from Rockstar expires, so the visual icon for this Trait in the bottom left may help time Abilities for waveclear. When using Powerslide or Stage Dive, the first pulse is fired upon reaching the end location. When using Mosh Pit the first pulse is fired right after the windup completes. Damage bonus to Minions and Mercenaries stacks additively with offensive damage modifiers.

entries.description: After 0.75 seconds, channel to Stun nearby enemies for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Mosh Pit

entries.description: Leap to target location, landing after 2.75 seconds, dealing 330 damage to enemies in the area, and Slowing them by 50% for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Stage Dive

entries.description: Hitting at least 2 targets with Face Melt reduces its cooldown by 6 seconds.
entries.name: Mic Check

entries.description: Face Melt leaves an Amp behind, which will knock enemies away again 2 seconds later. Enemy Heroes knocked back by Face Melt or the Amp reduce E.T.C.'s Heroic cooldown by 4%.
entries.name: Encore

undoc.notes: Secondary pulse does not interact with talents affecting Face Melt.

entries.description: Face Melt Slows enemies by 50% fading over 2 seconds.
entries.name: Face Smelt

entries.description: After using Powerslide, gain 35 Armor for 4 seconds, reducing all damage taken by 35%.
entries.name: Show Stopper

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: E.T.C.'s Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Guitar Solo by 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Aggressive Shredding

entries.description: Activate to Slow the Attack Speed by 50% and Movement Speed by 20% of nearby Heroes and Summons for 2.5 seconds. Heroes and Summons that attack your Hero have their Attack Speed slowed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Imposing Presence

undoc.notes: Passive is not applied if the enemy Basic Attack misses due to being Blinded. Passive Attack Slow does not stack with itself, nor the active component. Passive and active Attack Slow stack additively with other effects that can affect the target Hero's Attack Speed.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Attack Slow, Slow

entries.description: Mosh Pit refreshes the cooldown of Powerslide. E.T.C. can Powerslide during Mosh Pit, which also increases its duration by 2 seconds.
entries.name: Tour Bus

entries.description: Stage Dive's impact area is 50% bigger, and its Slow is increased by 30%.
entries.name: Crowd Pleaser

undoc.notes: Slow increase is additive.

entries.description: Upon dying, a ghost uses Mosh Pit at E.T.C's location.
entries.name: Death Metal

undoc.notes: The ghost's Mosh Pit activates immediately upon E.T.C.'s death with no windup. As the ghost is untargetable, it cannot be interrupted, moved or delayed through any means, and will channel with a normal range and full duration Mosh Pit.

entries.description: Cooldown: 45 seconds Activate to give all nearby allied Heroes a Shield that absorbs damage equal to 30% of their maximum Health for 5 seconds, increased by 2% for each other allied Hero in the area.
entries.name: Power of the Horde

entries.description: Activate to teleport to a nearby location and deal 48 damage to nearby enemy Heroes. The cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds for every enemy Hero hit, up to 50 seconds.
entries.name: Ride the Lightning

undoc.notes: If this Talent is chosen while E.T.C. is affected by certain Stasis effects including Stitches's Gorge, it becomes usable while channeling Mosh Pit.

entries.description: Leoric becomes a ghost when he dies, and resurrects upon reaching full Health. Leoric deals no damage while dead. Wrath Of The Bone King Leoric's first two Basic Attacks cleave for 100% damage, and his third Basic Attack deals 225% damage to a single target.
entries.name: Undying

undoc.notes: Leoric can use Ghastly Swing (Q), Drain Essence (W) and Hearth and provide vision while Undying. Leoric cannot Mount, use other Abilities or interact with other units in any other way while Undying, unless otherwise noted. Leoric is untargetable by everything while Undying and cannot be interacted with. Leoric can pass through pathing blockers and enemy Gates while Undying, but not through real terrain. Reaching full Health while Undying automatically resurrects him at his current location after 1 second. Leoric is still Undying, but unable to act for the duration of the resurrection sequence. / Damage bonus of the third attack (+125%) stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Leoric's Basic Attack damage.
undoc.type: Special death state / Physical Damage / Offensive damage modifier

entries.description: Leoric swings his mace, dealing 150 damage and Slowing enemies by 40% for 2.5 seconds. If an enemy Hero is hit, refund 50% of the cooldown and Mana cost. Deals 75% additional damage to Minions. Peasants!
entries.name: Skeletal Swing

undoc.notes: Damage bonus to Minions stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Skeletal Swing 's damage.

entries.description: Slow enemies by 40% for 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Ghastly Swing

undoc.notes: Replaces Skeletal Swing while Undying. Does not benefit from talents affecting Skeletal Swing.

entries.description: Grab an enemy Hero's soul, dealing up to 20% of their maximum Health as damage and healing Leoric for up to 20% of his maximum Health while he is nearby, over 4 seconds. Leoric's Movement Speed is reduced by 20% while this is active.
entries.name: Drain Hope

undoc.notes: Drain Hope is interrupted if Leoric dies or is put in Stasis.

entries.description: Throw out a chain, attaching to the first enemy Hero hit, healing Leoric for up to 10% of his maximum Health over 4 seconds as long as the enemy remains close.
entries.name: Drain Essence

undoc.notes: Replaces Drain Hope while Undying. Does not benefit from Talents affecting Drain Hope. Drain Essence applied to a target before they change states may remain on them in some cases (e.g. D.Va before she uses Self-Destruct).

entries.description: Leoric separates from his body, becoming Unstoppable and gaining Movement Speed accelerating up to 50% over 2.5 seconds. When Wraith Walk ends or is canceled, his body jumps to his wraith.
entries.name: Wraith Walk

undoc.notes: Can be cast while Rooted. Wraith Walk can be reactivated after 0.25 seconds to apply its end effect early. Leoric's Wraith is an Invulnerable Summon that has regular base Movement Speed. Wraith's Movement Speed can be affected by conveyor belts in Volskaya Foundry. Leoric can pass through pathing blockers and enemy Gates while Wraith Walking, but not through real terrain. Unstoppable is removed before teleporting to Wraith. Wraith Walk is interrupted, without teleporting Leoric, if he dies or is put in Stasis.

entries.description: Create an unpassable tomb for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Entomb

undoc.notes: Entomb can be reactivated after 0.5 seconds to end its effect early.

entries.description: Leoric becomes Unstoppable and walks forward, swinging his mace 3 times. Enemies hit take 250 damage, and Heroes hit heal Leoric for 12% of his maximum Health.
entries.name: March of the Black King

undoc.notes: First swing takes place 0.5 seconds after the cast and the following two at 1 second intervals. Cannot be cast while Rooted.
undoc.type: Spell Damage / Healing, Movement: Dash, Status effect

entries.description: Skeletal Swing's cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds. Enemy Heroes hit heal Leoric for 4% of his maximum Health.
entries.name: Consume Vitality

undoc.notes: Baseline cooldown reduction from hitting a Hero is applied after base reduction from Consume Vitality.

entries.description: When a nearby friendly or enemy Minion dies, Leoric restores 1.25% of his maximum Health and 6 Mana.
entries.name: Fealty Unto Death

entries.description: Activate to heal Leoric for 30% of his maximum Health over 5 seconds. Regeneration Globes lower the cooldown of this Ability by 20 seconds.
entries.name: Ossein Renewal

entries.description: Increase the range of Skeletal Swing by 25%.
entries.name: Ghastly Reach

entries.description: Increase the Slow of Skeletal Swing by 20%.
entries.name: Paralyzing Rage

entries.description: Skeletal Swing deals 75% additional damage to Mercenaries and Monsters, and hitting them activates Skeletal Swing's cost and cooldown refund.
entries.name: Kneel, Peasants!

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Skeletal Swing 's damage.

entries.description: Increase the healing from Drain Hope to 25% of Leoric's maximum Health. If Drain Hope lasts its full duration, Leoric instantly heals for an additional 5% of his maximum Health.
entries.name: Willing Vessel

entries.description: Drain Hope no longer reduces Leoric's Movement Speed. If Drain Hope lasts its full duration, gain 30% Movement Speed for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Drain Momentum

entries.description: Increase the range of Drain Hope by 25%.
entries.name: Hopelessness

entries.description: Create an unpassable tomb for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Entomb

entries.description: Leoric becomes Unstoppable and walks forward, swinging his mace 3 times. Enemies hit take 250 damage, and Heroes hit heal Leoric for 12% of his maximum Health.
entries.name: March of the Black King

entries.description: Drain Hope's cooldown is reduced by 0.75 seconds for every 1 second it is active. If Drain Hope lasts its full duration, its cooldown is reduced by an additional 2 seconds.
entries.name: Unyielding Despair

entries.description: Increase Wraith Walk's duration by 100%. Enemy Heroes that come in contact with the wraith deal 50% less damage for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Ominous Wraith

undoc.notes: Damage reduction stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting the target Hero's damage output.

entries.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 2.5% of the Hero's maximum Health and heal Leoric for twice that amount.
entries.name: Spectral Leech

undoc.notes: Only affects the primary target of the Basic Attack. Only heals for twice the bonus damage actually dealt (relevant if the target has less than 2.5% of maximum Health remaining).

entries.description: If Drain Hope lasts its full duration, it instantly deals an additional 15% of the target's maximum Health as damage. This damage does not heal Leoric.
entries.name: Crushing Hope

entries.description: Wraith Walk increases the damage of the next Skeletal Swing within 5 seconds by 50%. Each enemy Hero hit by this Skeletal Swing reduces the cooldown of Wraith Walk by 7 seconds.
entries.name: Royal Focus

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Skeletal Swing 's damage.

entries.description: Increase Leoric's Attack Speed by 20%.
entries.name: Mithril Mace

entries.description: The duration of Entomb is lowered by 1 second, but enemies trapped inside are Silenced and take 50 damage every 1 second.
entries.name: Buried Alive

undoc.notes: Because of the relatively low tickrate, it is possible for e.g. Lúcio to High Five in and Cleanse targets, without it being canceled by being Silenced on the way in, if timed correctly.

entries.description: The final swing of March of the Black King also applies Drain Hope to nearby enemy Heroes.
entries.name: Death March

undoc.notes: 1) Extended by Leoric's unit radius. Movement speed bonuses from multiple instances of Drain Momentum do not stack. Hopelessness does not affect the initial radius of Death March application. Only the active range is increased. Death March fully interacts with all other Talents affecting Drain Hope. Drain Hopes applied to a target before they change states may remain on them in some cases (e.g. D.Va before she uses Self-Destruct).

entries.description: Deal 40 damage per second to nearby enemies. While Drain Hope is active, gain 40 Armor and the damage and area is increased by 100%.
entries.name: Burning Despair

undoc.notes: Damage from Burning Despair is unaffected by external offensive damage modifiers, doesn't trigger lifesteal effects and doesn't draw tower aggro from A Call For Help. Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Activate to become Protected for 3 seconds, preventing all damage.
entries.name: Shroud of the Dead King

entries.description: Upon taking damage, your Basic Ability cooldowns refresh 50% faster and you gain 10% Movement Speed for 1 second.
entries.name: Fast Feet

undoc.notes: While active, Fast Feet reduces Li Li's Basic Ability cooldowns by 0.125 seconds every 0.25 seconds. Fast Feet does not stack with itself. Subsequent applications refresh the duration.

entries.description: Heal lowest Health allied Hero within 6 range for 210 Health.
entries.name: Healing Brew

undoc.notes: Ability is disabled if no allied Heroes with missing Health are in range. A visual effect indicates the current heal target, which is the lowest Health percent ally in range (including self).

entries.description: Summon a Cloud Serpent on an allied Hero that attacks nearby enemies every second. Each attack deals 26 damage and heals the ally for 20. Lasts for 8 seconds. Cloud Serpent
entries.name: Cloud Serpent

undoc.notes: Casting Cloud Serpent on an ally with an existing Cloud Serpent replaces the old one. Cloud Serpent 's attacks prioritize the closest Hero and then the closest enemy. Cloud Serpent 's Basic Attacks cannot miss.

entries.description: Throw a cloud of wind at the 2 nearest enemies (prioritizing Heroes), dealing 133 damage. Heroes hit are Blinded and Slowed by 15% for 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Blinding Wind

undoc.notes: Ability is disabled if there are no valid targets in range.

entries.description: Channel for up to 6 seconds. Every 0.25 seconds, increase the cooldown of Jug of 1,000 Cups by 2 seconds, up to 50 additional seconds, and heal the lowest Health nearby allied Hero for 75 Health.
entries.name: Jug of 1,000 Cups

undoc.notes: Jug of 1,000 Cups can be reactivated after 0.5 seconds to end its effects early. Li Li's Basic Abilities are disabled and she cannot attack while channeling Jug of 1,000 Cups. She can, however, still use Active Abilities gained from her Talents. Cooldown starts counting down as soon as the Ability starts channeling. Ticks once immediately and every 0.25 seconds thereafter, for a total of 25 ticks.

entries.description: Li Li channels for 2 seconds, summoning a Water Dragon that hits the nearest enemy Hero within 12 range and all enemies near them, dealing 300 damage and slowing their Movement Speed by 70% for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Water Dragon

undoc.notes: Ability is disabled if there are no valid targets in range. After activating Water Dragon, Li Li's Basic Abilities are disabled and she cannot attack for 0.5 seconds. She can, however, still use Active Abilities gained from her Talents. Water Dragon is only interrupted if Li Li dies while casting it. The target is chosen at the end of the 2 second delay. If no targets are within the range at this moment the ability will not fire and goes on full cooldown. After the 2 second targeting period, there is an additional 0.4 second delay before the Water Dragon impacts. Li Li gains vision over the current target of Water Dragon during the targeting period, and for 1 second after it impacts.

entries.description: Healing Brew's cooldown is reduced by 1 second and its Mana cost is refunded if it heals a Hero under 50% Health.
entries.name: Free Drinks

undoc.notes: The cooldown Reduction can apply multiple times per cast if combined with Two for One.

entries.description: Cloud Serpent no longer costs Mana and while Fast Feet is active its cooldown refreshes an additional 75% faster.
entries.name: Serpent Sidekick

undoc.notes: Reduces Cloud Serpent 's cooldown by an additional 0.1875 seconds each tick of Fast Feet.

entries.description: Increase Fast Feet's duration by 150% and increase Mana regeneration by 150% while Fast Feet is active.
entries.name: Eager Adventurer

entries.description: Cloud Serpent grants its bearer 10% increased Movement Speed. Casting Blinding Wind increases this bonus to 20% for 2 seconds. Cloud Serpent attacks 25% faster.
entries.name: Wind Serpent

undoc.notes: Actually reduces the attack period of Cloud Serpent by 25%, resulting in a 33% increase in its Attack Speed.

entries.description: If Blinding Wind hits 2 Heroes, its cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds and Li Li gains 10% Spell Power for 10 seconds.
entries.name: Surging Winds

undoc.notes: Spell Power from Surging Winds does not stack with itself. Subsequent applications refresh the duration. Spell Power from Surging Winds stacks additively with other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage modifiers and healing dealt modifiers affecting the target Hero.
undoc.type: Healing dealt modifier, Offensive damage modifier

entries.description: Activate to gain Fast Feet, 30 Armor, and 30% Movement Speed for 3 seconds. While Fast Feet is active, Li Li gains 10 Armor.
entries.name: Safety Sprint

undoc.notes: Does not stack with base Movement Speed bonus from Fast Feet. Does not stack with itself or other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Healing Brew heals for an additional 42 over 3 seconds. While Fast Feet is active, this heal amount is increased by 100%.
entries.name: The Good Stuff

undoc.notes: Fast Feet bonus directly affects the base value, causing the bonus percentage to stack multiplicatively with healing dealt modifiers that can affect healing from The Good Stuff.

entries.description: Increase the number of enemies hit by Blinding Wind from 2 to 3. Blinding Wind deals 75% additional damage if all 3 enemies hit are Heroes.
entries.name: Mass Vortex

undoc.notes: All wind clouds do not need to impact. It is enough that all of the targeted enemies from the cast are Heroes to gain the damage bonus. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Blinding Wind 's damage.

entries.description: Activate to heal an allied Hero for 160 and make them Unstoppable for 1 second. Let's Go's cooldown is affected by Fast Feet.
entries.name: Let's Go!

undoc.notes: Cooldown is reduced by 0.125 seconds every 0.25 seconds while Fast Feet is active.

entries.description: Channel for up to 6 seconds. Every 0.25 seconds, increase the cooldown of Jug of 1,000 Cups by 2 seconds, up to 50 additional seconds, and heal the lowest Health nearby allied Hero for 75 Health.
entries.name: Jug of 1,000 Cups

entries.description: Li Li channels for 2 seconds, summoning a Water Dragon that hits the nearest enemy Hero within 12 range and all enemies near them, dealing 300 damage and slowing their Movement Speed by 70% for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Water Dragon

entries.description: Cloud Serpent attacks bounce to hit 2 additional targets for 13 damage and 10 healing.
entries.name: Lightning Serpent

undoc.notes: Bounces chain, and cannot hit the same target, including the primary target of Cloud Serpent's attack, more than once.

entries.description: Increase Blinding Wind's duration by 0.75 seconds. Li Li's Basic Attacks against Blinded Heroes deal 100% increased damage.
entries.name: Gale Force

undoc.notes: Interacts with Blinds from any source. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Li Li's Basic attack damage.

entries.description: Increase Blinding Wind's Slow amount to 30% and its duration to 2 seconds.
entries.name: Hindering Winds

entries.description: Increases the number of allies healed by Healing Brew to 2, but increases the cooldown by 1 second.
entries.name: Two For One

entries.description: Healing Brew's healing for Heroes is increased by 33% if they are under 50% Health.
entries.name: Pick Me Up

undoc.notes: Does not interact with heal over time from The Good Stuff. Pick Me Up directly affects the base value of Healing Brew, causing the bonus percentage to stack multiplicatively with healing dealt modifiers that can affect its healing.

entries.description: Cloud Serpent grants its bearer 10% increased healing received and heals them for an additional 0.5% of their maximum Health each time it attacks.
entries.name: Blessings of Yu'lon

undoc.notes: Bouncing attacks from Lightning Serpent do not grant additional healing. Healing amplification stacks additively with other healing received modifiers.

entries.description: Jug of 1,000 Cups heals two allies at a time.
entries.name: Jug of 1,000,000 Cups

entries.description: After hitting a target with Water Dragon, another Water Dragon is summoned at the point of impact.
entries.name: Double Dragon

undoc.notes: Secondary cast is independent of Li Li's status or position and goes off even if she is dead, otherwise it has the same properties as the primary cast.

entries.description: Activate to heal nearby allied Heroes for 149. Basic Attacks and Cloud Serpent attacks reduce the cooldown of Mistweaver by 1 second.
entries.name: Mistweaver

undoc.notes: Bouncing Attacks from Lightning Serpent do not grant additional cooldown reduction.

entries.description: While Stunned, Silenced, or Rooted and for 2 seconds afterwards, Li Li gains 35 Armor. Increase Fast Feet's cooldown refresh rate to 75%.
entries.name: Shake It Off

undoc.notes: Causes Fast Feet to reduce cooldowns by an additional 0.0625 seconds every 0.25 seconds it is active. Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Gathering a Regeneration Globe with a Viking permanently increases all their Health Regeneration by 0.5 per second.
entries.name: Viking Hoard

undoc.notes: Each Regeneration Globe only counts as 1 stack, even if it's collected by multiple Vikings.

entries.description: Olaf can charge enemies and Slow their Movement Speed by 30% for 3 seconds by right-clicking on them. 8 second cooldown. Olaf gains increased Health Regeneration when out of combat for 4 seconds. Charge Stoutness
entries.name: Select Olaf

undoc.notes: Targeting an enemy below the minimum range will not initiate Charge, and causes Olaf to Basic Attack them normally. Attack orders issued while Silenced will never trigger the charge, Olaf will simply walk all the way up and Basic Attack normally instead. If Olaf is mid-charge when Play Again triggers from another Viking, he will continue his charge globally, either flying all the way to and hitting his target or returning to the start location of the charge, depending on the part of the animation he is in when Play Again completes.

entries.description: Baleog's Basic Attacks deal 50% splash damage to enemies behind his attack target.
entries.name: Select Baleog

entries.description: Erik moves faster than the other Vikings and has increased Basic Attack range.
entries.name: Select Erik

entries.description: The Lost Vikings can be controlled individually or as a group. Each Viking has particular strengths.
entries.name: Select All Vikings

entries.description: Hop into an Unstoppable Longboat that fires at nearby enemies for 128 damage per second and can fire a mortar that deals 228 damage in an area. The boat has increased Health for each Viking inside. If the boat is destroyed by enemies, all Vikings are Stunned for 1 second. Lasts 15 seconds. Longboat
entries.name: Longboat Raid!

undoc.notes: Longboat Raid! cannot be cast unless all alive Vikings are within 20 radius. If a single Viking is being controlled, Longboat will be summoned at their location. If multiple Vikings are controlled, Baleog's location will be prioritized, then Olaf's, if Baleog is dead. While Longboat Raid! is active, Vikings inside are put in Stasis. In addition to the usual effects of Stasis, the Vikings are removed from ground plane (disjoints certain projectiles), have no collision, cannot regenerate Health, Mana, Energy or Shields and cannot be seen on the minimap or revealed. / Longboat's attacks are siege attacks that deal Spell Damage. Longboat's attacks prioritize Heroes, then the closest enemy.

entries.description: Fires a mortar at the targeted location, dealing 228 damage in a large area.
entries.name: Longboat Raid! - Mortar

undoc.notes: Available during Longboat Raid! . Mortar projectile has a flight time of 0.3, 1.0 or 1.5 seconds, depending on the distance to the target point.

entries.description: Summon, fully heal, and revive all Lost Vikings at target location after a Viking channels for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Play Again!

undoc.notes: Placed on a 10 second cooldown if interrupted. Vikings in Stasis at the end of the channel will not be healed or teleported to the cast location.

entries.description: The Vikings gain 30% increased Movement Speed for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Go Go Go!

entries.description: Olaf gains 20% bonus maximum Health. Every 5 seconds, Olaf gains 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%. Stores up to 2 charges.
entries.name: Olaf the Stout

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: After standing still for 3 seconds, Erik gains Stealth and his Sight Radius is increased by 75%. The Stealth persists for 3 seconds after moving and once removed, Erik gains 75% bonus Basic Attack damage for 6 seconds.
entries.name: Spy Games

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Erik's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Increases Baleog’s splash damage against non-Heroes to 100%.
entries.name: Explosive Attacks

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Baleog's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Enemy Minions or captured Mercenaries killed near The Lost Vikings grant stacks of Bribe. Use 40 stacks to bribe target Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries. Maximum stacks available: 200.
entries.name: Viking Bribery

undoc.notes: Players from either team can see the exact number of stacks for this Talent currently available by hovering over the icon on the Talents screen.

entries.description: Baleog's Basic Attacks and splash damage heal for 20% of the damage dealt. Healing is doubled against Heroes.
entries.name: Pain Don't Hurt

entries.description: Permanently increases Erik's base Movement Speed by 10%, and as long as Erik is moving he heals 34 Health per second.
entries.name: Erik The Swift

undoc.notes: You can use shift to queue up Erik to run back and forth in a small area and therefore passively heal while you control another Viking. Movement Speed bonus is an increase to Erik's base Movement Speed, causing it to stack multiplicatively with the highest Movement Speed buff affecting him.

entries.description: Erik's Basic Attacks against Structures light them on fire for 3 seconds, causing 225 damage.
entries.name: It's a Sabotage!

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself. Reapplying the effect refreshes the duration.

entries.description: Friendly non-Boss Mercenaries near your Hero deal 50% more damage. Gain 50 Armor against Minions and Mercenaries, reducing the damage taken by 50%.
entries.name: Mercenary Lord

undoc.notes: Damage bonus does not stack with other Mercenary Lord auras and its derivatives. Does not stack with other positive Armor effects against Minions and Mercenaries. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Increase Baleog’s attack range by 2.5. While near Olaf and Erik, he becomes inspired by the power of teamwork and his Attack Speed is increased by 50%.
entries.name: Baleog the Fierce

entries.description: Activate to have each Viking deal 85 damage to nearby enemies. Deals 100% bonus damage to enemy Heroes.
entries.name: Spin To Win!

undoc.notes: Hero bonus stacks additively with offensive damage modifiers that can affect Spin To Win! 's damage.

entries.description: All Vikings gain a 140 to 308 point Shield, increasing in strength for each Viking alive. Lasts 4 seconds.
entries.name: Norse Force

entries.description: Hop into an Unstoppable Longboat that fires at nearby enemies for 128 damage per second and can fire a mortar that deals 228 damage in an area. The boat has increased Health for each Viking inside. If the boat is destroyed by enemies, all Vikings are Stunned for 1 second. Lasts 15 seconds.
entries.name: Longboat Raid!

entries.description: Summon, fully heal, and revive all Lost Vikings at target location after a Viking channels for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Play Again!

entries.description: Olaf deals 34 damage every second to nearby enemies.
entries.name: Hunka' Burning Olaf

entries.description: Makes all Vikings Invulnerable and able to pass over enemies for 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Jump!

undoc.notes: Cannot be activated if Stunned, Silenced, or in Stasis, except you can select a Viking which isn't so impaired and press W to immediately free all 3 Vikings with this Talent.

entries.description: While Olaf, Baleog, and Erik are near each of the other Vikings, their Basic Attacks deal bonus damage equal to 1.25% maximum Health to enemy Heroes.
entries.name: Nordic Attack Squad

entries.description: When Olaf charges enemies, they are Stunned for 1 second.
entries.name: Large and In Charge

entries.description: Enemies damaged by a Viking's Basic Attack reduce the cooldown of all Viking Abilities by 0.3125 seconds.
entries.name: Impatience Is a Virtue

entries.description: Activating Go Go Go! grants an additional 40% Movement Speed and breaks the Vikings out of Roots and Slows.
entries.name: 64 KB Marathon

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with baseline Go Go Go! Movement Speed bonus, but not with other Movement Speed bonuses.

entries.description: Attacking a Hero who is Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned increases your Basic Attack damage by 30% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Executioner

undoc.notes: The effect triggers separately on each Viking. Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Vikings' Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: The Longboat can attack two targets at once and the range of its Mortar is increased by 100%. Reduce Longboat Raid!'s cooldown by 30 seconds.
entries.name: Ragnarok 'n' Roll!

entries.description: 10 seconds after using Play Again!, any dead Vikings are revived and summoned again, and all are healed to full.
entries.name: Checkpoint Reached

entries.description: Reduces The Lost Vikings' death timer by 50%.
entries.name: The Sequel!

entries.description: Every 5 seconds, the next Basic Attack will deal an additional 41 damage to the target, and 105 damage to all nearby Minions, Mercenaries and Monsters. Each Viking has their own cooldown.
entries.name: Fury of the Storm

entries.description: While moving alongside terrain, activate to slide toward a targeted location. Enemies hit take 100 damage and are Slowed by 75% for 1 second.
entries.name: Push Off

undoc.notes: Lúcio's Basic Attack fires 4 pulses 0.125s apart, each doing the full amount of damage listed in his base stats. Push Off is disabled when Lúcio has not had a proper contact with a wall within the last 0.25 seconds (see note on Wall Ride).
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Movement: Dash

entries.description: Deal 105 damage to enemies in an area and knock them back.
entries.name: Soundwave

entries.description: Play one of two music tracks for Lúcio and his allies. : Passively heal Lúcio and nearby allied Heroes for 15 Health per second. : Increase the Movement Speed of Lúcio and nearby allied Heroes by 10%.
entries.name: Crossfade

entries.description: Raise Lucio's Crossfade track volume for 3 seconds, amping to 112 Health per second and to 30% increased Movement Speed.
entries.name: Amp It Up

entries.description: After a 1 second delay, grant yourself and all nearby allied Heroes a 1296 point Shield that rapidly decays over 6 seconds.
entries.name: Sound Barrier

undoc.notes: Interrupting the Ability during its windup puts it on a 10 second cooldown.

entries.description: Quickly skate to an allied Hero. Upon arrival, the ally is healed for 230, Lúcio is healed for 80 and both gain Unstoppable for 1 second.
entries.name: High Five

undoc.notes: Lúcio himself has no limit to how often he can be affected by the effects of this Ability. The Ability is interrupted if Lúcio cannot reach the target within 1.5 seconds or if the target moves farther than 12 units from Lúcio. Ally cooldown starts immediately when the Ability is used. The cooldown will not be refunded if the Ability gets interrupted.

entries.description: While moving alongside terrain, Lúcio begins to Wall Ride for 2 seconds. While Wall Ride is active, Lúcio can walk through units and gains 20% Movement Speed that stacks with other bonuses.
entries.name: Wall Ride

undoc.notes: To (re)apply Wall Ride Lúcio must have proper contact with a wall: - Lúcio must be within 1.4 distance of proper terrain. - Lúcio's Movement Speed must be above 2.5. (This equates to being above ~52% of his base Movement Speed.) - Lúcio may not be Stunned, Dazed or Polymorphed. Once applied, Wall Ride and associated bonuses last for the given duration, even if Lúcio loses contact with a wall.

Actually a 23% radius increase. Allies affected by Boombox also generate stacks for the quest, though they cannot give double credit from both auras simultaneously. Boombox also gains bonus radius from quest completion.

entries.description: Wall Ride's Movement Speed bonus gradually increases to 40% over 6 seconds while Lúcio maintains its effect.
entries.name: Accelerando

undoc.notes: Wallride speed bonus is updated every 0.2 seconds in 1% increments.

entries.description: While Wall Ride is active, Basic Attacks heal for 30% of the damage dealt and restore 0.5 Mana. Increase Wall Ride's duration by 1 second.
entries.name: Smooth Moves

entries.description: Enemies within the first half of Soundwave's range are knocked back 75% farther.
entries.name: Subwoofer

undoc.notes: Knockback speed remains unchanged. Bonus radius from completing the quest does not affect knockback distance. Quest reward increases the radius of the inner area in proportion, but not the arc.

entries.description: Hitting an enemy with Soundwave while Wall Ride is active sets its cooldown to 5 seconds and refunds 15 Mana.
entries.name: Off the Wall

entries.description: While Wall Ride is active, Push Off's cooldown recharges 100% faster.
entries.name: Supersonic

undoc.notes: Reduces the cooldown of Push Off by 0.125 seconds for every 0.125 seconds that Wall Ride is active.

entries.description: Hitting an enemy with Soundwave grants Lúcio a 38 point Shield for 8.5 seconds. Hitting enemy Heroes grants 3 times this amount.
entries.name: Good Vibrations

undoc.notes: Shields from subsequent applications stack and refresh the duration.
