entries.description: Blast Lúcio's Crossfade track at enemy Heroes. While Amp It Up is active, deals 50 damage per second and Slows by 20%. This Ability is unaffected by Crossfade talents.
entries.name: Reverse Amp

entries.description: Place a boombox that plays Lúcio's active Crossfade track. Its volume adjusts with Amp It Up. Allied Heroes near the boombox gain 5 Armor. Crossfade tracks do not stack. Boombox Boombox Aura
entries.name: Boombox

undoc.notes: Only 1 Boombox can be active at a time. Boombox aura has the same properties as Crossfade and benefits from healing modifiers affecting it. Boombox fully interacts with Party Mix, Rejuvenescência and Up to Eleven talents. Boombox healing is increased by the House Party talent, but allies in its aura do not generate stacks for it. Boombox does not interact with All Together or Summer Anthem talents.

entries.description: After a 1 second delay, grant yourself and all nearby allied Heroes a 1296 point Shield that rapidly decays over 6 seconds.
entries.name: Sound Barrier

entries.description: Quickly skate to an allied Hero. Upon arrival, the ally is healed for 230, Lúcio is healed for 80 and both gain Unstoppable for 1 second.
entries.name: High Five

entries.description: For each ally affected by Crossfade, Lúcio gains 5% Movement Speed that stacks with other bonuses.
entries.name: All Together

entries.description: Push Off no longer Slows the first Hero hit, and instead Stuns them for 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Heavy Casters

entries.description: While Wall Ride is active, passing near an enemy Hero increases its Movement Speed bonus to 40%, and grants 15 Armor, for 1 second.
entries.name: Slip

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: While Amp It Up is active, Crossfade's heals for an additional 2.5% of the target's maximum Health per second.
entries.name: Rejuvenescência

entries.description: Hitting enemy Heroes with Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Amp It Up by 0.3 seconds. Wall Ride increases Basic Attack range by 2.2.
entries.name: Up the Frequency

undoc.notes: Every Basic Attack projectile that hits an enemy Hero grants cooldown reduction.

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Soundwave or Push Off increases the duration of Amp It Up. Soundwave grants 0.5 seconds and Push Off grants 1 second. If Amp It Up is not active, these bonuses are granted to its next activation, up to 3 seconds. Increase the duration of Amp It Up by 1 second.
entries.name: Up to Eleven

entries.description: Reduce the cooldown of Sound Barrier to 30 seconds, but the Shield now decays over 4 seconds (from 6).
entries.name: Bossa Nova

entries.description: High Five can now be cast on enemy Heroes, dealing 160 damage and reducing all healing received by 50% for 3 seconds. Reduce the Mana cost by 30% and cooldown of High Five by 30%.
entries.name: Mixing Fire

undoc.notes: Lúcio does not gain the self-benefits of High Five when it is cast on an enemy Hero.

entries.description: For each ally affected by Crossfade, Lúcio gains 8% increased healing.
entries.name: House Party

undoc.notes: Lúcio also generates a stack for this bonus.

entries.description: Activate for all allies affected by Crossfade to become Unkillable for 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Summer Anthem

undoc.notes: 1) Benefits from talents increasing Crossfade 's radius.

entries.description: Leap into the air, becoming immune to all hostile effects for 0.75 seconds. After reaching level 20, Vault of the Wardens gain an additional charge.
entries.name: Vault of the Wardens

undoc.notes: Maiev is able to move normally, but cannot attack or use her Abilities during Vault of the Wardens. Unit targeted Abilities can target and hit Maiev during Vault of the Wardens. Blinds do not get removed, even though there is an Unstoppable flag. Slows get removed. Basic Attacks can target Maiev, but will miss on impact due to the Evasion provided by Protected status.
undoc.props: Protected, Unstoppable, Untargetable by AoE, Untargetable by Skillshots

entries.description: Deal 152 damage to enemies in a crescent area. Hitting at least 2 enemy Heroes with Fan of Knives reduces its cooldown to 0.5 seconds, and refunds its Mana cost.
entries.name: Fan of Knives

undoc.notes: 1) Crescent is created by overlapping two circles of the same radius. The one drawing the outer edge is centered on the target point and the inner one is offset toward Maiev.

entries.description: Maiev's next Basic Attack cleaves and applies a tether to enemy Heroes hit for 2.5 seconds. If a tethered Hero moves too far from Maiev, they are pulled toward her, dealing 110 damage and breaking the tether.
entries.name: Umbral Bind

undoc.notes: Cleave damages all enemies, but only Heroes are tethered. Affected Heroes are always pulled a set distance upon the tether breaking, regardless of Maiev's position. Pulled Heroes are Stunned for 0.25 seconds after the pull ends. Cooldown starts once the Ability is triggered by attacking an enemy. Activating Umbral Bind immediately resets Maiev's Basic Attack cooldown.
undoc.props: Attack Modifier, Primed, Pull, Splash, Stun
undoc.type: Physical Damage (splash) / Spell Damage (pull), Crowd control

entries.description: Send a shadow of Maiev outward that will return to its cast location, dealing 150 damage to enemies along both paths. If an enemy Hero is hit, reduce the cooldown by 4 seconds.
entries.name: Spirit of Vengeance

undoc.notes: Cooldown reduction can trigger only once per cast.
undoc.val1: Blink - Teleport to the Spirit of Vengeance, consuming it.

entries.description: Throw a glaive in the target direction. If an enemy Hero is hit, Containment Disc can be reactivated to remove their vision and Time Stop them for 4 seconds. Leaving containment Silences the enemy Hero for 1.5 seconds. Containment Disc automatically activates 6 seconds after hitting a Hero.
entries.name: Containment Disc

undoc.val1: Contain - Activate to remove the target's vision and Time Stop them for 4 seconds.

entries.description: Summon 8 Warden Avatars as a cage around Maiev. After 1.5 seconds, enemy Heroes that come in contact with an Avatar consume it and are knocked to the center of the cage. Warden Avatars last 5 seconds.
entries.name: Warden's Cage

undoc.notes: Warden avatars have no collision. Affected Heroes are pushed until they are within 0.1 range of the cage's center.
Cleave damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Maiev's Basic Attack damage. Continues granting bonus damage after achieving all quest rewards.

entries.description: Each Hero tethered by Umbral Bind reduces the cooldown of Spirit of Vengeance by 2.5 seconds and each Hero hit by Spirit of Vengeance reduces the cooldown of Umbral Bind by 1 second.
entries.name: Pursuit of Vengeance

undoc.notes: Spirit of Vengeance triggers cooldown reduction on both paths for each Hero.

entries.description: Activate to make primary Basic Attacks bounce between nearby enemies up to 2 times. Lasts 8 seconds. Recharge Naisha's Memento by hitting at least 2 Heroes with a single Fan of Knives.
entries.name: Naisha's Memento

undoc.notes: Basic Attacks empowered by Naisha's Memento will not bounce if Maiev is Blinded or if the primary target is [[evasion
Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Fan of Knives 's damage.

entries.description: Using Fan of Knives deals 50 Physical Damage to enemies around Maiev.
entries.name: Blade Dance

undoc.notes: Blade Dance 's damage is dealt after all other immediate effects of Fan of Knives .

entries.description: After Blinking with Spirit of Vengeance the shadow explodes, damaging all nearby enemy Heroes for 6% of their maximum Health.
entries.name: Sudden Vengeance

undoc.notes: Bonus damage is dealt in a separate instance.

entries.description: Hitting at least 2 Heroes with a single Fan of Knives causes the next Fan of Knives to drop a star on targets that deals 77 damage when it impacts.
entries.name: Elune's Wrath

undoc.notes: 1) Delay is increased by a random value from 0 to 0.1875 seconds. Elune's Wrath does not interact with talents specifically affecting Fan of Knives .

entries.description: Enemy Heroes pulled by Umbral Bind have their Armor reduced by 15 and are Slowed by 25% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Bonds of Corruption

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Spirit of Vengeance increases all of Maiev's damage by 15% for 4 seconds, stacking up to 30%.
entries.name: Ruthless Spirit

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect damage from Maiev's Abilities, Talents and Basic Attacks.

entries.description: Throw a glaive in the target direction. If an enemy Hero is hit, Containment Disc can be reactivated to remove their vision and Time Stop them for 4 seconds. Leaving containment Silences the enemy Hero for 1.5 seconds. Containment Disc automatically activates 6 seconds after hitting a Hero.
entries.name: Containment Disc

entries.description: Summon 8 Warden Avatars as a cage around Maiev. After 1.5 seconds, enemy Heroes that come in contact with an Avatar consume it and are knocked to the center of the cage. Warden Avatars last 5 seconds.
entries.name: Warden's Cage

entries.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Fan of Knives grants 5 Armor for 5 seconds, up to 20 Armor.
entries.name: Bladed Armor

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself, but not with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Tethering at least 2 enemy Heroes with Umbral Bind grants 35 Armor for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Chain Gang

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Blink grants 20 Armor for 3.5 seconds. Maiev's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes refresh this duration.
entries.name: Shadow Armor

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Dealing damage to enemy Heroes causes the next cast of Fan of Knives that hits enemy Heroes to deal 1% maximum Health as bonus damage, up to 5%.
entries.name: Vengeful Knives

undoc.notes: Effect triggers and consumes gathered stacks only when Fan of Knives hits an enemy Hero. Bonus damage is dealt in a separate instance. Regardless, Vengeful Knives does not grant double benefit for enemies hit by both the base and bonus damage. After Fan of Knives has been cast, Maiev gains stacks equal to the number of enemy Heroes affected. Only damage from Maiev's Basic Attacks, Abilities or Talents grants stacks of Vengeful Knives . Blade Dance does not give any progress for this Talent, if any enemy Heroes were hit with Fan of Knives in the same cast.

entries.description: Umbral Bind grants 25% Movement Speed for 2.5 seconds. In addition, each time Maiev deals damage to tethered targets, Umbral Bind’s pull damage to all targets is increased by 30%, up to 150%.
entries.name: Cruel Chain

undoc.notes: Stacks are reset each cast. Only damage from Maiev's attacks, Abilities or Talents grants stacks of Cruel Chain . Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Umbral Bind 's pull damage.

entries.description: While Maiev has Armor of any kind, all Physical Damage dealt is increased by 25%.
entries.name: Armored Assault

undoc.notes: Maiev's total Physical or Spell Armor has to be above 0 to trigger the effect. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Physical Damage from Maiev's Abilities, Talents and Basic Attacks.

entries.description: Activate to reset the cooldown of Spirit of Vengeance. Recharge Shadow Orb by damaging enemy Heroes with Spirit of Vengeance 5 times.
entries.name: Shadow Orb: Vengeance

entries.description: Activate to increase Movement Speed and Attack Speed by 40% for 5 seconds. Recharge Shadow Orb by dealing Physical Damage to enemy Heroes 10 times.
entries.name: Shadow Orb: Huntress

undoc.notes: Attack Speed bonus stacks additively with other effects that can affect Maiev's Attack Speed.

entries.description: Activate to deal 75 damage to an enemy Hero, Slowing them by 30% and reducing their Armor by 20 for 4 seconds. Recharge Shadow Orb by dealing Spell Damage to enemy Heroes 10 times.
entries.name: Shadow Orb: Shadow Strike

undoc.notes: Damage from Shadow Orb: Shadow Strike itself grants one stack toward its recharge counter. Bonus damage instances from Vengeful Knives do grant recharge progress. Does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Defensive damage modifier, Crowd control

entries.description: Mal'Ganis heals for 45% of damage dealt to enemy Heroes and 10% of damage dealt to non-Heroes.
entries.name: Vampiric Touch

undoc.notes: Grants Mal'Ganis 10% base lifesteal against all units, which is increased by 35% against Heroes. Stacks additively with other sources of lifesteal.

entries.description: Violently slash in the chosen direction, dealing 66 damage to enemies. Reactivate to slash up to 2 more times. The third slash Stuns enemies for 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Fel Claws

undoc.notes: 1) The last part of the first and second dashes' damage area is a half circle in front of Mal'Ganis. Cooldown starts immediately upon the first cast. The first 0.25 seconds of the third dash's Stun knocks the enemies up in the air. This effect is purely visual.
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Movement: Dash

entries.description: Desecrate the air, dealing 110 damage to nearby enemies and gaining 25 Armor for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Necrotic Embrace

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: After 0.75 seconds, gain 50% Movement Speed for 2 seconds. While active, Mal'Ganis can move through enemy Heroes and put them to Sleep for 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Night Rush

undoc.notes: Night Rush can be reactivated after 0.5 seconds to end its effect early. Mal'Ganis can use Necrotic Embrace during Night Rush without breaking the channel. Using any other ability interrupts Night Rush immediately. Mal'Ganis cannot use Basic Attacks during Night Rush. Sleep counts as a Stun effect and interacts with all effects that interact with Stuns.
undoc.props: Mobile channel, Movement Speed buff, Sleep

entries.description: After 1 second, disperse into an Invulnerable swarm of bats for 3 seconds, dealing 120 damage per second to enemies. Vampiric Touch heals for 75% of Carrion Swarm's damage to Heroes.
entries.name: Carrion Swarm

undoc.notes: 1) Carrion Swarm's damage area consists of three cones in "opposite" directions that rotate every 0.0625s between three possible orientations. Regardless, enemies can only be damaged by the Ability once every 0.5 seconds. Interrupting the ability during its cast puts it on a 10 second cooldown. Mal'Ganis can move, but cannot use Abilities both while channeling and during Carrion Swarm. Carrion Swarm removes most negative effects from Mal'Ganis once the channel finishes and Mal'Ganis enters Stasis. Carrion Swarm sets the base lifesteal bonus to 75% against all enemies, which is against non-Heroic enemies reduced multiplicatively by 87.1%, resulting in 9.675% lifesteal when no other lifesteal effects are in place. Stacks additively with Vampiric Touch bonuses from Fueled by Torment and Vanquish the Weak as well as other sources of lifesteal.

entries.description: Channel on an enemy Hero for 0.75 seconds, then swap Health percentages with the target over 3 seconds.
entries.name: Dark Conversion

undoc.notes: Interrupting the ability during its windup puts it on a 10 second cooldown. Cast is interrupted if the target moves at least 3 units past its maximum range. Despite being based on percentage of target's Health, Dark Conversion is not considered Percent Damage. Its damage can be affected by damage modifiers, such as Armor and Spell Power. Heal over time persists even in the case that the DoT is removed. Dark Conversion 's damage is not affected by the lifesteal from Vampiric Touch. If Mal'Ganis has a higher percentage of Health than the target enemy Hero, the ability will instead damage Mal'Ganis while healing the enemy Hero, and can even deal fatal damage to Mal'Ganis.
undoc.props: Channeled cast (stationary), Damage over time, Heal over time

entries.description: Each time Necrotic Embrace hits an enemy Hero, gain 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack. If Winged Guard has no charges, Mal'Ganis will gain 1 charge after 6 seconds.
entries.name: Winged Guard

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself or other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Mal'Ganis heals for 30% of Physical Damage dealt, and nearby allied Heroes heal for 15% of Physical Damage dealt.
entries.name: Vampiric Aura

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with Vampiric Touch and other lifesteal effects.

entries.description: Mal'Ganis heals for 70 when damaging a nearby enemy Hero. This can occur once every 6 seconds against each enemy Hero, but is also refreshed when they are slept by Night Rush.
entries.name: Time to Feed

undoc.notes: Enemy Heroes damaged by Mal'Ganis must be within the radius to trigger Time to Feed.

entries.description: While Necrotic Embrace is active, Mal'Ganis heals for 12 when damage is taken and Vampiric Touch converts 20% more Hero damage into healing.
entries.name: Fueled by Torment

undoc.notes: Lifesteal bonus stacks additively with Vampiric Touch and other lifesteal effects.

entries.description: Necrotic Embrace's Armor is increased to 50.
entries.name: Might of Sargeras

entries.description: When Necrotic Embrace expires, it explodes again for 68 damage. For each enemy Hero hit, gain 5 Mana and reduce the cooldown of Necrotic Embrace by 0.75 seconds. Does not wake Sleeping targets.
entries.name: Echo of Doom

undoc.notes: Secondary explosion only deals damage and does not interact with talents affecting Necrotic Embrace. Does not draw tower aggro when damaging enemy Heroes under their Structures.

entries.description: After Mal'Ganis hits an enemy Hero with Fel Claws, his next Basic Attack deals 60% more damage and reduces the Armor of enemy Heroes by 15 for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Black Claws

undoc.notes: Attack Damage bonus does not stack with itself nor generate multiple charges. Armor reduction is applied after the damage is dealt. Basic Attack damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Mal'Ganis's Basic Attack damage. Does not stack with itself or other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier / Defensive damage modifier

entries.description: Each enemy Hero hit by the first 2 slashes of Fel Claws causes the final slash to steal 1% of maximum health from heroes, up to 4%. If at least 4 enemy Heroes are hit with the first 2 slashes of Fel Claws, then the final slash Stuns enemies for an additional 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Will of Tichondrius

undoc.notes: Will of Tichondrius does not benefit from Vampiric Touch.

entries.description: After casting Night Rush, deal 33 damage per second to nearby enemies. This effect lasts 5 seconds and Basic Attacks against Heroes refresh its duration. Does not wake Sleeping targets.
entries.name: Spreading Plague

undoc.notes: Does not draw tower aggro when damaging enemy Heroes under their Structures. Damage from Spreading Plague is affected by offensive damage modifiers unlike other burning rage effects. Spreading Plague pauses its duration while Mounted and during Carrion Swarm. Once these effects end, the effect continues with its remaining duration.

entries.description: After 1 second, disperse into an Invulnerable swarm of bats for 3 seconds, dealing 120 damage per second to enemies. Vampiric Touch heals for 75% of Carrion Swarm's damage to Heroes.
entries.name: Carrion Swarm

entries.description: Channel on an enemy Hero for 0.75 seconds, then swap Health percentages with the target over 3 seconds.
entries.name: Dark Conversion

entries.description: Increase Night Rush's Sleep duration by 0.75 seconds and its Movement Speed bonus by 10%.
entries.name: Deep Sleep

entries.description: Basic Attacks deal 200% bonus damage to Sleeping enemies. After Night Rush's Sleep ends, targets are Slowed by 30% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: The Night Beckons

entries.description: When Mal'Ganis is healed by a Hero, he gains 1% Movement Speed for 6 seconds, up to 15%.
entries.name: Blood Rush

undoc.notes: If Mal'Ganis receives healing while already at full Health, this talent does not trigger. Benefits from each instance of Mal'Ganis's lifesteal against Heroes, and also from healing received from Regeneration Globes, Healing Fountains, Biotic Emitters, Hearthing (but not the Heal over Time while within the Hall of Storms), and healing received from allied Heroes. Movement Speed bonus stacks additively with itself, but not with other Movement Speed buffs. Subsequent applications refresh the duration of existing stacks.

entries.description: Necrotic Embrace unleashes a wave of bats in front of Mal'Ganis, dealing 81 damage.
entries.name: Plague Bats

entries.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes with a higher Health percentage heal for an additional 50% of damage dealt. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes with a lower Health percentage grant 35% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Frenzied Assault

undoc.notes: Lifesteal bonus stacks additively with baseline Vampiric Touch and other lifesteal effects.

entries.description: Activate to erupt with blind rage, removing the cooldown and Mana cost of Fel Claws, but losing all vision. Lasts 6 seconds. Enemy Heroes hit by the final slash of Fel Claws reduce the cooldown of this Ability by 4 seconds.
entries.name: Blind as a Bat

undoc.notes: Fel Claws during Blind as a Bat follow the same three cast rotation as normal cast. Activating Blind as a Bat refreshes the cooldown of Fel Claws, making it instantly available once active recasts have been used. Fel Claws will not be put on cooldown if Blind as a Bat expires while awaiting the 2nd and 3rd activation of Fel Claws. During Blind as a Bat terrain and Mal'Ganis are visible, but you can't see any other units, abilities or damage pop-ups. Healing pop-ups, however, remain visible and can be used to infer hitting an enemy unit.

entries.description: Upon expiring, Carrion Swarm's bats seek nearby enemy Heroes, dealing 132 damage and Sleeping them for 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Seeker Swarm

undoc.notes: Does not draw tower aggro when damaging enemy Heroes under their Structures. Damage benefits from Carrion Swarm 's lifesteal bonus to Vampiric Touch. Sleep counts as a Stun effect and interacts with all effects that interact with Stuns.

entries.description: Enemy Heroes near the target suffer 75% of the transferred Health as damage over 3 seconds. Does not benefit from Vampiric Touch.
entries.name: Wrath of Nathreza

undoc.notes: The ability deals damage to the secondary targets regardless of whether the primary target or Mal'Ganis was the one that gained the DoT after Dark Conversion connected.

entries.description: Damage from Fel Claws and Basic Attacks Slows enemies by 25% for 1.5 seconds, and Vampiric Touch converts 10% more damage into healing versus Slowed Heroes.
entries.name: Vanquish the Weak

undoc.notes: Lifesteal bonus stacks additively with Vampiric Touch and other lifesteal effects.

entries.description: Reduce the cooldown of Night Rush by 4 seconds. Enemy Heroes put to Sleep by Night Rush have their vision greatly reduced during the Sleep and for 2 seconds after.
entries.name: Alone in the Dark

entries.description: Grant an allied Hero 20% of their maximum Mana over 5 seconds. While affected by Innervate, their Basic Ability cooldowns recharge 50% faster.
entries.name: Innervate

undoc.notes: Cannot be self-cast.

entries.description: Heal an allied Hero for 380 Health over 20 seconds.
entries.name: Regrowth

undoc.notes: Casting Regrowth sets Malfurion's Basic Attack's cooldown to 0.5 seconds, potentially causing his next attack to come out faster or slower.

entries.description: Deal 90 damage to enemies in an area and reveal them for 2 seconds. Allies with an active Regrowth are healed for 130 Health for each enemy Hero hit by Moonfire.
entries.name: Moonfire

undoc.notes: Healing from Moonfire does not have a range limitation. Healing from each Moonfire hit is dealt in a separate instance.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Revealed, Triggered Heal

entries.description: Root enemy Heroes in an area for 1.25 seconds, and deal 117 damage over the duration. Affected area grows over 3 seconds.
entries.name: Entangling Roots

undoc.notes: Only deals damage when the Root connects, and therefore cannot damage anything except Heroes who are not currently Unstoppable or in Stasis. 1) The area grows every 0.5 seconds in 0.5 ... 0.75 increments, reaching maximum radius 2.0 seconds after the center appeared. After reaching its maximum radius, the area lingers for 1.25 seconds

entries.description: Heal nearby allied Heroes for 80 Health per second for 8 seconds. Allies affect by Regrowth within Tranquility's area gain 10 Armor.
entries.name: Tranquility

undoc.notes: Casting Tranquility sets Malfurion's Basic Attack's cooldown to 0.5 seconds, potentially causing his next attack to come out faster or slower. Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, deal 310 damage in a large area around Malfurion, Silencing enemies, making them unable to use Abilities for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Twilight Dream

undoc.notes: Interrupting the Ability during its windup puts it on a 10 second cooldown.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Channeled cast (stationary), Silence

entries.description: Entangling Roots grows 25% larger and persists on the ground 40% longer.
entries.name: Deep Roots

undoc.notes: Bonus duration is split between growth to bonus radius and linger duration: time to reach maximum radius (now 3.75) is increased by 0.5 seconds and the linger duration by 0.25 seconds. Quest bonus increases both maximum and current Mana by given amount.

entries.description: Entangling Roots spawns a Treant that does 58 damage per second and lasts 10 seconds. Treant
entries.name: Vengeful Roots

entries.description: Entangling Roots Sleeps enemy Heroes for 2 seconds after its Root expires.
entries.name: Emerald Dreams

undoc.notes: The Sleep effect is not applied if the Root is cleansed

entries.description: Casting Regrowth on an ally also grants Malfurion its effect for 50% normal duration.
entries.name: Rejuvenation

undoc.notes: Rejuvenation counts toward the total number of active Regrowths. Rejuvenation benefits from bonus healing from Ysera's Gift, but not from Lifebloom. Rejuvenation benefits from Wild Growth 's duration increase when hitting enemies with Moonfire, but doesn't gain even a partial duration increase from Nature's Balance.

entries.description: Increase Moonfire's reveal duration by 3 second. Malfurion's Basic Attacks against Heroes revealed by Moonfire deal 85% more damage.
entries.name: Celestial Alignment

entries.description: Gain a second charge of Innervate. Its cooldown recharges 25% faster per ally affected by Regrowth.
entries.name: Shan'do's Clarity

undoc.notes: Each Regrowth reduces the remaining cooldown of Innervate by 0.25 seconds every time it ticks (1 per second).

entries.description: Each enemy hit by Moonfire extends the duration of currently active Regrowths by 1 second.
entries.name: Wild Growth

entries.description: Increase the Root duration of Entangling Roots by 25%. When Malfurion is Stunned, the cooldown of Entangling Roots is instantly reset. This can only occur every 10 seconds.
entries.name: Tenacious Roots

entries.description: Activate to remove all Stuns, Roots, and Slows from allies affected by Regrowth.
entries.name: Nature's Cure

entries.description: Heal nearby allied Heroes for 80 Health per second for 8 seconds. Allies affect by Regrowth within Tranquility's area gain 10 Armor.
entries.name: Tranquility

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, deal 310 damage in a large area around Malfurion, Silencing enemies, making them unable to use Abilities for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Twilight Dream

entries.description: Malfurion gains 6% Movement Speed for every active Regrowth.
entries.name: Nature's Swiftness

undoc.notes: Movement Speed bonus stacks additively with itself, but not with other Movement Speed bonuses.

entries.description: Moonfire Slows Enemy Heroes by 25% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Hindering Moonfire

entries.description: Using Innervate also grants Malfurion 15% of his maximum Mana and causes his Basic Ability cooldowns to refresh 50% faster for 5 seconds.
entries.name: Revitalize

entries.description: While Malfurion is above 75% Health, Regrowth's healing-over-time is increased by 75%.
entries.name: Ysera's Gift

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other healing dealt modifiers that can affect Regrowth 's healing.

entries.description: Increase Moonfire's area by 25% and Regrowth's duration by 5 seconds.
entries.name: Nature's Balance

undoc.notes: Actually increases radius by 25%, so area by 56.25%. Causes Regrowth to tick 5 additional times for an additional 95 healing over time.

entries.description: Increase Moonfire's heal by 20%, and 15% per ally affected by Regrowth.
entries.name: Moonlit Harmony

undoc.notes: Healing bonus stacks additively with itself and other healing dealt modifiers that can affect Moonfire 's healing.

entries.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Moonfire reduces the cooldown of Tranquility by 3 seconds. Increase Tranquility's healing by 25% and 10% per ally affected by Regrowth.
entries.name: Serenity

undoc.notes: Healing bonuses stack additively with themselves and other healing dealt modifiers that can affect Tranquility 's healing.

entries.description: Activate to channel for 1 second, and then instantly teleport and cast Twilight Dream at the targeted location. Cooldown is shared with Twilight Dream. Increase Twilight Dream's Silence duration to 5 seconds.
entries.name: Astral Communion

entries.description: Casting Regrowth instantly heals its target for 10% of their missing Health.
entries.name: Lifebloom

entries.description: If Moonfire hits a Hero, its cooldown is reduced by 1 second and the next Moonfire within 6 seconds deals 20% more damage. This damage bonus stacks up to 60%.
entries.name: Lunar Shower

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Moonfire 's damage.

entries.description: Basic Attacks cleave in an area in front of Malthael and afflict non-Structure targets with for 4 seconds. Marked enemies are revealed and take damage equal to 2% of their maximum Health every 1 second.
entries.name: Reaper's Mark

undoc.notes: If Multiple Malthaels are on a team, they each apply and refresh their own Mark separately. However, the effects of all Reaper's Marks are shared: the damage does not stack, and all Malthaels can interact with a target that has Reaper's Mark regardless of whether or not they own a mark on the target.
undoc.props: Attack Modifier, Damage over Time, Percent damage, Revealed, Splash

entries.description: Extract the souls of nearby enemies afflicted by , dealing 100 damage and healing Malthael for 25 per target hit. Heroic targets heal Malthael for an additional 4% of the Hero's maximum Health.
entries.name: Soul Rip

undoc.notes: Can only be activated if there is at least one enemy affected by Reaper's Mark within the Ability's radius. Healing from each target is dealt in a separate instance, and bonus healing from Heroes is dealt in yet another instance, separate from the base heal.

entries.description: Instantly teleport through an enemy afflicted by , dealing 59 damage and refreshing .
entries.name: Wraith Strike

undoc.notes: Can only be activated if there is at least one enemy affected by Reaper's Mark. Malthael teleports to the opposite side of the target from his location at 1.5 distance. Puts Malthael's Basic Attack on full cooldown (1.1s) without using it upon activation.

entries.description: After 0.25 seconds, unleash a wave of dark mist that applies to enemies it hits.
entries.name: Death Shroud

entries.description: Unleash a torrent of souls, continually applying to nearby enemies for 4 seconds. Tormented Souls resets the cooldown of Wraith Strike when activated, and while active, Wraith Strike costs no Mana and its cooldown is reduced to 2 seconds.
entries.name: Tormented Souls

entries.description: Apply a death sentence to an enemy Hero that, after 2 seconds, deals damage equal to 50% of their missing Health.
entries.name: Last Rites

undoc.notes: Mathematically, kills a target which is at less than or equal to 1/3 of maximum Health. Damage is based on missing Health when the Mark expires after 2 seconds. The Mark cannot be removed, but the damage can be avoided with effects that grant damage immunity, like entering the Hall of Storms, or entering Stasis or Invulnerability, at the time of its expiration. While Last Rites is available, enemy Heroes within 12 radius of Malthael are indicated by a red skull above them if the damage from Last Rites would be enough to kill them.

entries.description: Increase Wraith Strike's range by 35%.
entries.name: Death's Reach

entries.description: Gain an additional 20% Movement Speed while mounted.
entries.name: On a Pale Horse

entries.description: Activate to increase Movement Speed by 25% and pass through other units for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Fear the Reaper

entries.description: Soul Rip deals 50% more damage if it hits only one Hero.
entries.name: Die Alone

undoc.notes: If any number of non-Heroic targets are also hit, the bonus damage still applies, but only to the Hero.

entries.description: Increase Death Shroud's range by 33%, reduce its cooldown by 3 seconds, and reduce its Mana cost from 50 to 30. Death Shroud's initial impact deals 2% maximum Health as damage to non-Structure enemies.
entries.name: Throwing Shade

entries.description: {{Quest|Apply to Heroes for a total of 150 seconds.|Permanently increase duration by 2 seconds.}}
entries.name: Black Harvest

undoc.notes: If multiple Malthaels are in a team, Black Harvest starts to gain stacks only when the Hero with the Talent has applied a Reaper's Mark to the enemy Hero. However, once applied it continues to gain stacks even after the Hero's personal mark has expired, as long as the target is afflicted by any Reaper's Mark.

entries.description: Soul Rip Slows enemies by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Cold Hand

entries.description: Wraith Strike now damages and applies to enemies around its target.
entries.name: Massacre

undoc.notes: Also applies bonus damage from Mortality.

entries.description: Activate to reduce healing received by Heroes afflicted by by 50% for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Touch of Death

undoc.notes: Affects all active Reaper's Marks, including those placed by other Malthaels. Healing reduction stacks additively with other healing modifiers that can affect the healing received by the target Hero.

entries.description: Unleash a torrent of souls, continually applying to nearby enemies for 4 seconds. Tormented Souls resets the cooldown of Wraith Strike when activated, and while active, Wraith Strike costs no Mana and its cooldown is reduced to 2 seconds.
entries.name: Tormented Souls

entries.description: Apply a death sentence to an enemy Hero that, after 2 seconds, deals damage equal to 50% of their missing Health.
entries.name: Last Rites

entries.description: Increase Soul Rip's bonus healing from Heroes to 4.75% of the Hero's maximum Health.
entries.name: Soul Siphon

entries.description: Gain 10 Physical Armor per enemy Hero afflicted by , up to a maximum of 30.
entries.name: Ethereal Existence

undoc.notes: Benefits from all Reaper's Marks, including those placed by other Malthaels. Stacks additively with itself, but not with other positive Physical Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Activate to become Unstoppable for 2 seconds, but remove all active .
entries.name: Inevitable End

undoc.notes: If multiple Malthael's are in a team, only affects Reaper's Marks placed by the Malthael that activates the Ability.

entries.description: After 2 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Shroud of Wisdom

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Spell Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Reduce Soul Rip's cooldown by 0.5 seconds and increase its range by 25%.
entries.name: Soul Collector

entries.description: When damaging a Hero, Wraith Strike deals bonus damage equal to 8% of the Hero's maximum Health.
entries.name: Mortality

undoc.notes: Also affects enemies hit by Massacre.

entries.description: deals 60% increased damage after afflicting an enemy for more than 4 seconds.
entries.name: Memento Mori

undoc.notes: Duration requirement is per target. If multiple Malthaels are in a team, the damage increase only applies while the personal mark from a Malthael with Memento Mori has met the time requirement and remains on the target.

entries.description: Increase the duration of Tormented Souls to 6 seconds, and while Tormented Souls is active, Hero Takedowns refresh its duration. If 2 or more enemy Heroes are in Tormented Souls's radius, it does not decay
entries.name: Reaper of Souls

entries.description: Last Rites heals for 100% of the damage dealt, and its current and future cooldown reduction bonuses are doubled.
entries.name: Angel of Death

undoc.notes: Also heals for 100% of the overkill value.

entries.description: Death Shroud leaves a trail in its wake for 4 seconds, applying to enemies in its area.
entries.name: Final Curtain

entries.description: Activate while dead to immediately respawn at the Altar but increase Malthael's next respawn time by 25%.
entries.name: No One Can Stop Death

entries.description: While channeling Healing Beam, Lt. Morales regenerates 2% of her maximum Health per second.
entries.name: Caduceus Reactor

undoc.notes: Lt. Morales uses Energy instead of Mana as a resource. Morales has 100 max Energy, which regenerates at 6 Energy per second while not using Healing Beam.

entries.description: Heal target ally for 172 Health per second as long as they are in range. After not channeling Healing Beam for 2 seconds, regenerate 6 Energy per second. Reactivate to switch targets. Self-cast or activate your Trait to cancel the channel.
entries.name: Healing Beam

undoc.notes: Consumes no energy, but still triggers Caduceus Reactor , when held on a full Health target. Healing Beam goes on cooldown for 2 seconds when interrupted by enemies, 0.5 seconds when switching target, 0.5 seconds when canceling it within 0.5 seconds from the beginning of the channel, and 0 seconds when canceling it after 0.5 seconds from the beginning of the channel. Lt. Morales can attack and use her Abilities without interrupting Healing Beam. Consumes 3 Energy per Healing tick while activated. Healing Beam is able to heal Minions.

entries.description: Redirect Healing Beam to another target. Use on self to cancel channeling.
entries.name: Redirect Healing Beam

entries.description: Grant target ally Hero 35 Armor for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Safeguard

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself or other positive Armor effects except Garrosh's Trait. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack

entries.description: Fire a grenade that can be manually detonated, dealing 208 damage to nearby enemies and knocking them away.
entries.name: Displacement Grenade

undoc.notes: Grenade detonates automatically at maximum range.
undoc.val4: Detonate Displacement Grenade - Detonate Displacement Grenade, dealing 208 damage to nearby enemies and knocking them away.

entries.description: Grant an allied Hero 75% Attack Speed and 25% Movement Speed for 10 seconds.
entries.name: Stim Drone

undoc.notes: Interrupting the Ability during its cast puts it on a 10 second cooldown. Cast is interrupted if the target moves over 10 range beyond the Ability's maximum range before the channel has finished.
undoc.props: Attack Speed buff, Channeled cast (stationary), Movement Speed buff

entries.description: Target a location for a Medivac transport. For up to 10 seconds before takeoff, allies can right-click to enter the Medivac. Medivac Dropship
entries.name: Medivac Dropship

undoc.notes: Dropship is Unstoppable and has no collision.
undoc.range: - Min: 11 - Max: 100 Selecting Medivac Dropship also unlocks Reinforcements Ability, which shares a cooldown with it. Interrupting the Ability during its cast puts it on a 10 second cooldown. Must be cast on pathable surface. Lt. Morales is automatically put in the dropship once the cast finishes. Allies that enter Dropship cannot leave manually. All Heroes inside are ejected automatically when Dropship reaches its destination or is destroyed. Upon successfully casting Medivac Dropship, Lt. Morales gains access to Depart Ability, which can be cast after 3 seconds to immediately launch toward the target location. The dropship departs automatically after 10 seconds. Heroes that have entered the dropship cannot leave until it arrives to its target location. Heroes inside the dropship are put in Stasis, removed from ground plane (disjoints certain projectiles) and have no collision. Enemies can attack the dropship. If the dropship is destroyed, the Heroes inside it will be immediately ejected and Stunned for 0.5 seconds.

entries.description: Departs for the target location immediately.
entries.name: Medivac Dropship - Depart

undoc.notes: Starts on a 3 second cooldown upon successfully casting Medivac Dropship or Reinforcements.

entries.description: Call down a Medivac Dropship at your Hall of Storms for your allies. After 10 seconds, or when the Ability is activated again, the Medivac will travel to its original cast location to unload its passengers.
entries.name: Medivac Dropship - Reinforcements

undoc.notes: Shares cooldown with Medivac Dropship. Can be recast after 3 seconds to depart immediately. Cannot be cast while within the mines on Haunted Mines.

entries.description: Increase Attack Range by 1.1, and Basic Attacks against Heroes generate 4 Energy.
entries.name: Caduceus Feedback

entries.description: During the first 2 seconds of Energy regeneration Healing Beam regenerates 100% more Energy. Increase your maximum Energy by 10.
entries.name: Life Support

entries.description: Consume 30 Energy to heal Lt. Morales for 30% of her maximum Health over 3 seconds. Caduceus Reactor is disabled while this is active. Generate 2 Energy each time Safeguard reduces damage, up to a maximum of 10 Energy per use.
entries.name: Cellular Reactor

entries.description: Gain 40 Armor for 3 seconds if damage is taken while below 40% Health. This effect has a 30 second cooldown. Increase the healing provided by Caduceus Reactor from 2% to 4% of Lt. Morales's maximum Health per second.
entries.name: Trauma Trigger

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Heroes hit by Displacement Grenade are Slowed by 50% for 1 second after being knocked away and grant Lt. Morales a Shield equal to 6% of her maximum Health. This Shield stacks up to 5 times.
entries.name: Blast Shield

entries.description: Safeguard removes all Slows from its target and its cooldown is reduced by 3 seconds.
entries.name: Physical Therapy

entries.description: While an ally affected by Safeguard is Stunned or Rooted, Safeguard grants an additional 20 Armor. Increase the duration of Safeguard by 1 second.
entries.name: Vanadium Plating

entries.description: Allies with Safeguard receive 75% of the healing done by Healing Beam on another ally.
entries.name: Medi-Drone

undoc.notes: Medi-Drone does not heal if the primary target of Healing Beam is at full Health. Lt. Morales can also benefit from Medi-Drone by using Safeguard on herself. Medi-Drone benefits from the bonus healing from First Responder. Medi-Drone has its own separate base value that is 75% of Healing Beam 's, causing the percentage to stack multiplicatively with healing modifiers and bonus healing effects.

entries.description: Grant an allied Hero 75% Attack Speed and 25% Movement Speed for 10 seconds.
entries.name: Stim Drone

entries.description: Unlock the Medivac Dropship and Reinforcements Abilities. These Abilities share a cooldown. Medivac Dropship Target a location for a Medivac transport. For up to 10 seconds before takeoff, allies can right-click to enter the Medivac. Reinforcements Call down a Medivac Dropship at your Hall of Storms for your allies. After 10 seconds, or when the Ability is activated again, the Medivac will travel to its original cast location to unload its passengers.
entries.name: Medivac Dropship

entries.description: Displacement Grenade deals an additional 96 damage over 2 seconds, and up to 400 bonus damage to Shields.
entries.name: EMP Grenade

undoc.notes: Bonus damage to Shields only applies against Heroic targets.

entries.description: Heroes hit by Displacement Grenade deal 30% less damage for 3 seconds.
entries.name: System Shock

undoc.notes: Damage reduction stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting targets' damage output.

entries.description: Heroes hit by Displacement Grenade will take an additional 6% of maximum Health as damage from Lt. Morales's next Basic Attack against them. Basic Attacks against Heroes deal an additional 1% of maximum Health as damage.
entries.name: Bedside Manner

undoc.notes: Displacement Grenade puts a mark on the enemy Hero that lasts for 6 seconds and is consumed if Lt. Morales Basic Attacks them during this time, dealing the bonus damage, or else expires at the end of this interval. The mark is removed, but the bonus damage does not connect, if Lt. Morales is Blinded or if the target is Evading on this Basic Attack.

entries.description: Channeling Healing Beam on a Hero for at least 3 seconds causes them to be healed for 258 over 3 seconds when Healing Beam ends. Increase the range of Healing Beam by 30%.
entries.name: Extended Care

undoc.notes: Increases both cast and channel range by the same value. Heal over Time ends immediately if Lt. Morales targets the ally with Healing Beam again.

entries.description: While above 60 energy, Healing Beam's healing is increased by 20% and both Lt. Morales and her Healing Beam target gain 15% Movement Speed.
entries.name: First Responder

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with healing modifiers that affect Lt. Morales's healing output and multiplicatively with modifiers that affect healing received by the target.

entries.description: Safeguard gains a second charge and its range is increased by 60%.
entries.name: Shield Sequencer

entries.description: Reduce the cooldown of Stim Drone from 70 seconds to 35 seconds, and increase the Movement Speed bonus from 25% to 50%.
entries.name: Hyperactivity

entries.description: After exiting the Medivac, allies are Protected from all damage for 3 seconds. Reduces the cooldown of Medivac Dropship Abilities by 15 seconds.
entries.name: Safe Zone

entries.description: Safeguard grants its target Unkillable for 1 second. If the target is under 50% maximum Health when the Unkillable effect ends, they are healed for 8% of their maximum Health.
entries.name: Hospice Care

entries.description: Hitting 2 or more Heroes with Displacement Grenade reduces its cooldown to 2 seconds.
entries.name: Second Opinion

entries.description: Instead of mounting, Medivh can transform into a raven, increasing Movement Speed by 20%. While transformed, Medivh can see and fly over all terrain and is immune to all effects.
entries.name: Raven Form

undoc.notes: Medivh has reduced sight radius during Raven Form . Medivh cannot be targeted by allied or enemy effects while Mounted, but any effects applied beforehand persist for their duration. Using Abilities causes Medivh to leave Raven Form. Medivh cannot leave Raven Form, and thus also cannot use Abilities, while above unpathable terrain. Medivh can pick up and receive Regeneration Globes and use Healing Fountain in Raven Form . Medivh can collect Experience Globes while in Raven Form . Raven Form removes Medivh from the ground plane, disjointing certain projectiles.
undoc.props: Immune to damage, Movement Speed, Untargetable

entries.description: Launch a rift that deals 170 damage to enemies in its path. If an enemy Hero is hit, reduce its cooldown by 5 seconds and refund 50 Mana.
entries.name: Arcane Rift

entries.description: Protect an allied Hero from all damage for 1.5 seconds. Upon expiration, Force of Will heals the target 20% of the damage it absorbed.
entries.name: Force of Will

undoc.notes: Healing is calculated from the final damage taken, after all damage modifiers.

entries.description: Create a set of portals between you and the target location, allowing allies to teleport between both. The portals last 6 seconds.
entries.name: Portal

undoc.notes: Allied Heroes have to perform a 0.25 second [[Channeled Ability#Waygate Channel

entries.description: Polymorph an enemy Hero for 2 seconds, Silencing them and making them unable to attack. On expiration, Poly Bomb spreads to other nearby enemy Heroes.
entries.name: Poly Bomb

undoc.notes: Poly Bomb can spread to the same target multiple times, but it cannot spread to enemies that were already carrying it. Polymorph counts as a Silence effect. Effects that interact with Silences also interact with Poly Bomb .

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, unleash a wave of energy that places enemy Heroes in Time Stop for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Ley Line Seal

undoc.notes: Interrupting the Ability during its windup puts it on a 10 second cooldown.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Channeled cast (stationary), Time Stop

entries.description: Transform into a raven, increasing Movement Speed by 20%. While Transformed, Medivh can see and fly over terrain and is immune to all effects.
entries.name: Raven Form (Activate)

undoc.notes: Raven Form can be reactivated after 1 second to exit it manually.

entries.description: Increases Raven Form's Movement Speed bonus by 50%.
entries.name: Winds of Celerity

undoc.notes: Increases Raven Form 's Movement Speed bonus to 30%.

entries.description: Raven Form increases Medivh's Mana and Health Regeneration by 75%.
entries.name: Raven's Intellect

entries.description: Medivh can manually place both Portal locations and it no longer breaks Raven Form.
entries.name: Portal Mastery

undoc.notes: Portals must be placed 7.5 units from each other. Medivh can't place a Portal past its maximum range. Using the Basic Ability to cast the first portal still places the second at Medivh's location. The second portal can be cast at the desired location using either Basic or Active Ability key, but casting with the Active has no cast time. Additionally, the first portal marker remains indefinitely, and Medivh can place the second portal globally so long as it is within the max range of the first indicator.

entries.description: The first time an Ally uses a Portal, they gain 40 Armor for 5 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 40%.
entries.name: Mage Armor

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself nor other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: A Raven Familiar joins allies each time they use a Portal. The Raven will dive at the ally's next Basic Attack against a Hero within 5 seconds, dealing 114 damage and Slowing them by 30% for 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Raven Familiar

undoc.notes: Raven Familiar will not be sent by Zul'jin if he has the Talent No Mercy and Basic Attacks a target marked by Grievous Throw. This damage is dealt by the Hero who Basic Attacks, ans therefore subject to their own modifiers on their damage.

entries.description: Activate to greatly increase sight range for 5 seconds and reveal enemy Heroes in the area for 8 seconds. Does not cancel Raven Form. Increase Medivh's sight range while in Raven Form by 25%.
entries.name: Dust of Appearance

entries.description: If Arcane Rift hits an enemy Hero, Medivh's next Basic Attack within 6 seconds deals 50% more damage and heals for 50% of the damage dealt.
entries.name: Mystic Assault

undoc.notes: Can only trigger once per cast. Does not stack with itself. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Medivh's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: When Force of Will expires, it deals 80 damage to nearby enemies, plus 50% of the damage it prevented, up to 315 additional damage.
entries.name: Arcane Explosion

entries.description: Preventing at least 268 damage with a single cast of Force of Will grants 30% Spell Power for 15 seconds. Stacks up to 2 times.
entries.name: Force of Magic

undoc.notes: Can only trigger once per cast.

entries.description: Polymorph an enemy Hero for 2 seconds, Silencing them and making them unable to attack. On expiration, Poly Bomb spreads to other nearby enemy Heroes.
entries.name: Poly Bomb

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, unleash a wave of energy that places enemy Heroes in Time Stop for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Ley Line Seal

entries.description: Force of Will also applies to allies near the target, but its cooldown is increased by 2 seconds.
entries.name: Circle of Protection

undoc.notes: Each barrier benefits from talents affecting Force of Will and has its own damage counter.

entries.description: Preventing at least 268 damage with Force of Will reduces its cooldown to 4 seconds.
entries.name: Enduring Will

entries.description: Increase the amount of healing from Force of Will to 70% of the damage it absorbed.
entries.name: Reabsorption

undoc.notes: If an Ultimate Evolution Clone of Medivh, or another Medivh (e.g. in ARAM) casts Force of Will on another Medivh, the target Medivh inherits the Force of Will healing percentage possessed by the source Medivh (that is, according to whether or not they have this Talent, which answer is always no for an Ultimate Evolution Clone).

entries.description: When Arcane Rift damages an enemy Hero, the next Arcane Rift deals 15% more damage.
entries.name: Arcane Charge

undoc.notes: Can only trigger once per cast. Does not stack with itself. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Arcane Rift's damage.

entries.description: Basic Attacks reduce Medivh's Heroic Ability cooldown by 3%. Each enemy Hero hit by Arcane Rift reduces Medivh's Heroic Ability cooldown by 9%.
entries.name: Temporal Flux

entries.description: Decrease Portal cooldown by 25% and increase Portal duration by 50%.
entries.name: Stable Portal

entries.description: Poly Bomb now hits an area, instantly polymorphing enemy Heroes, hitting the same area again 1 second later. Polybomb's duration is reduced to 1 second, and the spread radius is increased by 25%.
entries.name: Glyph of Poly Bomb

entries.description: Increase the duration of the Time Stop by 33% and gain the ability to redirect the wave once while it's active.
entries.name: Medivh Cheats!

entries.description: Minions and Catapults hit by Arcane Rift are instantly killed.
entries.name: Guardian of Tirisfal

entries.description: Activate to instantly restore 200 Mana to all nearby allied Heroes and grant them 15% Spell Power for 10 seconds.
entries.name: Arcane Brilliance

undoc.notes: Spell Power from Arcane Brilliance stacks additively with other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage modifiers and healing dealt modifiers affecting the target Hero.
undoc.type: Healing dealt modifier, Offensive damage modifier, Mana restoration

entries.description: Stealth an allied Hero for 40 seconds, making them Unrevealable for the first 0.5 seconds. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible. Stores up to 2 charges.
entries.name: Dust of Disappearance

undoc.notes: There is no cooldown between charges.

entries.description: Become encased in ice for 3 seconds, gaining a rapidly decaying Shield that absorbs up to 1104 damage. While active, this Shield grants Unstoppable and restores up to 35% of Mei's maximum Health.
entries.name: Cryo-Freeze

undoc.notes: Cryo-Freeze can be reactivated after 0.5 seconds to end its effect early, removing the Shield, healing and Unstoppable. The Ability ends immediately if the Shield expires or breaks, removing Unstoppable status and healing.

entries.description: Throw a snowball that hits all enemies in an area. Enemies hit take 70 damage, are Slowed by 35%, and are Blinded for 1.75 seconds.
entries.name: Snow Blind

undoc.notes: Slow and Blind are applied after the damage is dealt.

entries.description: Command Snowball to create a blizzard at the target location for 2 seconds. Enemies within the blizzard take 13 damage every 0.25 seconds and are Slowed by 7%, stacking up to 35%. When the blizzard ends, enemies within its area take an additional 75 damage and are Stunned for 1.25 seconds.
entries.name: Blizzard

undoc.notes: Slow is applied before the periodic damage is dealt. Each instance of ramping up the Slow counts as applying it. Final damage is dealt in a separate instance on the last tick in addition to the periodic damage. Stun is applied after the final damage is dealt.

entries.description: Slide quickly in the targeted direction. When this effect ends, enemies near Mei are knocked back, take 52 damage, and are Slowed by 80%, rapidly decaying over 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Icing

undoc.notes: Icing can be reactivated after 0.25 seconds to stop the dash and trigger its end effect early. Knockback is applied before the damage is dealt. Slow is applied as the knockback effect expires.
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Movement: Dash

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, roll a massive snowball that consumes enemy Heroes in its path. At the end of its path, the snowball crumbles, releasing the consumed Heroes, dealing 220 damage and Stunning them for 0.5 per Hero consumed.
entries.name: Avalanche

undoc.notes: Interrupting the Ability during its windup puts it on a 10 second cooldown. Enemies inside the snowball are put in hostile Stasis. In addition to usual effects of Stasis, the targets are removed from ground plane (disjoints certain projectiles), have no collision, cannot regenerate Health, Mana, Energy or Shields, cannot be seen on the minimap or revealed and some delayed heals applied beforehand are prevented.
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control, Status effect

entries.description: After a 0.75 second delay, create an impassable wall that traps enemy Heroes hit for 2.5 seconds. When the wall expires, trapped Heroes are Slowed by 75% decaying over 3 seconds.
entries.name: Ice Wall

undoc.notes: 1) Area consists of 7 overlapping circular pathing blocker units with 1.5 radius. The first point of vector targeting determines the initial point and the second the direction. Blocker units are spawned at 0.125 second intervals, immediately affecting the units in their respective areas. Regardless, they will all expire at the same moment, as the duration of Ice Wall will not start counting until the wall has been fully formed.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Slow, Time Stop
undoc.type: Crowd control, Status effect / Pathing blocker

entries.description: Increases the duration of Snow Blind's Slow by 1.5 seconds. Each time Blizzard damages an enemy Hero, reduce the cooldown of Snow Blind by 0.5 seconds and gain 3 Mana.
entries.name: Heavy Pack

entries.description: Every 3rd hit of Blizzard against enemy Heroes deals an additional 42 damage. Blizzard's final stun damage is increased by 150% against all enemies.
entries.name: Ice Storm

undoc.notes: Periodic bonus damage is dealt in a separate instance on the same tick in addition to the periodic damage. This damage instance does not interact with other talents affecting Blizzard. Stun damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Blizzard 's damage.

entries.description: Basic Attacks against Rooted, Stunned, or Slowed Heroes deal 33% more damage. Each time Mei Stuns or Slows an enemy Hero she heals for 16.5 Health.
entries.name: Heat Transfer

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Mei's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Snow Blind deals 75% increased damage and Structures hit are disabled for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Slushball

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Snow Blind 's damage.

entries.description: Reduce the cooldown of Icing by 3 seconds. If Mei enters her own Blizzard while Icing is active, the cooldown of Icing is reduced by 5 seconds and she gains 80 Mana.
entries.name: Cold Front

entries.description: Reduce the cooldown of Cryo-Freeze by 10 seconds. Mei gains 40 Spell Armor while Cryo-Freeze is active and for 1 second after.
entries.name: Crystallize

undoc.notes: Spell Armor persists regardless of how Mei exits Cryo-Freeze. Does not stack with other positive Spell Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Enemy Heroes inside of Blizzard's area have their damage dealt reduced by 40%. When Blizzard ends, enemy Heroes within its area gain this effect for an additional 4 seconds.
entries.name: Induce Hibernation

undoc.notes: . Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers.

entries.description: When Icing ends, grant Mei and nearby allies 20% Movement Speed and 50 Physical Armor for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Skating Away

undoc.props: Area of Effect, Movement Speed, Physical Armor

entries.description: Activate to remove all Roots and Slows and regenerate 20% of maximum Health over 2 seconds. The cooldown of this Ability is reduced by 10 seconds each time Mei picks up a Regeneration Globe.
entries.name: Backup Battery

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, roll a massive snowball that consumes enemy Heroes in its path. At the end of its path, the snowball crumbles, releasing the consumed Heroes, dealing 220 damage and stunning them for 0.5 per Hero consumed.
entries.name: Avalanche

entries.description: After a 0.75 second delay, create an impassable wall that traps enemy Heroes hit for 2.5 seconds. When the wall expires, trapped Heroes are slowed by 75% decaying over 3 seconds.
entries.name: Ice Wall

entries.description: While in her own Blizzard, Mei gains 50% increased Attack Speed and Blizzard's cooldown refreshes 125% faster. If Mei is in her own Blizzard when it ends, gain these bonuses for 3 additional seconds.
entries.name: Flurry

entries.description: While Cryo-Freeze is active, Mei's Basic Ability cooldowns recover 200% faster. Basic Attacks Slow by 20% for 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Cooling Servos

undoc.notes: Slow is applied after damage is dealt. Each instance counts as applying the Slow.

entries.description: Using an Ability causes Mei to deal 24 damage a second to nearby enemies for 4 seconds. Enemy Heroes damaged by this effect also have their Movement and Attack Speed Slowed by 20%.
entries.name: Polar Vortex

undoc.notes: Subsequent applications refresh the duration of the aura. Each instance counts as applying the Slow.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Attack Slow, Slow
undoc.type: Spell Damage / Crows control, Status effect

entries.description: Snow Blind gains an additional charge and its range is increased by 33%.
entries.name: Fresh Powder

entries.description: Icing's Slow effect no longer decays over its duration. Icing deals 300% more damage to enemies very close to Mei.
entries.name: Black Ice

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other damage modifiers that can affect Icing 's damage.

entries.description: Each time Mei Slows or Stuns an enemy Hero, the damage she deals and healing she receives is increased by 1%, stacking up to 20 times. While at maximum stacks, Mei also gains 10 Armor. Lasts 8 seconds.
entries.name: Acclimation

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack. Stacks additively with healing modifiers that affect Mei's healing received. Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers.
undoc.type: Defensive damage modifier, Healing modifier, Offensive damage modifier

entries.description: While traveling, Avalanche constantly launches a volley of untalented Snow Blind snowballs ahead of itself. Reduce the cooldown of Avalanche by 30 seconds.
entries.name: Cascade

undoc.notes: Launches a total of 22 snowballs: Immediately after release fires 5 snowballs over 0.375 seconds toward randomly selected 5 out of 7 possible predetermined locations ([x,y] = [0,10], [±2.75, 11], [±2.875, 12], [±2.75, 13]). It then continues to launch snowballs to 7 predetermined locations 12.5 units ahead (x = 0, ±2.75, ±3.75, ±4.25) in randomized order, one every 0.125 seconds. Upon reaching the end location, 5 more snowballs are released toward 8 possible locations within ~3.5 radius over 0.3125 seconds.

entries.description: When Ice Wall expires, trapped enemy Heroes hit take 210 damage and have their Armor reduced by 25 for 5 seconds.
entries.name: Shatter

undoc.notes: Armor debuff is applied after damage is dealt. Does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Every 15 seconds, the next Snow Blind you cast has 67% increased area and 200% increased damage.
entries.name: The Big One

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Snow Blind 's damage.

entries.description: When Mei takes fatal damage, she instantly gains Cryo-Freeze. This effect has a 180 second cooldown.
entries.name: Flash Freeze

entries.description: Hitting enemy Heroes with Basic Abilities reduces Mephisto's Basic Ability cooldowns. Skull Missile and Shade of Mephisto grant 1.5 seconds of cooldown reduction per Hero hit, and Lightning Nova grants 0.3 seconds per Hero hit.
entries.name: Lord Of Hatred

entries.description: Conjure a skull that travels in the target direction after 0.625 seconds, dealing 127 damage to enemies hit and Slowing Heroes hit by 25% for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Skull Missile

entries.description: A ring of lightning appears around Mephisto for 2.5 seconds. Enemies within the ring take 43 damage every 0.25 seconds. Each time a cast of Lightning Nova hits a Hero, its damage is increased by 3%, up to 30%.
entries.name: Lightning Nova

undoc.notes: Mephisto's 4.5 Basic Attack Range is the same as the Lightning Nova's inner radius, meaning that AA move puts him at the correct distance. Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Lightning Nova 's damage.

entries.description: Teleport to a location, dealing 78 damage to nearby enemies and leaving behind a Shade of Mephisto at Mephisto's original location. After 2.5 seconds, Mephisto is teleported back to the Shade's location.
entries.name: Shade of Mephisto

undoc.notes: Does not deal damage on return. The return always triggers regardless of any positive or negative status effects on Mephisto, with the exception of Stasis. The return teleport interrupts active displacements, but does not affect any other effects Mephisto may be afflicted by. However, with the right timing, certain displacements, such as Diablo's Overpower, may still continue their animation and snap Mephisto back to it after the return. Teleporting back dismounts and interrupts mounting, Hearthing and channeling objectives, but does not interrupt channeling Mephisto's Heroic Abilities or Warhead Junction's Nukes.

entries.description: Channel for 2.5 seconds, revealing all enemy Heroes. After the Channel completes, all enemy Heroes take 357 damage and are Slowed by 25% for 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Consume Souls

undoc.notes: Interrupting the cast puts the Ability on full cooldown.

entries.description: After 1 second, unleash a wave of evil spirits that Root the first enemy Hero hit for 2.5 seconds and deal 250 damage to them over the same duration. Durance of Hate spreads outward from its initial target, Rooting and damaging additional nearby enemy Heroes.
entries.name: Durance of Hate

undoc.notes: 1) The area grows in increments of 0.5625 radius every 0.1875 seconds, reaching its maximum radius after 2.0625 seconds. Interrupting the Ability during its windup puts it on a 10 second cooldown. If Mephisto teleports back with Shade of Mephisto during the cast time, the wave is unleashed in the direction of target point. Enemies that are immune to skillshots cannot be hit by the initial missile, but can be affected by the spreading area, as long as they are not also immune to AoE.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Channeled cast (stationary), Damage over Time, Root, Skillshot

undoc.notes: Bonus damage is added to base damage and dealt in a single instance.

entries.description: Every 3rd hit from Lightning Nova against the same target deals 65 bonus damage and grants Mephisto 2 Mana.
entries.name: Furious Spark

undoc.notes: Bonus damage is dealt in an additional instance. Damage from Furious Spark does not benefit from Lightning Nova 's innate damage multiplier nor create stacks for it.

entries.description: Shade of Mephisto grants 25% Spell Power while active and for 2.5 seconds after ending. If Mephisto hits enemy Heroes at least 18 times with his Basic Abilities while Shade of Mephisto is active, then increase the duration of the Spell Power bonus to 10 seconds after it ends.
entries.name: Malicious Intent

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself. Subsequent applications refresh the duration if it is currently lower than 2.5 seconds. Spell Power stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage and healing modifiers affecting Mephisto's Spell Damage or healing output.

entries.description: Skull Missile grants 10 Mana and heals Mephisto for 70% of the damage it deals to Heroes.
entries.name: Hateful Mending

undoc.notes: Mana restoration triggers for each enemy Hero hit.

entries.description: At the end of its duration, Lightning Nova grants Mephisto a Shield equal to 40% of the damage it dealt to Heroes. Lasts 5 seconds.
entries.name: Static Barrier

undoc.notes: Shield amount is calculated similarly to Lifesteal from final damage dealt. Bonus damage from Furious Spark, Static Field, Aminosity and secondary Nova from Mimic all contribute to Shield amount gained. Gaining a Shield from Static Barrier while already having one causes them to stack and refreshes the duration.

entries.description: Increase Regeneration Globe healing duration by 100%. Every tick of Regeneration Globe healing activates Lord of Hatred, reducing Basic Ability cooldowns by 1 second.
entries.name: Spite

undoc.notes: Makes Regeneration Globes tick an additional 5 times, healing Mephisto for an additional 9% of his maximum Health and an additional 7% of his maximum Mana over its duration.

entries.description: Shade of Mephisto grants 25 Armor while active and for 2.5 seconds after it ends.
entries.name: Ghastly Armor

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself or other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: While Shade of Mephisto is active, enemies who are hit by Lightning Nova are Slowed by 15% for 1 second and the Slow from Skull Missile is increased to 50%.
entries.name: Frost Storm

undoc.notes: Shade of Mephisto must be active the moment Lightning Nova or Skull Missile hits the target (not when the Ability is cast) to benefit from this talent.

entries.description: Shade of Mephisto grants 20% Movement Speed while active and for 2.5 seconds after it ends. If Mephisto hits enemy Heroes at least 18 times with his Basic Abilities while Shade of Mephisto is active, then reset the cooldown of Shade of Mephisto.
entries.name: Trickery

entries.description: Channel for 2.5 seconds, revealing all enemy Heroes. After the Channel completes, all enemy Heroes take 357 damage and are Slowed by 25% for 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Consume Souls

entries.description: After 1 second, unleash a wave of evil spirits that Root the first enemy Hero hit for 2.5 seconds and deal 250 damage to them over the same duration. Durance of Hate spreads outward from its initial target, Rooting and damaging additional nearby enemy Heroes.
entries.name: Durance of Hate

entries.description: Hitting a Hero with Skull Missile grants 25% Spell Power for 6 seconds. Skull Missile deals 40% more damage to Heroes under 50% Health.
entries.name: Abhorred Skull

undoc.notes: Spell Power from Abhorred Skull does not stack with itself. Subsequent applications refresh the duration. Spell Power from Abhorred Skull stacks additively with other sources of Spell Power and other offensive damage and healing modifiers affecting Mephisto's Spell Damage or healing output. Damage bonus against low-Health Heroes stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Skull Missile 's damage.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier, Healing dealt modifier / Offensive damage modifier

entries.description: Lord of Hatred also reduces the cooldown of Mephisto's Heroic Ability. Mephisto is healed for 15% of his maximum Health and Mana when he casts his Heroic Ability.
entries.name: Hysteria

entries.description: Basic Attacks hit enemies near the primary target and activate Lord of Hatred against enemy Heroes, reducing Basic Ability cooldowns by 1 second per Hero hit.
entries.name: Shard of Hate

entries.description: Skull Missile explodes on contact with Lightning Nova, dealing 120 damage to nearby enemies.
entries.name: Lightning Reaction

undoc.notes: Lightning Reaction can trigger multiple times on the same cast.

entries.description: When Lightning Nova's damage bonus reaches 30%, enemy Heroes within its radius take damage equal to 10% of their maximum Health.
entries.name: Static Field

undoc.notes: Bonus damage is dealt in an additional damage instance.

entries.description: Increase the duration of Lightning Nova by 1 second and the maximum amount of bonus damage it can deal from 30% to 42%.
entries.name: Animosity

entries.description: Consume Souls deals bonus damage equal to 10% of the target's missing Health. If Consume Souls initial cast kills a Hero it will cast 1 additional time.
entries.name: Consumed by Hatred

undoc.notes: The bonus damage amount is calculated before the main damage is dealt. Free cast does not require channeling. Recast will trigger if a Hero (not including Hallucinations) dies to any source within 0.5s of being hit by Consume Souls.

entries.description: Durance of Hate Silences enemies while they are Rooted and for 3 seconds after its Root expires.
entries.name: Unspeakable Horror

undoc.notes: If a target is hit by a Knockback while affected by this Ability, the Silence and Root are both temporarily removed, and then both reapplied when the Knockback applies. Because the target is necessarily Dazed during the Knockback, this rarely matters, but the reapplication of the Silence could matter for certain CC removal Abilities (e.g. Brightwing's Soothing Mist, Lunara's Abolish Magic).

entries.description: While both Shade of Mephisto and Lightning Nova are active, Lightning Nova also casts from the Shade's location.
entries.name: Mimic

undoc.notes: Shade's Lightning Nova interacts with all Talents that affect Lightning Nova.

entries.description: Activate to swap locations with Shade of Mephisto and refresh its duration. Shade of Mephisto benefits from all of Mephisto's level 7 Talents.
entries.name: Shade Lord

entries.description: Choose between Transcendence, Iron Fists, and Insight from the Talents panel.
entries.name: Pick Your Trait

entries.description: Jump to an ally or enemy. Enemies are immediately hit with a Basic Attack. Stores up to 2 charges.
entries.name: Radiant Dash

undoc.notes: Can target all non-Structure units. The Basic Attack from Radiant Dash can trigger attack modifiers, such as Kharazim's Trait, but does not activate Deadly Reach.

entries.description: Heal nearby Heroes for 295 and give them 15% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Breath of Heaven

undoc.props: Area of Effect, Movement Speed bonus

entries.description: Kharazim's next Basic Attack increases his Attack Speed and Attack Range by 100% for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Deadly Reach

undoc.props: Area of Effect, Attack Speed, Primed

entries.description: Become Invulnerable and strike 7 times over 1.6875 seconds. Each strike hits the highest Health nearby Hero for 7% of their maximum Health.
entries.name: Seven-Sided Strike

undoc.notes: First hit is instant, then every 0.25 seconds the last 6 hits activate. After the 7 hits there is a 0.1875 second delay before he exits. Kharazim is Invulnerable for the duration of the Ability. During this Kharazim is removed from the ground plane, allowing him to disjoint certain projectiles. Deals Percent damage to Heroes and special Spell Damage to Vehicles. Damage dealt to Heroes still ignores all damage modifications, but the damage dealt to Vehicles only ignores offensive damage modifiers and can still be affected by defensive damage modifiers, like Armor, on the target. Can only hit visible enemy Heroes.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Percent damage, Invulnerable
undoc.type: Spell damage / Spell damage / Status effect

entries.description: Protect an allied Hero from death, causing them to be healed for 1200 if they take fatal damage in the next 4 seconds.
entries.name: Divine Palm

entries.description: Every 3rd Basic Attack heals the lowest nearby allied Hero for 104 and gives 25% increased Move Speed for 2.5 seconds.

Casting a Basic or Heroic Ability other than Deadly Reach interrupts the channel, but casting Active Abilities does not. The damage penalty stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Kharazim's Basic Attack damage.

Insight 's Mana restoration is reduced to 7 Mana and cooldown reduction to 0.8175 seconds. Completing the quest is not required to gain the cooldown reduction when Insight is gained through Fists of Legend.

Can be cast on Unstoppable enemies, but only deals damage to them.
