entries.description: Place an Egg at target location, revealing the nearby area. Upon dying, Murky respawns at the Egg after 8 seconds. Murky only grants 25% of a real Hero's experience upon dying. If Murky's Egg is killed, he is revealed to enemies for 15 seconds, and Spawn Egg is placed on cooldown. Egg's Health regenerates by 42 per second, scaling by 4% per level, after a 5s delay. Murky gains a 35% of maximum Health Shield for 10 seconds upon reviving from an Egg. Respawn Egg
entries.name: Spawn Egg

undoc.notes: Minions, Mercenaries and Monsters do not attack the Egg. Enemy Structures can attack the Egg, dealing normal damage to it. Egg remains killed until Murky places a new one. Every time Murky respawns in the Hall of Storms (due to dying without an active Egg) a new Egg is automatically spawned in the Hall of Storms as well.

entries.description: Deal 86 damage and apply Slime on nearby enemies for 6 seconds, Slowing them by 20%. Deal 210 damage to enemies who are already Slimed. Structures take 50% damage.
entries.name: Slime

undoc.notes: Subsequent applications refresh Slimed duration. All Murkys on a team benefit from the "Slimed" debuff on enemies, regardless of who placed it on the target.

entries.description: Spit out a Pufferfish with 225 Health at the target point. After 2.75 seconds, the fish will blow up for 310 damage. Deals 50% less damage to Structures. Pufferfish Explode
entries.name: Pufferfish

undoc.notes: The three-second detonation timer starts after Pufferfish has landed. Self-casting Pufferfish causes the projectile phase to be omitted, leaving the Pufferfish at Murky's current location and instantly initiating the detonation timer. Enemies can kill the Pufferfish to prevent it from exploding. Pufferfish cannot be hit by skillshots. The Pufferfish can be targeted and attacked by enemy Structures. Minions, Mercenaries and Monsters do not attack Pufferfish. Damage reduction to Structures stacks additively with offensive damage modifiers that can affect Pufferfish 's damage.

entries.description: Becomes Invulnerable for 2 seconds. While active, Murky cannot attack or use Abilities.

undoc.notes: Safety Bubble cannot be manually canceled.

entries.description: After 0.75 seconds, Murky commands a legion of Murlocs to march in a target direction, each one leaping onto the first enemy Hero or Structure they find. Each Murloc deals 130 damage and Slows its target by 15% for 5 seconds. Murlocs deal 50% damage to Structures.
entries.name: March of the Murlocs

undoc.notes: Interrupting the Ability during its cast puts it on a 10 second cooldown. Summons a total of 36 Invulnerable Murlocs over 6.75 seconds. Murlocs spawn in one of 10 possible locations every 0.1875 seconds. Each Murloc sticking to a target applies new instances of DoT and Slow that tick separately. New applications do not refresh the duration of pre-existing Slow and DoTs. Slow stacks additively up to 5 times with itself, but not with other sources of Slows. Minimum Movement Speed for affected targets is 0.4843, even in combination with self-Slows. Damage reduction to Structures stacks additively with offensive damage modifiers that can affect March of the Murlocs 's damage.
undoc.props: Channeled cast (stationary), Damage over Time, Skillshot, Slow

Stacks toward the free Slime are tracked separately for every enemy Hero and all stacks on a particular Hero expire after 10 seconds without Murky Basic Attacking them.

entries.description: Qhira fires a Grappling Hook that pulls her to terrain it contacts. If an enemy Hero is hit, they take 35 damage and Qhira launches at them, kicking them for an additional 108 damage. Can be used while Revolving Sweep is active.
entries.name: Grappling Hook (Trait)

entries.description: Unleash your sword in the target direction, continuously dealing 30 damage to enemies caught in its path.
entries.name: Carnage

undoc.notes: The area grows to its maximum length in 4 ticks over 0.25 seconds, dealing damage every tick. After an additional 0.3125 seconds the sword is pulled back, dealing an additional tick of damage to all targets.

entries.description: Basic Attack and Ability damage cause enemies to bleed for 44 damage over 4 seconds. Stacks 5 times. Qhira deals 32 damage and heals for 90 Health per enemy Hero affected. Damage and healing are increased by 50% per each additional stack on that Hero.
entries.name: Blood Rage

undoc.notes: Active component is disabled if no enemies are affected by the passive. Subsequent applications of the DoT add to its damage and refresh its duration. Damage from either Blood Rage 's active or passive do not add or refresh any stacks. Damage from both bleed and activation can affect non-Heroes, but do not trigger healing. Damage and healing bonuses from the active component stack additively with itself and multiplicatively with other modifiers. If multiple Qhiras are on a team, each of them can apply their own Bleed damage over time to the target. However, only the unit who placed the first Bleed stack on the unit may activate and benefit from Blood Rage on it. Additionally, the stack count and duration are shared among all Bleed effects applied on the target, meaning that any Qhira (re)applying Bleed instantly inherits the current stack count, increments it and refreshes the duration of all active Bleeds on the target.

entries.description: Attach your sword to the first enemy Hero hit, dealing 96 damage and Stunning them for 0.25 seconds. Once attached, Qhira becomes Immune to all effects, rotating around the target for 2.75 seconds, and dealing 105 damage to any enemies between you and the target. Reactivate to send you to the target's location, knocking them away, dealing 108 damage and Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Revolving Sweep

undoc.notes: Rotation is always clockwise and at set distance from the target. While Qhira is swinging, she is Unstoppable and untargetable, nullifies all incoming damage, Evades Basic Attacks and has no collision. Qhira is unable to attack, move or use her abilities other than Grappling Hook and Revolving Sweep's reactivation. Swing behaviour is instantly removed, dropping Qhira at her current location (as long as it's on pathable surface), if: - the target becomes Unstoppable or Invulnerable - the target or Qhira is put in Stasis or Time Stop - the target instantly moves farther than 10 units from Qhira's current location - the target is Falstad during Flight or Ragnaros during Molten Core - Qhira latches on to a Hero or terrain with Grappling Hook. If the ability has not been reactivated or interrupted, swinging stops after completing one full circle and Qhira is placed at range distance from the target.
undoc.props: Clamping, Evasion, Knockback, Skillshot, Stun, Untargetable
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Movement: Launch, Status effect

entries.description: Deal 44 damage to nearby enemies every 0.5 seconds for 2.5 seconds as your sword grows outward. Upon expiring, deal 160 damage to all nearby enemy Heroes and Stun them for 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Unrelenting Strikes

undoc.notes: 1) Extended by Qhira's unit radius. Qhira can activate Blood Rage, while channeling Unrelenting Strikes without interrupting it. Qhira cannot use any other abilities or attack during the channel. First 2 ticks strike at the initial radius, after which it grows in 0.5 increments. Final damage is dealt in a separate instance on the last tick in addition to the periodic damage.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Mobile channel, Stun

entries.description: After 1 second, deal 410 damage to all enemies in a line. This damage is increased by 25% against enemy Heroes below 50% Health.
entries.name: Final Strike

undoc.notes: Interrupting the ability during its cast puts it on a 10 second cooldown. Low health damage bonus stacks additively with other damage modifiers affecting Qhira's Spell Damage output.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Channeled cast (stationary), Clamping

entries.description: If Carnage damages the same enemy Hero 3 times, it deals an additional 108 damage and Slows by 25% for 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Maximum Effort

entries.description: While at maximum stacks, Blood Rage's bleed deals 30% more damage to enemy Heroes below 50% Health.
entries.name: Fatal Wounds

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other damage modifiers affecting Qhira's Spell Damage output.

entries.description: Gain 20% Basic Attack damage. When Qhira Basic Attacks an enemy Hero below 50% Health it deals an additional 20% damage, and she gains 35% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Finishing Touch

undoc.notes: Bonus damage is only dealt and Attack Speed bonus gained (or refreshed) if the target is below 50% Health before the Basic Attack damage itself is done. Stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers affecting Qhira's physical damage output.

entries.description: Damaging at least 2 Heroes with Blood Rage causes Qhira to Evade the next 4 Heroic Basic Attacks within 12 seconds.
entries.name: Upstage

undoc.notes: Triggering the effect while already affected by it resets the Evasion charges and duration. Avoids the damage from the Basic Attack, but not necessarily all of its effects. For example Maiev's Umbral Bind will still attach a Tether.

entries.description: The primary target of Revolving Sweep is Slowed by 60% while Qhira is attached to them. Secondary targets hit by Revolving Sweep's swing are Slowed by 40% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Ensnaring Swing

entries.description: Basic Attacking an enemy Hero causes Qhira to gain 10 Armor for 3 seconds. Stacks 3 times.
entries.name: Your Pain, My Gain

undoc.notes: Subsequent applications refresh the duration. Stacks additively with itself, but not with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Carnage heals for 50% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes. Anytime Carnage damages an enemy Hero, Qhira’s next Basic Attack within 4 seconds against an enemy Hero deals 15% additional damage, stacking up to 10 times.
entries.name: The Thirst

undoc.notes: Fully interacts with the bonus damage instance from Maximum Effort. Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers affecting Qhira's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: If Blood Rage damages an enemy Hero below 50% Health, it Heals for an additional 210 Health.
entries.name: Healmonger

undoc.notes: Every Hero below the Health threshold triggers the effect. Healing from Healmonger does not benefit from Blood Rage 's per Hero bonus.

entries.description: Damaging an enemy Hero with Revolving Sweep's initial impact or swing causes Qhira to regenerate 96 Health over 4 seconds. Stacks up to 4 times. Qhira heals for 20% of her damage dealt by Basic Attacks.
entries.name: Siphoning Link

entries.description: Deal 44 damage to all nearby enemies every 0.5 seconds for 2.5 seconds as your sword grows outward. Upon expiring, deal 160 damage to all nearby enemy Heroes and Stun them for 1.5 second.
entries.name: Unrelenting Strikes

entries.description: After 1 second, deal 410 damage to all enemies in a line. This damage is increased by 25% against enemy Heroes below 50% Health.
entries.name: Final Strike

entries.description: Carnage's cooldown regenerates 100% faster while an enemy Hero has maximum Blood Rage stacks.
entries.name: Chainsaw

entries.description: Each additional enemy Hero hit by Revolving Sweep causes the primary target to take an additional 135 damage.
entries.name: Pulsing Pain

entries.description: Basic Attacking an enemy Hero increases your Basic Attack damage against that Hero by 25% for 4 seconds. Stacks up to 4 times and lasts 4 seconds. Bonus is reset if a different Hero is attacked.
entries.name: The Hunted

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself and other damage modifiers affecting Qhira's physical damage output.

entries.description: Increase the Stun duration of Revolving Sweep's reactivation by 0.25 seconds. Enemy Heroes around the primary target are also affected by Revolving Sweeps reactivation.
entries.name: Booming Kick

undoc.notes: AoE hit has the same properties as the primary hit.

entries.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Revolving Sweep or by Grappling Hook have their Armor reduced by 35 for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Lingering Ailment

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack. Only applies to the initial impact and swing of Revolving Sweep, not the reactivation.

entries.description: Revolving Sweep's cooldown recharges 250% faster while Qhira is swinging around her target. She also gains 60 Spell Armor for 5 seconds after the re-activation impact.
entries.name: Swing Life Away

undoc.notes: Reactivation is required to gain Spell Armor. While active, reduces the cooldown of Revolving Sweep by 0.1562 seconds every 0.0625 seconds. Does not stack with other positive Spell Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Hitting enemy Heroes with Unrelenting Strikes Silences them for 0.5 seconds and reduces its cooldown by 3 seconds.
entries.name: Silent Killer

entries.description: Increase the damage to enemy Heroes below 50% Health from 25% to 50%. If an enemy Hero dies within 1.5 seconds of being hit with Final Strike, then reset the cooldowns of Final Strike and all of Qhira's Basic Abilities.
entries.name: Unleashed Potential

entries.description: Grappling Hook's cooldown is reset when hitting an enemy Hero with the initial impact of Revolving Sweep and recharges 900% faster if Qhira hasn't taken damage within the last 2 seconds.
entries.name: Utility Belt

entries.description: Nearby enemy Heroes below 50% Health are revealed and you gain 20% Movement Speed while an enemy is revealed by you in this way. Additionally, you deal 20% increased damage to these revealed enemies.
entries.name: No Sanctuary

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other damage modifiers affecting Qhira's damage output.

entries.description: Gain Stealth when out of combat for 3 seconds. Taking damage, attacking, using Abilities, or Channeling ends Stealth. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds grants Invisible. Gain 15% Movement Speed while Stealthed.
entries.name: Permanent Cloak

undoc.notes: Stealth can activate while Mounted, but Mounting will break Stealth momentarily.

entries.description: Deals 230 damage to the first enemy hit. Hitting an enemy Hero with Snipe permanently increases the damage of Snipe by 6%, stacking up to 30%. Gain an additional 25% damage bonus at maximum stacks. All stacks are lost if Snipe fails to hit an enemy.
entries.name: Snipe

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and offensive damage modifiers that can affect Snipe 's damage.

entries.description: Deal 100 damage to an enemy and Slow them by 40% for 2.25 seconds.
entries.name: Pinning Shot

entries.description: Create a Decoy for 5 seconds with 100% of Nova's current Health that attacks enemies, dealing 10% of Nova's base damage. Whenever a Decoy takes damage it deals that amount to itself, effectively doubling the damage it takes. Using this Ability does not break Stealth. Holo Decoy
entries.name: Holo Decoy

undoc.notes: Decoy can use Snipe and Pinning Shot with reduced damage and Slow values. Decoys only use their Abilities against Heroes. If Nova is Stealthed while casting Holo Decoy, the decoy will also be Stealthed and vice versa. Stealthed Decoys only attack Heroes. Unstealthed decoys also attack Structures, Summons and aggroed Mercenaries, but not Minions, unless the Lethal Decoy Talent has been picked. Decoys will immediately attack the closest visible enemy Hero when one comes in its range and mimics Nova's Basic Abilities in the following order: Pinning Shot > Snipe > Basic Attack. Killing a Decoy grants no XP or Takedown credit. Decoy benefits from all of Nova's non-active Talents, unless otherwise noted. Decoy has its own base damage values, causing the damage reduction percentage to stack multiplicatively with offensive damage modifiers, but displays the floating damage text as if it were from the real Nova (full damage value).

entries.description: Locks in on the target Hero, then fires 3 shots that hit the first Hero or Structure they come in contact with for 372 damage each.
entries.name: Triple Tap

undoc.notes: Triple Tap can hit Structures in their way but is only castable on Heroes. Nova can't take any actions while channeling Triple Tap. Triple Tap can't be manually canceled and only ends if its channeling is interrupted or if the target is killed, becomes untargetable, moves more than 50 units past its maximum range or once all 3 shots have been fired. Interrupting the channel in any way before any shots have been fired puts Triple Tap on a 10 second cooldown, and otherwise on full cooldown. The target is Revealed for the duration of the Ability and for 0.3 seconds afterward. Exceptionally, this Reveal persists through Unrevealable Stealth.
undoc.props: Channeled cast (stationary), Revealed, Skillshot, Stationary channel

entries.description: After a 1.5 second delay, deals 435 damage to enemies within an area. Unlimited range.
entries.name: Precision Strike

undoc.notes: Grants vision over the area for 6 seconds when the Ability starts casting. At the moment of impact, vision radius is increased by 1 for 1 second.

entries.description: Activate to instantly grant Stealth to Nova and spawn a Holo Decoy at her location. Nova is Unrevealable for the first 0.5 seconds when Stealthed by Ghost Protocol.
entries.name: Ghost Protocol

undoc.notes: The decoy has the same properties as those created by Holo Decoy.

entries.description: Increases the cast range of Pinning Shot by 30%. Pinning Shot also increases the range of Nova's next Basic Attack by 2.
entries.name: Longshot

entries.description: After being Stealthed for 2 seconds, Pinning Shot's Slow is increased to 60% and costs no Mana. Bonus is lost after losing Stealth for 1 second.
entries.name: Covert Ops

entries.description: After being Stealthed for 1 second, gain an additional 10% Movement Speed. While Stealthed, regenerate 3 Mana per second.
entries.name: Advanced Cloaking

entries.description: Reduces Holo Decoy's cooldown and Mana cost by 60%.
entries.name: Rapid Projection

entries.description: Increase the cast range of Holo Decoy by 100% and its duration by 120%. Reduce the cooldown of Ghost Protocol by 15 seconds.
entries.name: Holo Stability

entries.description: Enemy Minions killed near Nova grant a stack of Bribe. Hero Takedowns grant 10 stacks of Bribe. Use 25 stacks to bribe a Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries. Maximum of 100 stacks. If a camp is defeated entirely with Bribe, it respawns 50% faster.
entries.name: Covert Mission

undoc.notes: Minions generate a stack, if they die within 12 radius of Nova or are dealt a killing blow by her Abilities or Basic Attacks. Decoys can collect stacks, if they dealt the finishing blow to the enemy, but not through presence.

entries.description: Hitting an enemy with Snipe reduces the cooldown by 2 seconds and refunds half its Mana cost, doubled against Heroes.
entries.name: Perfect Shot

undoc.notes: Both Mana refund and cooldown reduction are doubled upon hitting a Heroic target.

entries.description: After using an Ability, Nova's next Basic Attack within 3 seconds deals 65% additional damage.
entries.name: One in the Chamber

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers.

entries.description: Nova's Basic Attacks deal 250% damage and decrease the Physical Armor of Heroic targets by 15 for 4 seconds, but her Attack Speed is proportionally slower.
entries.name: Anti-Armor Shells

undoc.notes: Increases Nova's Base Attack damage, causing the damage bonus to stack multiplicatively with offensive damage modifiers. Decoy's attacks also have modified base damage and base Attack Speed values, but do not apply the Armor reduction. Does not stack with itself or other negative Physical Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack. If and only if Nova's Basic Attack is off cooldown, causes the damage text for Decoy Basic Attacks to differ (exposing the real, lowered value).

entries.description: Locks in on the target Hero, then fires 3 shots that hit the first Hero or Structure they come in contact with for 372 damage each.
entries.name: Triple Tap

entries.description: After a 1.5 second delay, deals 456 damage to enemies within an area. Unlimited range.
entries.name: Precision Strike

entries.description: Snipe's range is increased by 15% and hitting a Hero grants an additional stack of Precision Sniper.
entries.name: Psionic Efficiency

entries.description: Pinning Shot now has 2 charges, but its cooldown is increased by 2 seconds.
entries.name: Double Tap

entries.description: Gain 25 Armor for 3 seconds after losing Stealth.
entries.name: Ionic Force Field

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Snipe also deals 90% damage to enemies near the impact.
entries.name: Explosive Round

undoc.notes: Splash has its own base damage values for Nova and her decoys, causing the damage penalty to stack multiplicatively with offensive damage modifiers that can affect Snipe 's damage.

entries.description: Pinning Shot lowers a Hero's Armor by 20 for the duration of the Slow, causing them to take 20% increased damage.
entries.name: Crippling Shot

undoc.notes: Armor reduction is applied after the damage is dealt. Decoys' Pinning Shots do not apply Armor reduction. Does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Increases the damage Holo Decoy deals to 30% of Nova's damage.
entries.name: Lethal Decoy

undoc.notes: Increases Holo Decoy 's damage output by 200%. This stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Holo Decoy 's damage.

entries.description: Triple Tap's cooldown is reset if it kills an enemy Hero.
entries.name: Fast Reload

entries.description: Precision Strike gains a 2nd charge and its cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds.
entries.name: Precision Barrage

entries.description: Reduce the cooldown of Permanent Cloak by 2 seconds.
entries.name: Apollo Suit

entries.description: Activate to reset the cooldowns of your Basic Abilities.
entries.name: Rewind

undoc.notes: Also resets the cooldown of Ghost Protocol.

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with a Basic Ability grants 1 Chaos. Chaos can stack up to 3 times. While Orphea has Chaos, her Basic Attacks against Heroes consume all Chaos, dealing 50% increased damage per stack, and healing for 100% of the damage dealt.
entries.name: Overflowing Chaos

undoc.notes: Orpheas hands glow purplish-pink when she has Chaos stacks. Chaos stacks additively with itself and multiplicatively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Orphea's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, deal 165 damage to enemies in a line. Hitting a Hero with Shadow Waltz sets its cooldown to 2 seconds, refunds 35 Mana, and causes Orphea to dash a short distance upon moving.
entries.name: Shadow Waltz

undoc.notes: Cannot be self-cast. Casting Shadow Waltz will drop all commands upon casting (except attack commands, if the target is still within Orphea's Attack Range). Upon hitting a Heroic Target Waltz Dash is enabled for 2 seconds. During this time the first movement command issued, including Ability and attack orders that require her to move in their range, causes Orphea to dash in that direction. Can be cast while Rooted, but Orphea cannot dash afterward if she was/became Rooted after hitting an enemy Hero. Orphea cannot attack while dashing.

entries.description: After 0.625 seconds, deal 305 damage to nearby enemies in front of Orphea.
entries.name: Chomp

undoc.notes: 1) The accurate Area of Effect is done by a vertex. It's a mirrored area drawn by points (-3,0), (-3,-2), (-2.5,-3.5) (-1.5,-4.5) and (0,-5) in order. Casting Chomp will drop all movement commands, but not attack commands.

entries.description: Release a wave of dread that deals 85 damage to enemies hit. Dread erupts 0.75 seconds after reaching the end of its path, dealing 175 damage. Enemies hit by Dread's wave or eruption are Slowed by 25% for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Dread

undoc.notes: Damage from Dread is applied before the Slow. Enemies can be hit by path only once per cast.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Clamping, Self-castable,, Slow

entries.description: After 1.5 seconds, deal 210 damage in an area. Eternal Feast repeats every 1 second as long as it hits an enemy Hero.
entries.name: Eternal Feast

undoc.notes: Drops all movement commands, but not attacks.

entries.description: After 1.25 seconds, pull enemies in an area toward the center, dealing 250 damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Crushing Jaws

undoc.notes: Damage from Crushing Jaws is applied before the Stun. Cannot be self-cast.

entries.description: Shadow Waltz deals an increased 90% damage to enemies hit by its end and grants 1 additional Chaos.
entries.name: En Pointe

undoc.notes: Gaining additional Chaos also requires hitting Heroes with the end area. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Shadow Waltz 's damage.

entries.description: Increase Dread's damage by 50%.
entries.name: Growing Nightmare

undoc.notes: Passive and quest bonus stack additively with each other as well as other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Dread 's damage.

entries.description: Non-Heroic Abilities deal 15% more damage to Stunned, Rooted, Silenced or Slowed enemies. Enemy Heroes who are hit with Overflowing Chaos are Slowed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Ancestral Strength

undoc.notes: Slow is applied after damage is dealt. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting damage dealt by Orphea's Abilities.

entries.description: Reduce the cooldown of Shadow Waltz by 1 second. Hitting Heroes with the end of Shadow Waltz sets its cooldown to 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Allegrissimo

entries.description: If Chomp hits a Hero, Orphea immediately dashes a short distance backwards. Gain 15% maximum Health.
entries.name: Backbiter

undoc.notes: Removes existing displacement effects from Orphea upon triggering.

entries.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes while having 3 stacks of Chaos deal an additional 75% bonus damage.
entries.name: Chaotic Assault

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with Chaos stacks, and multiplicatively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Orphea's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Hitting a Hero with Chomp sets its cooldown to 2 seconds.
entries.name: Insatiable

entries.description: After 1.5 seconds, deal 210 damage in an area. Eternal Feast repeats every 1 second as long as it hits an enemy Hero.
entries.name: Eternal Feast

entries.description: After 1.25 seconds, pulls enemies in an area toward the center, dealing 250 damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Crushing Jaws

entries.description: After dashing with Shadow Waltz, Orphea gains 50 Spell Armor, stacking up to 2 times. While Orphea has Determination, her Physical Damage is increased by 15%.
entries.name: Determination

undoc.notes: Additional charges do not modify damage dealt. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that affect Orphea's Physical Damage output. Does not stack with other positive Spell Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.
undoc.type: Defensive damage modifier, Offensive damage modifier

entries.description: Hitting a Hero with Chomp instantly grants Orphea maximum Chaos and a 170 Shield for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Abyssal Symbiosis

undoc.notes: Shield does not stack with itself.

entries.description: Activate to deal 150 damage to all nearby enemies after 2 seconds. For each Hero hit, heal for 182 and gain 1 Chaos.
entries.name: Invasive Miasma

entries.description: Shadow Waltz deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to 3% of their maximum Health, healing Orphea for 50% of the damage dealt.
entries.name: Bond of Anguish

entries.description: Basic Attacks that consume Chaos ignore Armor and deal 90 Spell Damage to the target and all enemies around them.
entries.name: Dead Magic

undoc.notes: Armor piercing only affects the Basic Attack damage dealt to the primary target. Armor piercing ignores only positive Armor effects. Splash does not interact with Overflowing Chaos or the talents affecting it. It can still be affected by offensive Spell Damage modifiers, like Spell Power.

entries.description: After Dread erupts and for 2 seconds afterward, activate to cast Chomp from the eruption area. Enemy Heroes hit by this Chomp are Slowed by 70% for 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Lurking Terror

undoc.notes: Cooldown is shared with Chomp. Interacts with all Talents affecting Chomp, except Backbiter.

entries.description: Eternal Feast grants 1 Chaos each time it hits a Hero. While Eternal Feast is active and for 5 seconds afterward, Orphea's Basic Abilities recharge 150% faster.
entries.name: Monster Within

entries.description: Crushing Jaws reduces the Armor of Heroes hit by 50 for 3 seconds. Takedowns set its cooldown to 5 seconds.
entries.name: Engulfing Oblivion

undoc.notes: Armor reduction is applied after damage is dealt. Does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Each Chaos consumed increases Orphea's Spell Power by 3%, up to 30%. After reaching the maximum bonus, the Spell Power is increased by an additional 30%. Lasts 10 seconds.
entries.name: Eldritch Conduit

undoc.notes: Each application refreshes the timer. Spell Power from Eldritch Conduit stacks additively with itself and other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage and healing modifiers affecting Orphea's Spell Damage or healing output.

entries.description: Activate to instantly reset the cooldown of Shadow Waltz. For the next 5 seconds, dashing with Shadow Waltz resets its cooldown and increases the duration of Final Toccata by 1 second.
entries.name: Final Toccata

entries.description: Warp in a Pylon that generates a Power Field and grants vision of the surrounding area. Probius only regenerates Mana while inside a Power Field. Enemy Heroes and Minions drop Minerals when killed. Gather Minerals to reduce the cooldown of Warp In Pylon by 0.75 seconds. Up to 2 Pylons can be active at a time. Pylon
entries.name: Warp In Pylon

undoc.notes: Heroes drop minerals if Probius gets a Takedown regardless of distance.

entries.description: Fire a burst of energy forward, dealing 142 damage to all enemies it passes through. Hitting the center of a Warp Rift will cause it to explode, dealing additional damage.
entries.name: Disruption Pulse

undoc.notes: Enemies cannot be hit by multiple Disruption Pulses too closely together, which can cause issues with multiple Probii on a team (e.g. an Abathur Ultimate Evolution Clone, or in ARAM), or even alone with the Shoot 'Em Up Talent.

entries.description: Open an unstable Warp Rift at a location that takes 1.25 seconds to arm, which then Slows nearby enemies by 25% lasting 3 seconds. Armed Warp Rifts explode when they expire or when hit by Disruption Pulse, dealing 261 damage to nearby enemies. Stores up to 2 charges.
entries.name: Warp Rift

undoc.notes: A Warp Rift cannot be placed so that its center overlaps with a Structure, unpathable terrain, or another Warp Rift 's center. Warp Rifts provide vision within their radius.

entries.description: Warp in a Photon Cannon that deals 105 damage. Lasts for 13 seconds. While within a Pylon's Power Field, Photon Cannons gain 40% Attack Speed over 4 seconds and reveal nearby enemies. Photon Cannon
entries.name: Photon Cannon

undoc.notes: Photon Cannon prefers to acquire Heroic targets. However, it will not change to a Heroic unit from a previously acquired target as long as it remains valid. Attack Speed ramps up by 2.5% of base every 0.25 seconds, to the maximum of 40% bonus Attack Speed.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Attack Speed Revealed, Self-castable / Unstoppable

entries.description: For 8 seconds, increase the size of Pylon power fields and allow them to attack enemy Heroes within them for 96 damage per second. Pylons are Invulnerable for the duration.
entries.name: Pylon Overcharge

entries.description: Project a barrier of negative energy in the target direction that lasts 4 seconds. Enemies who touch the barrier take 76 damage per second and are Slowed by 80% for as long as they remain in contact with it.
entries.name: Null Gate

undoc.notes: First point of cast determines the location of the first end of the gate, and second the direction.

entries.description: Activate to gain an additional 60% Movement Speed for 5 seconds. Taking damage ends this effect early. Probius moves 10% faster by hovering over the ground.
entries.name: Worker Rush

undoc.notes: Movement Speed from Worker Rush stacks additively with other Movement Speed bonuses. Movement Speed bonus can be interrupted by damage over time ticks, even if applied before activating Worker Rush.

entries.description: Disruption Pulse now returns to Probius 1.25 seconds after reaching its target, dealing 100% damage on the return trip.
entries.name: Echo Pulse

undoc.notes: Returning pulse has the same properties as initial pulse, it can detonate Warp Rifts and interacts with all Talents affecting Disruption Pulse. Damage reduction stacks additively with offensive damage modifiers that can affect Disruption Pulse 's damage.
Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Photon Cannon 's damage.

entries.description: While a Photon Cannon is alive and powered, Probius gains 40 Spell Armor.
entries.name: Photon Barrier

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself or other positive Spell Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Worker Rush grants an additional 10% passive Movement Speed while in a Power Field, and its cooldown is reduced by 14 seconds.
entries.name: Turbo Charged

entries.description: Probius gains permanent Shields equal to 10% of his max Health. Shields regenerate quickly as long as he hasn't taken damage recently.
entries.name: Shield Capacitor

entries.description: After hitting 3 Heroes with Disruption Pulse the next Warp Rift detonated by a Disruption Pulse fires 4 additional pulses that deal 78 damage from the impact location in different directions. Reduce the cooldown of Disruption Pulse by 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Particle Accelerator

undoc.notes: Additional pulses are always fired relative to the direction from Probius's current location to the detonated Warp Rift. Pulses are aligned 30 degrees from the direction and perpendicular to it on both sides. Additional pulses can detonate Warp Rifts, but do not interact with Talents affecting Disruption Pulse, including itself.

entries.description: Hitting a Warp Rift with Disruption Pulse within 1 second of its arming deals 105 damage over 3 seconds.
entries.name: Rift Shock

entries.description: Reduce Photon Cannon's cooldown by 3.5 seconds when Disruption Pulse or Warp Rift damages an enemy Hero.
entries.name: Tower Defense

entries.description: Increase the size of Pylon power fields and allow them to attack enemies within it for 96 damage per second. Lasts 10 seconds.
entries.name: Pylon Overcharge

entries.description: Vector Targeting. Project a barrier of negative energy in the target direction that lasts 4 seconds. Enemies who touch the barrier take 76 damage per second and are slowed by 80% for as long as they remain in contact with it.
entries.name: Null Gate

entries.description: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes 35% increased Basic Attack damage.
entries.name: Aggressive Matrix

undoc.notes: Damage bonus does not stack with itself, but stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect the targets' Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes 10% increased Spell Power and 2 Mana per second.
entries.name: Power Overflowing

undoc.notes: Spell Power from Power Overflowing does not stack with itself, but stacks additively with other sources of Spell Power and other offensive damage and healing modifiers affecting targets' Spell Damage or healing output.

entries.description: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes 28 Shields per second, up to 112. Shields persist for 2 seconds after exiting a Pylon Power Field.
entries.name: Shield Battery

undoc.notes: Shield gain starts after the Hero has been in a Pylon's area for 0.5 seconds.

entries.description: Enemies continue to be Slowed for 3 seconds after their last contact with a Warp Rift.
entries.name: Quantum Entanglement

entries.description: Enemies are Slowed more the closer they are to the center of the Warp Rift, up to a maximum Slow of 60%.
entries.name: Gravity Well

undoc.notes: Applies 40% Slow within 2.0 radius and 60% Slow within 1.0 radius of the center.

entries.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Warp Rift detonations have their Spell Power reduced by 35% for 5 seconds. Additionally, enemies hit by Warp Rift explosions are knocked away from the center.
entries.name: Interference

undoc.notes: Spell Power reduction from Interference does not stack with itself, but stacks additively with other sources of Spell Power and other offensive damage and healing modifiers affecting targets' Spell Damage or healing output.

entries.description: Probius can now have up to 3 active Pylons, and increase the damage of Pylon Overcharge by 25%.
entries.name: Construct Additional Pylons

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Pylon Overcharge 's damage.

entries.description: Null Gate lasts indefinitely if either end is within a Power Field.
entries.name: Gate Keeper

entries.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Disruption Pulse take a bonus 2.5% of their maximum Health as damage. Reduce the cooldown of Disruption Pulse by 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Shoot 'Em Up

entries.description: Whenever a Rift explosion hits 1 or more enemy Heroes, create a new Warp Rift in the same location.
entries.name: Probius Loop

entries.description: Channel on an allied or destroyed Fort or Keep to replace it with Ragnaros's ultimate form, temporarily gaining new Abilities, having 3996 Health that burns away over 18 seconds. Ragnaros returns to his normal form upon losing all Health in Molten Core.
entries.name: Molten Core

undoc.notes: Interrupting Molten Core during its windup puts it on a 10 second cooldown. Ragnaros can exit Molten Core after a 1 second channel by reactivating the Trait. Exiting can be canceled by pressing the Trait button again before the channel is complete. Successfully casting Molten Core puts real Ragnaros and the target Structure in Stasis for its duration and replaces them with different Molten Core Ragnaros unit. In addition to usual effects of Stasis, real Ragnaros is removed from ground plane (disjoints certain projectiles), has no collision, cannot regenerate Health, Mana, Energy or Shields and cannot be seen on the minimap or revealed. Molten Core Ragnaros cannot be targeted by friendly Abilities during Molten Core. Buffs, like Heal over time effects, applied to real Ragnaros beforehand persist for their duration, but cannot affect Molten Core Ragnaros. Molten Core Ragnaros cannot be targeted or affected by Abathur's Ultimate Evolution, Sylvanas's Black Arrow disable or Zagara's Devouring Maw.

entries.description: Ragnaros's next Basic Attack is instant, dealing 191 Spell Damage in an area, and heals for 20% of the damage dealt. Healing doubled versus Heroes. Stun and damage nearby enemies.

entries.description: Summon a meteor at the target point that deals 68 damage, then rolls in the target direction dealing 272 damage per second for 1.75 seconds. Drop a line of meteor impacts.

Damage from Blast Echo and Meteor Bomb talents can grant cooldown reduction, but periodic damage from Giant Scorcher doesn't. entries.description: Instead of using a mount, Rehgar transforms into a Ghost Wolf with 20% increased Movement Speed. Basic Attacks in Ghost Wolf form cause him to lunge at his target and deal 60% bonus damage. Dealing damage, using Abilities, and channeling cancels Ghost Wolf form.

undoc.notes: Transforming into Ghost Wolf form resets Rehgar's Basic Attack cooldown. The lunge will not happen if the target of the attack is within the minimum range. The Ability can be activated and Rehgar can attack enemies in range from Ghost Wolf Form while Rooted, but the lunge will not happen. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Rehgar's Basic Attack damage. If the lunge is triggered, it will follow an enemy who moves away during its duration so long as it is not disjointed with a Teleport. Using Active Abilities gained from Talents will also cancel this form. Can also be canceled by pressing the Mount button again (which goes on a 1 second cooldown after entering this form).

Wellspring 's Chain Heal uses a separate base value from the original, requiring the given percentage to be calculated multiplicatively with healing dealt modifiers.

Heroes can only gain additional Shields if they received the base Shields. In order to gain additional Shields, affected allies must be within 8 radius of an enemy Hero that is hit by Rehgar's Lightning Shield from this Ability. Every time additional Shields are gained, the duration of the base Shields is set to 4 seconds and the duration of additional Shields to 5 seconds. Lightning Shield from Elemental Conduit benefits from all Talents affecting Lightning Shield.

Deathwing does not grant a stack of Pit Fighter. Pit Fighter 's effects are refreshed every 0.25 seconds. Pit Fighter reduces the cooldown of Purge by 0.125 seconds every time it ticks. Attack damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers affecting Rehgar's Basic Attack damage. Spell Power from Pit Fighter stacks additively with itself and other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage modifiers and healing dealt modifiers affecting the target Hero.

If Misha is alive while Rexxar is killed, she dies as well, totaling a full Hero kill/XP and two Takedown credits. Misha's death timer is 14s+.5s/level. Rexxar becomes unable to control Misha while he is unable to act (Stunned, Dazed or put in Time Stop or Stasis, other than Feign Death) or Silenced. If Rexxar enters a Vehicle or is some other way removed from the battleground, Misha will be removed from the Battleground as well. entries.description: Teleport a short distance in the direction of the mouse cursor, creating 2 images for 8 seconds with 100% of Samuro's current Health that Basic Attack enemies for 11 damage. Images have their duration increased by 1 second each time they or Samuro use a Basic Attack against an enemy Hero. Whenever an Image takes damage, it deals that amount of damage to itself, effectively doubling the damage it takes. Maximum 2 Mirror images can be active at a time. Using Mirror Image removes most negative effects from Samuro. Mirror Image
entries.name: Mirror Image

undoc.notes: Samuro appears in the direction of the player's mouse cursor when Mirror Image is cast. Samuro and his Mirror Images spawn in an equilateral triangle around the point where the ability was cast from. Using Mirror Image puts Samuro in Stasis for 0.125 seconds, removing most debuffs from Samuro and making him briefly untargetable and immune to damage. Usable while Rooted as it is cleansed by the Stasis. Samuro and the Images retain the last attack command given to Samuro before casting the Ability and attempt to complete it when the cast ends, unless they are spawned within Basic Attack range of another target, in which case they will focus that target instead. Mirror Images deal the same type of damage that Samuro does. Mirror Images gain all benefits from Samuro's Trait and Talents affecting it. Mirror Images can be affected by Regeneration Globes' healing, but cannot pick them up themselves. The effect is not shared between Samuro and his Images. Killing Mirror Images rewards no XP or Takedown credit.
undoc.type: Summon / Movement: Teleport, Status effect / Hallucination

entries.description: Samuro's next Basic Attack within 8 seconds will be a Critical Strike, dealing 50% increased damage. This also applies to Images, and does not break Wind Walk. Samuro and his Images deal a Critical Strike on every 4th Basic Attack.
entries.name: Critical Strike

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself. Activating sets Samuro's next attack to be a critical strike (regardless of if it already was), putting the Ability on cooldown. Activating resets Samuro's Basic Attack cooldown, causing his next Basic Attack to strike immediately. Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Samuro's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Grant Samuro Stealth for up to 10 seconds or until he attacks, uses an Ability, or takes damage. While Stealthed, Samuro heals for 2% of his maximum Health per second, his Movement Speed is increased by 20%, and he can pass through other units. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible. Samuro is Unrevealable for the first 1 second of Wind Walk.
entries.name: Wind Walk

undoc.notes: Using Mirror Image and [[mount

entries.description: Cause a Bladestorm of destructive force around Samuro for 3 seconds, granting him 25 Armor and dealing 180 damage per second to nearby enemies.
entries.name: Bladestorm

undoc.notes: Bladestorm can be ended prematurely by reactivating the Ability. All other Abilities are disabled during Bladestorm, and Bladestorm is also disabled during the brief Stasis window of Mirror Image and Image Transmission. This also prevents them from being successively cast using the Command Queue system (hold Shift by default). Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Mirror Images can be controlled individually or as a group and their damage is increased by 100%. Image Transmission's cooldown is reduced to 8 seconds.

Mirror Images have a copy of Illusion Master active and Image Transmission, both of which swap the Image using it with Samuro. The cooldown is shared between Samuro and all his Images. undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself, but not with other negative Physical Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

Burning Blade damage is unaffected by Basic Attack damage modifiers, like Critical Strike or Illusion Master's Image bonus damage, but can be affected by offensive damage modifiers that affect Samuro's Spell Damage output. Burning Blade 's damage reduction to Samuro himself stacks multiplicatively and damage reduction to Images stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Samuro's Spell Damage output.

undoc.notes: Sgt. Hammer cannot use her Abilities while switching into or out of Siege Mode. During Siege Mode, the casts of all Abilities are clamped at maximum range. Siege Mode can be activated or deactivated while Silenced. Polymorphs cancel Siege Mode if active, although as they are a type of Silence, Siege Mode can still be activated during the Polymorph. Damage bonus from Siege Mode stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Sgt. Hammer's Basic Attack damage. Splash damage penalty stacks multiplicatively with other offensive damage modifiers, including Siege Mode damage bonus, that can affect Sgt. Hammer's Basic Attack damage.

Bio-Kill Switch 's damage is dealt in addition to Weighted Pustule 's expiration damage in a separate instance. Healing Pathogens remain on the target until 0.0625 seconds after casting this Ability. Healing Pathogens placed on Medivh are not detonated by this Ability during Raven Form. If multiple Stukovs are on a team, Bio-Kill Switch only affects viruses placed by the activator.

entries.name: Healing Pathogen

undoc.notes: Can cast on self, and spread to self. Healing Pathogen can be cast on a Hero with an active Pathogen, overwriting its effect. However, it cannot spread to Heroes already affected by it. This also applies if multiple Stukovs are in a team.

entries.description: Hurl a pustule that impacts all enemy Heroes in its path, dealing 20 damage and Slowing by 5%, increasing to 50% over 3 seconds. Deals an additional 88 damage upon expiring or being removed.
entries.name: Weighted Pustule

undoc.notes: Unstoppable negates the Slow effect of Weighted Pustule, but does not prevent applying or remove a Pustule. Pustules can, however, be fully removed from units by Abilities which specifically remove Slows. If Weighted Pustule hits an enemy already affected by one, the previous Pustule is overwritten. This also applies if multiple Stukovs are in a team.

entries.description: Channel at a target location, creating an area that deals 136 damage per second to non-Structure enemies and Silences them. Deals 50% reduced damage to non-Heroes. Does not cost Mana while Channeling, and lasts until canceled or interrupted.
entries.name: Lurking Arm

undoc.notes: Each tick applies 0.3 seconds Silence.

entries.description: Swipe 3 times in front of Stukov over 1.75 seconds, dealing 48 damage to enemies hit and knocking them away. Each swipe is larger than the previous.
entries.name: Flailing Swipe

undoc.notes: 1) Target search is performed in three rotating 60 degree sections over three successive ticks. First and third swipes rotate clockwise, and second rotates counter-clockwise. Completing the three swipes only takes 1.375 seconds, but Stukov will remain locked in animation for the remaining 0.375 seconds of the 1.75 second channel.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Knockback, Stationary channel
undoc.val1: - First: 0.1875 seconds - Second: 0.25 seconds - Third: 0.5625 seconds

entries.description: Extend Stukov's arm. If it hits an enemy Hero, they are rapidly shoved until they collide with terrain, dealing 190 damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds. Stukov gains 50 Armor while shoving an enemy.
entries.name: Massive Shove

undoc.notes: Enemy Heroes are Revealed as long as they are being shoved. Massive Shove is canceled if the arm collides with terrain before hitting a Hero. Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.
undoc.props: Armor, Clamping, Knockback, Revealed, Skillshot, Stationary channel, Stun
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control, Status effect / Defensive damage modifier

entries.description: Basic Attacks become ranged and Slow enemies by 20% for 1.5 seconds, but deal 35% less damage. This effect can be toggled.
entries.name: Fetid Touch

entries.description: While below 50% Health, the cooldown of Bio-Kill Switch refreshes 100% faster. Activate to instantly spread a Weighted Pustule to all nearby enemy Heroes and reset the cooldown of Bio-Kill Switch. This effect has a 75 second cooldown.
entries.name: Reactive Ballistospores

undoc.notes: Can be activated while channeling Lurking Arm without interrupting it. While below 50% Health, reduces the cooldown of Bio-Kill Switch by 0.125 seconds every 0.125 seconds. The Talent's cooldown is unaffected by any cooldown reduction effects. Bio-Kill Switch cannot be activated again for 0.0625 seconds (1 game loop) after the last activation even when using the reset from this Ability.

entries.description: Lurking Arm deals 100% more damage to enemy Heroes below 50% Health and persists for 1 second after it is canceled.
entries.name: Low Blow

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Lurking Arm 's damage.

entries.description: After a Healing Pathogen infests 3 targets, restore 10 Mana and reduce the cooldown of Healing Pathogen by 2 seconds.
entries.name: One Good Spread...

entries.description: Healing Pathogen grants 10 Physical Armor to its targets while active on them. Detonating Bio-Kill Switch increases this bonus to 50 for 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Biotic Armor

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Physical Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Bio-Kill Switch heals for 30% more when detonating 3 or more Healing Pathogens.
entries.name: Vigorous Reuptake

undoc.notes: Bonus healing stacks additively with other healing dealt modifiers that can affect Bio-Kill Switch 's healing.

entries.description: Increase the range of Weighted Pustule by 50%. Detonating 2 or more Weighted Pustules causes Stukov's Bio-Kill Switch and Basic Ability cooldowns to recharge 100% faster for 4 seconds.
entries.name: The Long Pitch

undoc.notes: While active, reduces Stukov's Basic Ability cooldowns by 0.0625 seconds every 0.0625 seconds.

entries.description: Lurking Arm's area expands by 50% over 2.5 seconds, but it cannot be channeled for longer than 3 seconds.
entries.name: Growing Infestation

undoc.notes: If Low Blow has been picked, the area will continue growing even after Stukov stops channeling if Lurking Arm still hasn't reached its maximum radius.

entries.description: Detonating exactly 1 Weighted Pustule (but any number of Healing Pathogens) with Bio-Kill Switch reduces the cooldown of Bio-Kill Switch to 7 seconds and other Basic Abilities by 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Targeted Excision

entries.description: Swipe 3 times in front of Stukov over 1.75 seconds, dealing 48 damage to enemies hit and knocking them away. Each swipe is larger than the previous.
entries.name: Flailing Swipe

entries.description: Extend Stukov's arm. If it hits an enemy Hero, they are rapidly shoved until they collide with terrain, dealing 190 damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds. Stukov gains 50 Armor while shoving an enemy.
entries.name: Massive Shove

entries.description: Increase the range of Lurking Arm by 30%. If Lurking Arm damages enemy Heroes 8 times, its cooldown is reset and its Mana cost is refunded.
entries.name: It Hungers

undoc.notes: Sets cooldown to 0.5s if the reset triggers (beginning once the Ability stops being channeled). Counter is reset every time Lurking Arm is cast.

entries.description: Detonating a Weighted Pustule on an enemy who is inside of Lurking Arm Roots them for 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Virulent Reaction

entries.description: Detonating a Weighted Pustule with Bio-Kill Switch within 1.5 seconds of its expiration increases its damage by 150% and applies its damage and Slow in an area. Enemy Heroes hit have a Weighted Pustule applied to them.
entries.name: Poppin' Pustules

undoc.notes: Also causes the Pustule to last an additional 0.0625s after detonation with Bio-Kill Switch. Late detonation damage increase only affects the expiration damage of active Weighted Pustules. Only the activation damage from Bio-Kill Switch is dealt in an area. Enemies can be damaged by multiple area explosions, but only one instance of Weighted Pustule will be applied to them. A new Weighted Pustule will not be applied to the Hero that was initially carrying the Weighted Pustule before the area detonation. However, they can have one applied to them from the area detonation of other Heroes. Weighted Pustules from Poppin' Pustules interact with other all other Talents affecting Weighted Pustule. However, applying them in this way does not deal the impact damage of Weighted Pustule and cannot grant progress toward the Fetid Touch quest. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Bio-Kill Switch 's pustule detonation damage.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier / Spell Damage, Crowd control

entries.description: Whenever an ally with Healing Pathogen is Stunned or Rooted, they are instantly healed for 300 Health.
entries.name: Superstrain

entries.description: Healing Pathogen can continually spread through Stukov, but its healing is reduced by 25%.
entries.name: Universal Carrier

undoc.notes: Only affects Pathogen's heal over time component. Healing penalty stacks additively with other healing dealt modifiers affecting Healing Pathogen 's healing.

entries.description: Bio-Kill Switch no longer removes Healing Pathogen but instead sets its duration to 3 seconds.
entries.name: Pox Populi

entries.description: Flailing Swipe gains 2 additional charges, but each use only swings 1 time, at maximum range. Additionally, its cooldown is decreased to 25 seconds, and its Mana cost is reduced from 60 to 25.
entries.name: Controlled Chaos

undoc.notes: When picked, Controlled Chaos instantly grants two ready charges, even if the ability was on cooldown at that moment. Controlled Chaos 's swipe has the same properties as the third swipe, except its initial delay is reduced to 0.125 seconds and total channel time to 0.75 seconds.

entries.description: Massive Shove Slows its target by 50% for 4 seconds upon colliding with terrain. If Massive Shove pushes a target for more than 1.25 seconds, its cooldown is reduced by 15 seconds.
entries.name: Push Comes To Shove

entries.description: Healing Pathogen's heal over time is increased by 30% while its target is above 60% Health.
entries.name: Top Off

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other Healing dealt modifiers that can affect Healing Pathogen 's healing.

entries.description: Bio-Kill Switch now also detonates Lurking Arm, dealing 230 damage, applying a Weighted Pustule and Silencing enemy Heroes inside for 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Bio-Explosion Switch

undoc.notes: Detonation instantly removes Lurking Arm, even if affected by the Low Blow Talent. Weighted Pustules from Bio-Explosion Switch interact with other all other Talents affecting Weighted Pustule. However, applying them in this way does not deal the impact damage of Weighted Pustule and cannot grant progress toward the Fetid Touch quest.

entries.description: Basic Attacks infect enemies with Black Arrows for 3 seconds, stacking up to 3 times. Sylvanas deals 15% more damage to enemies with 3 stacks.
entries.name: Black Arrows

undoc.notes: Walls do not give stacks for the quest. The effects of Black Arrows are applied before the damage is dealt. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Sylvanas's damage. The stack count of Black Arrows is shared among all Sylvanases in the team, and they can all refresh it, increment it and interact with it regardless of who placed it.

entries.description: Shoot the closest enemy up to 5 times over 1.5 seconds for 39 damage, prioritizing Heroes. Cooldown is reset on getting a Takedown.
entries.name: Withering Fire

undoc.notes: Can only be activated if an enemy is within the radius. The Ability can not be activated again until all shots are used. If no enemy is in radius (while the Ability is active), a shot is consumed and the Ability continues until the end of its duration. Prioritizes the closest enemy in target groups of Heroes and non-Heroes. Other Structures are prioritized over Gates and Walls.

entries.description: Throw a dagger at a target enemy that deals 30 damage and an additional 150 damage over 2.5 seconds. Damage dealt by Sylvanas to the initial target spreads Shadow Dagger to all nearby enemies.
entries.name: Shadow Dagger

undoc.notes: 1) Spread radius is extended by the main target's unit radius. Cast is interrupted if the target moves at least 4 units past its range during its windup. Initial target is displayed by a unique icon overhead. Cannot spread to Stealthed enemy units, Walls, or enemy targets that are already affected by Shadow Dagger from the same Sylvanas. The initial damage instance is not classified as DoT and is dealt to secondary targets as well when Shadow Dagger spreads to them.

entries.description: Send forth a wave of banshees, dealing 114 damage to all targets. Reactivate to teleport to the banshees' location.
entries.name: Haunting Wave

undoc.notes: 1) Search area expands to its maximum radius over 1.5 seconds in increments of 0.54. After the cast, the Ability can be reactivated for 1.75 seconds to launch to the wave's location. Sylvanas gains Unstoppable while she is traveling to the wave's location.
undoc.type: Spell Damage / Movement: Launch, Status effect

entries.description: Shoot an arrow that can be reactivated to deal 228 damage and Silence enemies in an area for 2.5 seconds. The arrow detonates automatically if it reaches maximum range.
entries.name: Wailing Arrow

entries.description: After 0.25 seconds, fire a missile that Mind Controls the first enemy Hero hit. Heroes hit are Silenced, Slowed by 30%, have 3 stacks of Black Arrows applied to them, and are forced to walk toward Sylvanas for 1.75 seconds.
entries.name: Mind Control

undoc.notes: Mind Control is treated as a Silence effect. Abilities that interact with Silences also interact with Mind Control. Mind Controlled Heroes cannot attack and have no control of their movement.

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Withering Fire increases Sylvanas's Attack Speed and Spell Power by 5% for 6 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.
entries.name: Might of the Banshee Queen

undoc.notes: Spell Power from Might of the Banshee Queen stacks additively with itself and other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage and healing modifiers affecting Sylvanas's Spell Damage.

entries.description: Increase the damage of Shadow Dagger by 20% and increase its duration by 1 second.
entries.name: Unrelenting Torment

undoc.notes: Affects both the initial damage and the damage over time. Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers affecting Shadow Dagger 's damage.

entries.description: Enemy Heroes with 3 stacks of Black Arrows are Slowed by 15%. Sylvanas's Basic Attacks against Slowed enemy Heroes deal 1% of their maximum Health as damage.
entries.name: Overwhelming Affliction

undoc.notes: Slow is applied to the target for 3 seconds. This effect and its duration are separate from Black Arrows. Damage is dealt in a separate instance along with Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Minions that die under the effects of Shadow Dagger or Sylvanas's Traits explode, dealing 150 damage to nearby Minions, Mercenaries, and Summons.
entries.name: Unstable Poison

undoc.notes: If multiple Sylvanases are on a team, Unstable Poison only triggers from the effects placed by Sylvanases with this Talent. Activation through Black Arrows uses a separate counter that requires 3 stacks to be applied or refreshed by the same Hero.

entries.description: Friendly non-Elite Mercenaries near Sylvanas deal 60% more damage. Sylvanas's Basic Attacks Stun and instantly apply 3 stacks of Black Arrows to laning Mercenaries. Sylvanas deals 30% additional damage to Mercenaries with 3 stacks of Black Arrows.
entries.name: Mercenary Queen

undoc.notes: The Stun is applied for 3 seconds when attacking a Mercenary with 3 stacks of Black Arrows. This effect and its duration is separate from Black Arrows. Damage aura does not stack with other Mercenary Lord derivated damage auras. Otherwise, damage bonuses stack addtively with other offensive damage bonuses that can affect the target units' damage output.

entries.description: Black Arrows can now be activated to cause all Basic Attacks and Abilities to Stun Minions and Structures for 3 seconds. Lasts for 10 seconds. Basic Attacks against Structures reduce this cooldown by 3 seconds.
entries.name: Haunting Arrows

entries.description: Hitting the same enemy with 5 shots of Withering Fire causes the 5th shot to deal 400% bonus damage.
entries.name: Barbed Shot

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Withering Fire 's damage.

entries.description: Basic Attacks against Heroes and Structures with 3 stacks of Black Arrows reduce the cooldown of Shadow Dagger by 0.75 seconds, doubled against Heroes.
entries.name: Lost Soul

undoc.notes: Affects both the initial damage and the damage over time. Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Shadow Dagger 's damage.

entries.description: Increase Haunting Wave's damage by 15%. Haunting Wave applies 3 stacks of Black Arrows.
entries.name: Festering Wounds

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other damage modifiers that can affect Haunting Wave 's damage.

entries.description: Shoot an arrow that can be reactivated to deal 228 damage and Silence enemies in an area for 2.5 seconds. The arrow detonates automatically if it reaches maximum range.
entries.name: Wailing Arrow

entries.description: After 0.25 seconds, fire a missile that Mind Controls the first enemy Hero hit. Heroes hit are Silenced, Slowed by 30%, have 3 stacks of Black Arrows applied to them, and are forced to walk toward Sylvanas for 1.75 seconds.
entries.name: Mind Control

entries.description: Shadow Dagger reduces the Armor of the initial target by 25 and any enemy it spreads to by 10 for 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Cold Embrace

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Haunting Wave can be cast a second time for free within 4 seconds after teleporting. Teleporting with Haunting Wave resets the cooldown of Withering Fire.
entries.name: Windrunner

entries.description: Increase Sylvanas's Basic Attack range by 1. Sylvanas's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes with 3 stacks of Black Arrows shoot an untalented shot of Withering Fire. This shot of Withering Fire applies Black Arrows.
entries.name: Remorseless

undoc.notes: Remorseless 's Withering Fire shots are fired from the target of the Basic Attack upon impact and prioritize the closest unit to the target. Withering Fire shot will not bounce to unaggroed Mercenaries.

entries.description: Hitting an enemy with Withering Fire grants 6% Movement Speed for 2 seconds, up to 30%. Basic Attacks refresh this duration.
entries.name: Evasive Fire

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself, but not with other sources of bonus Movement Speed.

entries.description: Heal for 15% of damage dealt by Sylvanas to enemies with 3 stacks of Black Arrows. Healing is doubled against Heroes.
entries.name: Life Drain

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other sources of lifesteal.

entries.description: Activate to become Unstoppable and gain 40% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Will of the Forsaken

entries.description: Enemies at the center of Wailing Arrow's explosion take 50% more damage and are Silenced for twice as long.
entries.name: Deafening Blast

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Wailing Arrow 's damage.

entries.description: Heroes hit by Mind Control have their vision radius greatly reduced for 5 seconds. Mind Control's cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds.
entries.name: Dark Lady's Call

entries.description: Withering Fire applies Black Arrows, and Heroes hit by Withering Fire reduce its cooldown by 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Withering Barrage

entries.description: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.
entries.name: Bolt of the Storm

entries.description: Tassadar's Basic Attack is a Channeled beam that Slows by 15%. While Channeling, your Basic Attack damage and Mana Regeneration increase by 25% a second, to a maximum of 100%. While at full charge, gain an additional 3 Mana per second. This bonus is lost after 6 seconds of not Channeling.
entries.name: Resonance Beam

undoc.notes: Each tick grants 6.25% Resonance Beam charge. Gaining charge in any way resets the duration. Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Tassadar's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Channel a beam of Psionic energy, dealing 280 damage and Slowing enemies in a line by 30% for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Shock Ray

undoc.notes: Tassadar can start moving after the channel although there is an additional 0.0625s delay (noted above) before the beam appears from its cast location. Interrupting the Ability during its windup puts it on a 0.5 second cooldown. Cooldown does not start until the channel completely finishes. It is possible to reduce the cast time to 0.1 seconds through an input buffer: W > Basic Attack > Q (buffer is easier to execute while Archon is active).
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Channeled cast (stationary), Slow, Stationary channel

entries.description: Create a Psionic Storm at the targeted location for 3 seconds. While in a storm, enemies take 38 damage every 0.5 seconds, increasing by 20% for each consecutive instance of damage, up to 100%.
entries.name: Psionic Storm

undoc.notes: Enemies can only be affected by one Psionic Storm at a time. This also applies in the event there are multiple Tassadars in a team. Damage bonus tracks each target separately and can carry over to another cast of Psionic Storm, if it damages the target within 0.4 seconds of the last damage instance. This also applies to Psionic Storms cast by different Tassadars. A target with no existing stacks that is hit by a full-duration Storm will take 342 damage (excluding scaling and other damage modifiers). Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and offensive damage modifiers.
undoc.tickrate: - Damage: 2.0 per second (x6) - Target search: 4.0 per second (x11)

entries.description: After a 0.5 second delay, create a wall that blocks all units from moving through it for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Force Wall

undoc.notes: 1) Area consists of four overlapping circular blocking units with 1.0625 radius. Force Wall can be reactivated 0.5 seconds after it has spawned to end its effect early. Force Wall grants vision in 6 radius.

entries.description: Tassadar transforms into an Archon, gaining a Shield equal to 25% of his maximum Health and empowering Resonance Beam. Lasts for 12 seconds. Deals 140 damage to the target and splashes 70 damage to nearby enemies. Heroes hit have their Spell Armor reduced by 20 for 2 seconds. Resonance Beam is fully charged while Archon is active.
entries.name: Archon

undoc.notes: Tassadar cannot Mount while in this form. Cooldown starts when the transformation ends. Archon benefits from Resonance Beam 's Slow and Mana regeneration bonuses, but not from the damage bonus. Archon attacks benefit from all talents enhancing Resonance Beam, except Khaydarin Amulet. Does not stack with itself or other negative Spell Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.
undoc.type: Physical Damage, Defensive damage modifier / Shield

entries.description: After a 0.5 second cast, launch a Black Hole that travels in a long line. Enemy Heroes within the Black Hole's area are quickly pulled toward its center. Touching the center deals 310 damage and Stuns for 1.25 seconds.
entries.name: Black Hole

undoc.notes: Interrupting the cast during its windup puts the Ability on a 10 second cooldown. Pull from Black Hole does not apply Daze, allowing the target to control their Hero's movement and actions as normal and causing it to be unable to interrupt channels (without getting hit by its center). Heroes hit by the center continue to be pulled until they leave Black Hole's area, but cannot be hit by the center again.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Channeled cast (stationary), Displacement, Stun

entries.description: Maximum of 200 additional damage.
entries.name: Static Charge

entries.description: Increases the range of Psionic Storm by 33%. Each non-Structure enemy hit by Psionic Storm restores 0.5 Mana, increased to 5 against Heroes.
entries.name: Psi-Infusion

undoc.notes: Mana refund can trigger multiple times on the same target.

Bounce radius is extended by the target's unit radius. Bounces chain from the secondary target. Secondary attacks Slow. Secondary targets do not grant additional charge. Archon Basic Attacks do not bounce. Damage reduction to both bounces is relative to damage dealt to primary target. Damage reduction to secondary targets stacks multiplicatively with offensive damage modifiers that can affect Tassadar's Basic Attack damage. Target must be visible to initially bounce to them, and then is revealed while linked.

entries.description: Tassadar gains 10% Movement Speed. Casting Shock Ray increases this bonus to 30% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Induction

entries.description: Force Wall deals 92 damage a second to nearby enemies and Slows them by 35%.
entries.name: Electric Fence

entries.description: While Resonance Beam is fully charged, gain a Shield equal to 3% of max Health every second, stacking up to 12%.
entries.name: Plasma Shield

entries.description: While Resonance Beam is fully charged, Shock Ray's cooldown refreshes 100% faster and its Slow duration is increased to 4 seconds. Reduce the Mana cost of Shock Ray from 55 to 40.
entries.name: Beam Alignment

undoc.notes: Reduces the cooldown of Shock Ray by 0.125 seconds every 0.125 seconds. Slow duration is determined when the Ability hits the target. Gaining or losing full Resonance Beam charge does not affect the duration.

entries.description: Casting Psionic Storm causes your next Shock Ray within 3 seconds to only cost 30 Mana and create a Psionic Storm on the first enemy Hero hit.
entries.name: Psionic Echo

undoc.notes: The Psionic Storm created by Psionic Echo benefits from all talents affecting Psionic Storm.

entries.description: When Resonance Beam is fully charged, Tassadar's Basic Attack range is increased by 1 and its next instance of damage also creates a Psionic Storm on the target. This effect has a 20 second cooldown that decays twice as fast while Resonance Beam is fully charged.
entries.name: Arc Discharge

undoc.notes: Secondary targets from Khaydarin Amulet and Archon do not generate a Psionic Storm. A Psionic Storm created by Arc Discharge interacts with all Talents affecting Psionic Storm. Does not benefit from cooldown reduction granted by Executor's Will.

entries.description: Tassadar transforms into an Archon, gaining a Shield equal to 25% of his maximum Health and empowering Resonance Beam. Lasts for 12 seconds. Deals 140 damage to the target and splashes for 70. Heroes hit have their Spell Armor reduced by 20 for 2 seconds. Resonance Beam is fully charged while Archon is active.
entries.name: Archon

entries.description: After a 0.5 second cast, launch a Black Hole that travels in a long line. Enemy Heroes within the Black Hole's area are quickly pulled toward its center. Touching the center deals 310 damage and Stuns for 1.25 seconds.
entries.name: Black Hole

entries.description: When an enemy Hero is affected by Psionic Storm, Resonance Beam's Slow is increased to 50% and it reduces Physical Armor by 25.
entries.name: Feedback

undoc.notes: Basic Attacks apply the debuff for 0.5 seconds, subsequent applications refreshing the duration. While Archon is active, the duration of the debuff is increased to 2 seconds. Secondary attacks from Khaydarin Amulet can trigger the effect. Debuff applies after the triggering Basic Attack's damage is calculated. Does not stack with itself or other negative Physical Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Tassadar becomes Stealthed and Unrevealable, but cannot attack or use Abilities for 1.5 seconds. While this effect is active gain 40% increased Movement Speed and 35 Armor. Can be cast while channeling Shock Ray.
entries.name: Shadow Walk

undoc.notes: Can also be cast while channeling Black Hole. Shadow Walk can be reactivated after 0.5 seconds to end its effect early. Activating Shadow Walk during the windup of Shock Ray or Black Hole puts the Abilities on their respective shorter cooldowns. If Shock Ray is interrupted this way after the windup, the Ability ends immediately and is put on full cooldown.

entries.description: While stationary, gain 30 Spell Armor for 0.75 seconds and restore 12 Health per second. Activate to Channel for up to 4 seconds, revealing a gradually increasing area anywhere on the map.
entries.name: Oracle

undoc.notes: 1) Reveal area radius grows in 0.5 increments every 0.125 seconds. Vision and Revealed status persists for 2 seconds after Tassadar stops channeling. Does not stack with itself or other positive Spell Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Stationary channel, Revealed, Spell Armor
undoc.type: Status effect / Defensive damage modifier, Healing

entries.description: Shock Ray deals an additional 8% of maximum Health as damage to the first Hero it hits.
entries.name: Thermal Lance

entries.description: Psionic Storm deals damage 25% faster.
entries.name: Psychic Shock

undoc.notes: Actually deals damage 33.3~% faster because it sets the period of the AoE to 74.5% of its original (.375s instead of .5s). Duration remains the same, causing Psionic Storm to tick an additional 2 times. Results in up to a ~44.4% increase in total damage to someone who stands in its entire duration, due to its ramping.

entries.description: Activate to gain full Resonance Beam charge, 20% Spell Power, and cause Basic and Heroic Ability cooldowns to regenerate 25% faster. This effect lasts as long as Resonance Beam remains at full charge.
entries.name: Executor's Will

undoc.notes: Cooldown starts when the Ability is cast. Spell Power from Executor's Will does not stack with itself, but stacks additively with other sources of Spell Power and other offensive damage and healing modifiers affecting Tassadar's Spell Damage or healing output.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier, Healing dealt modifier

entries.description: Basic Attacks while in Archon form increase its duration by 2 seconds.
entries.name: Twilight Archon

undoc.notes: Basic Attacks will not increase the remaining duration of Archon if it is already higher than 12 seconds, effectively limiting the remaining duration to 14 seconds.

entries.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Black Hole's center have their Armor reduced by 20 for 3 seconds and have a Psionic Storm created at their location.
entries.name: Kugelblitz

undoc.notes: Psionic Storms created by Kugelblitz benefit from all talents affecting Psionic Storm. Armor debuff is not cleansed by Stasis. Does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Increase the duration of Force Wall by 0.5 seconds, its range by 50%, and reduce its cooldown by 10 seconds.
entries.name: Force Barrier

undoc.notes: Causes Electric Fence to tick 1 additional time.

entries.description: Gain 4% Spell Power for yourself and each nearby ally Hero, up to 20% total Spell Power. Your total bonus is shared with all contributing allies.
entries.name: Khala's Gift

undoc.notes: Searches for allies in range every 0.25 seconds. Lingers for 0.3125 seconds after going out of range. Spell Power from Khala's Gift stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage and healing modifiers affecting the target Hero's Spell Damage or healing output.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier, Healing dealt modifier

entries.description: Dealing damage with Abilities grants 1 stack of Frostwolf Resilience. At 5 stacks, Thrall is instantly healed for 240 Health.
entries.name: Frostwolf Resilience
