entries.description: Shock an enemy with lightning, dealing 170 damage. The lightning then bounces 3 times to nearby enemies, dealing 85 damage to each enemy hit.
entries.name: Chain Lightning

undoc.notes: Targets of secondary bounces are chosen at random from all units in range. Each unit can only be damaged once per cast.

entries.description: Unleash a Feral Spirit that deals 153 damage to enemies in its path and Roots Heroes hit for 1 second. Each Hero hit increases the distance traveled by 25%.
entries.name: Feral Spirit

undoc.notes: Can still impact Invulnerable targets, giving Thrall stacks of Frostwolf Resilience, increasing the Ability's range, and benefiting Talents, though doing nothing to the target.

entries.description: Increase Thrall's Movement Speed by 30% for 4 seconds. His next 3 Basic Attacks occur 100% faster and generate stacks of Frostwolf Resilience.
entries.name: Windfury

undoc.props: Attack Speed, Attack Modifier (resilience), Movement Speed

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, sunder the earth in a long line, dealing 290 damage and shoving enemies to the side, Stunning them for 1 second.
entries.name: Sundering

undoc.notes: Sundering interrupts active displacements and momentarily removes collision on the targets.

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, summon a massive Earthquake that pulses every 4 seconds. Each pulse lasts 2 seconds, Slowing all enemies in the area by 50%, and deals 50 damage to enemy Heroes. Does 3 pulses.
entries.name: Earthquake

undoc.notes: Only grants Frostwolf Resilience stacks from Heroes.

undoc.val1: 0.5 seconds. The Fork allows each bounce (including the initial) to start 2 instances of the next bounce in the chain instead of just 1 instance. The farthest target hit (this could use more testing) in a certain set of bounces won't be hit in the next set of bounces.

undoc.notes: Bounce targets within the groups of Heroic or non-Heroic targets are still chosen at random.
Movement Speed bonuses do not stack.

entries.description: Heroes damaged by Feral Spirit grant 4 stacks of Frostwolf Resilience and 2 stacks of Feral Resilience, granting 75 Physical Armor against the next incoming Hero Basic Attack. Stacks are consumed on the next cast of Feral Spirit.
entries.name: Feral Resilience

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Physical Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Frostwolf Resilience restores 15 Mana and reduces Basic Ability cooldowns by 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Mana Tide

entries.description: For 8 seconds after hitting an enemy with Chain Lightning, Thrall's next Basic Attack against them grants a stack of Frostwolf Resilience. If the target is an enemy Hero, then he also deals damage to them equal to 3% of their maximum Health and healing for the same amount.
entries.name: Rolling Thunder

entries.description: Activate to consume 8 stacks of Ancestral Wrath, damaging a target enemy Hero for 15% of their maximum Health over 3 seconds, and healing Thrall for 150% of the damage dealt. Gain 1 stack of Ancestral Wrath every time Frostwolf Resilience activates.
entries.name: Ancestral Wrath

undoc.notes: Does not generate Frostwolf Resilience stacks. Starts with 0 stacks.
undoc.props: Damage over Time, Lifesteal, Percent damage

entries.description: After using a Basic or Heroic Ability, Thrall's next Basic Attack within 4 seconds deals 45% more damage.
entries.name: Elemental Assault

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other damage modifiers affecting Thrall's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, sunder the earth in a long line, dealing 290 damage and shoving enemies to the side, Stunning them for 1 second.
entries.name: Sundering

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, summon a massive Earthquake that pulses every 4 seconds. Each pulse lasts 2 seconds, Slowing all enemies in the area by 50%, and deals 50 damage to enemy Heroes. Does 3 pulses.
entries.name: Earthquake

entries.description: Windfury attacks grant twice as many stacks of Frostwolf Resilience.
entries.name: Grace Of Air

entries.description: Frostwolf Resilience can be activated to instantly heal. This healing is increased by up to 100% based on Thrall's missing Health.
entries.name: Frostwolf's Grace

undoc.notes: Triggering Frostwolf Resilience this way still benefits from all Talents and Abilities affecting it. Activating does not affect the current amount of Resilience stacks. Bonus healing stacks additively with healing dealt modifiers.

entries.description: Every 45 seconds, gain 70 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 4 seconds. Triggering Frostwolf Resilience reduces this cooldown by 10 seconds. Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
entries.name: Spirit Shield

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Spell Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: The final strike of Windfury hits 3 times for 75% normal damage. These strikes do not provide quest progress.
entries.name: Tempest Fury

undoc.notes: Each additional hit generates Frostwolf Resilience stacks. Only the first hit of the three part series benefits from Follow Through 's damage bonus. Stacks additively with other damage modifiers affecting Thrall's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Chain Lightning Slows targets by 8% for 2 seconds. Bonuses are reset if Chain Lightning is used on the same Hero it was last used on, or if Thrall dies.
entries.name: Thunderstorm

undoc.notes: Slow only affects the primary target (and only if it is a Hero). Stacks additively with other damage modifiers affecting Chain Lightning 's damage.

entries.description: For 3 seconds after a Hero is hit by Feral Spirit, Thrall's Basic Attacks against them deal an additional 3% of the target's maximum Health as damage. Increase the duration of Feral Spirit's Root to 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Alpha Wolf

undoc.notes: Bonus damage is dealt in a separate instance and does not generate Frostwolf Resilience stacks.

entries.description: Lower the cooldown of Sundering by 40 seconds. After Sundering impacts, it leaves behind an impassable rift, blocking unit movement for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Worldbreaker

undoc.notes: 1) Consists of two rows of 4 overlapping circles with 2.5 radius. The "impassable rift" can be cancelled earlier by pressing the heroic button again.

entries.description: Allies within the Earthquake area gain a Shield equal to 15% of their maximum Health each pulse. This shield lasts 4 seconds.
entries.name: Earthen Shields

undoc.notes: Calculated from the target's maximum Health.

entries.description: Basic Attacks reduce Thrall's Basic and Heroic Ability cooldowns by 0.25 seconds, tripled against Heroes.
entries.name: Elemental Momentum

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Thrall's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Basic Attacks deal 20% more damage and Slow enemy Movement Speed by 20% for 1 second.
entries.name: Nexus Blades

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Thrall's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Activate to immediately teleport to a target location and gain Windfury.
entries.name: Wind Rush

undoc.notes: Wind Rush benefits from all talents affecting Wind Fury.

entries.description: Regenerate 1 Scrap every 4 seconds. Destroyed Rock-It! Turrets drop 1 Scrap, which can be picked up. Activate to destroy a target Rock-It! Turret.
entries.name: Reduce, Reuse, Recycle

undoc.notes: Scrap persists on the ground for 5 seconds. Activating Reduce, Reuse, Recycle does not dismount. If Gazlowe places a Rock-It! Turret when he is at full Scrap and Scrap regeneration is off-cooldown, he instantly regenerates 1 Scrap.

entries.description: Create a turret that deals 43 damage. Loses Health over 20 seconds. Turrets prioritize the nearest enemy Hero when first created. Turret
entries.name: Rock-It! Turret

undoc.notes: Turrets can be retargeted using Focus Turrets!. Turrets have no collision.

entries.description: After 0.65 seconds, deal 175 damage to enemies in a line. Heal for 25% of the damage dealt, increased to 75% against enemy Heroes.
entries.name: Deth Lazor

entries.description: Place a bomb that deals 142 damage to enemies within the target area after 1.25 seconds. Enemies hit are also Stunned for 1 second.
entries.name: Xplodium Charge

undoc.notes: Does not benefit from cooldown reduction.

entries.description: Activate to become Unstoppable for 1.5 seconds. Basic Attacks deal 100 bonus damage over 5 seconds, stacking up to 3 times.
entries.name: Robo-Goblin

undoc.notes: Damage stacks additively. Subsequent applications refresh the duration.
undoc.props: Attack Modifier, Damage over Time, Unstoppable

entries.description: After a 1.5 second delay, pull enemies toward the center of an area and deal 220 damage. Basic Abilities deal 30% more damage for 5 seconds after casting Grav-O-Bomb 3000.
entries.name: Grav-O-Bomb 3000

undoc.notes: Affected enemies are also Stunned for the duration of the knockback. Removing this Stun (e.g. Brightwing's Soothing Mist active) stops the knockback as well. Damage is dealt after the pull finishes. Damage bonus to Basic Abilities stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers. Grav-O-Bomb 3000 can be seen by all players through Fog of War when cast.
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control, Offensive damage modifier

entries.description: Orders any nearby Rock-It! Turrets to focus the target.
entries.name: Focus Turrets!

undoc.notes: Disabled while no Rock-It! Turrets are active.

entries.description: Increase the cast range of Xplodium Charge by 30% and its damage by 35%. Hitting an enemy Hero increases Movement Speed by 20% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Rocket Boots

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Xplodium Charge 's damage.

entries.description: Increase maximum Scrap by 2. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes, Mercenaries, or Monsters accelerates Reduce, Reuse, Recycle Scrap regeneration by 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Big Game Hunter

entries.description: Casting Basic Abilities causes Gazlowe’s next Basic Attack within 6 seconds to deal 75% more damage. Stores up to 2 charges.
entries.name: One Man Wrecking Crew

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Gazlowe's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Casting Rock-It! Turret grants Gazlowe a Shield that absorbs up to 200 damage for 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Rock It Sock It

undoc.notes: Shield does not stack with itself. Subsequent applications refresh the shield amount and duration.

entries.description: Heroes hit by Deth Lazor or Xplodium Charge take an additional 2% of their maximum Health in damage. Gazlowe is healed for 150% of the damage dealt.
entries.name: Hyperfocus Coils

entries.description: Activate to gain 40 Armor for 3 seconds, reducing damage taken by 40%, and reduce damage dealt by all nearby enemy Heroes and Summons by 50% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: EZ-PZ Dimensional Ripper

undoc.notes: Damage reduction stacks with other offensive damage modifiers affecting the target Hero's damage output. Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.
undoc.type: Defensive damage modifier / Offensive damage modifier

entries.description: Generate 3 Scrap for each Hero hit by Deth Lazor.
entries.name: Goblin Fusion

entries.description: Deth Lazor can now store up to 2 charges. Each enemy Hero hit by Deth Lazor reduces its cooldown by 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Overload

entries.description: Deth Lazor and Xplodium Charge Slow enemies hit by 35% for 3 seconds. Rock-It! Turret Basic Attacks against enemies Slowed in this way extend the Slow duration by 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Master Blaster

entries.description: Activate to become Unstoppable for 1.5 seconds. Basic Attacks deal 90 bonus damage over 5 seconds, stacking up to 3 times.
entries.name: Robo-Goblin

entries.description: After a 1.5 second delay, pull enemies toward the center of an area and deal 220 damage. Basic Abilities deal 30% more damage for 5 seconds after casting Grav-O-Bomb 3000.
entries.name: Grav-O-Bomb 3000

entries.description: Primary Rock-It! Turret attacks against Heroes increase Gazlowe's Attack Speed by 40% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Positive Reinforcement

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself. Subsequent applications refresh the duration.

entries.description: Rock-It! Turrets attack up to 2 additional enemies for 60% damage and have 30% increased Basic Attack range.
entries.name: Superior Schematics

undoc.notes: Secondary targets are chosen within an 80 degree cone around the main target, prioritizing the enemies closest to the Turret. Secondary attacks benefit from Grav-O-Bomb 3000 's damage bonus. Secondary attacks do not prioritize Heroes. Secondary attack damage penalty stacks additively with offensive damage modifiers that can affect Rock-It! Turret s' damage.

entries.description: Gazlowe gains 5% Spell Power for each active Rock-It! Turret, up to a maximum of 15%. Dealing Basic Attack damage heals Rock-It! Turrets by 8% of their max health.
entries.name: Overcharged Capacitors

undoc.notes: Spell Power stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage and healing modifiers affecting Gazlowe's Spell damage or healing output.

entries.description: Firing Deth Lazor causes all of Gazlowe's Rock-It! Turrets to fire a Deth Lazor of their own that deals 125 damage.
entries.name: Firin' Mah Lazorz

undoc.notes: All lazorz are fired toward the target point. Rock-It! Turret s' lazorz do not interact with other talents affecting Deth Lazor. Turrets' lazorz do not benefit from Grav-O-Bomb 3000 's damage bonus.

entries.description: Reduce the cooldown of Xplodium Charge by 2 seconds. Casting Xplodium Charge creates 3 miniature Rock-It! Turrets that last for 3 seconds. These Turrets do not drop Scrap or benefit from other Talents.
entries.name: Ark Reaktor

undoc.notes: Miniature Turrets spawn immediately upon cast. Miniature Turrets also prioritize Heroes upon spawning and can be retargeted using Focus Turrets!. Miniature Turrets' attacks do not benefit from Grav-O-Bomb 3000 's damage bonus.

entries.description: Basic Attacks grant Gazlowe 15% Movement Speed for 2 seconds. Dealing Basic Attack damage to Heroes causes them to take an additional 2.5% of their maximum Health as damage.
entries.name: Overklock

undoc.props: Attack Modifier, Movement Speed, Percent damage

entries.description: Basic Attacks increase Gazlowe's Armor by 10 for 10 seconds, up to a maximum of 30, and deal 50% bonus damage to Stunned or Slowed enemies.
entries.name: Mecha-Lord

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Gazlowe's Basic Attack damage. Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.
undoc.type: Defensive damage modifier, Offensive damage modifier

entries.description: Increases Grav-O-Bomb 3000's radius by 25% and its damage by 50%. Each enemy Hero pulled reduces its cooldown by 12 seconds.
entries.name: Miniature Black Hole

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers.

entries.description: Reduce the Scrap cost of Rock-It! Turrets by 1. Regain 2 Scrap for each Scrap pickup.
entries.name: It's Raining Scrap

entries.description: Xplodium Charge gains a 2nd charge with a 3 second cooldown between uses and launches 2 more bombs when it detonates.
entries.name: Bomb Toss

undoc.notes: Additional bombs are launched at a 45 degree angle from the initial direction. Additional bombs have the same impact properties as Xplodium Charge, and interact with Grav-O-Bomb 3000 's damage bonus and all Talents affecting Xplodium Charge, except Ark Reaktor.

entries.description: Tracer can Basic Attack while moving, and after attacking 10 times she needs to reload over 0.8125 seconds. Tracer can manually reload early by activating Reload. Basic Attacks heal Tracer for 10% of the damage dealt.
entries.name: Reload

undoc.notes: Reload cannot be interrupted. Tracer's effective Attack Speed with Reload is 5.16 per second (Tracer's Basic Attack is available immediately when Reload finishes). Reload activates automatically when Tracer successfully Mounts or Hearths at a partially loaded clip.

entries.description: Dash toward an area. Stores up to 3 charges.
entries.name: Blink

entries.description: Deal 220 damage to a nearby enemy, prioritizing Heroes. Gain 5% Pulse Bomb charge when using Melee against an enemy, and 10% against Heroes.
entries.name: Melee

undoc.notes: Cannot be activated if there is no targetable enemy within the cast range. Cannot target enemies that are not visible. Stops Tracer from Basic Attacking for 0.375 seconds upon activation.

entries.description: After 1.25 seconds, Tracer returns to the position she was at 2 seconds prior to casting, refilling her ammo and removing all negative status effects from herself.
entries.name: Recall

undoc.notes: Can be cast while Rooted. Tracer is put in Stasis for 1.25 seconds before reappearing, removing most debuffs and making her untargetable and immune to damage. Teleport to end location takes place 0.1875 seconds after the Ability is cast. The destination of Recall is visible to enemy Heroes.

entries.description: Fire a short range bomb that can attach to an enemy if it hits them. The bomb explodes after 2 seconds, dealing 298 damage to them and 149 damage to other nearby enemies. This Ability is slowly charged over time by dealing damage to enemies with Basic Attacks and Melee.
entries.name: Pulse Bomb

undoc.notes: The Ability is available from the start of the game with 0% charge. Basic Attacks grant 0.75% charge each. This amount is unaffected by any damage modifiers on Tracer or her target. Enemies that walk over the center of the bomb while it's on the ground are considered primary targets and take the same damage as if the bomb were attached to them. Pulse Bomb will not attach to Structures, and will instead go through or land under them.

entries.description: Reduce the cooldown of Melee by 1 second and it gains an additional charge.
entries.name: One-Two Punch

entries.description: Recall leaves behind 6 bombs that deal 240 damage each to different targets. Heroes hit with these bombs are Slowed by 50% for 0.75 seconds and grant 7% Pulse Bomb charge.
entries.name: Parting Gift

undoc.notes: The bombs are spread evenly in 60 degree intervals, one of them launched toward the direction Tracer was facing when casting Recall. Enemies cannot get hit by any of the bombs more than once. Bombs expire after 1 second.

entries.description: Increase Basic Attack range by 10%. Basic Attacks against Heroes reveal a small area around them for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Tracer Rounds

undoc.notes: Reveal is not applied in an area. Only the Heroes directly afflicted by Tracer Rounds receive the Revealed debuff.

entries.description: Increase the healing from Basic Attacks by up to 200%, based on the amount of Health Tracer is missing.
entries.name: Leeching Rounds

undoc.notes: The bonus increases linearly based on the percentage of Health Tracer is missing. The bonus stacks multiplicatively with the lifesteal percentage.

entries.description: Successfully sticking a Pulse Bomb to an enemy Hero heals Tracer for 12% of her maximum Health over 1.5 seconds and refunds a charge of Blink.
entries.name: Pulse Generator

entries.description: Collecting a Regeneration Globe instantly heals Tracer for 15% of her maximum Health and reduces the cooldown of Healing Fountain by 15 seconds. Drinking from a Healing Fountain instantly heals for 20% of Tracer's maximum Health.
entries.name: Is That a Health Pack?!

undoc.notes: These effects are granted in addition to the basic benefits of Regeneration Globes and Healing Fountains.

entries.description: Reduces Reload time by 50%. This equals 20% more damage per second.
entries.name: Sleight of Hand

undoc.notes: Reload time is actually reduced by only 46%, or if accounting for Tracer's Basic Attack being available immediately after reloading with or without this Talent, effectively a 55% reduction. The DPS increase from this talent is actually 24% rather than the given tooltip's listed 20%. Increases Tracer's effective Attack Speed to roughly 6.40 per second.

entries.description: If an entire ammo magazine is unloaded on an enemy, the last bullet will deal 80 bonus damage. This is equal to 35% of the total magazine.
entries.name: Focus Fire

undoc.notes: Focus Fire doesn't activate if Tracer hasn't attacked the target for 2 seconds, even if the clip is the same. Bonus damage can be affected by attack and damage modifiers, like Untouchable and lifesteal. Bonus damage from Focus Fire is dealt in a separate instance from the final Basic Attack, meaning that it cannot benefit from Ricochet. Bonus damage activates if the target was hit 10 times in a row instead of firing the last bullet, meaning Chrono Trigger won't trigger Focus Fire on the last bullet continuously.

entries.description: Reactivate Reload within the last 50% of its cast time to increase Tracer's Basic Attack damage by 40% for that magazine.
entries.name: Locked and Loaded

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Tracer's Basic Attack damage. Can be activated while mounted without dismounting Tracer.

entries.description: Increases Pulse Bomb's radius by 50% and enemies hit are Slowed by 70% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Sticky Bomb

entries.description: Pulse Bomb deals an additional 6% of maximum Health as damage to Heroes.
entries.name: Quantum Spike

undoc.notes: Bonus damage from Quantum Spike is dealt in a separate instance.

entries.description: Increases Pulse Bomb's range and charge rate from Basic Attacks against Heroes by 100%.
entries.name: Pulse Rounds

entries.description: After Blinking, gain 20% Movement Speed for 1.25 seconds.
entries.name: Untouchable

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Tracer's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: When Blink has no charges remaining, its cooldown charges 100% faster. Casting Blink grants Tracer a Shield equal to 6% of her maximum Health for 3 seconds. This Shield stacks up to 3 times.
entries.name: Jumper

entries.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Recall by 0.1875 seconds. When Tracer arrives at her Recall location she becomes Unkillable for 1 second and nearby enemies take 175 damage and are knocked back.
entries.name: Telefrag

undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Status effect, Cooldown reduction

entries.description: Increases the radius of Melee by 30%, and causes it to damage all enemies in range.
entries.name: Bullet Spray

undoc.notes: Additional enemies hit do not generate Pulse Bomb charge.

entries.description: Heroes hit by Melee have their Armor reduced by 15 for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Heavy Handed

undoc.notes: Armor reduction is applied after the damage from Melee and any instantly detonated Pulse Bombs through Get Stuffed have been dealt. Does not stack with itself or other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Tracer's Basic Attacks have a 60% chance to hit another nearby enemy, prioritizing Heroes.
entries.name: Ricochet

undoc.notes: The chance to trigger and selection of targets is random. Ricocheting bullets can only bounce to visible targets. Ricocheting bullets interact with Tracer Rounds and Telefrag talents and benefit from damage modifier and lifesteal effects. Ricocheting bullets do not generate additional Pulse Bomb charge. Will not bounce to unaggroed Mercenaries.

entries.description: Casting Blink causes Basic Attacks to not consume ammo for 1 second.
entries.name: Chrono Triggers

entries.description: Increases Melee's Pulse Bomb charge against Heroes from 10% to 20%. Hitting an enemy with Melee who is stuck with a Pulse Bomb causes the bomb to instantly explode and knock the target away.
entries.name: Get Stuffed!

undoc.notes: If there are multiple Tracers on a team, any Tracer with the Get Stuffed! Talent can cause the knockback effect on a target affected by any Tracer's Pulse Bomb. The instant explosion effect, however, cannot be triggered in this way. Knockback can still be activated even if melee was applied after the Pulse Bomb damage for a very short moment.

entries.description: Recall heals Tracer equal to the amount of Health she lost during that time.
entries.name: Total Recall

undoc.notes: Tracer is healed after the Stasis from Recall ends for the difference between the Health she had 3.25 seconds earlier (i.e. at the time being "rewound to") and the Health she currently has.

entries.description: Successfully sticking a Pulse Bomb to an enemy Hero also drops another one at their feet that deals 50% damage and explodes slightly earlier.
entries.name: Composition B

undoc.notes: Secondary bomb also has the effects of Pulse Bomb 's Heroic upgrade. Secondary bomb has its own base damage values (which are half of the originals), causing the damage reduction to stack multiplicatively with offensive damage modifiers. The bonus damage from Quantum Spike is also exceptionally halved in the secondary bomb.

entries.description: Activate to have Basic Attacks against Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 2.5% of their maximum Health. Lasts 3 seconds.
entries.name: Minigun

undoc.notes: Minigun duration starts at the first Basic Attack after activating the trait. Cooldown starts when the duration ends. Bonus damage from Minigun is dealt in a separate instance.

entries.description: Deal 552 damage to the target and 276 damage to nearby targets over 4 seconds. Reactivate to select a new target or direction. Can move and use Abilities while channeling.
entries.name: Overkill

undoc.notes: Tychus can cancel Overkill by starting to Mount or casting Commandeer Odin. If the main target of Overkill dies while it's active, it will automatically retarget the closest enemy within its radius. If the main target is simply out of range, Overkill remains fixated to it until a new target is issued by reactivating the Ability.

entries.description: Lob a grenade that deals 256 damage, knocking enemies away.
entries.name: Frag Grenade

entries.description: Dash a short distance.
entries.name: Run and Gun

entries.description: Call down an Odin to pilot. The Odin deals increased Damage, has 100% increased Basic Attack range, and uses different Abilities. The Odin has 25 Armor and lasts 23 seconds.
entries.name: Commandeer Odin

undoc.notes: Tychus is unable to act for 2.75 seconds while entering the Odin. During this time Tychus is Unstoppable. This delay is included in its duration. Activating Commandeer Odin immediately ends Minigun and Overkill. Cooldown starts immediately when the Ability is cast. Tychus cannot use Minigun and does not benefit from Sizzling Attacks while piloting Odin.
undoc.type: Transformation, Defensive damage modifier, Status effect

entries.description: Fire the Odin's cannons in a straight line, dealing 196 damage to everything in the path.
entries.name: Commandeer Odin - Annihilate

undoc.notes: 1) Annihilate 's search area is a line of 7 circles with 1.8 radius, which centers are 2.5 units apart. Impact on each sub-area is delayed by 0.1 seconds from the previous, but a target cannot be hit more than once per cast. Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack. Only available while Commandeer Odin is active.

entries.description: Launches a volley of missiles at target area, dealing 132 damage and Slowing enemy Movement Speed by 30% for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Commandeer Odin - Ragnarok Missiles

undoc.notes: Only available while Commandeer Odin is active.

entries.description: Dash in target direction.
entries.name: Commandeer Odin - Thrusters

undoc.notes: Only available while Commandeer Odin is active.

entries.description: Call down a Laser Drill to attack nearby enemies, dealing 142 damage every second. Reactivate to assign a new target. Lasts 22 seconds. Drakken Laser Drill
entries.name: Drakken Laser Drill

undoc.notes: Drakken Laser Drill has a 2 second spawn delay. This delay is included in its duration. Cooldown starts immediately when the Ability is cast. Laser Drill 's attack is a channeled beam that deals Spell Damage.

entries.description: Increases Frag Grenade's damage by 10% and its range by 45%.
entries.name: Quarterback

entries.description: Increase the range of Run and Gun by 50%. When cast, increase Tychus's Movement Speed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Dash

entries.description: Increase Tychus's Basic Attack range by 1.
entries.name: Press the Advantage

entries.description: Increase the damage bonus to 4% while enemy Heroes are above 30% Health, but Minigun no longer has any effect on targets below 30%.
entries.name: The Bigger They Are...

entries.description: Increase Tychus's Attack Speed by 10%.
entries.name: Master Assassin

undoc.notes: Also affects Tychus's Attack Speed during Commandeer Odin.

entries.description: Enemies hit by Frag Grenade take an additional 75 damage over 3 seconds. This damage is increased by 100% against Minions, Mercenaries and Monsters.
entries.name: Melting Point

undoc.notes: Does not benefit from the damage bonus from Quarterback. Bonus damage to Minions, Mercenaries and Monsters stacks additively with offensive damage modifiers.

entries.description: Reduce the cooldown of Minigun by 4 seconds. Reduce the cooldown by an additional 4 seconds after using Run and Gun.
entries.name: Combat Tactician

undoc.notes: Casting Run and Gun while Minigun is still active has no effect on the cooldown.

entries.description: Being Stunned or Rooted grants 30 Armor for 3 seconds, reducing damage taken by 30%.
entries.name: Relentless Soldier

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Call down an Odin to pilot. The Odin deals increased Damage, has 100% increased Basic Attack range, and uses different Abilities. The Odin has 25 Armor and lasts 23 seconds.
entries.name: Commandeer Odin

entries.description: Call down a Laser Drill to attack nearby enemies, dealing 142 damage every second. Reactivate to assign a new target. Lasts 22 seconds.
entries.name: Drakken Laser Drill

entries.description: Overkill Slows enemy Movement Speed by 25% and its range is increased by 25%.
entries.name: Spray 'n' Pray

entries.description: Minigun heals Tychus for 100% of the bonus damage dealt after it expires.
entries.name: That's the Stuff!

entries.description: Activate to gain 75 Spell Armor for 4 seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by 75%.
entries.name: Neosteel Coating

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Each time Overkill hits an enemy, its damage against them is increased by 15%, stacking up to 60% bonus damage.
entries.name: Armor Piercing Rounds

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Overkill 's damage.

entries.description: Frag Grenade deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to 5% of their maximum Health. Each enemy Hero hit by Frag Grenade reduces its cooldown by 1 second.
entries.name: Titan Grenade

undoc.notes: Bonus damage is dealt in a separate instance.

entries.description: Basic Attacks deal bonus damage to Heroes equal to 1% of their maximum Health. Stacks with Minigun.
entries.name: Sizzlin' Attacks

undoc.notes: Bonus damage is dealt in a separate instance from both Tychus's Basic Attacks and Minigun. Commandeer Odin does not benefit from Sizzlin' Attacks.

entries.description: Odin lasts 50% longer and Ragnarok Missiles also launches a Nuclear Missile, which lands 2.5 seconds later, dealing 319 damage in its area.
entries.name: Big Red Button

undoc.notes: Nuclear Missile is launched at the same location as Ragnarok Missiles and has the same radius. Nuclear Missile does not Slow.

entries.description: Increases the range of the Drakken Laser Drill by 50%. Deals increased damage the longer it remains on a single target, up to 100% extra damage.
entries.name: Focusing Diodes

undoc.notes: Damage increases in 20% increments every second Laser Drill has been locked to a target, up to 5 times. Changing target instantly resets the bonus. Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Drakken Laser Drill 's damage.

entries.description: Reduce Overkill's cooldown by 5 seconds. While Channeling Overkill, Tychus gains 40 Armor.
entries.name: Can Do This All Day

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Run and Gun and Odin's Thrusters gain 2 additional charges and reduces Run and Gun's Mana cost from 50 to 25. After using Run and Gun, increase Tychus's Basic Attack range by 1.5 for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Bob and Weave

undoc.notes: Does not affect Tychus's attack range during Commandeer Odin.

entries.description: Upon dying, become Invulnerable and gain 20% Movement Speed for 4 seconds. Upon expiration, explode, dealing 450 damage and reducing Tyrael's death timer by 10% per enemy Hero hit. Archangel's Wrath reduces nearby enemy Heroes' damage by 50% while active and for 3 seconds after it expires.
entries.name: Archangel's Wrath

undoc.notes: Tyrael ignores collision until he explodes. During Archangel's Wrath, Tyrael can move through pathing blockers and enemy Gates, but not through other unpassable terrain. Damage debuff is removed immediately when the target leaves the radius of Archangel's Wrath. Duration extension requires being hit by the explosion upon expiration. Damage debuff stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting the target Hero's damage output.
undoc.type: Spell Damage / Offensive damage modifier / Special death state, Status effect

entries.description: Throw El'druin to the target area, dealing 110 damage to nearby enemies and Slowing them by 30% for 2.5 seconds. Reactivate within 5 seconds to teleport Tyrael to El'druin and Slow nearby enemies again.
entries.name: El'druin's Might

undoc.notes: El'druin's Might cannot be cast on unpathable terrain. Teleport on secondary cast has no range limit. Reactivation has an initial 0.5 second cooldown, and it cannot be used before the thrown sword has reached the target location. All reactivations of El'druin's Might are considered Basic Ability casts. Cooldown starts when the Ability is activated for the first time.
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Movement: Teleport

entries.description: Shields Tyrael for 350 damage and nearby allies for 40% as much for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Righteousness

undoc.notes: Damage dealt to allies shielded by Righteousness is shown in small pop-up numbers. Regardless of the real damage type of the attack, these numbers appear in orange, normally reserved for Physical Damage.

entries.description: Rake target area for 150 damage. For the next 3 seconds, allies moving through the targeted area gain 25% Movement Speed for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Smite

undoc.notes: 1) Area consists of 5 overlapping circles with 1.5 radius in a wide V-shape. The ground effect lingers for 3 seconds, applying the buff to allies in the area every 0.25 seconds. Multiple instances of the buff only refresh the duration.

entries.description: After 0.75 seconds, charge an enemy Hero, dealing 150 damage and Stunning them for 1.5 seconds. Nearby enemies are knocked away and take 75 damage.
entries.name: Judgment

undoc.notes: Interrupting Tyrael during the cast puts the Ability on a 10-second cooldown. Upon activation Tyrael gains vision of the target for the duration of the Ability. The cast is also interrupted if the target becomes untargetable, gains Stealth or moves farther than 5 units past its maximum cast range during the windup. Charging Tyrael can only be disjointed if the target dies, is removed from the plane (certain Stasis effects) or instantly teleports farther than 20 units from its previous location. When disjointed, the charge expires upon reaching the target's location before the event. Otherwise, the charge will keep redirecting to the target unit. Judgment always applies its area effects upon reaching the end location, regardless of being able to hit its original target. Tyrael is Unstoppable while charging.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Channeled cast (stationary), Knockback, Splash, Stun, Unstoppable
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Movement: Launch, Status effect

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds create a field of holy energy that makes allied Heroes Invulnerable. Lasts 3 seconds.
entries.name: Sanctification

undoc.notes: Interrupting Sanctification during its cast puts the Ability on a 10-second cooldown.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Channeled cast (stationary), Invulnerable

entries.description: Increase the Shield amount Tyrael gains from Righteousness by 35% and heal Tyrael for 150 Health if his Shield is destroyed. Does not increase the Shield amount gained by allies.
entries.name: Salvation

undoc.notes: Healing does not trigger if the Shield expires without breaking.

entries.description: Increase the Shield applied to allies by Righteousness to 80% of the Shield gained by Tyrael.
entries.name: Justice for All

entries.description: Dealing damage to a Hero heals Tyrael for 20 over 5 seconds. Dealing damage resets this timer, and the heal amount stacks up to 10 times.
entries.name: Ardent Restoration

undoc.notes: Quest healing bonus stacks additively with healing dealt modifiers that can affect healing from Ardent Restoration.

entries.description: Gain 25 Armor while El'druin's Might is active, and for 3 seconds after teleporting.
entries.name: Stalwart Angel

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself or other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: When Tyrael's Shield from Righteousness expires or is destroyed, it deals 190 damage to nearby Heroes and Summons. For each enemy Hero damaged by Reciprocate or El'druin's Might, Tyrael heals for 3% of his maximum Health.
entries.name: Reciprocate

entries.description: If Smite hits an enemy, Tyrael's Basic Attacks within the next 4 seconds heal for 70% of the damage dealt.
entries.name: Divine Vigor

entries.description: Both Tyrael and El'druin deal 15 damage per second to nearby enemies. Teleporting increases this damage from Tyrael by 125% for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Burning Halo

undoc.notes: 1) Extended by Tyrael's unit radius. Enemies can take damage from both Tyrael's and El'druin's damage auras at the same time. When Sword of Justice is picked, the first reactivation increases the damage around both Tyrael and El'druin. The second reactivation does not further increase the damage, but only reapplies or refreshes the effect. Does not affect unaggroed neutral Mercenaries. Does not draw tower aggro when damaging enemy Heroes under their Structures. Damage from Burning Halo is unaffected by external offensive damage modifiers and lifesteal effects. Disabled while Mounted, Stealthed or in Stasis.

entries.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Smite increases Tyrael's Basic Attack damage by 60% for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Purge Evil

undoc.notes: Subsequent applications refresh the duration. Stacks from previous casts carry over. Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Tyrael's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Smite grants 20% more Movement Speed and also grants 25% Attack Speed for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Swift Retribution

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself. Subsequent applications refresh the duration. Movement Speed bonus stacks additively with baseline bonus, but not with other sources of Movement Speed. Attack Speed stacks additively with other effects that can affect the target's Attack Speed.

entries.description: After 0.75 seconds, charge an enemy Hero, dealing 150 damage and Stunning them for 1.5 seconds. Nearby enemies are knocked away and take 75 damage.
entries.name: Judgment

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds create a field of holy energy that makes allied Heroes Invulnerable. Lasts 3 seconds.
entries.name: Sanctification

entries.description: Upon teleporting using El'druin's Might, El'druin swaps places with Tyrael, and El'druin's Might can be reactivated to teleport an additional time.
entries.name: Sword of Justice

entries.description: Create a ring for 3 seconds that blocks enemies from entering the area teleported to using El'druin's Might.
entries.name: Holy Ground

undoc.notes: Displacement from the creation of Holy Ground doesn't apply Daze.

entries.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Smite reduces the cooldown of Righteousness by 1 second. Each allied Hero Shielded by Righteousness increases the damage of the next Smite by 35%.
entries.name: Law and Order

entries.description: El'druin's Might's Slow is increased to 65% for 1 second, decaying to 30% over the remaining duration.
entries.name: Bound by Law

entries.description: Tyrael's Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of El'druin's Might by 2 seconds.
entries.name: Horadric Reforging

entries.description: While El'druin's Might is active, and for 2 seconds after teleporting, Smite's cooldown recharges 125% faster.
entries.name: Smite the Wicked

entries.description: Increases the cast range of Judgment by 50%, and reduces the cooldown by 40 seconds.
entries.name: Angel of Justice

entries.description: Increases the duration of Sanctification by 1 second and increases the damage of allies inside by 25%.
entries.name: Holy Arena

undoc.notes: Summons themselves must be inside Sanctification to gain the damage buff from Holy Arena. Summons are still unaffected by the baseline benefits of Sanctification. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting the target's damage output.

entries.description: Using a Basic Ability grants 50% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Seal of El'druin

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself. Subsequent applications refresh the duration. Stacks additively with other effects that can affect Tyrael's Attack Speed.

entries.description: Activate to gain 50 Armor for 3 seconds. Each time Tyrael damages an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack or Basic Ability, increase the duration of this Armor bonus by 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Defense of the Angels

undoc.notes: Cooldown starts when the Ability is activated.

entries.description: After 1.5 seconds, gain the effects of Archangel's Wrath without dying. Cooldown is reduced by 10% for each enemy Hero hit by the explosion.
entries.name: Aspect of Justice

undoc.props: Area of Effect, Movement Speed, Invulnerability
undoc.type: Spell Damage / Status effect / Offensive damage modifier

entries.description: Reveal a non-Structure enemy and reduce their Armor by 15 for 4 seconds. Tyrande's Basic Attacks heal her for 1% of her maximum Health, doubled against targets with Hunter's Mark.
entries.name: Hunter's Mark

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.
undoc.type: Defensive damage modifier, Status effect / Healing

entries.description: Heal an ally Hero for 270. Light of Elune's cooldown is reduced by 1.5 seconds every time Tyrande hits an enemy with a Basic Attack or damages an enemy Hero. Stores up to 2 charges. Cooldown replenishes all charges at the same time.
entries.name: Light of Elune

undoc.notes: Basic Attacks trigger cooldown reduction from both Heroic and non-Heroic targets. Ability Damage only triggers cooldown reduction from Heroes. Casting Light of Elune sets the cooldown of Tyrande's next Basic Attack to 0.5 seconds, potentially causing it to come out slightly faster or slower depending on timing.

entries.description: Send an Owl across the battleground revealing its path, dealing 120 damage to the first Hero hit, and revealing them for 5 seconds. If a Hero revealed by Sentinel dies, refresh its cooldown.
entries.name: Sentinel

undoc.notes: As Sentinel travels, it grants vision in a 7.0 x 7.0 area (increased by its hitbox) around the projectile that lasts for 4 seconds. Heroes hit by Sentinel grant vision in 8 radius around them for the duration of the revealed debuff.

entries.description: After 0.75 seconds, deal 150 damage and Stun enemies in the target area for 0.75 seconds. Restores 25 Mana per enemy hit.
entries.name: Lunar Flare

entries.description: Grant all allied Heroes Stealth for 10 seconds and heal them for 380 Health over 10 seconds. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.
entries.name: Shadowstalk

undoc.notes: Heal over time persists even after Stealth has been broken.

entries.description: Deal 92 damage per second and Slow enemies by 20% in an area. Lasts 6 seconds.
entries.name: Starfall

undoc.notes: Casting Starfall sets the cooldown of Tyrande's next Basic Attack to 0.5 seconds, potentially causing it to come out slightly faster or slower depending on timing.

entries.description: Sentinel width is increased by 25% and deals up to 250% more damage based on distance traveled.
entries.name: Ranger

undoc.notes: Ranger increases Sentinel 's damage by 10% for every 2 units traveled, reaching the maximum bonus at 50 units. Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Sentinel 's damage.

entries.description: Basic Attacks decrease the cooldown of Light of Elune by an additional 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Moonlit Arrows

entries.description: Activate to grant Tyrande and nearby allied Heroes 40% increased Attack Damage for 5 seconds, and to reset the cooldown of Hunter's Mark.
entries.name: Trueshot Aura

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Tyrande's or her allies' Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: If Light of Elune's second charge is cast on a different target from the first, it heals for 80% more.
entries.name: Everlasting Light

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with healing modifiers that affect Light of Elune 's healing output and multiplicatively with modifiers that affect healing received by the target.

entries.description: Tyrande's Basic Attacks against Marked targets heal other allied Heroes near the enemy for 4% of their maximum Health.
entries.name: Mark of Mending

undoc.notes: Healing is based on the receiving ally's Health.

entries.description: Activate to make Tyrande's Basic Attacks heal target allied Hero for 175% of the damage dealt. Lasts for 8 seconds.
entries.name: Elune's Chosen

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Lunar Flare grants 20% Spell Power for 10 seconds.
entries.name: Elune's Gift

entries.description: Light of Elune grants the target 10 Spell Armor for 2 seconds. This effect stacks up to 2 times.
entries.name: Kaldorei Resistance

entries.description: Increase the cast range and duration of Hunter's Mark by 25%. Tyrande's Basic Attacks against targets with Hunter's Mark splash to nearby enemy Heroes.
entries.name: Huntress's Fury

undoc.notes: Splashing attacks grant cooldown reduction for Light of Elune. Splashing attacks do not interact with any of Tyrande's talents affecting her Basic Attacks, except the damage increase from Trueshot Aura.

entries.description: Grant all allied Heroes Stealth for 10 seconds and heal them for 380 Health over 10 seconds. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.
entries.name: Shadowstalk

entries.description: Deal 92 damage per second and Slow enemies by 20% in an area. Lasts 6 seconds.
entries.name: Starfall

entries.description: Gain 5% Movement Speed. Light of Elune increases the target's Movement Speed by 20% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Quickening Blessing

entries.description: Sentinel Slows enemies hit by 35% and reduces their damage dealt by 35% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Harsh Moonlight

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect the target's damage output.

entries.description: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Hunter's Mark by 2 seconds. Basic Attacks against marked targets reduce the cooldown of Lunar Flare by 4 seconds.
entries.name: Ranger's Mark

entries.description: Light of Elune removes Stuns, Silences, and Slows from its target.
entries.name: Celestial Attunement

entries.description: Reduce Sentinel's cooldown by 3 seconds. Heroes hit by Sentinel take bonus damage equal to 6% of their maximum Health.
entries.name: Empower

entries.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant a stacking 12% increased Attack Damage bonus for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Darnassian Archery

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers affecting Tyrande's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Shadowstalk reveals all enemy Heroes for 10 seconds and heals for 75% more.
entries.name: Eyes of the Huntress

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with healing modifiers that affect Shadowstalk 's healing output and multiplicatively with modifiers that affect healing received by the target.

entries.description: Increase the Slow of Starfall to 60% and cause it to apply Hunter's Mark to enemy Heroes while inside its area of effect.
entries.name: Celestial Wrath

entries.description: Sentinel gains a 2nd charge.
entries.name: Commander of Sentinels

entries.description: Increase Attack Speed by 20%. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce their damage dealt by 8% for 3 seconds. This effect stacks up to 5 times.
entries.name: Iceblade Arrows

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers affecting the target's damage output.

entries.description: Uther's Basic Abilities grant 25 Armor to allied Heroes, and 15 to Uther, for 2 seconds. Eternal Vanguard Upon dying, Uther becomes an Invulnerable spirit for up to 8 seconds. While in spirit form, Uther can heal allies with Flash of Light.
entries.name: Devotion

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack. / Eternal Vanguard can pass through enemy gates.
undoc.type: Defensive damage modifier / Special death state

entries.description: Heal target ally for 362 Health. When used on a target other than Uther, also heal Uther for 181 Health.
entries.name: Holy Light

entries.description: Heal an ally for 242 Health.
entries.name: Flash of Light

undoc.notes: Flash of Light applies Devotion. Flash of Light is a separate ability from Holy Light and thus does not interact with any talents affecting it.

entries.description: Heal allied Heroes and Minions in a line for 194 Health, dealing 177 damage to enemies.
entries.name: Holy Radiance

undoc.notes: Also hits Uther.

entries.description: Deal 109 damage and Stun the target for 1 second.
entries.name: Hammer of Justice

undoc.notes: Cast is interrupted without putting the ability on cooldown if the target moves more than 1.5 units past its maximum range. Unstoppable enemies can be targeted, but they will only be damaged upon being hit by Hammer of Justice.

entries.description: Make an allied Hero Invulnerable and increase their Movement Speed by 20% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Divine Shield

entries.description: Deal 170 damage and Stun nearby enemies for 1.75 seconds.
entries.name: Divine Storm

entries.description: Damaging or healing Heroes with Holy Radiance refunds 5 Mana and reduces its cooldown by 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Wave of Light

entries.description: Basic Attacks restore 1.5% of Uther's maximum Mana.
entries.name: Hammer of the Lightbringer

entries.description: Holy Light can be used on an enemy to do 40% of its healing amount as damage. When used this way, Uther receives its self-healing benefits, its cooldown is reduced by 6 seconds, and it refunds 45 Mana.
entries.name: Holy Shock

undoc.notes: Benefits from all talents affecting Holy Light.

entries.description: Hammer of Justice increases Uther's Movement Speed by 25% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Pursuit of Justice

entries.description: Deal 13 damage per second to nearby enemies. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes increase this damage by 20% for 3 seconds. This can stack up to 3 times.
entries.name: Holy Fire

undoc.notes: Holy Fire is inactive while Mounted. Holy Fire does not affect unaggroed neutral Mercenaries. Damaging enemy Heroes with Holy Fire does not trigger tower aggro. Damage from Holy Fire is unaffected by external offensive damage modifiers and lifesteal effects. Damage bonus from itself stacks additively.

entries.description: Being Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced grants Uther 90 Mana and causes Holy Light's cooldown to recharge 200% faster for 6 seconds. This effect has a 20 second cooldown.
entries.name: Armor of Faith

entries.description: Healing a Hero with a Basic Ability that is Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced grants them 50 Armor for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Guardian of Ancient Kings

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Activate to make target ally Unstoppable for 1 second. Cannot be cast on Uther. Basic Attacks reduce Hand of Protection's cooldown by 5 seconds.
entries.name: Hand of Protection

entries.description: Make an allied Hero Invulnerable and increase their Movement Speed by 20% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Divine Shield

entries.description: Deal 170 damage and stun nearby enemies for 1.75 seconds.
entries.name: Divine Storm

entries.description: For the next 5 seconds after using Holy Light, Uther's Basic Attacks heal him and nearby allies for 15% of the total amount healed by Holy Light.
entries.name: Blessed Champion

undoc.notes: Healing from Blessed Champion does not apply Devotion. The healing amount is calculated from the sum of Holy Light 's allied and self-heal after modifications (bonuses and reductions). Healing past target's maximum Health does not count toward this amount.

entries.description: When used against Heroes, Hammer of Justice reduces the target's Movement Speed and damage dealt by 25% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Well Met

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other damage modifiers affecting the target's damage output.

entries.description: Every 30 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 50%. Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
entries.name: Spell Shield

entries.description: Uther receives 125% more self-healing when targeting others with Holy Light. This bonus is increased to 250% while he is below 50% Health.
entries.name: Beacon of Light

undoc.notes: Beacon of Light will trigger whenever Uther himself is not the primary target of the cast, meaning that damaging enemies with Holy Shock also grants increased self-healing. Stacks additively with healing modifiers that affect self-healing dealt by Holy Light and multiplicatively with modifiers that affect healing received by Uther.

entries.description: Increase the damage and healing of Holy Radiance by 10%. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes cause Uther’s next cast of Holy Radiance to have its damage and healing increased by an additional 10%, stacking up to 7 times.
entries.name: Tyr's Deliverance

undoc.notes: Bonus from Basic Attack stacks up to 7 times, making the maximum bonus from the talent 80% with the base percentage. Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Holy Radiance 's damage. Healing bonus stacks additively with other healing dealt modifiers that can affect healing from Holy Radiance.
undoc.type: Healing dealt modifier, Offensive damage modifier

entries.description: Activate to reduce the Mana cost of your next Basic Ability by 50 and its cooldown by 10 seconds.
entries.name: Benediction

undoc.notes: Cooldown starts after the ability is triggered by casting a Basic Ability.

entries.description: Divine Shield is also applied to all nearby allied Heroes and lasts 1 second longer.
entries.name: Bulwark of Light

entries.description: Divine Storm's radius is increased by 50% and its cooldown is reduced by 40 seconds.
entries.name: Divine Hurricane

entries.description: After Eternal Devotion ends, Uther revives at the spirit's location with 50% of his maximum Health. This effect has a 180 second cooldown.
entries.name: Redemption

undoc.notes: If Redemption goes off cooldown when Uther is in Eternal Vanguard, it will trigger.

entries.description: Increase Devotion's Armor to 50 and its duration by 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Divine Protection

undoc.notes: Affects Armor bonuses for both allied Heroes and Uther.

entries.description: Vanish from sight, becoming Stealthed, gaining 20% Movement Speed and access to new Abilities. For the first second, Valeera is Unrevealable and can pass through other units. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible. After being Stealthed for 3 seconds, Ambush, Cheap Shot and Garrote have 100% increased range and cause Valeera to teleport to the target when used.
entries.name: Vanish

undoc.notes: Valeera can't use Basic Attacks while Stealthed by Vanish. Vanish can be manually cancelled to unstealth Valeera by reactivating the Ability. Valeera immediately loses access to Stealth Ablities once she is unstealthed. Teleporting with Stealth Abilities places Valeera behind her target.

entries.description: Dash forward, hitting all enemies in a line for 110 damage. If Sinister Stike hits a Hero, Valeera stops dashing immediately and the cooldown is reduced to 1 second. . Heavily damage an enemy and reduce their Armor.
entries.name: Sinister Strike

entries.description: Ambush an enemy, dealing 130 damage and reducing their Armor by 10 for 5 seconds. . Dash foward, damaging enemies.
entries.name: Ambush

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Deal 130 damage in an area around Valeera. per enemy Hero hit. Stun, Blind, and damage an enemy.
entries.name: Blade Flurry

entries.description: Deal 30 damage to an enemy, Stun them for 0.75 seconds, and Blind them for 2 seconds once Cheap Shot's Stun expires. . Deal damage in an area around Valeera.
entries.name: Cheap Shot

entries.description: Consumes all . Eviscerate an enemy, dealing increased damage per . : 85 : 170 : 255 Silence and damage an enemy over time.
entries.name: Eviscerate

undoc.notes: Eviscerate is unavailable if Valeera does not have any Combo Points.

entries.description: Deal 20 damage to an enemy and an additional 140 damage over 7 seconds, and Silence them for 2.5 seconds. . High damage finishing move.
entries.name: Garrote

entries.description: Create a cloud of smoke. While in the smoke, Valeera is Unrevealable, can pass through other units, and gains 60 Armor, reducing damage taken by 60%. Valeera can continue to attack and use Abilities without being revealed. Lasts 5 seconds. Using this Ability does not break Stealth.
entries.name: Smoke Bomb

undoc.notes: Valeera can use Smoke Bomb's Unrevealable effect while Stealthed to prevent her Stealth from being broken by incoming enemy damage. When Valeera attacks inside the Smoke Bomb, a particle effect plays to notify players that she's still inside it. Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Valeera is enveloped in a Cloak of Shadows, which immediately removes all damage over time effects from her. For 1.5 seconds, she becomes Unstoppable and gains 75 Spell Armor, reducing Ability Damage taken by 75%. Using this Ability does not break Stealth.
entries.name: Cloak of Shadows

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Spell Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Valeera regenerates an additional 3 Energy per second.
entries.name: Vigor

entries.description: After teleporting with Ambush, Cheap Shot, or Garrote regenerate 10 Energy per second for 5 seconds.
entries.name: Subtlety

entries.description: Each Combo Point spent grants 75 Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing its damage by 75%. Stores up to 3 charges.
entries.name: Combat Readiness

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself or other positive Physical Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Activate to make Valeera's next damaging Ability and subsequent Abilities within 4 seconds Slow targets by 20% for 4 seconds. Activating Crippling Poison does not break Stealth.
entries.name: Crippling Poison

undoc.notes: Cooldown starts once the effect is triggered by damaging an enemy with an Ability. Structures are not affected by the Slow, but damaging them still triggers the effect.

entries.description: Reduces the Energy cost of Sinister Strike by 10.
entries.name: Relentless Strikes

entries.description: Valeera's Basic Attacks deal 40% additional damage to enemies affected by Garrote.
entries.name: Hemorrhage

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other damage modifiers affecting Valeera's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Ambush, Cheap Shot, and Garrote grant 15% Movement Speed for 3 seconds and award 2 Combo Points.
entries.name: Initiative

entries.description: Activate to make Valeera's next damaging Ability and subsequent Abilities within 4 seconds reduce enemy healing received by 50% for 4 seconds. Activating Wound Poison does not break Stealth.
entries.name: Wound Poison

undoc.notes: Cooldown starts once the effect is triggered by damaging an enemy with an Ability. Structures are not affected by the healing reduction, but damaging them still triggers the effect.

entries.description: Sinister Strike now hits with both blades, dealing 125% additional damage, but its range is reduced by 1.
entries.name: Mutilate

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other damage modifiers affecting Sinister Strike 's damage output.

entries.description: Eviscerating an enemy with 3 Combo Points grants 150% Attack Speed. Lasts 3 seconds or 3 Basic Attacks. Basic Attacks restore 2 Energy.
entries.name: Slice and Dice

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other effects that can affect Valeera's Attack Speed.

entries.description: Create a cloud of smoke. While in the smoke, Valeera is Unreavealable, can pass through other units, and gains 60 Armor, reducing damage taken by 60%. Valeera can continue to attack and use Abilities without being revealed. Lasts 5 seconds. Using this Ability does not break Vanish.
entries.name: Smoke Bomb

entries.description: Valeera is enveloped in a Cloak of Shadows, which immediately removes all damage over time effects from her. For 1 second, she becomes Unstoppable and gains 75 Spell Armor, reducing Ability Damage taken by 75%. Using this Ability does not break Vanish.
entries.name: Cloak of Shadows

entries.description: Teleporting with Ambush reduces the cooldown of Vanish by 4 seconds.
entries.name: Death From Above

entries.description: Increase the duration of Cheap Shot's Blind by 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Blind

entries.description: Using Garrote on a Hero reduces their Spell Power by 40% for 6 seconds.
entries.name: Strangle

undoc.notes: Spell Power reduction from Strangle stacks additively with other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage modifiers and healing dealt modifiers affecting the target Hero.
undoc.type: Healing dealt modifier, Offensive damage modifier

entries.description: Sinister Strike deals 50% additional damage and generates an additional Combo Point when used against Silenced, Rooted, or Stunned enemy Heroes.
entries.name: Seal Fate

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other damage modifiers affecting Sinister Strike 's damage output.

entries.description: Ambush deals 50% additional damage and reduces the target's Armor by an additional 10 if no other enemy Heroes are within 4 range of the victim.
entries.name: Assassinate

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other damage modifiers affecting damage taken from Ambush. Armor reduction stacks additively with Ambush 's base Armor reduction, but not with other negative Armor effects.

entries.description: Activate to instantly restore 100 Energy. Activating Thistle Tea does not break Vanish.
entries.name: Thistle Tea

entries.description: While in the Smoke Bomb, Valeera regenerates an additional 40 Energy per second.
entries.name: Adrenaline Rush

entries.description: Whenever Valeera uses Vanish, she also gains Cloak of Shadows.
entries.name: Enveloping Shadows

entries.description: Increase Garrote's damage over time by 100%. Valeera's Basic Attacks refresh the duration of Garrote.
entries.name: Rupture

undoc.notes: Basic Attacks refresh Garrote even if they miss due to Valeera being Blinded or the target Evading. Duration refreshing only affects Garrote 's Damage over Time effect.

entries.description: Increase Valeera's Movement Speed while Vanished by an additional 20%.
entries.name: Elusiveness

entries.description: Every 18 seconds, Varian's next Basic Attack deals 125 bonus Spell Damage. Basic Attacks reduce this cooldown by 3 seconds.
entries.name: Heroic Strike

undoc.notes: This damage will also miss and set the Trait back on full cooldown if a Basic Attack misses while this effect is available (because of Varian being Blinded or the target Evading).

entries.description: Create a shockwave that travels in a straight line, dealing 150 damage and Slowing enemies by 35% for 1.5 seconds. Each enemy hit heals Varian for 35, increased to 140 against Heroes.
entries.name: Lion's Fang

entries.description: Parry all incoming Basic Attacks for 1.25 seconds, reducing their damage by 100%. Stores up to 2 charges.
entries.name: Parry

entries.description: Charge to the target enemy, dealing 50 damage and Slowing them by 75% for 1 second.
entries.name: Charge

undoc.notes: If there is an unpathable area between Varian and the target, Varian will try to dash around it until Charge reaches its maximum duration of 1.5 seconds.
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Movement: Dash

entries.description: Silence a target Hero and force them to attack Varian for 1.25 seconds. Maximum Health and Health Regeneration increased by 40%.
entries.name: Taunt

undoc.notes: The effect ends immediately if Varian dies. Cannot be cast on enemy Heroes who are immune to crowd control.

entries.description: Smash a target enemy, dealing 185 damage and lowering their Armor by 25 for 3 seconds, causing them to take 25% increased damage. Base Attack Damage increased by 100%. Maximum Health and Health Regeneration reduced by 10%.
entries.name: Colossus Smash

undoc.notes: Cast is interrupted if the distance between Varian and the target becomes greater than 12 units or the target instantly teleports farther than 12 units from their previous location. Armor reduction does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack. Attack damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can attack Varian's Attack Damage.
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Defensive damage modifier / Movement: Launch, Offensive damage modifier, Health modifier

entries.description: Basic Attacks reduce Heroic Strike's cooldown by 9 seconds, and increase Varian's Movement Speed by 30% for 2 seconds. Attack Speed increased by 100%. Base Attack Damage reduced by 25%.
entries.name: Twin Blades of Fury

undoc.notes: Attack Speed increase stacks additively with other Attack Speed modifiers. Damage penalty stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Varian's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: When you Parry a Hero's Basic Attack, Heroic Strike's cooldown is refreshed and the next one does 40% more damage.
entries.name: Overpower

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Heroic Strike 's damage.
Completing all three quests grants a total of 60 bonus Basic Attack damage. Bonus damage is affected by damage modifiers, including Colossus Smash and Twin Blades of Furys' passive multipliers.

entries.description: Silence a target Hero and force them to attack Varian for 1.25 seconds. Maximum Health and Health Regeneration increased by 40%.
entries.name: Taunt

entries.description: Smash a target enemy, dealing 185 damage and lowering their Armor by 25 for 3 seconds, causing them to take 25% increased damage. Base Attack Damage increased by 100%. Maximum Health reduced by 10%.
entries.name: Colossus Smash

entries.description: Basic Attacks reduce Heroic Strike's cooldown by 9 seconds and increase Varian's Movement Speed by 30% for 2 seconds. Attack Speed increased by 100%. Base Attack Damage reduced by 25%.
entries.name: Twin Blades of Fury

entries.description: Increase Lion Fang's healing from Heroes by 75%.
entries.name: Lionheart

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with healing modifiers that can affect Lion's Fang 's healing output and multiplicatively with modifiers that affect healing received by the target.

entries.description: Basic Attacks heal Varian for 1% of his maximum Health. While below 50% Health, they also heal him for 50% of the damage dealt.
entries.name: Second Wind

undoc.notes: Does not heal from Heroic Strike damage.

entries.description: Every 30 seconds, Varian's next Basic Attack will heal him for 350 Health. When a nearby enemy Minion or Monster dies, this cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds.
entries.name: Victory Rush

undoc.notes: Monster deaths only trigger the cooldown reduction if killed by Varian. Effect will not trigger nor be put on cooldown if the attack misses due to being Blinded or target [[evade

entries.description: Parry now grants Protected, preventing all incoming damage for the duration. Additionally, Parry's cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds, but it loses 1 charge.
entries.name: Shield Wall

undoc.notes: Protected replaces Evasion after taking this Talent.

entries.description: Reduces Charge's cooldown by 8 seconds and Mana cost from 45 to 25. Additionally, Charge can be cast on allied Heroes.
entries.name: Warbringer

undoc.notes: Charging to allied Heroes neither damages nor Slows them.

entries.description: Charge deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to 4% of their maximum Health.
entries.name: Juggernaut

entries.description: Heroes hit by Heroic Strike receive 40% reduced healing for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Mortal Strike

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with modifiers that affect healing received, and multiplicatively with modifiers that affect healing dealt.

entries.description: Activate to throw a sword at a target Hero that deals 50 damage, and up to 1400 bonus damage to their Shields. Basic Attacks against Heroes deal up to 200% bonus Physical Damage to Shields.
entries.name: Shattering Throw

undoc.notes: Passive Basic Attack damage multiplier does not affect Heroic Strike. Passive Shield damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Varian's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Activate to place a Banner that grants 25% increased Movement Speed to nearby allied Heroes. Lasts 12 seconds. Banner Stormwind Aura
entries.name: Banner of Stormwind

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Movement Speed effects, such as Twin Blades of Fury's Movement Speed bonus, unless otherwise specified by the Ability in question.

entries.description: Activate to place a Banner that grants 20 Armor to nearby allied Heroes, reducing damage taken by 20%. Lasts 12 seconds. Banner Ironforge Aura
entries.name: Banner of Ironforge

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Activate to place a Banner that grants 20% increased Spell Power to nearby allied Heroes. Lasts 12 seconds. Banner Dalaran Aura
entries.name: Banner of Dalaran

undoc.notes: Spell Power stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage and healing modifiers affecting target Heroes' Spell Damage or healing output.

entries.description: Being hit by a Hero Basic Attack reduces the cooldown of Taunt by 1 second.
entries.name: Vigilance

entries.description: Colossus Smash affects all enemies near the target, and its cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds.
entries.name: Master at Arms

undoc.notes: Structures can be affected by the splash damage.

entries.description: Twin Blades of Fury increases Heroic Strike damage by an additional 25%, and Basic Attacks increase his Movement Speed by an additional 10%.
entries.name: Frenzy

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Heroic Strike 's damage.

entries.description: Banner now also increases health regeneration and all healing received for nearby allied Heroes by 50%, and the cooldown is reduced by 50%.
entries.name: Glory to the Alliance

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other healing modifiers that affect healing received, and multiplicatively with modifiers that affect healing dealt (such as Banner of Dalaran).

entries.description: Activate to demoralize nearby enemy Heroes, reducing damage they deal by 40% for 5 seconds. Each time an enemy Hero affected by Demoralizing Shout deals damage to a Hero, reduce its cooldown and Parry's cooldown by 5%.
entries.name: Demoralizing Shout

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that affect the target Heroes' damage output.

entries.description: Whitemane's healing Abilities apply for 8 seconds. Allies with are healed for 100% of the damage Whitemane deals to Heroes. Activate to gain 25% Spell Power and lose 15 Armor for 5 seconds. Can be cast while channeling abilities.
entries.name: Zeal

undoc.notes: Healing from Zeal follows Lifesteal rules. Healing is calculated directly from final damage dealt and is unaffected by Spell Power's healing modifying properties. Spell Power stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage and healing modifiers affecting Whitemane's Spell Damage or healing output. Does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.
undoc.type: Defensive damage modifier (active), Offensive damage modifier (active), Healing dealt modifier (active) / Healing (passive)

entries.description: Heal an allied Hero for 140 and gain for 4 seconds. increases Desperate Plea's Mana cost by 40, and stacks up to 3 times. 40. Mana Cost at 3 stacks of 160.
entries.name: Desperate Plea

entries.description: Channel on an enemy Hero for up to 3 seconds, dealing 50 damage every 0.5 seconds and Slowing them by 30%. Removes a stack of . Shares a cooldown with Clemency.
entries.name: Inquisition

undoc.notes: Inquisition can be canceled after 0.5 seconds by reactivating the Ability to end its effect early. The channel is interrupted if the target moves outside the active range. Cooldown begins at the start of channel.

entries.description: After 0.5 seconds, smite enemies in a straight line for 82 damage. If the first strike hits an enemy Hero, a second strike will occur after a short delay.
entries.name: Searing Lash

undoc.notes: The second strike is perpendicular to the first.

entries.description: After 1 second, consecrate an area for 4 seconds, dealing 50 damage every 0.5 seconds to enemies inside. 25% of the damage dealt to Heroes is returned as Mana.
