entries.description: Activate to cast Inquisition on an allied Hero, healing them for up to 329 over 3 seconds while Channeling. Shares a cooldown with Inquisition. Removes a stack of .
entries.name: Clemency

undoc.notes: Clemency can be canceled after 0.5 seconds by reactivating it to end its effect early. Applies Zeal on every tick. The channel is interrupted if the target moves outside the active range. Cooldown begins at the start of channel.

entries.description: For every Hero hit with Searing Lash, lower the cooldown of Inquisition by 1.5 second. Allies below 30% Health receive 25% more healing from Whitemane.
entries.name: Pity the Frail

undoc.notes: Pity the Frail can also affect the damage-based healing from Zeal, stacking additively with it. Bonus healing stacks additively with healing dealt modifiers that affect Whitemane's healing output and multiplicatively with healing received modifiers on the target.

entries.description: Searing Lash deals 25% more damage to enemies. If the second strike hits an enemy Hero, they take an additional 25% damage and Whitemane gains 40% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Righteous Flame

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Searing Lash 's damage.

entries.description: Increase Whitemane's Basic Attack Range by 1.1. Whitemane gains 20% increased Basic Attack damage for each active buff.
entries.name: Unwavering Faith

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Whitemane's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Desperate Plea's healing is increased by 30%. Increase this by an additional 10% for each active .
entries.name: Martyrdom

undoc.notes: Bonus healing stacks additively with healing modifiers that affect Whitemane's healing dealt modifiers and multiplicatively with healing received modifiers on the target.

entries.description: Gain 5% Movement Speed. Increase this by an additional 5% for each active .
entries.name: Indulgence

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with itself, but not with other sources of Movement Speed.

entries.description: Upon reaching 2 stacks of , Whitemane gains .
entries.name: Zealous Spirit

entries.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Searing Lash are marked for 3 seconds. Basic Attacks against them deal an additional 55 Spell Damage and remove the mark.
entries.name: Saintly Greatstaff

undoc.notes: Mark is removed without triggering the Spell Damage bonus, if the Basic Attack misses due to Whitemane being Blinded or the target Evading.

entries.description: Activate to make an ally Unstoppable for 1 second.
entries.name: Intercession

entries.description: Bolster the spirits of nearby allied Heroes, healing them for 300 and granting them 40 Armor for 4 seconds.
entries.name: Scarlet Aegis

entries.description: After 1 second, consecrate an area for 4 seconds, dealing 50 damage every 0.5 seconds to enemies inside. 25% of the damage dealt to Heroes is returned as Mana.
entries.name: Divine Reckoning

entries.description: Inquisition reduces all damage the target deals by 50%.
entries.name: Subjugation

undoc.notes: Damage reduction stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting the target's damage output.

entries.description: If Searing Lash's second strike hits an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown to 1 second.
entries.name: Lashing Out

entries.description: Basic Attacks against Heroes increase the duration of all active s by 0.75 seconds, restore 0.5% Mana to all targets, and lower the cooldown of 's activation by 4 seconds.
entries.name: Scarlet Wrath

entries.description: Reaching 3 stacks of heals for 175 and reapplies to allies with .
entries.name: Radiance

entries.description: Upon casting, Inquisition can chain to an additional enemy Hero near its target, dealing 50 damage every 0.5 seconds. Affected enemies lose 10 Armor.
entries.name: Shared Punishment

undoc.notes: Clemency can also chain to an enemy Hero. Additional target can receive the debuff from Subjugation. Does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Hitting a Hero with Searing Lash while they are being targeted by Inquisition Roots them for 1.5 seconds. Reduce Inquisition's cooldown by 2 seconds.
entries.name: Harsh Discipline

undoc.props: Root If a Hero is hit by both lashes while affected by Inquisition, only the first one applies a Root.

entries.description: Scarlet Aegis heals for 50% more and makes affected allies Unstoppable for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Scarlet Crusade

undoc.notes: Healing bonus stacks additively with other healing dealt modifiers that can affect Scarlet Aegis 's healing.

entries.description: Divine Reckoning deals 50% more damage and pulls enemies to its center the first time it hits them.
entries.name: Judgment Day

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Divine Reckoning 's damage.

entries.description: Activate to cast a permanent on an allied Hero that costs no Mana and doesn't grant . Only one can be active at a time and has a global cast range.
entries.name: Guiding Light

entries.description: Activate to blast an enemy Hero with holy fire, reducing their Armor by 25 and dealing 300 damage over 4 seconds.
entries.name: Purge the Wicked

undoc.notes: The Armor debuff is applied after the first damage tick. Armor reduction is not cleansed by Stasis effects. Does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Nazeebo's Basic Attacks and Abilities poison non-Heroic enemies, causing them to take 66 additional damage over 6 seconds.
entries.name: Voodoo Ritual

undoc.notes: If multiple Nazeebos are on a team, only one Voodoo Ritual can be active on a target. Any Nazeebo can refresh the duration of a Voodoo Ritual placed by other Nazeebos, but only the Nazeebo that last (re)applied it gains the stack. Damage over Time effect does not stack. Subsequent applications refresh the duration.
undoc.type: Spell Damage / Bonus Health, Bonus Mana

entries.description: Hurl a jar of spiders that deals 50 damage. If it hits at least one enemy, create 3 Corpse Spiders that attack for 38 damage. Spiders last for 4 seconds. Corpse Spider
entries.name: Corpse Spiders

undoc.notes: Corpse Spiders are untargetable. Corpse Spiders follow the target until it dies or until they expire. Corpse Spiders' Basic Attacks apply Voodoo Ritual. Corpse Spiders can collide with themselves, Structures and unpathable terrain, but not with other units.

entries.description: After 1 second, create a ring of Zombies surrounding the target area that deal 28 damage and last for 3 seconds. Zombie
entries.name: Zombie Wall

undoc.notes: 1) Approximate distance from center of the ring to the center of the Zombie units. Summons 9 Zombies. Zombies are treated as unpathable terrain. Zombie Wall can be canceled by reactivating the Ability.

entries.description: Create a wave of 3 Toads that explode on contact, dealing 126 damage over 6 seconds. This effect stacks. Stores up to 2 charges.
entries.name: Plague of Toads

undoc.notes: Toads at the edges are aligned 18.4 degrees to both sides from the target point. Each Toad applies 1 stack of DoT to all enemies hit by the explosion. Each enemy can be afflicted by a maximum of 20 stacks of DoT at a time. Stacks of DoT tick independently and subsequent applications do not refresh the duration of existing DoTs. Toads change direction upon coming into contact with unpathable terrain. Toads explode upon reaching maximum range, even if they didn't come in contact with an enemy.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Clamping, Damage over time, Summon figment, Skillshot

entries.description: Summon a Gargantuan to guard an area for 20 seconds. Deals 100 damage when summoned, attacks for 140 damage, and can be ordered to stomp nearby enemies. The Gargantuan's Stomp deals 140 damage and Slows by 30% for 2 seconds. Gargantuan
entries.name: Gargantuan

undoc.notes: Gargantuan Stomp actually does 240 damage, wrong due to a tooltip error. / Cooldown starts when Gargantuan is cast. Gargantuan takes 50% less damage from Forts, Keeps, and Towers (but not Core). This damage reduction stacks multiplicatively with the 50% damage reduction these Structures have to all Summons, so Gargantuan takes 75% less damage from them than other units do.

entries.description: Order the Gargantuan to stomp, dealing 240 damage to nearby enemies and Slowing them by 30% for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Gargantuan Stomp

undoc.notes: Replaces Gargantuan while Gargantuan is alive. Can be activated while Nazeebo is dead. The 0.25 second delay will stop all other commands Gargantuan does (premature cast will stop the Gargantuan's Basic Attack).

entries.description: Channel a Ravenous Spirit that deals 230 damage per second. Cannot move while channeling. Lasts for 8 seconds.
entries.name: Ravenous Spirit

undoc.notes: Ravenous Spirit can be canceled after 1.5 seconds by reactivating the Ability. While channeling, Nazeebo has direct control of Ravenous Spirit's movement. Spirit can travel through unpathable terrain and Structures.

entries.description: Enemies hit by Corpse Spiders' jar are Slowed by 25% for 1 second.
entries.name: Widowmakers

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Corpse Spiders 's damage.

Upon quest completion, alignment of the inner toads is changed to 14 degrees and outer to 26.6 degrees from the target direction. Damage reduction stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers affecting the target Hero.

entries.description: Increase the range of Nazeebo's Basic Abilities by 20%.
entries.name: Thing of the Deep

undoc.notes: Spell Power from Thing of the Deep stacks additively with itself and other modifiers that can affect Nazeebo's Spell Power or healing output.

entries.description: Increases the Health and Mana bonuses from Voodoo Ritual by 100%.

entries.description: If an enemy dies while poisoned by Voodoo Ritual, restore 2% of Nazeebo's maximum Health and Mana. Takedowns grant 3 stacks of Voodoo Ritual.
entries.name: Blood Ritual

entries.description: The number of Corpse Spiders spawned is increased from 3 to 4. If Corpse Spiders' jar hits only one enemy, it creates an additional spider.
entries.name: Spirit of Arachyr

entries.description: Zombie Wall deals 100% more damage. When it expires up to 5 remaining Zombies uproot and attack nearby enemies for 3 seconds. Dead Rush Zombie
entries.name: Dead Rush

undoc.notes: Also activates when Zombie Wall is manually canceled. Stacks additively with other damage modifiers that can affect Zombies' damage.

entries.description: Increase the damage and explosion radius of Plague of Toads by 25% after each hop, up to a maximum of 100%.
entries.name: Toads of Hugeness

undoc.notes: Explosion radius increases in increments of 0.25 up to 1.0 bonus. Damage bonus stack additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Plague of Toads 's damage.

entries.description: Summon a Gargantuan to guard an area for 20 seconds. Deals 100 damage when summoned, attacks for 140 damage, and can be ordered to stomp nearby enemies. The Gargantuan's Stomp deals 140 damage and Slows by 30% for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Gargantuan

undoc.notes: Gargantuan Stomp actually does 240 damage, wrong due to a tooltip error.

entries.description: Channel a Ravenous Spirit that deals 230 damage per second. Cannot move while channeling. Lasts for 8 seconds.
entries.name: Ravenous Spirit

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Plague of Toads grants 30 Armor for 3 seconds, stacking up to 6 seconds.
entries.name: Guardian Toads

undoc.notes: Each enemy hit by the initial explosion applies the effect. Subsequent hits extend the duration by 1.5 seconds each. Does not stack with itself or other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Gain 40 Spell Armor. Heroic Basic Attacks against Nazeebo remove this bonus for 3 seconds and spawn a Corpse Spider to attack the Hero.
entries.name: Superstition

undoc.notes: Bonus is suppressed for 3 seconds even if the Spell Armor wasn't active when the Basic Attack hit. Corpse Spider is only spawned if the Spell Armor buff was active at the time the Basic Attack hit. Corpse Spider spawns by Nazeebo and then chases the target. Does not stack with itself or other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Activate to place yourself in Stasis and gain Invulnerability for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Ice Block

undoc.notes: Can be reactivated to end the effect early.

entries.description: Corpse Spider Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldowns of Nazeebo's Basic Abilities by 0.125 seconds.
entries.name: Spider Colony

entries.description: Zombie Wall lasts 1 second longer, and the center is filled with poison that deals a total of 319 damage over 4 seconds. This damage starts small and increases over the duration.
entries.name: Ring of Poison

undoc.notes: 1) The damage of a tick is the initial damage multiplied by the number of the tick. Damage is not affected by how long the target has been in the AoE.

entries.description: Activate to increase Nazeebo's Health and Spell Power by 7% for each nearby enemy, up to a maximum of 35%. Lasts 15 seconds.
entries.name: Soul Harvest

undoc.notes: All Health gained from this Ability is lost when the 15 seconds expires (this is unlike most similar temporary Health buffs, e.g. Muradin's Avatar and Alexstrasza's Dragonqueen). Spell Power from Soul Harvest stacks additively with itself and other modifiers that can affect Nazeebo's Spell Damage or healing output.

entries.description: Gargantuan Stomp's area is increased by 25% and its Slow amount is increased to 50%. Reduce Gargantuan's cooldown by 40 seconds and its Mana cost by 50%.
entries.name: Humongoid

undoc.notes: Increases Stomp radius by 25%, so its area is actually increased by 56.25%.

entries.description: When Ravenous Spirit damages an enemy Hero, reduce their healing received by 50% for 1 second and increase Ravenous Spirit's damage by 5% for the rest of its duration. Increases the range of Ravenous Spirit by 50%.
entries.name: Annihilating Spirit

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers affecting Ravenous Spirit 's damage. Healing reduction stacks additively with other healing received modifiers.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier / Healing received modifier

entries.description: Consume 5 stacks of Voodoo Ritual to become Unstoppable, gain 20% increased Movement Speed, and 50 Armor for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Bad Medicine

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Getting a Takedown will refresh the cooldown on all of Li-Ming's Abilities.

entries.description: Fire three missiles toward an area, each dealing 147 damage to the first enemy hit. These missiles do 50% damage to Structures.
entries.name: Magic Missiles

undoc.notes: Damage reduction against Structures stacks additively with offensive damage modifiers.

entries.description: Fire an orb that powers up as it travels, dealing 135 damage to the first enemy hit. Damage is increased the farther it travels, up to 270 more damage.
entries.name: Arcane Orb

undoc.notes: Upon hitting a target the Orb explodes, dealing area damage. Units that are immune to skillshots cannot trigger the explosion, but can be damaged by it. Hit detection radius is increased by 0.09 and damage is increased by 16.875 every 0.0625 seconds the orb travels. Arcane Orb 's damage can increase up to 16 times, causing it to reach its maximum damage after travelling for 1.0 second (9.0 range).

entries.description: Teleport a short distance instantly.
entries.name: Teleport

undoc.notes: As a teleport-type Movement Ability, Teleport can disjoint most projectiles.

entries.description: Channel a powerful beam, dealing 480 damage over 2.6 seconds to enemies while they are in it. The direction of the beam changes with your mouse cursor position.
entries.name: Disintegrate

undoc.props: Area of Effect, Clamping, Stationary channel

entries.description: Knock away all enemies from an area and deal 160 damage.

entries.description: When Magic Missiles damages an enemy Hero, gain 50 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability, reducing the damage taken by 50%. Can only gain 1 charge per cast, up to 4 charges maximum. Li Ming's Mana regeneration is increased by 100% while below 35% Mana.
entries.name: Force Armor

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself or other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Teleport costs no Mana. If Li-Ming hasn't taken damage in the last 3 seconds, Teleport's cooldown is decreased by 2 seconds. Casting Teleport causes Li-Ming's next cast of Magic Missiles to deal 10% bonus damage.
entries.name: Aether Walker

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself. Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Magic Missiles 's damage.

entries.description: Regeneration Globes restore 100% more Mana and grant 10% Spell Power for 20 seconds.

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself. Subsequent Globes refresh the duration. Stacks additively with other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage modifiers affecting Li-Ming's Spell Damage.

entries.description: Basic Attacking a target recently hit by a Magic Missile does an extra 87 damage.
entries.name: Charged Blast

undoc.notes: Damage is dealt in a separate instance of Spell Damage.

entries.description: If Arcane Orb hits an enemy Hero after traveling at least 50% of its base range, the cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds and 40 Mana is refunded.

undoc.notes: Distance threshold is unaffected by the range increase from Arcane Orbit.

entries.description: Takedowns restore 30% of Li Ming's missing Health.

entries.description: Teleport does 300 damage to enemy Heroes near your destination.

entries.description: Knock away all enemies from an area and deal 160 damage.

undoc.notes: Based on Li-Ming's maximum Health. This cooldown is not reset by Critical Mass.

entries.description: When Li-Ming uses an Ability, her next Basic Attack's damage is increased by 75% and deals Spell Damage instead of Physical. Stacks up to 3 times.

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other sources of Spell Power as well as other offensive damage modifiers affecting Li-Ming's Spell Damage.

entries.description: Increases Wave of Force's knockback distance by 150% and increases its cast range by 95%.
entries.name: Repulsion

entries.description: Casting Abilities increases the damage of the next Ability by 5%, up to a maximum of 20%. This bonus is reset when the same Ability is used within a chain.
entries.name: Tal Rasha's Elements

undoc.notes: Damage bonus is added and validated after the Ability has been cast. In case the bonus is reset, the Ability that reset the bonus still benefits from the damage increase. Using any Ability twice within a 4 Ability chain resets the bonus. Upon reaching 20% bonus, the next Ability used resets the bonus. Stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect the cast Ability's damage.

entries.description: Activate to enter Archon form, allowing Li-Ming to repeatedly use Disintegrate, but be unable to cast other Abilities.
entries.name: Archon: Pure Power

undoc.notes: Archon form lasts indefinitely once cast and can be disabled by reactivating the Ability. Cooldown starts upon leaving Archon form. Entering Archon form replaces Wave of Force and Disintegrate with Archon's Disintegrate, which has no Mana cost and can be freely toggled on and off. Archon's Disintegrate has a separate cooldown from normal Disintegrate. Li-Ming is unable to mount while in Archon form.

entries.description: Activate to instantly charge Yrel's next Basic Ability at no Mana cost. Divine Purpose's cooldown is reset when Yrel casts a Heroic Ability. Yrel's Basic Abilities charge up over 1.5 seconds, increasing in effectiveness, but reducing Yrel's Movement Speed by 25%.
entries.name: Divine Purpose

undoc.notes: Activating Divine Purpose does not dismount. Yrel channels Abilities indefinitely until they are cast or interrupted. If Yrel is interrupted while channeling a Basic Ability, it goes on full cooldown without firing off.

entries.description: Unleash holy energy around Yrel, dealing 42 damage to nearby enemies and healing her for 96. Charging up this Ability increases its damage up to 140, and healing up to 320.
entries.name: Vindication

entries.description: Swing Yrel's hammer, dealing 38 damage to enemies in front of her and knocking them away. Charging up this Ability increases its knockback distance, and damage up to 125. Enemies hit at maximum charge are Stunned for 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Righteous Hammer

undoc.notes: 1) Swing search is done in three 60 degree areas rotating clockwise over 0.1875 seconds. Enemies can only be hit by the Ability once regardless.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Clamping, Knockback, Mobile channel (charge), Stun

entries.description: Leap to a location, dealing 225 damage to enemies in an area and Slowing them by 50% for 1 second. Charging up this Ability increases its range.
entries.name: Avenging Wrath

undoc.notes: Being Rooted prevents initiating the charge and interrupts the Ability if it is charging, putting it on full cooldown. Leap has a set duration regardless of distance.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Clamping, Mobile channel (charge), Slow, Self-castable
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Crowd control / Movement: Launch

entries.description: Surround Yrel in a barrier for 3 seconds, absorbing all damage taken and healing her for 50% of the damage received.
entries.name: Ardent Defender

undoc.notes: Healing is calculated from final damage taken, after all modifications.

entries.description: Yrel sanctifies the ground around her, gaining 50 Armor until she leaves the area.
entries.name: Sacred Ground

undoc.notes: Cooldown starts when the Ability is cast. Does not stack with itself or other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Increase Vindication's radius by 15%. Hitting an enemy Hero increases Vindication's healing by 45%. If more than one Hero is hit, the bonus is increased by 90%.
entries.name: Light of Karabor

entries.description: Casting a Basic Ability grants Yrel 35 Physical Armor for 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Dauntless

undoc.notes: Requires successfully casting a Basic Ability. Subsequent instances of Dauntless refresh the duration. Does not stack with itself. Does not stack with other Physical Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: After damaging an enemy Hero with a Basic Ability, Yrel's next Basic Attack heals her for 160.
entries.name: Maraad's Insight

undoc.notes: Maraad's Insight does not stack nor generate charges. A Basic Attack at full Health does not consume the healing.

entries.description: Upon landing, Avenging Wrath grants other nearby allied Heroes 40 Armor for 5 seconds.
entries.name: Aegis of Light

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damge modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Divine Purpose heals the lowest Health nearby allied Hero other than Yrel for 275.
entries.name: Gift of the Naaru

entries.description: Grant an allied Hero 30% Movement Speed for 3 seconds and remove all Slows and Roots from them.
entries.name: Hand of Freedom

entries.description: Gain 5% Movement Speed. Yrel is no longer Slowed while channeling Righteous Hammer, and instead this bonus is quadrupled.
entries.name: Righteous Momentum

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Avenging Wrath at maximum charge deals 25% more damage and reduces its cooldown to 1 second.
entries.name: Holy Avenger

entries.description: Mounting is instant and grants 60% Movement Speed that decays over 3 seconds.
entries.name: Divine Steed

entries.description: Surround Yrel in a barrier for 3 seconds, absorbing all damage taken and healing her for 50% of the damage received.
entries.name: Ardent Defender

entries.description: Yrel sanctifies the ground around her, gaining 50 Armor until she leaves the area.
entries.name: Sacred Ground

entries.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Vindication at maximum charge deal 40% less damage for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Aldor Peacekeeper

undoc.notes: Damage reduction stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting the target Heroes' damage output.

entries.description: Increase Avenging Wrath's Slow by 25% and duration by 0.75 seconds.
entries.name: Repentance

entries.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with a Basic Ability at maximum charge grants 10% Spell Power for 10 seconds, up to 30%.
entries.name: Velen's Chosen

undoc.notes: Limited to 1 stack per cast. Subsequent instances of Velen's Chosen refresh the duration. Stacks additively with itself and other sources of Spell Power. Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers or healing dealt modifiers that can affect Yrel's damage or healing output respectively.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier, Healing dealt modifier

entries.description: Righteous Hammer reduces the Armor of enemy Heroes hit by 15 for 4 seconds and deals bonus damage equal to 6% of their maximum Health.
entries.name: Templar's Verdict

undoc.notes: Bonus damage is dealt in a separate instance. Does not stack with other negative Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Casting a Basic Ability reduces the cooldown of Divine Purpose by 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Divine Favor

entries.description: After casting a Basic Ability, Yrel's next Basic Attack splashes for 35% increased damage around the target.
entries.name: Holy Wrath

undoc.notes: Increases Yrel's next Basic Attack's damage by the given amount, which then splashes to nearby enemies for 100% of the (increased) damage. Requires successfully casting a Basic Ability. Holy Wrath does not stack with itself. Damage bonus stacks with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Yrel's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Increase the amount that Yrel heals from damage received from 50% to 75%. Ardent Defender heals nearby allied Heroes for 100% of the healing received by Yrel.
entries.name: Word of Glory

entries.description: Casting Avenging Wrath while inside Sacred Ground moves Sacred Ground to Yrel's location upon landing.
entries.name: Hallowed Ground

entries.description: After 1 second, Yrel becomes Invulnerable and casts Hearthstone. Cannot be canceled.
entries.name: Bubble Hearth

undoc.notes: Interrupting the Ability during its windup puts it on a 10 second cooldown.

entries.description: Activate to become Unstoppable for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Seraphim

entries.description: Lay a Creep Tumor that generates Creep. While on Creep, Zagara moves 20% faster and her summons move 30% faster. Tumors last 240 seconds and reveal the surrounding area while active. Stores up to 3 charges. Creep Tumor
entries.name: Creep Tumor

undoc.notes: Creep grows to its maximum radius over 6 seconds. Creep areas can overlap, but Creep Tumors cannot be placed exactly on top of each other. Creep Tumors become Invisible after 2 seconds of being placed. Damaging Creep Tumors reveals them for 2 seconds. Sight radius increases to 8.5 when the Creep Tumor turns invisible. Creep Tumors are permanently Unstoppable, immune to skillshots and friendly Abilities and do not draw Minion aggro. In the event there are multiple Zagaras in a team, they can fully interact with Creep placed by each other.

entries.description: Launch 2 Banelings that deal 80 damage to the enemies they hit. Stores up to 2 charges.
entries.name: Baneling Barrage

undoc.notes: Banelings explode at the end of their range. Banelings benefit from on-Creep Movement Speed bonus. Enemies that are immune to skillshots can still be hit by the explosion damage.

entries.description: Summon a Hydralisk to attack a single target, dealing 71 damage per second. Lasts 8 seconds. Hydralisk
entries.name: Hunter Killer

entries.description: Bombard target area with a Zerg Drop Pod for 140 damage. The pod spawns 2 Roachlings that deal 30 damage per second and last for 8 seconds. Roachling
entries.name: Infested Drop

entries.description: Summon a Devouring Maw that devours enemies for 4 seconds. Devoured enemies cannot fight and take 94 damage per second.
entries.name: Devouring Maw

undoc.notes: Enemies caught by Devouring Maw are put in hostile Stasis. In addition to usual effects of Stasis, the targets are also Stunned, have no collision, do not receive the expanded debuff removal, and some delayed heals applied beforehand are prevented. Vehicles are completely unaffected by Devouring Maw. Deathwing cannot be devoured, but his pathing can be blocked by Devouring Maw.
undoc.props: Area of Effect, Invulnerable Summon, Stasis (debuff)
undoc.type: Spell Damage, Status effect / Pathing blocker

entries.description: Summon a Nydus Worm on Creep anywhere that Zagara has vision. Zagara can enter a Nydus Worm and travel to any other Nydus Worm by right-clicking near it. While inside a Nydus Worm, Zagara regenerates 10% Health and Mana per second. Stores up to 2 charges. Maximum of 4 Nydus Worms at a time. Creep spreads 15% farther. While on Creep, each Basic Attack reduces all of Zagara's cooldowns by 0.4 seconds. Nydus Worm
entries.name: Nydus Network

undoc.notes: Zagara can cast Nydus Network while inside a Nydus Worm. Other Abilities are disabled. Nydus Worms cannot be placed such that they overlap Structures or unpathable terrain or within 6 radius of an existing Nydus Worm. Placing a fifth Nydus Worm causes the oldest one to be destroyed. After being placed, Nydus Worm spreads Creep around it. This does not expire until the Nydus Worm is destroyed. Nydus worm has collision, is Unstoppable and immune to friendly Abilities and does not draw Minion aggro. Entering the Nydus Worm requires a 1.5 second [[Channeled Ability#Weak Channel
undoc.prop2: Bonus Creep radius / Basic Attack damage

entries.description: Banelings can travel 50% farther before exploding.
entries.name: Volatile Acid

undoc.notes: Actually a 44.4~% increase in range.

entries.description: Reduces the cooldown of Infested Drop by 3 seconds and Roachlings have 30% more Health.
entries.name: Corpse Feeders

entries.description: Nearby Ranged Minions deal an additional 100% damage, plus an additional 1% per 1000 Siege damage Zagara has dealt. Can be toggled on or off.
entries.name: Infest

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect target units' Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Activate to have Zagara's next Basic Attack apply 230 damage over 5 seconds.
entries.name: Envenomed Spines

undoc.props: Attack modifier, Damage over Time, Primed

entries.description: Basic Attacks deal 33% damage to three nearby targets.
entries.name: Medusa Blades

undoc.notes: Additional Basic Attacks target enemies within the sector in front of Zagara. Attacks prioritize enemy units that are closest to Zagara. Additional Basic Attacks do not grand any cooldown reduction from Nydus Network. Damage reduction stacks additively with offensive damage modifiers that can affect Zagara's Basic Attack damage.
Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Zagara's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Gain 2 additional charges of Baneling Barrage, but increase its cooldown by 2 seconds.
entries.name: Baneling Massacre

entries.description: Banelings Slow enemies by 25% for 2.5 seconds.
entries.name: Viscous Acid

entries.description: Summon a Devouring Maw that devours enemies for 4 seconds. Devoured enemies cannot fight and take 94 damage per second.
entries.name: Devouring Maw

entries.description: Summon a Nydus Worm on Creep anywhere that Zagara has vision. Zagara can enter a Nydus Worm and travel to any other Nydus Worm by right-clicking near it. While inside a Nydus Worm, Zagara regenerates 10% Health and Mana per second. Stores up to 2 charges. Maximum of 4 Nydus Worms at a time. Creep spreads 15% farther. While on Creep, each Basic Attack reduces all of Zagara's cooldowns by 0.4 seconds.
entries.name: Nydus Network

entries.description: Zagara is healed for 60% of the damage dealt by Hunter Killers' Basic Attacks to Heroes.
entries.name: Hydralisk Transfusion

entries.description: While on Creep, Zagara gains 20 Armor, taking 20% less damage.
entries.name: Protective Coating

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself or other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Every 30 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 50%. Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
entries.name: Spell Shield

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Spell Armor effects. Other damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: When attacking Heroes, Hunter Killers and Roachlings deal additional damage equal to 1.5% of their maximum Health.
entries.name: Corrosive Saliva

undoc.notes: Damage is dealt in a separate instance.

entries.description: Reduce the cooldown of Hunter Killer by 4 seconds. Hunter Killer now spawns a Mutalisk. Mutalisks have a bounce attack and last for 30 seconds.
entries.name: Mutalisk

undoc.notes: Mutalisk's attacks bounce twice, dealing 50% less damage with each bounce. Bounces are chained and attacks cannot bounce back to the initial target. Bounces cannot target enemies that are not visible or to unaggroed Mercenaries. Bounces prioritize the closest enemy unit to the target. Bounce damage reduction stacks multiplicatively with offensive damage modifiers.

entries.description: While on Creep, Zagara gains 50% more Basic Attack damage and her Attack Range is increased by 1.1.
entries.name: Jagged Barbs

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other damage modifiers that can affect Zagara's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Devouring Maw deals 50% more damage. Takedowns reduce its cooldown by 25 seconds.
entries.name: Tyrant Maw

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Devouring Maw 's damage.

entries.description: The cast range for Creep Tumor is increased by 2000%. Creep Tumors now last 600 seconds. While on Creep, Zagara gains an additional 10% Movement Speed.
entries.name: Endless Creep

undoc.notes: Actually a 1900% increase in cast range.

entries.description: Every 3rd Basic Attack also launches a Baneling towards the target. Gain 20% bonus Attack Speed.
entries.name: Broodmother

undoc.notes: Broodmother Banelings have the same basic properties as the ones launched via Baneling Barrage. Broodmother Banelings benefit from the Viscous Acid Slow and the damage bonus from Volatile Acid but not from Volatile Acid 's range increase.

entries.description: Zagara and her summons deal 20% more damage to enemies attacked by a Hunter Killer in the last 2 seconds.
entries.name: Pack Instinct

undoc.notes: Mutalisk's bouncing attacks do not apply the marker to secondary targets. Only affects Zagara's (and her summons') damage from her Abilities and Basic Attacks. Damage bonus does not stack with itself, but stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Zagara's damage.

entries.description: Each time Zarya's Personal Barrier or Shield Ally absorbs 9 damage, her Energy is increased by 1. Each point of Energy increases Zarya's damage by 2%. After 0.5 seconds, Energy decays by 3 per second. Particle Cannon
entries.name: Energy

undoc.notes: Damage absorbed through Zarya's Shields is only limited by the Shield amount of Personal Barrier and Shield Ally . Talents that increase their Shield amounts thus also increase the maximum possible Energy gained from them. Damage bonus stacks additively with itself and multiplicatively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Zarya's damage output. / Zarya's Basic Attacks Splash to all enemies in a 1.0 x 6.25 rectangle in front of her. Her main target must still be within her attack range. Splash cannot hit more than 4 times per second (even if Zarya's Attack Speed is increased). Splash hits 62.5ms (1 server tick) after the primary target is hit and does not happen if the primary target is killed by that Basic Attack.

entries.description: Launch a particle grenade that deals 80 damage to enemies within the area. Deals 50% damage to Structures. Stores up to 4 charges.
entries.name: Particle Grenade

undoc.notes: Structure damage penalty stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Particle Grenade 's damage.

entries.description: Gain a Shield that absorbs 560 damage for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Personal Barrier

entries.description: Grants an allied Hero a Shield that absorbs 420 damage for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Shield Ally

entries.description: Launch a gravity bomb that detonates after 1 second and draws enemy Heroes toward the center for 2.5 seconds. Affected Heroes take 30 damage a second.
entries.name: Graviton Surge

undoc.notes: Graviton Surge pulls affected Heroes to within 1 radius of its center point and sets their Movement Speed to 0%. Affected Heroes can still attack and use their Abilities. Heroes can get out of Graviton Surge using [[Movement ability

entries.description: Launch a gravity bomb that deals 124 damage and creates an expulsion zone for 3.5 seconds. Enemies who enter the affected area are knocked back and have their Movement Speed reduced by 50% for 1 second.
entries.name: Expulsion Zone

undoc.props: Area of Effect, Clamping, Knockback, Slow

entries.description: For 3 seconds after gaining Shield Ally, every 5.35 damage done by the bearer contributes 1 Energy to Zarya, up to 40 Energy per Shield.
entries.name: Together We Are Strong

entries.description: Zarya's Basic Attack deals 50% additional damage to enemies in melee range. While above 40 Energy, Zarya's Basic Attack size is increased by 35%.
entries.name: Feel the Heat

undoc.notes: Feel the Heat uses its own base damage value, which is 50% higher than the original, causing the given percentage to stack multiplicatively with offensive damage modifiers.

entries.description: Regen Globes now instantly grant 20 Energy.
entries.name: Maximum Charge

entries.description: Personal Barrier absorbs an additional 140 damage. Damage absorbed by Zarya's Shields contributes 20% more Energy.
entries.name: I Am the Strongest

entries.description: Shield Ally increases the allied Hero's Movement Speed by 50% for the duration.
entries.name: Speed Barrier

entries.description: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier and Shield Ally grant 75 Physical Armor against the next 2 Hero Basic Attacks for 6 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%.
entries.name: Defensive Shielding

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself or other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack. If the target has certain Talents which give Block stacks (those Talents being Illidan with Reflexive Block, The Lost Vikings with Olaf the Stout, Muradin with Dwarf Block, Rexxar or Misha with Grizzled Fortitude), the Block stacks will be shared and capped at a maximum of 4. Additionally the duration of all Block stacks from either Talent will all be set to that of the most recently applied Block stacks.

entries.description: Particle Grenade deals 30 more damage and Slows Movement Speed by 25% for 2 seconds to enemies hit by the center of the blast.
entries.name: Pinpoint Accuracy

undoc.notes: Center radius is unaffected by Demolitions Expert bonus.

entries.description: Hitting a Hero with Particle Grenade causes Basic Attacks against them to generate 2 Energy. Lasts 4 seconds.
entries.name: Deep Burn

undoc.notes: If multiple Zaryas are on a team, they can all benefit from Deep Burn applied by another Zarya regardless of if they have the Talent or not.

entries.description: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier explodes, dealing 110 damage to nearby enemies.
entries.name: Explosive Barrier

entries.description: Launch a gravity bomb that detonates after 1 second and draws enemy Heroes toward the center for 2.5 seconds. Affected Heroes take 30 damage a second.
entries.name: Graviton Surge

entries.description: Launch a gravity bomb that deals 124 damage and creates an expulsion zone for 3.5 seconds. Enemies who enter the affected area are knocked back and have their Movement Speed reduced by 50% for 1 second.
entries.name: Expulsion Zone

entries.description: Personal Barrier makes you Unstoppable for up to 2 seconds.
entries.name: Unstoppable Competitor

entries.description: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier grants Zarya 75 Spell Armor for 3 Seconds, reducing the damage taken from Abilities by 75%.
entries.name: Spell Barrier

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Spell Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: While at or above 75 Energy, Zarya gains 20 Armor, reducing all damage taken by 20%.
entries.name: Endurance Training

entries.description: Activate to consume all Energy and gain a Shield that absorbs 0.8% of Zarya's maximum Health per Energy consumed and lasts for 3 seconds. Zarya may only have one personal Shield active on herself at a time.
entries.name: Pain is Temporary

entries.description: Causes Shield Ally to remove all disabling effects and reduces its cooldown by 3 seconds.
entries.name: Cleansing Shield

entries.description: Shield Ally now grants an untalented shield to a nearby ally upon impact.
entries.name: Gain Train

undoc.notes: Prioritizes the closest allied Hero to the primary target of Shield Ally .

entries.description: While at or above 75 Energy, Zarya's cooldowns regenerate 25% faster.
entries.name: Born in Battle

entries.description: Increases Graviton Surge's duration by 1 second and it Silences Heroes caught in its area.
entries.name: Gravity Kills

entries.description: Reduce Expulsion Zone's cooldown by 25 seconds and increase its duration by 1.5 seconds.
entries.name: Clear Out

entries.description: All Particle Grenade charges are returned at once.
entries.name: Grenadier

entries.description: Activate to reset the cooldowns of Personal Barrier and Shield Ally.
entries.name: Unyielding Defender

entries.description: Gain Stealth when out of combat for 3 seconds. Taking damage, attacking, using Abilities, or channeling ends Stealth. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.
entries.name: Permanent Cloak

undoc.notes: Stealth and Invisibility can be gained while mounted.

entries.description: Deal 200 damage to nearby enemies.
entries.name: Cleave

entries.description: Flings a Singularity Spike that sticks to the first enemy hit. Deals 240 damage after 1 second and Slows the enemy by 40% for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Singularity Spike

undoc.notes: Singularity Spike grants vision in 2.7 radius around the target, until it explodes. Singularity Spike is instantly removed, preventing any associated effects from triggering, if the target becomes Invulnerable, or enters Stasis.

entries.description: Teleport to the target location. Using this Ability does not break Stealth.
entries.name: Blink

entries.description: Activate to cast an untalented version of Zeratul's most recently used Basic Ability, dealing 50% less damage. After using an Ability, Zeratul's next Basic Attack within 6 seconds deals 30% more damage.
entries.name: Might Of The Nerazim

undoc.notes: Does not interact with Vorpal Blade in any way. Has all the same properties as the untalented Basic Ability, except its base damage is set to half of the original. Might of the Nerazim does not affect Talented versions of the Ability that involve reactivating the Ability. Attack Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Zeratul's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Slows time in an area to a near standstill, placing allies and enemies in Time Stop for 5 seconds. Zeratul is not affected.
entries.name: Void Prison

undoc.notes: Void Prison can be ended prematurely by reactivating the Ability. Target units that walk into the AoE after the Ability has been cast are also affected.

entries.description: Activate to teleport to Zeratul's last non-Structure Basic Attack target within 3 seconds. The target is Revealed during these 3 seconds.
entries.name: Vorpal Blade

undoc.notes: When teleporting with Vorpal Blade, Zeratul retains the direction he is facing and is placed right next to the target in a position where the target is right in front of him. The mark is consumed immediately upon cast, but the target will still be revealed for its full duration (3 seconds after the last AA).

entries.description: Increases the radius of Cleave by 33%.
entries.name: Greater Cleave

entries.description: Reduce the cooldown of Permanent Cloak by 1 second. Gain 30% Movement Speed while Stealthed.
entries.name: Move Unseen

entries.description: Cleave deals an additional 40% damage over 3 seconds.
entries.name: Rending Cleave

undoc.notes: Rending Cleave benefits from all of Zeratul's talents affecting Cleave. Rending Cleave has independent base damage values, causing the given percentage to stack multiplicatively with offensive damage modifiers.

entries.description: Dealing damage to enemy Heroes increases all damage dealt by 6% for 3 seconds, stacking up to 30%.
entries.name: Psionic Strength

entries.description: Activate to gain 40% bonus Attack Speed for 5 seconds. Gain 20% Attack Speed.
entries.name: Darkness Descends

undoc.notes: Active and passive bonuses stack additively with each other as well as other effects affecting Zeratul's Attack Speed.

entries.description: After 1.25 seconds, reactivate Blink to return to the point where it was cast from, within 4 seconds.
entries.name: Wormhole

entries.description: Singularity Spike takes 50% longer to explode. It can be reactivated to teleport to the target, granting 30% increased Move Speed for 3 seconds.
entries.name: Seeker in the Dark

entries.description: Vorpal Blade gains a 2nd charge. Teleporting with Vorpal Blade or entering Permanent Cloak causes Zeratul's next Basic Attack to deal 50% increased damage.
entries.name: Warp Skirmisher

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Zeratul's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Activate to cast an untalented version of Zeratul's most recently used Basic Ability, dealing 50% less damage. After using an Ability, Zeratul's next Basic Attack within 6 seconds deals 30% more damage.
entries.name: Might of the Nerazim

entries.description: Slows time in an area to a near standstill, placing allies and enemies in Time Stop for 5 seconds. Zeratul is not affected.
entries.name: Void Prison

entries.description: Zeratul gains a Shield equal to 20% of his Maximum Health over 3 seconds while under Permanent Cloak.
entries.name: Shroud of Adun

entries.description: Basic Attacks heal for 35% of the damage dealt.
entries.name: Mending Strikes

entries.description: Every 30 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor against the next Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 50%. Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
entries.name: Spell Shield

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Spell Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Every third consecutive Basic Attack against the same target deals 125% bonus damage.
entries.name: Master Warp-Blade

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with other damage modifiers that can affect Zeratul's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: If Cleave hits more than one enemy Hero, it deals 40% increased damage and its cooldown is reduced by 3 seconds.
entries.name: Void Slash

undoc.notes: Also affects damage over time from Rending Cleave. Stacks additively with other damage modifiers that can affect Cleave 's damage output.

entries.description: Deal 25% increased damage to enemies while they are marked or Slowed by Singularity Spike.
entries.name: Sentenced to Death

undoc.notes: Removing the Slow effect from the target after Singularity Spike has exploded also removes the damage bonus. Stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers affecting Zeratul's damage output.

entries.description: Might of the Nerazim resets the cooldown of all Basic Abilities.
entries.name: Twilight Falls

entries.description: Singularity Spike no longer costs Mana. Basic Attacks against enemies reduce its cooldown by 1.25 seconds, doubled against Heroes.
entries.name: Unwavering Pressure

entries.description: Reduce the cooldown of Vorpal Blade by 10 seconds. Casting Vorpal Blade grants Zeratul a Shield that absorbs 260 damage over 3 seconds.
entries.name: Shadow Stride

undoc.notes: Does not stack with itself. Subsequent applications refresh the Shield amount and duration.

entries.description: Heal for 60% of Spell Damage dealt to Heroes.
entries.name: Shadow Mending

entries.description: Activate to increase Basic Attack damage by 25% but consume 2% maximum Health per attack. Zul'jin attacks 1% faster for every 1% of maximum Health missing. You Want Axe? Lose 3 stacks upon death.
entries.name: Berserker

undoc.notes: Toggling Berserker on or off does not dismount. Self-damage is not lethal. Self-damage consumes Health regardless of the attacks hitting or not. Berserker Attack Speed bonus stacks additively with itself and other effects that affect Attack Speed. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Zul'jin's Basic Attack damage. / Lose 15 Basic Attacks' worth of stacks (3 bonus Attack Damage) upon death. Continues to gain stacks after the second reward is completed.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier, Self-Damage, Status effect / Bonus damage

entries.description: Zul'jin throws an axe forward, dealing 125 damage to the first 2 enemies hit and marking them for 6 seconds. Marked enemies take 50% bonus damage from Zul'jin's next 3 Basic Attacks against them.
entries.name: Grievous Throw

undoc.notes: Basic Attacks which miss due to being Blinded or the target Evading remove charges from the mark. Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Zuljin's Basic Attack damage.

entries.description: Throw 2 axes in a large, circular arc, dealing 112 damage and Slowing affected enemies by 15% per axe for 2 seconds.
entries.name: Twin Cleave

undoc.notes: Enemies can only be hit once per revolution for each axe. Twin Cleave 's axes return and revolve from the initial cast location, regardless of where Zul'jin is. One full rotation takes 1.25 seconds. Slow stacks additively with itself, up to 2 times, but not with other Slows. Slow duration does not stack. Subsequent applications refresh the duration.

entries.description: Zul'jin channels to regenerate 30% of his maximum Health over 4 seconds. Moving while channeling or taking damage will interrupt this effect.
entries.name: Regeneration

undoc.notes: Damage over Time effects applied before cast do not interrupt Regeneration.

entries.description: For the next 4 seconds, Zul'jin is Unkillable, and cannot be reduced to less than 1 Health. Taz'dingo!
entries.name: Taz'dingo!

undoc.notes: Overflowing damage taken is nullified.

entries.description: Zul'jin launches a massive axe into the air that drops on the targeted area, dealing 330 damage plus bonus damage the lower his Health is.
entries.name: Guillotine

undoc.notes: Bonus damage from missing Health is determined when the Ability is activated. Offensive damage modifiers, such as Spell Power bonus from Recklessness, are verified and applied when it impacts. Bonus damage is proportional to the square of Zul'jin's missing Health: bonusDamage% = missingHealth% 2 / 50 Bonus damage is added directly to the base damage and stacks multiplicatively with offensive damage modifiers.

entries.description: Activate to cause Zul'jin to instantly lose 50% of his current Health and heal for that amount over 10 seconds.
entries.name: Amani Rage

entries.description: Grievous Throw now pierces through all enemies hit and restores 15 Mana per Hero hit. Additionally, Grievous Throw's mark is no longer removed by Basic Attacks.
entries.name: Boneslicer

entries.description: While Zul'jin is below 75% Health, he gains 10% Spell Power. While he is below 50% Health, his Basic Attack damage is increased by 10% and Basic Attacks against Heroes grant an additional stack of You Want Axe?.
entries.name: Recklessness

undoc.notes: Attack damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Zul'jin's Basic Attack damage. Spell Power stacks additively with itself and other offensive damage and healing modifiers affecting Zul'jin's Spell Damage or healing output.
undoc.type: Offensive damage modifier, Healing dealt modifier

undoc.notes: Damage bonus stacks additively with other offensive damage modifiers that can affect Zul'jin's damage.

entries.description: Increase Regeneration's healing by 25%. If Regeneration fully finishes, restore 10% of Zul'jin's maximum Mana.
entries.name: Troll's Blood

undoc.notes: Healing bonus directly affects the base value, causing the given percentage to stack multiplicatively with healing dealt modifiers.

entries.description: Activate to remove Roots and Slows. Lower the cooldown and Mana cost of Regeneration by 40%.
entries.name: Voodoo Shuffle

entries.description: Lower Amani Rage's cooldown by 10 seconds and gain 15 Armor while regenerating Health from it.
entries.name: Amani Hide

undoc.notes: Does not stack with other positive Armor effects. Other defensive damage modifiers may stack.

entries.description: Increase the duration of Grievous Throw's mark by 3 seconds and its damage bonus by 45%.
entries.name: Vicious Assault

undoc.notes: Stacks additively with baseline bonus and other offensive damage modifiers.
Each flying axe generates stacks.

entries.description: Increases the Attack Speed bonus of Berserker by 40%.
entries.name: Ferocity

undoc.notes: Increases the Attack Speed gain per 1% of missing Health from 1% to 1.4%.

entries.description: For the next 4 seconds, Zul'jin is Unkillable, and cannot be reduced to less than 1 Health. Taz'dingo!
entries.name: Taz'dingo!

entries.description: Zul'jin launches a massive axe into the air that drops on the targeted area, dealing 330 damage plus bonus damage the lower his Health is.
entries.name: Guillotine

entries.description: Increase the Slow amount of each Twin Cleave axe by 10% and its duration by 0.5 seconds.
entries.name: Lacerate

entries.description: Basic Attack against enemy Heroes grant Zul'jin 6% Movement Speed for 2 seconds, up to 30%.
entries.name: Eye of Zul'jin

undoc.notes: Stack additively with itself, but not with other Movement Speed bonuses.

entries.description: Throw a net forward, Rooting the first enemy Hero hit for 1.5 seconds. If no Heroes are hit, Ensnare's cooldown is reduced to 10 seconds.
entries.name: Ensnare

entries.description: Zul'jin's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes marked with Grievous Throw ignore Armor and deal an additional 2% of maximum Health as damage.
entries.name: No Mercy!

undoc.notes: Ignores only positive Armor effects. Bonus damage is dealt in a separate instance.

entries.description: If an enemy is hit by both Twin Cleave Axes at the same time, they take an additional 100 damage and counts as 5 Hero hits for You Want Axe?.
entries.name: Wrong Place Wrong Time

undoc.notes: Bonus damage may occur in both locations where the two axes meet each other: in the mid-arc as well as in the end of axes' traveling path, i.e. the initial cast location. After completing the You Want Axe? quest, the second revolution also applies this Talent's effects.

entries.description: When Zul'jin kills an enemy, his Attack Speed is increased by 5%, up to 40%, for 12 seconds. Basic Attacks refresh the duration. Hero Takedowns instantly grant 40% Attack Speed.
entries.name: Let the Killing Begin

undoc.notes: Non-Heroes that die within 0.5 seconds of being damaged by Zul'jin grant a stack regardless of who dealt the killing blow. Destroyed Structures do not grant Attack Speed. Stacks additively with itself and other Attack Speed bonuses.

entries.description: Increase Taz'dingo's duration by 1 second. Upon expiring, Zul'jin heals for 50% of the damage he dealt during Taz'dingo.
entries.name: Amani Resilience

entries.description: After impact, Guillotine continues forward, dealing 75% damage to enemies hit. If a Hero is killed by Guillotine, Zul'jin is instantly healed to full.
entries.name: Buzzsaw

undoc.notes: Buzzsaw's damage is based on the increased damage value from the missing Health bonus. The healing is applied if a Hero dies from any cause within 1.5 seconds after being hit by the initial impact of Guillotine or damage from Buzzsaw. Buzzsaw searches for targets every 0.0625 seconds, but enemies cannot be damaged more often than once every 0.5 seconds. Buzzaw 's damage reduction stacks additively with offensive damage modifiers that can affect its damage.

entries.description: Regeneration is no longer Channeled, and cannot be interrupted.
entries.name: Forest Medicine

entries.description: Basic Attacks bounce to a nearby enemy for 50% damage, prioritizing enemy Heroes.
entries.name: A Surprise For Ya

undoc.notes: Target is chosen at random within the bounce range. Does not interact with Grievous Throw mark at all and does not give quest progress for You Want Axe?. The bouncing axe damage is affected by flat bonus damage from You Want Axe? and other offensive damage modifiers affecting Zul'jin's Basic Attack damage, including Recklessness, Headhunter, and the Berserker state Zul'jin was in at the moment the primary Basic Attack was fired. The 50% damage reduction stacks multiplicatively with other damage modifiers. Does not bounce to unaggroed Mercenaries.

source: Heroes of the Storm Wiki Data pages
